nodes.title: Capital markets reprice agent-displaced SaaS by agent-touched API share Q2 2026
nodes.description: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **資本市場はQ2 2026中に「AIエージェントに置換される企業向けSaaS」のバリュエーションをリセットする。** 4月23日のServiceNowの**-18%(史上最悪の単日下落)**、IBMの同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracleの連鎖的な下落は、資本市場が「AIによるコスト削減効果」と「AIによるレガシー・ワークフローSaaSの置換」をどう天秤にかけるかが転換したことを示している。Q2 2026中に、Gartner / Forresterのマジック・クアドラント / ウェーブ・レポートが「Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS」軸を明示し、時価総額の計算式は「シート数 × ARPU」から「エージェントが触れるAPIコールのシェア」へと移行すると予想される。アナリスト・コンセンサスの更新が遅れるため、今後2四半期でさらに3-5社(Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheetなど)が15%以上の下落を見せる可能性が高い。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Los mercados de capitales restablecen su valoración del "SaaS empresarial desplazado por agentes de IA" dentro del Q2 2026.** El **-18% (peor caída en un solo día de la historia)** de ServiceNow el 23 de abril, el declive de IBM el mismo día, y las caídas encadenadas de Salesforce / Workday / Oracle revelan un cambio en cómo los mercados de capitales sopesan el "beneficio de ahorro de costos por IA" frente al "desplazamiento por IA del SaaS de workflow legacy". Dentro del Q2 2026, se espera que los reportes Magic Quadrant / Wave de Gartner / Forrester hagan explícito el eje "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS", y que la matemática de capitalización de mercado pase de "asientos × ARPU" a "cuota de llamadas a API tocadas por agentes". Las actualizaciones rezagadas del consenso de analistas significan que probablemente otros 3-5 nombres (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) verán caídas del 15%+ en los próximos dos trimestres. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Iri-reset ng capital markets ang valuation nila ng "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" sa loob ng Q2 2026.** Ang **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** ng ServiceNow noong Apr 23, ang same-day decline ng IBM, at ang chained falls ng Salesforce / Workday / Oracle ay naghahayag ng pagbabago kung paano tinitimbang ng capital markets ang "AI cost-savings benefit" laban sa "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Sa loob ng Q2 2026, asahan ang Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports na gawing explicit ang "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis, at ang market-cap math na lumipat mula sa "seats × ARPU" papunta sa "share of API calls touched by agents." Ang lagging analyst consensus updates ay nangangahulugan na isa pang 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) ay malamang na makikita ng 15%+ drops sa susunod na dalawang quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **資本市場はQ2 2026中に「AIエージェントに置換される企業向けSaaS」のバリュエーションをリセットする。** 4月23日のServiceNowの**-18%(史上最悪の単日下落)**、IBMの同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracleの連鎖的な下落は、資本市場が「AIによるコスト削減効果」と「AIによるレガシー・ワークフローSaaSの置換」をどう天秤にかけるかが転換したことを示している。Q2 2026中に、Gartner / Forresterのマジック・クアドラント / ウェーブ・レポートが「Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS」軸を明示し、時価総額の計算式は「シート数 × ARPU」から「エージェントが触れるAPIコールのシェア」へと移行すると予想される。アナリスト・コンセンサスの更新が遅れるため、今後2四半期でさらに3-5社(Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheetなど)が15%以上の下落を見せる可能性が高い。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **Los mercados de capitales restablecen su valoración del "SaaS empresarial desplazado por agentes de IA" dentro del Q2 2026.** El **-18% (peor caída en un solo día de la historia)** de ServiceNow el 23 de abril, el declive de IBM el mismo día, y las caídas encadenadas de Salesforce / Workday / Oracle revelan un cambio en cómo los mercados de capitales sopesan el "beneficio de ahorro de costos por IA" frente al "desplazamiento por IA del SaaS de workflow legacy". Dentro del Q2 2026, se espera que los reportes Magic Quadrant / Wave de Gartner / Forrester hagan explícito el eje "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS", y que la matemática de capitalización de mercado pase de "asientos × ARPU" a "cuota de llamadas a API tocadas por agentes". Las actualizaciones rezagadas del consenso de analistas significan que probablemente otros 3-5 nombres (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) verán caídas del 15%+ en los próximos dos trimestres. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.fil: **Iri-reset ng capital markets ang valuation nila ng "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" sa loob ng Q2 2026.** Ang **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** ng ServiceNow noong Apr 23, ang same-day decline ng IBM, at ang chained falls ng Salesforce / Workday / Oracle ay naghahayag ng pagbabago kung paano tinitimbang ng capital markets ang "AI cost-savings benefit" laban sa "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Sa loob ng Q2 2026, asahan ang Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports na gawing explicit ang "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis, at ang market-cap math na lumipat mula sa "seats × ARPU" papunta sa "share of API calls touched by agents." Ang lagging analyst consensus updates ay nangangahulugan na isa pang 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) ay malamang na makikita ng 15%+ drops sa susunod na dalawang quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

plain_language.en: ServiceNow's stock had its worst day ever because investors think AI agents will replace its software. Other workflow SaaS firms are next.
plain_language.ja: ServiceNowの株価が史上最悪の日を迎えたのは、投資家がAIエージェントが同社のソフトウェアを置き換えると考えたからだ。他のワークフローSaaS企業がその次に来る。
plain_language.es: La acción de ServiceNow tuvo su peor día porque los inversores creen que los agentes de IA reemplazarán su software. Otras empresas de SaaS de workflow son las siguientes.
plain_language.fil: Ang stock ng ServiceNow ay nagkaroon ng pinakamasamang araw nito kailanman dahil iniisip ng mga investor na papalitan ng AI agents ang software nito. Sumusunod ang ibang workflow SaaS firms.

summary_short_locales.en: ServiceNow's worst-ever -18% single-day drop on Apr 23, IBM's same-day fall, and chained Salesforce / Workday / Oracle declines mark a capital-markets reset on AI-agent displacement of legacy SaaS. Inside Q2 2026, Gartner / Forrester are expected to make the Agent-native vs Legacy axis explicit and 3-5 more names likely see 15%+ drops.
summary_short_locales.ja: 4月23日のServiceNowの史上最悪-18%単日下落、IBMの同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracleの連鎖下落は、AIエージェントによるレガシーSaaS置換に対する資本市場のリセットを示している。Q2 2026中に、Gartner / ForresterがAgent-native vs Legacy軸を明示化し、さらに3-5社が15%以上の下落を見せる可能性が高い。

Dentro del Q2 2026, se espera que Gartner / Forrester hagan explícito el eje Agent-native vs Legacy y que probablemente 3-5 nombres más vean caídas del 15%+.

Sa loob ng Q2 2026, ang Gartner / Forrester ay inaasahang gagawing explicit ang Agent-native vs Legacy axis at 3-5 pang names ang malamang makakaranas ng 15%+ drops.

bridges.text: Today's Anthropic 10-agent finance launch directly displaces analyst, research, AML, and KYC functions historically owned by FactSet, Bloomberg, and vertical compliance SaaS — Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital named as adopters and Moody's MCP delivering credit ratings on 600M+ companies natively into Claude advance the consequence the dormant prediction names.

text_locales.en: Today's Anthropic 10-agent finance launch directly displaces analyst, research, AML, and KYC functions historically owned by FactSet, Bloomberg, and vertical compliance SaaS — Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital named as adopters and Moody's MCP delivering credit ratings on 600M+ companies natively into Claude advance the consequence the dormant prediction names.
text_locales.ja: 本日のAnthropicによる10エージェント金融ローンチは、FactSet、Bloomberg、垂直コンプライアンスSaaSが歴史的に所有してきたアナリスト、リサーチ、AML、KYC機能を直接置換する — Citadel、BNY、Carlyle、Mizuho、Travelers、Walleye Capitalが採用顧客として命名され、Moody's MCPが600M+ 企業の信用格付けをClaudeにネイティブに提供することは、ドーマント予測が指摘する帰結を前進させる。
text_locales.es: El lanzamiento de hoy de 10 agentes financieros de Anthropic desplaza directamente las funciones de analista, investigación, AML y KYC históricamente propiedad de FactSet, Bloomberg y SaaS de cumplimiento vertical — con Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital nombrados como adoptantes y MCP de Moody's entregando calificaciones crediticias sobre 600M+ empresas nativamente en Claude avanzan la consecuencia que la predicción dormante nombra.
text_locales.fil: Ang Anthropic 10-agent finance launch ngayon ay direktang nagdi-displace ng analyst, research, AML, at KYC functions na historically pag-aari ng FactSet, Bloomberg, at vertical compliance SaaS — Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital ang pinangalanan bilang adopters at ang Moody's MCP na naghahatid ng credit ratings sa 600M+ companies nang native sa Claude ay nagpapasulong sa consequence na pinangalanan ng dormant prediction.

bridges.text: The May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV launches articulate agent-led workflow redesign as the explicit go-to-market vector, advancing the consequence the prediction names: the buyside is now being asked to fund the agent-displaces-SaaS thesis as a structured-equity vehicle rather than as a multiple-compression play on incumbent SaaS.

text_locales.en: The May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV launches articulate agent-led workflow redesign as the explicit go-to-market vector, advancing the consequence the prediction names: the buyside is now being asked to fund the agent-displaces-SaaS thesis as a structured-equity vehicle rather than as a multiple-compression play on incumbent SaaS.
text_locales.ja: 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JVローンチが、エージェント主導のワークフロー再設計を明示的なGTMベクターとして表現し、予測が指摘する帰結を前進させる: バイサイドは現在、既存SaaSへのマルチプル圧縮プレイとしてではなく、構造化エクイティ・ビークルとしてエージェントがSaaSを置換するテーゼの資金供給を求められている。
text_locales.es: Los lanzamientos paralelos de JV del 4 de mayo de Anthropic + OpenAI articulan el rediseño de flujos de trabajo dirigido por agentes como el vector explícito de go-to-market, avanzando la consecuencia que la predicción nombra: ahora se le pide al lado comprador financiar la tesis de agente-desplaza-SaaS como un vehículo de capital estructurado en lugar de como una jugada de compresión múltiple sobre el SaaS incumbente.
text_locales.fil: Ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV launches ay nag-aartikulo ng agent-led workflow redesign bilang explicit go-to-market vector, na sumusulong sa consequence na pinangalanan ng prediction: hinihingi sa buyside na pondohan ang agent-displaces-SaaS thesis bilang structured-equity vehicle sa halip na multiple-compression play sa incumbent SaaS.

bridges.text: The April monthly tape closed as the strongest month since 2020 and the Apr 30 record-S&P close ratifies the macro frame, but the specific agent-displaced-SaaS leg the prediction calls for has not yet shown the next 15%+ Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet drop. The buyside-pressure backdrop is in place; the SaaS-specific revaluation print is not.

text_locales.en: The April monthly tape closed as the strongest month since 2020 and the Apr 30 record-S&P close ratifies the macro frame, but the specific agent-displaced-SaaS leg the prediction calls for has not yet shown the next 15%+ Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet drop. The buyside-pressure backdrop is in place; the SaaS-specific revaluation print is not.
text_locales.ja: 4月の月次テープは2020年以来最強の月として終了し、4月30日の記録的なS&P終値はマクロフレームを承認するが、予測が要求するエージェント置換型SaaSの具体的な脚はまだ次の15%超のWorkday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet下落を示していない。買い手側圧力の背景は整っているが、SaaS固有の再評価プリントは未達。
text_locales.es: El tape mensual de abril cerró como el mes más fuerte desde 2020 y el cierre récord del S&P del 30 abr ratifica el frame macro, pero el leg específico de SaaS-desplazado-por-agentes que la predicción exige aún no ha mostrado la próxima caída del 15%+ en Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet. El telón de fondo de presión buyside está en su lugar; el print específico de revaluación de SaaS no.
text_locales.fil: Ang April monthly tape ay nagsara bilang pinakamatibay na buwan mula 2020 at ang Apr 30 record-S&P close ay nagpa-ratify sa macro frame, ngunit ang specific agent-displaced-SaaS leg na hinihingi ng prediction ay hindi pa nagpapakita ng susunod na 15%+ Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet drop. Ang buyside-pressure backdrop ay nasa lugar; ang SaaS-specific revaluation print ay wala pa.

El frame macro que la predicción necesita (tape de capex bajo presión) está en su sitio; la pata específica de SaaS desplazado por agentes aún no ha mostrado la próxima caída de 15%+.

Ang macro frame na kailangan ng prediction (capex tape sa ilalim ng presyon) ay nakalagay; ang specific agent-displaced-SaaS leg ay hindi pa nagpapakita ng susunod na 15%+ drop.

bridges.text: Apr 28's tape shift from rewarding capex on faith to demanding tangible AI economics, with Oracle / AMD / Broadcom / SoftBank dropping on the WSJ revenue-miss report, sharpens the structural force the prediction names: capital markets are now actively reweighting AI-economics-vs-narrative. The next-leg names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet) have not moved sharply today.

text_locales.en: Apr 28's tape shift from rewarding capex on faith to demanding tangible AI economics, with Oracle / AMD / Broadcom / SoftBank dropping on the WSJ revenue-miss report, sharpens the structural force the prediction names: capital markets are now actively reweighting AI-economics-vs-narrative. The next-leg names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet) have not moved sharply today.
text_locales.ja: 4月28日のテープが、信頼に基づくcapex報酬から具体的なAI経済性要求へとシフトし、Oracle / AMD / Broadcom / SoftBankがWSJ収益ミス・レポートで下落することで、予測が指摘する構造的な力を鋭利化させている: 資本市場は今や積極的にAI経済性 vs ナラティブを再加重している。次のレッグの銘柄(Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet)は本日大きく動いていない。
text_locales.es: El cambio de cinta del 28 de abril de premiar capex por fe a exigir economia tangible de IA, con Oracle / AMD / Broadcom / SoftBank cayendo en el reporte WSJ del fallo-de-ingresos, agudiza la fuerza estructural que la prediccion nombra: los mercados de capital ahora estan reponderando activamente AI-economics-vs-narrative. Los nombres de la siguiente pierna (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet) no se han movido bruscamente hoy.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apr 28 tape shift mula sa pag-reward sa capex sa pananampalataya patungo sa paghingi ng tangible AI economics, kasama ang Oracle / AMD / Broadcom / SoftBank na bumababa sa WSJ revenue-miss report, ay nagpapatalas sa structural force na pinapangalanan ng hula: ang capital markets ay ngayon aktibong nag-re-reweighting ng AI-economics-vs-narrative. Ang next-leg names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet) ay hindi gumalaw nang matindi ngayon.

text_locales.es: El cierre del 24 de abril de Motley Fool fijando a NVIDIA en $5.12T más la impresión +24% mejor-desde-1987 de Intel y AMD MTD +45% / iShares Semiconductor ETF +40.4% de IndexBox materializan la re-calificación de capital alrededor de la infraestructura de IA que ancla el eje de desplazamiento de agente que la predicción proyecta en el mismo ciclo de ganancias.
text_locales.fil: Ang Motley Fool's Apr 24 close na nagpa-pin sa NVIDIA sa $5.12T plus ang Intel's +24% best-since-1987 print at ang IndexBox's AMD MTD +45% / iShares Semiconductor ETF +40.4% ay nagma-materialize sa capital re-rating sa paligid ng AI infrastructure na nag-aanchor sa agent-displacement axis na pinagpapalagay ng prediction sa parehong earnings cycle.

text_locales.en: The 24/7 Wall St contrast between Salesforce's FY2026 $41.5B revenue with Agentforce ARR $800M and 29,000 deals (+50% QoQ) and ServiceNow's prior worst-ever -18% drop sharpens the Agent-native vs Legacy split as accelerate-vs-decline, materializing the displacement axis the prediction projects in the same earnings cycle.
text_locales.ja: 24/7 Wall StのSalesforceのFY2026 $41.5B収益とAgentforce ARR $800Mおよび29,000件取引(+50% QoQ)対ServiceNowの直前の史上最悪-18%下落の対比が、Agent-native対Legacyの分割を加速対衰退としてシャープにし、同じ決算サイクルで予測が想定する置換軸を物質化する。
text_locales.es: El contraste de 24/7 Wall St entre los ingresos FY2026 de $41.5B de Salesforce con Agentforce ARR $800M y 29,000 acuerdos (+50% QoQ) y la peor caída de la historia de -18% previa de ServiceNow agudiza la división Agent-native vs Legacy como acelerar-vs-declinar, materializando el eje de desplazamiento que la predicción proyecta en el mismo ciclo de ganancias.
text_locales.fil: Ang kontraste ng 24/7 Wall St sa pagitan ng FY2026 $41.5B revenue ng Salesforce na may Agentforce ARR $800M at 29,000 deals (+50% QoQ) at ng naunang worst-ever -18% drop ng ServiceNow ay nagpapatatag sa Agent-native vs Legacy split bilang accelerate-vs-decline, na nagpapamateryalisa sa displacement axis na inaasahan ng prediction sa parehong earnings cycle.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **資本市場はQ2 2026中に「AIエージェントに置換される企業向けSaaS」のバリュエーションをリセットする。** 4月23日のServiceNowの**-18%(史上最悪の単日下落)**、IBMの同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracleの連鎖的な下落は、資本市場が「AIによるコスト削減効果」と「AIによるレガシー・ワークフローSaaSの置換」をどう天秤にかけるかが転換したことを示している。Q2 2026中に、Gartner / Forresterのマジック・クアドラント / ウェーブ・レポートが「Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS」軸を明示し、時価総額の計算式は「シート数 × ARPU」から「エージェントが触れるAPIコールのシェア」へと移行すると予想される。アナリスト・コンセンサスの更新が遅れるため、今後2四半期でさらに3-5社(Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheetなど)が15%以上の下落を見せる可能性が高い。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Los mercados de capitales restablecen su valoración del "SaaS empresarial desplazado por agentes de IA" dentro del Q2 2026.** El **-18% (peor caída en un solo día de la historia)** de ServiceNow el 23 de abril, el declive de IBM el mismo día, y las caídas encadenadas de Salesforce / Workday / Oracle revelan un cambio en cómo los mercados de capitales sopesan el "beneficio de ahorro de costos por IA" frente al "desplazamiento por IA del SaaS de workflow legacy". Dentro del Q2 2026, se espera que los reportes Magic Quadrant / Wave de Gartner / Forrester hagan explícito el eje "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS", y que la matemática de capitalización de mercado pase de "asientos × ARPU" a "cuota de llamadas a API tocadas por agentes". Las actualizaciones rezagadas del consenso de analistas significan que probablemente otros 3-5 nombres (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) verán caídas del 15%+ en los próximos dos trimestres. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Iri-reset ng capital markets ang valuation nila ng "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" sa loob ng Q2 2026.** Ang **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** ng ServiceNow noong Apr 23, ang same-day decline ng IBM, at ang chained falls ng Salesforce / Workday / Oracle ay naghahayag ng pagbabago kung paano tinitimbang ng capital markets ang "AI cost-savings benefit" laban sa "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Sa loob ng Q2 2026, asahan ang Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports na gawing explicit ang "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis, at ang market-cap math na lumipat mula sa "seats × ARPU" papunta sa "share of API calls touched by agents." Ang lagging analyst consensus updates ay nangangahulugan na isa pang 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) ay malamang na makikita ng 15%+ drops sa susunod na dalawang quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Microsoft Agent 365 GA forces Big-3 to ship default MCP policy by Q4 2026
nodes.short_label: Microsoft Agent 365 GA forces Big-3 to ship default MCP policy by Q4 2026
nodes.title: Microsoft Agent 365 GA forces Big-3 to ship default MCP policy by Q4 2026
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q4までに、Microsoft Agent 365 GA($15/ユーザー、M365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClawオープンソース(3月23日)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4月29日)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4月28日)のスタックが収束し、エンタープライズ・エージェント制御プレーンの参照モデルとなる — Big-3ハイパースケーラー(AWS、Azure、GCP)のうち少なくとも2社が、テナントレベルでのポリシーベースMCPサーバーallow/block強制を、ツール呼び出しログの監査付きで、デフォルトオンのプリミティブとして実装する;少なくとも1つの独立した制御プレーンベンダー(Vanta、Zenity、OpenClawAI)がSec-Labelsスタイルのアーティファクト証明ゲートを公開する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達:Microsoftはエージェント制御プレーン分野に1ユーザーあたりの価格タグ($15/ユーザー/月)を付け、AWSとGoogleが同等の開示で対応せざるを得ない価格アンカーを設定した;4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK + 7社のサンドボックスプロバイダーがランタイム側を事前に固め、5月1日のGAがポリシー側を既存のM365管理サーフェス(Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender)に接続した。5月1日GAのDefenderアセットコンテキストマッピング(エージェントごとのデバイス + MCPサーバー + ID + クラウドリソース)が2026年6月に出荷されると、それが事実上のスキーマとなる;最も抵抗の少ない経路は、AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent GardenがM365インストールベースのアンカーを失わないようQ4前に並行スキーマを公開することだ。CSAIのMITRE-CNAケイデンスが開示側を並行して圧縮する。In plain language: MicrosoftがAIエージェント制御に価格を付けた — 他のクラウドはコピーするか顧客を失う。In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q4 2026, la pila formada por la GA de Microsoft Agent 365 ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 mar) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 abr) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 abr) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control para agentes empresariales — al menos 2 de los 3 grandes hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzarán la aplicación de políticas de permitir/bloquear servidores MCP a nivel de inquilino con registros auditados de invocación de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publicará una puerta de atestación de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** La función forzante es la contratación empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categoría de plano de control de agentes, lo que establece el ancla de precios al que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abr + 7 proveedores de sandbox prepararon el lado del runtime, y la GA del 1 mayo conecta el lado de las políticas con una superficie administrativa M365 existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Una vez que el mapeo de contexto-de-activos de Defender de la GA del 1 mayo (dispositivos + servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud por agente) se lance en junio 2026, se convierte en el esquema de facto; la ruta de menor resistencia es que AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden publiquen esquemas paralelos antes del Q4 para evitar perder el ancla de la base instalada de M365. La cadencia MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprimirá el lado de la divulgación en paralelo. En lenguaje claro: Microsoft ha puesto una etiqueta de precio al control de los agentes de IA — otras nubes copiarán o perderán clientes. En lenguaje claro: En lenguaje claro:
description.fil: **Sa Q4 2026 ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — hindi bababa sa 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay magpapadala ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; hindi bababa sa isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalathala ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kalalagay lang ng Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagtatakda ng pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ay nag-pre-bake na sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ang nagwi-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Sa sandaling magpadala sa Hunyo 2026 ang Defender asset-context mapping ng May 1 GA (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources kada agent), ito ay magiging de-facto schema; ang pinakamadaling daan ay para sa AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden na maglathala ng parallel schemas bago Q4 upang hindi mawalan sa M365-installed-base anchor. Ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence ay magpapasinop ng disclosure side parallel.

Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. reasoning.plain_language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents at work. Soon Amazon and Google clouds will copy that control, or customers will leave.

because.fil: Nagtakda ang Microsoft Agent 365 GA noong May 1 ng $15/user price tag sa tenant-level MCP-server allow/block enforcement.

given.en: OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side and CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence compresses disclosure timing.
given.ja: OpenAI Agents SDK + 7社のサンドボックスプロバイダーがランタイム側を事前に固め、CSAIのMITRE-CNAケイデンスが開示タイミングを圧縮している。
given.es: El OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 proveedores de sandbox prepararon el lado del runtime y la cadencia MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprime los tiempos de divulgación.
given.fil: Ang OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ay nag-pre-bake sa runtime side at ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence ay nagpapasinop ng disclosure timing.

so_that.en: AWS Bedrock AgentCore and Google Vertex publish parallel default-on MCP allow/block schemas with audited tool-invocation logs.
so_that.ja: AWS Bedrock AgentCoreとGoogle Vertexが、ツール呼び出しログの監査付きで、デフォルトオンのMCP allow/blockスキーマを並行して公開する。
so_that.es: AWS Bedrock AgentCore y Google Vertex publican esquemas paralelos de permitir/bloquear MCP activados por defecto con registros auditados de invocación de herramientas.
so_that.fil: Ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore at Google Vertex ay maglalathala ng parallel default-on MCP allow/block schemas na may audited tool-invocation logs.

landing.en: by Q4 2026; ≥2 Big-3 default-on + ≥1 independent attestation gate.
landing.ja: 2026年Q4までに;Big-3のうち2社以上がデフォルトオン + 独立した証明ゲートが1社以上。
landing.es: para el Q4 2026; ≥2 de los 3 grandes con default-on + ≥1 puerta de atestación independiente.
landing.fil: pagsapit ng Q4 2026; ≥2 Big-3 default-on + ≥1 independent attestation gate.

plain_language.en: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents at work. Soon Amazon and Google clouds will copy that control, or customers will leave.
plain_language.ja: Microsoftは職場でのAIエージェント制御に価格を付けた。間もなくAmazonとGoogleのクラウドはこの制御をコピーするか、さもなければ顧客が離れていく。
plain_language.es: Microsoft ha puesto una etiqueta de precio al control de los agentes de IA en el trabajo. Pronto las nubes de Amazon y Google copiarán ese control, o los clientes se irán.
plain_language.fil: Naglagay ng presyo ang Microsoft sa pagkontrol ng AI agents sa trabaho. Malapit nang kopyahin iyon ng Amazon at Google clouds, o aalis ang mga kustomer.

title_locales.en: Microsoft Agent 365 GA forces Big-3 to ship default MCP policy by Q4 2026
title_locales.ja: Microsoft Agent 365のGAにより、Big-3が2026 Q4までにデフォルトのMCPポリシーを実装
title_locales.es: El GA de Microsoft Agent 365 obligará a los Big-3 a lanzar una política MCP por defecto antes del Q4 2026
title_locales.fil: Pinipilit ng GA ng Microsoft Agent 365 ang Big-3 na maglabas ng default MCP policy pagsapit ng Q4 2026

detail.summary_short: Microsoft Agent 365's May 1 GA at $15/user wires MCP-server allow/block enforcement to an existing M365 admin surface and sets the pricing anchor for AWS Bedrock AgentCore and Google Vertex. Combined with CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence and the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK runtime substrate, ≥2 of the Big-3 ship default-on tenant-level enforcement with audited tool-invocation logs by Q4 2026, plus ≥1 independent attestation-gate vendor.

summary_short_locales.en: Microsoft Agent 365's May 1 GA at $15/user wires MCP-server allow/block enforcement to an existing M365 admin surface and sets the pricing anchor for AWS Bedrock AgentCore and Google Vertex. Combined with CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence and the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK runtime substrate, ≥2 of the Big-3 ship default-on tenant-level enforcement with audited tool-invocation logs by Q4 2026, plus ≥1 independent attestation-gate vendor.
summary_short_locales.ja: Microsoft Agent 365の5月1日GA($15/ユーザー)が、MCPサーバーallow/block強制を既存のM365管理サーフェスに接続し、AWS Bedrock AgentCoreとGoogle Vertexの価格アンカーを設定した。CSAIのMITRE-CNAケイデンスと4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDKランタイム基盤と組み合わさり、2026年Q4までにBig-3のうち2社以上がツール呼び出しログ監査付きのデフォルトオン・テナントレベル強制を出荷し、1社以上の独立した証明ゲートベンダーも加わる。
summary_short_locales.es: La GA del 1 mayo de Microsoft Agent 365 a $15/usuario conecta la aplicación de permitir/bloquear servidores MCP a una superficie administrativa M365 existente y fija el ancla de precios para AWS Bedrock AgentCore y Google Vertex. Combinado con la cadencia MITRE-CNA de CSAI y el sustrato de runtime del OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abr, ≥2 de los 3 grandes lanzarán la aplicación a nivel de inquilino activada por defecto con registros auditados de invocación de herramientas para el Q4 2026, más ≥1 proveedor independiente de puerta de atestación.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang May 1 GA ng Microsoft Agent 365 sa $15/user ay nagwi-wire ng MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa existing M365 admin surface at nagtatakda ng pricing anchor para sa AWS Bedrock AgentCore at Google Vertex. Kasama ng CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence at ng Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK runtime substrate, ≥2 sa Big-3 ay magpapadala ng default-on tenant-level enforcement na may audited tool-invocation logs pagsapit ng Q4 2026, kasama ng ≥1 independent attestation-gate vendor.

bridges.text: Cisco's May 4 ~$400M Astrix Security deal converts non-human-identity governance into an explicit M&A-tier primitive alongside Microsoft Agent 365's $15/user/mo SKU, with three-vendor convergence (Cisco + Microsoft + Astrix) on agent-identity-as-first-pillar Zero Trust visible in one week — the comparable AWS and Google now have to respond to.

text_locales.en: Cisco's May 4 ~$400M Astrix Security deal converts non-human-identity governance into an explicit M&A-tier primitive alongside Microsoft Agent 365's $15/user/mo SKU, with three-vendor convergence (Cisco + Microsoft + Astrix) on agent-identity-as-first-pillar Zero Trust visible in one week — the comparable AWS and Google now have to respond to.
text_locales.ja: Ciscoの5月4日 約 $400M でのAstrix Security取引は、Microsoft Agent 365の $15/ユーザー/月 SKUと並んで、非人間アイデンティティ・ガバナンスを明示的なM&A階層プリミティブへと変換し、エージェント・アイデンティティをファースト・ピラーとするゼロトラストへの三社収斂(Cisco + Microsoft + Astrix)が1週間以内に目に見える — 同等のAWSとGoogleは現在対応せざるを得ない。
text_locales.es: El acuerdo Astrix Security de Cisco del 4 de mayo por ~$400M convierte la gobernanza de identidad no humana en una primitiva explícita de nivel M&A junto con el SKU de $15/usuario/mes de Microsoft Agent 365, con la convergencia de tres proveedores (Cisco + Microsoft + Astrix) sobre Zero Trust de identidad-agente-como-primer-pilar visible en una semana — el comparable al que AWS y Google ahora deben responder.
text_locales.fil: Ang May 4 ~$400M Astrix Security deal ng Cisco ay nagko-convert sa non-human-identity governance bilang explicit M&A-tier primitive kasama ang $15/user/mo SKU ng Microsoft Agent 365, na may three-vendor convergence (Cisco + Microsoft + Astrix) sa agent-identity-as-first-pillar Zero Trust na nakikita sa loob ng isang linggo — ang comparable na dapat ngayong tugunan ng AWS at Google.

bridges.text: Microsoft Agent 365's $15/user/mo pricing anchor plus Cisco DefenseClaw open-source plus CSA's first-pillar framing harden the structural force the prediction names: the per-user pricing for the agent-control-plane category sets the comparable that AWS + Google must respond to with their own policy-based MCP-server enforcement schemas.

text_locales.en: Microsoft Agent 365's $15/user/mo pricing anchor plus Cisco DefenseClaw open-source plus CSA's first-pillar framing harden the structural force the prediction names: the per-user pricing for the agent-control-plane category sets the comparable that AWS + Google must respond to with their own policy-based MCP-server enforcement schemas.
text_locales.ja: Microsoft Agent 365の$15/ユーザー/月価格アンカー + Cisco DefenseClawオープンソース + CSAの第一の柱フレーミングが予測が指摘する構造的な強制力を硬化させる: エージェント・コントロールプレーン・カテゴリの単価が、AWS + Googleが独自のポリシーベースMCPサーバー強制スキーマで応答しなければならない比較対象を設定する。
text_locales.es: El ancla de precio de $15/usuario/mes de Microsoft Agent 365 más el open-source Cisco DefenseClaw más el framing del primer pilar de CSA endurecen la fuerza estructural que la predicción nombra: el precio por usuario para la categoría de plano-de-control-agente establece el comparable al que AWS + Google deben responder con sus propios esquemas de aplicación basados en políticas para servidor MCP.
text_locales.fil: Ang $15/user/mo pricing anchor ng Microsoft Agent 365 plus Cisco DefenseClaw open-source plus ang CSA's first-pillar framing ay nagpapatigas sa structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction: ang per-user pricing para sa agent-control-plane category ay nagtatakda ng comparable na dapat tugunan ng AWS + Google sa kanilang sariling policy-based MCP-server enforcement schemas.

bridges.text: Microsoft Agent 365 GA at $15/user/mo with allow/block tools management plus Registry Sync with Bedrock and Vertex plus Defender per-agent asset mapping compose the pricing-anchor and policy primitive the prediction's enterprise-procurement forcing function depends on. The cross-cloud preview makes parallel AWS and Google publication a near-term competitive necessity.

text_locales.en: Microsoft Agent 365 GA at $15/user/mo with allow/block tools management plus Registry Sync with Bedrock and Vertex plus Defender per-agent asset mapping compose the pricing-anchor and policy primitive the prediction's enterprise-procurement forcing function depends on. The cross-cloud preview makes parallel AWS and Google publication a near-term competitive necessity.
text_locales.ja: Microsoft Agent 365 GAが$15/user/moで許可/ブロックツール管理、BedrockとVertexとのレジストリ同期、Defenderのエージェント別資産マッピングが、予測のエンタープライズ調達強制力が依存する価格錨点とポリシープリミティブを構成する。クラウド横断プレビューが並行するAWSおよびGoogleの公表を近期競争上の必然性にする。
text_locales.es: La GA de Microsoft Agent 365 a $15/usuario/mes con gestión de herramientas allow/block más Registry Sync con Bedrock y Vertex más Defender con mapeo de activos por agente componen la primitiva de anclaje de precios y política de la que depende la función forzante de contratación empresarial de la predicción. El preview multi-nube hace que la publicación paralela de AWS y Google sea una necesidad competitiva a corto plazo.
text_locales.fil: Ang Microsoft Agent 365 GA sa $15/user/mo na may allow/block tools management plus Registry Sync sa Bedrock at Vertex plus Defender per-agent asset mapping ay bumubuo ng pricing-anchor at policy primitive na inaasahan ng enterprise-procurement forcing function ng prediction. Ginagawang malapit-na-malapit na competitive necessity ng cross-cloud preview ang parallel AWS at Google publication.

needs.actor: independent agent-control-plane vendor product lead at Vanta / Zenity / OpenClawAI
needs.job: Publish a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate that authenticates MCP-server provenance independent of any single hyperscaler's allow/block list.
needs.outcome: Vendor GA release notes announcing a publish-time + invocation-time attestation gate plus a customer-facing sign-off dashboard for procurement audits.
needs.motivation: Cross-cloud enterprises need a third-party attestation layer because hyperscaler allow-lists alone do not survive a multi-cloud audit, and CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence creates reporting cover for the third-party gate.

motivation_locales.en: Cross-cloud enterprises need a third-party attestation layer because hyperscaler allow-lists alone do not survive a multi-cloud audit, and CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence creates reporting cover for the third-party gate.
motivation_locales.ja: クロスクラウドのエンタープライズは、ハイパースケーラーのallow-listだけではマルチクラウド監査を生き残れないため、サードパーティの証明レイヤーが必要であり、CSAIのMITRE-CNAケイデンスがサードパーティゲートに対するレポートカバーを生み出す。
motivation_locales.es: Las empresas multi-cloud necesitan una capa de atestación de terceros porque las listas-de-permitidos de hyperscaler por sí solas no sobreviven a una auditoría multi-cloud, y la cadencia MITRE-CNA de CSAI crea cobertura de informes para la puerta de terceros.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang cross-cloud enterprises ay nangangailangan ng third-party attestation layer dahil ang hyperscaler allow-lists lamang ay hindi makakaligtas sa multi-cloud audit, at ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence ay nagbibigay ng reporting cover para sa third-party gate.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q4までに、Microsoft Agent 365 GA($15/ユーザー、M365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClawオープンソース(3月23日)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4月29日)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4月28日)のスタックが収束し、エンタープライズ・エージェント制御プレーンの参照モデルとなる — Big-3ハイパースケーラー(AWS、Azure、GCP)のうち少なくとも2社が、テナントレベルでのポリシーベースMCPサーバーallow/block強制を、ツール呼び出しログの監査付きで、デフォルトオンのプリミティブとして実装する;少なくとも1つの独立した制御プレーンベンダー(Vanta、Zenity、OpenClawAI)がSec-Labelsスタイルのアーティファクト証明ゲートを公開する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達:Microsoftはエージェント制御プレーン分野に1ユーザーあたりの価格タグ($15/ユーザー/月)を付け、AWSとGoogleが同等の開示で対応せざるを得ない価格アンカーを設定した;4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK + 7社のサンドボックスプロバイダーがランタイム側を事前に固め、5月1日のGAがポリシー側を既存のM365管理サーフェス(Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender)に接続した。5月1日GAのDefenderアセットコンテキストマッピング(エージェントごとのデバイス + MCPサーバー + ID + クラウドリソース)が2026年6月に出荷されると、それが事実上のスキーマとなる;最も抵抗の少ない経路は、AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent GardenがM365インストールベースのアンカーを失わないようQ4前に並行スキーマを公開することだ。CSAIのMITRE-CNAケイデンスが開示側を並行して圧縮する。In plain language: MicrosoftがAIエージェント制御に価格を付けた — 他のクラウドはコピーするか顧客を失う。In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q4 2026, la pila formada por la GA de Microsoft Agent 365 ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 mar) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 abr) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 abr) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control para agentes empresariales — al menos 2 de los 3 grandes hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzarán la aplicación de políticas de permitir/bloquear servidores MCP a nivel de inquilino con registros auditados de invocación de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publicará una puerta de atestación de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** La función forzante es la contratación empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categoría de plano de control de agentes, lo que establece el ancla de precios al que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abr + 7 proveedores de sandbox prepararon el lado del runtime, y la GA del 1 mayo conecta el lado de las políticas con una superficie administrativa M365 existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Una vez que el mapeo de contexto-de-activos de Defender de la GA del 1 mayo (dispositivos + servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud por agente) se lance en junio 2026, se convierte en el esquema de facto; la ruta de menor resistencia es que AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden publiquen esquemas paralelos antes del Q4 para evitar perder el ancla de la base instalada de M365. La cadencia MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprimirá el lado de la divulgación en paralelo. En lenguaje claro: Microsoft ha puesto una etiqueta de precio al control de los agentes de IA — otras nubes copiarán o perderán clientes. En lenguaje claro: En lenguaje claro:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sa Q4 2026 ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — hindi bababa sa 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay magpapadala ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; hindi bababa sa isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalathala ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kalalagay lang ng Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagtatakda ng pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ay nag-pre-bake na sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ang nagwi-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Sa sandaling magpadala sa Hunyo 2026 ang Defender asset-context mapping ng May 1 GA (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources kada agent), ito ay magiging de-facto schema; ang pinakamadaling daan ay para sa AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden na maglathala ng parallel schemas bago Q4 upang hindi mawalan sa M365-installed-base anchor. Ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence ay magpapasinop ng disclosure side parallel.

nodes.short_label: OCC publishes agentic-AI Model Risk Management addendum by Q3 2026
nodes.title: OCC publishes agentic-AI Model Risk Management addendum by Q3 2026
nodes.description: By Q3 2026 the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch — pitch builder, meeting preparer, earnings reviewer, model builder, market researcher, valuation reviewer, general ledger reconciler, month-end closer, statement auditor, and KYC screener running on Claude Opus 4.7 (state-of-the-art 64.37% on Vals AI Finance Agent benchmark), Microsoft 365 add-ins spanning Excel + PowerPoint + Word with Outlook coming, native MCP connectors for Dun & Bradstreet, Fiscal AI, Financial Modeling Prep, Guidepoint, IBISWorld, SS&C IntraLinks, Third Bridge, Verisk, the Moody's MCP app delivering credit ratings + data on 600M+ public/private companies natively into Claude, and a testimonial roster including Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital — combined with the May 4 BusinessWire FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent (FIS powers ~12% of the global economy; auto-assembles evidence across a bank's core systems, evaluates against known typologies, surfaces highest-risk cases, drafts SAR narratives; BMO + Amalgamated Bank are first deployment customers; broader availability targeted H2 2026) forces ≥1 banking regulator (OCC most likely, FRB / FCA / EBA siblings) to publish an agentic-AI use-of-AI-in-banking guidance OR a Model Risk Management addendum that explicitly names agent-based decisioning and sets audit-trail / human-in-the-loop / SAR-narrative-attribution requirements. The forcing function is dual: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 was written for static models, but agentic systems compose tools, call external data brokers via MCP, and chain decisions across multiple core systems in minutes — examiners cannot apply the legacy framework cleanly to a Claude-driven AML pipeline that auto-assembles SAR evidence and drafts the narrative. The OCC is the most-likely first mover because BMO is OCC-supervised at the US holdco level and the May 4 FIS announcement names a regulatory-grade audit trail as a feature; the OCC's existing model-risk leadership (SR 11-7 was Fed-OCC joint) makes an addendum the cleanest delivery shape. FRB SR-letter or FCA Dear-CEO letter follows within one filing cycle.

description.en: By Q3 2026 the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch — pitch builder, meeting preparer, earnings reviewer, model builder, market researcher, valuation reviewer, general ledger reconciler, month-end closer, statement auditor, and KYC screener running on Claude Opus 4.7 (state-of-the-art 64.37% on Vals AI Finance Agent benchmark), Microsoft 365 add-ins spanning Excel + PowerPoint + Word with Outlook coming, native MCP connectors for Dun & Bradstreet, Fiscal AI, Financial Modeling Prep, Guidepoint, IBISWorld, SS&C IntraLinks, Third Bridge, Verisk, the Moody's MCP app delivering credit ratings + data on 600M+ public/private companies natively into Claude, and a testimonial roster including Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital — combined with the May 4 BusinessWire FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent (FIS powers ~12% of the global economy; auto-assembles evidence across a bank's core systems, evaluates against known typologies, surfaces highest-risk cases, drafts SAR narratives; BMO + Amalgamated Bank are first deployment customers; broader availability targeted H2 2026) forces ≥1 banking regulator (OCC most likely, FRB / FCA / EBA siblings) to publish an agentic-AI use-of-AI-in-banking guidance OR a Model Risk Management addendum that explicitly names agent-based decisioning and sets audit-trail / human-in-the-loop / SAR-narrative-attribution requirements. The forcing function is dual: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 was written for static models, but agentic systems compose tools, call external data brokers via MCP, and chain decisions across multiple core systems in minutes — examiners cannot apply the legacy framework cleanly to a Claude-driven AML pipeline that auto-assembles SAR evidence and drafts the narrative. The OCC is the most-likely first mover because BMO is OCC-supervised at the US holdco level and the May 4 FIS announcement names a regulatory-grade audit trail as a feature; the OCC's existing model-risk leadership (SR 11-7 was Fed-OCC joint) makes an addendum the cleanest delivery shape. FRB SR-letter or FCA Dear-CEO letter follows within one filing cycle.
description.ja: 2026年Q3までに、5月5日のAnthropic 10エージェント金融サービス・ローンチ — pitch builder、meeting preparer、earnings reviewer、model builder、market researcher、valuation reviewer、general ledger reconciler、month-end closer、statement auditor、KYC screenerがClaude Opus 4.7上で稼働(Vals AI Finance Agentベンチマークで64.37%の最先端)、Microsoft 365アドインがExcel + PowerPoint + Wordをカバー(Outlookは予定)、Dun & Bradstreet、Fiscal AI、Financial Modeling Prep、Guidepoint、IBISWorld、SS&C IntraLinks、Third Bridge、Veriskへのネイティブ MCPコネクタ、Moody's MCPアプリは6億超の公開・非公開企業の信用格付け + データをClaudeにネイティブで配信、Citadel、BNY、Carlyle、Mizuho、Travelers、Walleye Capitalを含む推薦企業リスト — に、5月4日のBusinessWire FIS + Anthropic AML金融犯罪AIエージェント(FISは世界経済の約12%を支える; 銀行のコア・システム横断で証拠を自動収集、既知の類型と評価、最高リスク事案を浮上、SARナラティブを起草; BMO + Amalgamated Bankが最初の展開顧客; H2 2026に広範な提供を目標)が組み合わさり、≥1の銀行規制当局(OCCが最有力、FRB / FCA / EBAが兄弟)に対し、エージェントAI銀行業務利用ガイダンス、もしくはエージェントベース意思決定に明示的に言及し監査証跡 / human-in-the-loop / SARナラティブ帰属要件を設定するModel Risk Management補遺を公表することを強いる。強制関数は二重: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12は静的モデル向けに書かれたが、エージェント・システムはツールを合成し、MCP経由で外部データ・ブローカーを呼び出し、複数のコア・システムにまたがる意思決定を数分で連鎖させる — 検査官は、SAR証拠を自動収集しナラティブを起草するClaude駆動のAMLパイプラインに、レガシー枠組みをきれいに適用できない。OCCが最有力の先駆者となる根拠は、BMOが米国持株会社レベルでOCC監督下にあり、5月4日のFIS発表が規制当局グレードの監査証跡を機能として名指ししているため; OCCの既存のモデルリスク・リーダーシップ(SR 11-7はFed-OCC合同)が、補遺を最もクリーンな配信形にする。FRB SRレターまたはFCAのDear-CEOレターは1ファイリング・サイクル以内に追随する。
description.es: Para Q3 2026, el lanzamiento del 5 de mayo de Anthropic con 10 agentes de servicios financieros — pitch builder, meeting preparer, earnings reviewer, model builder, market researcher, valuation reviewer, general ledger reconciler, month-end closer, statement auditor y KYC screener corriendo sobre Claude Opus 4.7 (estado del arte 64.37% en el benchmark Vals AI Finance Agent), add-ins de Microsoft 365 que abarcan Excel + PowerPoint + Word con Outlook próximamente, conectores MCP nativos para Dun & Bradstreet, Fiscal AI, Financial Modeling Prep, Guidepoint, IBISWorld, SS&C IntraLinks, Third Bridge, Verisk, la app MCP de Moody's entregando ratings de crédito + datos sobre 600M+ empresas públicas/privadas nativamente dentro de Claude, y un roster de testimonios incluyendo Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital — combinado con el FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent del 4 de mayo en BusinessWire (FIS opera ~12% de la economía global; auto-ensambla evidencia a través de los sistemas centrales de un banco, evalúa contra tipologías conocidas, presenta los casos de mayor riesgo, redacta narrativas SAR; BMO + Amalgamated Bank son los primeros clientes de despliegue; disponibilidad más amplia objetivo H2 2026) obliga a ≥1 regulador bancario (OCC el más probable, FRB / FCA / EBA hermanos) a publicar una guía de uso de IA en banca agéntica O un adendum de Gestión de Riesgo de Modelo que nombre explícitamente la toma de decisiones basada en agentes y establezca requisitos de pista de auditoría / human-in-the-loop / atribución de narrativa SAR. La función forzante es dual: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 fue escrito para modelos estáticos, pero los sistemas agénticos componen herramientas, llaman a brokers de datos externos vía MCP y encadenan decisiones a través de múltiples sistemas centrales en minutos — los examinadores no pueden aplicar limpiamente el marco heredado a un pipeline AML conducido por Claude que auto-ensambla evidencia SAR y redacta la narrativa. El OCC es el más probable primer movedor porque BMO está supervisado por OCC a nivel de holdco de EE.UU. y el anuncio del 4 de mayo de FIS nombra una pista de auditoría de grado regulatorio como una característica; el liderazgo existente de riesgo de modelo del OCC (SR 11-7 fue conjunto Fed-OCC) hace que un adendum sea la forma de entrega más limpia. Una carta SR de FRB o carta Dear-CEO de FCA sigue dentro de un ciclo de presentación.
description.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch — pitch builder, meeting preparer, earnings reviewer, model builder, market researcher, valuation reviewer, general ledger reconciler, month-end closer, statement auditor, at KYC screener na tumatakbo sa Claude Opus 4.7 (state-of-the-art 64.37% sa Vals AI Finance Agent benchmark), Microsoft 365 add-ins na sumasaklaw sa Excel + PowerPoint + Word na may Outlook na paparating, native MCP connectors para sa Dun & Bradstreet, Fiscal AI, Financial Modeling Prep, Guidepoint, IBISWorld, SS&C IntraLinks, Third Bridge, Verisk, ang Moody's MCP app na naghahatid ng credit ratings + data sa 600M+ public/private companies nang native sa Claude, at testimonial roster kasama ang Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital — pinagsama sa May 4 BusinessWire FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent (FIS powers ~12% ng global economy; auto-assembles evidence sa kabuuan ng core systems ng bangko, sinusuri laban sa kilalang typologies, sinasakyang ang highest-risk cases, dini-draft ang SAR narratives; BMO + Amalgamated Bank ang first deployment customers; broader availability targeted H2 2026) ay pumipilit sa ≥1 banking regulator (OCC pinakamalamang, FRB / FCA / EBA siblings) na maglathala ng agentic-AI use-of-AI-in-banking guidance O Model Risk Management addendum na tahasang nagngangalan sa agent-based decisioning at nagtatakda ng audit-trail / human-in-the-loop / SAR-narrative-attribution requirements. Dual ang forcing function: ang SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 ay isinulat para sa static models, ngunit ang agentic systems ay nag-co-compose ng tools, tinatawag ang external data brokers sa pamamagitan ng MCP, at chains ng decisions sa kabuuan ng maraming core systems sa loob ng ilang minuto — hindi malinis na ma-apply ng examiners ang legacy framework sa Claude-driven AML pipeline na auto-assembles ng SAR evidence at dini-draft ang narrative. Ang OCC ang pinakamalamang na first mover dahil ang BMO ay OCC-supervised sa US holdco level at pinangalanan ng May 4 FIS announcement ang regulatory-grade audit trail bilang feature; ginagawang pinakamalinis na delivery shape ng existing model-risk leadership ng OCC (ang SR 11-7 ay Fed-OCC joint) ang isang addendum. Susunod ang FRB SR-letter o FCA Dear-CEO letter sa loob ng isang filing cycle.

detail.title: OCC publishes agentic-AI Model Risk Management addendum by Q3 2026
detail.title_clean: OCC publishes agentic-AI Model Risk Management addendum by Q3 2026

reasoning.because: Anthropic 10-agent finance launch + FIS-Anthropic AML agent on May 4-5 land Tier-1 banking workloads on agentic AI in one news cycle.
reasoning.given: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 model-risk framework was written for static models, not agents that chain tools + MCP data brokers across core systems.
reasoning.so_that: OCC publishes an agentic-AI use-of-AI-in-banking guidance or Model Risk Management addendum naming agent-based decisioning + audit-trail rules.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; OCC most-likely first mover via BMO supervision linkage, FRB / FCA / EBA siblings within one cycle.
reasoning.plain_language: Banks just put AI agents on AML and core finance work, so a US bank regulator will publish rules that name AI agents specifically.

because.en: Anthropic 10-agent finance launch + FIS-Anthropic AML agent on May 4-5 land Tier-1 banking workloads on agentic AI in one news cycle.
because.ja: Anthropicの10エージェント金融ローンチ + 5月4〜5日のFIS-Anthropic AMLエージェントが、Tier-1銀行ワークロードを1ニュースサイクルでエージェントAIに乗せた。
because.es: El lanzamiento de Anthropic con 10 agentes financieros + el agente AML FIS-Anthropic el 4-5 de mayo aterrizan cargas bancarias Tier-1 sobre IA agéntica en un ciclo de noticias.
because.fil: Ang Anthropic 10-agent finance launch + FIS-Anthropic AML agent noong May 4-5 ay naglapag ng Tier-1 banking workloads sa agentic AI sa isang news cycle.

given.en: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 model-risk framework was written for static models, not agents that chain tools + MCP data brokers across core systems.
given.ja: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12モデル・リスク枠組みは静的モデル向けで、コア・システム横断でツール + MCPデータ・ブローカーを連鎖させるエージェント向けではない。
given.es: El marco de riesgo de modelo SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 fue escrito para modelos estáticos, no para agentes que encadenan herramientas + brokers de datos MCP a través de sistemas centrales.
given.fil: Ang SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 model-risk framework ay isinulat para sa static models, hindi para sa agents na chains ng tools + MCP data brokers sa kabuuan ng core systems.

so_that.en: OCC publishes an agentic-AI use-of-AI-in-banking guidance or Model Risk Management addendum naming agent-based decisioning + audit-trail rules.
so_that.ja: OCCがエージェントAI銀行業務利用ガイダンスもしくはエージェントベース意思決定 + 監査証跡ルールに名指しするModel Risk Management補遺を公表する。
so_that.es: OCC publica una guía de uso de IA en banca agéntica o un adendum de Gestión de Riesgo de Modelo nombrando la toma de decisiones basada en agentes + reglas de pista de auditoría.
so_that.fil: Maglathala ang OCC ng agentic-AI use-of-AI-in-banking guidance o Model Risk Management addendum na nagngangalan sa agent-based decisioning + audit-trail rules.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; OCC most-likely first mover via BMO supervision linkage, FRB / FCA / EBA siblings within one cycle.
landing.ja: 2026年Q3まで; BMO監督リンクを通じてOCCが最有力先駆者、FRB / FCA / EBA兄弟は1サイクル以内。
landing.es: Para Q3 2026; OCC el más probable primer movedor vía vínculo de supervisión de BMO, FRB / FCA / EBA hermanos dentro de un ciclo.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; OCC pinakamalamang na first mover sa pamamagitan ng BMO supervision linkage, FRB / FCA / EBA siblings sa loob ng isang cycle.

plain_language.en: Banks just put AI agents on AML and core finance work, so a US bank regulator will publish rules that name AI agents specifically.
plain_language.ja: 銀行はAIエージェントをAMLとコア金融業務に投入したばかりで、米国の銀行規制当局はAIエージェントを名指しするルールを近いうちに公表するだろう。
plain_language.es: Los bancos acaban de poner agentes de IA en AML y trabajo financiero central, así que un regulador bancario de EE.UU. publicará reglas que nombren agentes de IA específicamente.
plain_language.fil: Inilagay na ng mga bangko ang AI agents sa AML at core finance work, kaya maglalabas ang isang US bank regulator ng mga panuntunan na tahasang nagngangalan sa AI agents.

title_locales.en: OCC publishes agentic-AI Model Risk Management addendum by Q3 2026
title_locales.ja: OCCが2026年Q3までにエージェントAI向けModel Risk Management補遺を公表する
title_locales.es: OCC publica adendum de Gestión de Riesgo de Modelo agéntico para Q3 2026
title_locales.fil: Maglalathala ang OCC ng agentic-AI Model Risk Management addendum pagsapit ng Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: Anthropic's May 5 10-agent finance launch on Claude Opus 4.7 with M365 + Moody's MCP, plus the May 4 FIS-Anthropic AML Financial Crimes Agent at BMO + Amalgamated, lands agentic AI inside Tier-1 banking. By Q3 2026 a regulator (OCC likely) publishes an agentic-AI Model Risk addendum.

summary_short_locales.en: Anthropic's May 5 10-agent finance launch on Claude Opus 4.7 with M365 + Moody's MCP, plus the May 4 FIS-Anthropic AML Financial Crimes Agent at BMO + Amalgamated, lands agentic AI inside Tier-1 banking. By Q3 2026 a regulator (OCC likely) publishes an agentic-AI Model Risk addendum.
summary_short_locales.ja: Anthropicの5月5日 Claude Opus 4.7上の10エージェント金融ローンチ(M365 + Moody's MCP)、加えて5月4日のFIS-Anthropic AML金融犯罪エージェント(BMO + Amalgamated)が、エージェントAIをTier-1銀行内に着地させた。2026年Q3までに、規制当局(OCCが最有力)がエージェントAI向けのModel Risk Management補遺を公表する。
summary_short_locales.es: El lanzamiento del 5 de mayo de Anthropic con 10 agentes financieros sobre Claude Opus 4.7 con M365 + MCP de Moody's, más el FIS-Anthropic AML Financial Crimes Agent del 4 de mayo en BMO + Amalgamated, aterriza la IA agéntica dentro de la banca Tier-1. Para Q3 2026 un regulador (OCC probable) publica un adendum de Riesgo de Modelo agéntico.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang May 5 10-agent finance launch ng Anthropic sa Claude Opus 4.7 na may M365 + Moody's MCP, plus ang May 4 FIS-Anthropic AML Financial Crimes Agent sa BMO + Amalgamated, ay naglapag ng agentic AI sa loob ng Tier-1 banking. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, maglalathala ang isang regulator (OCC pinakamalamang) ng agentic-AI Model Risk addendum.

needs.actor: Anthropic + FIS regulatory affairs + product team building examiner-grade audit-trail and model-card features for the AML Financial Crimes Agent
needs.job: ship a regulator-readable evidence pack — audit trail of every MCP tool call, model card per agent, SAR-narrative-attribution log, and human-in-the-loop checkpoint catalogue — that aligns with the OCC addendum's expected control families before H2 2026 broader availability.
needs.outcome: Publicly documented regulator-grade audit-trail + model-card feature set on the FIS-Anthropic AML agent, referenced in customer examiner-readiness packets at BMO, Amalgamated, and the H2 2026 onboarding cohort.
needs.motivation: The May 4 BusinessWire announcement already named regulator-grade audit trail as a feature; the OCC addendum makes that promise testable, and a vendor that fails the first examiner cycle loses the H2 2026 expansion pipeline.

needs.actor: OCC supervisory-policy staff drafting the agentic-AI Model Risk Management addendum (Office of the Comptroller of the Currency, Risk Analytics Division)
needs.job: draft an addendum to OCC 2011-12 / SR 11-7 that explicitly names agent-based decisioning, MCP-mediated tool composition, and chained core-system actions as in-scope model-risk activities, with audit-trail, human-in-the-loop, and SAR-narrative-attribution requirements aligned to the May 4 FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes Agent shape and the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent finance launch.
needs.outcome: Published OCC bulletin (addendum or companion guidance to OCC 2011-12) naming agentic AI as a distinct model-risk category with explicit examiner expectations on audit trail, model card, and SAR-narrative attribution.
needs.motivation: BMO is OCC-supervised at the US holdco level and is named as a first-deployment customer for the FIS-Anthropic AML agent; examiners need a published framework before the H2 2026 broader-availability rollout lands inside more OCC-supervised banks.

actor_locales.en: OCC supervisory-policy staff drafting the agentic-AI Model Risk Management addendum (Office of the Comptroller of the Currency, Risk Analytics Division)

job_locales.en: draft an addendum to OCC 2011-12 / SR 11-7 that explicitly names agent-based decisioning, MCP-mediated tool composition, and chained core-system actions as in-scope model-risk activities, with audit-trail, human-in-the-loop, and SAR-narrative-attribution requirements aligned to the May 4 FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes Agent shape and the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent finance launch.
job_locales.ja: OCC 2011-12 / SR 11-7への補遺を起草し、エージェントベース意思決定、MCP仲介ツール合成、連鎖的なコア・システム・アクションを範囲内のモデル・リスク活動として明示的に名指しし、5月4日のFIS + Anthropic AML金融犯罪エージェントの形と5月5日のAnthropic 10エージェント金融ローンチに沿った監査証跡、human-in-the-loop、SARナラティブ帰属の要件を設定する。
job_locales.es: redactar un adendum a OCC 2011-12 / SR 11-7 que nombre explícitamente la toma de decisiones basada en agentes, la composición de herramientas mediada por MCP y las acciones encadenadas en sistemas centrales como actividades de riesgo de modelo dentro del alcance, con requisitos de pista de auditoría, human-in-the-loop y atribución de narrativa SAR alineados con la forma del FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes Agent del 4 mayo y el lanzamiento del 5 mayo de Anthropic con 10 agentes financieros.
job_locales.fil: i-draft ang addendum sa OCC 2011-12 / SR 11-7 na tahasang nagngangalan sa agent-based decisioning, MCP-mediated tool composition, at chained core-system actions bilang in-scope model-risk activities, na may audit-trail, human-in-the-loop, at SAR-narrative-attribution requirements na aligned sa May 4 FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes Agent shape at sa May 5 Anthropic 10-agent finance launch.

outcome_locales.en: Published OCC bulletin (addendum or companion guidance to OCC 2011-12) naming agentic AI as a distinct model-risk category with explicit examiner expectations on audit trail, model card, and SAR-narrative attribution.
outcome_locales.ja: 公表されたOCC通牒(OCC 2011-12への補遺またはコンパニオン・ガイダンス)で、エージェントAIを独立したモデル・リスク・カテゴリとして名指しし、監査証跡、モデル・カード、SARナラティブ帰属に関する明示的な検査官期待値を伴う。
outcome_locales.es: Boletín del OCC publicado (adendum o guía complementaria a OCC 2011-12) nombrando la IA agéntica como una categoría distinta de riesgo de modelo con expectativas explícitas del examinador sobre pista de auditoría, model card y atribución de narrativa SAR.
outcome_locales.fil: Nailathalang OCC bulletin (addendum o companion guidance sa OCC 2011-12) na nagngangalan sa agentic AI bilang natatanging model-risk category na may explicit examiner expectations sa audit trail, model card, at SAR-narrative attribution.

motivation_locales.en: BMO is OCC-supervised at the US holdco level and is named as a first-deployment customer for the FIS-Anthropic AML agent; examiners need a published framework before the H2 2026 broader-availability rollout lands inside more OCC-supervised banks.
motivation_locales.ja: BMOは米国持株会社レベルでOCC監督下にあり、FIS-Anthropic AMLエージェントの最初の展開顧客として名指しされている; 検査官は、H2 2026の広範な提供がより多くのOCC監督下銀行内に着地する前に公表された枠組みを必要とする。
motivation_locales.es: BMO está supervisado por el OCC a nivel de holdco de EE.UU. y es nombrado como primer cliente de despliegue para el agente AML FIS-Anthropic; los examinadores necesitan un marco publicado antes de que el lanzamiento de disponibilidad más amplia de H2 2026 aterrice dentro de más bancos supervisados por OCC.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang BMO ay OCC-supervised sa US holdco level at pinangalanan bilang first-deployment customer para sa FIS-Anthropic AML agent; nangangailangan ang examiners ng nailathalang framework bago lumapag ang H2 2026 broader-availability rollout sa loob ng mas maraming OCC-supervised banks.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: By Q3 2026 the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch — pitch builder, meeting preparer, earnings reviewer, model builder, market researcher, valuation reviewer, general ledger reconciler, month-end closer, statement auditor, and KYC screener running on Claude Opus 4.7 (state-of-the-art 64.37% on Vals AI Finance Agent benchmark), Microsoft 365 add-ins spanning Excel + PowerPoint + Word with Outlook coming, native MCP connectors for Dun & Bradstreet, Fiscal AI, Financial Modeling Prep, Guidepoint, IBISWorld, SS&C IntraLinks, Third Bridge, Verisk, the Moody's MCP app delivering credit ratings + data on 600M+ public/private companies natively into Claude, and a testimonial roster including Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital — combined with the May 4 BusinessWire FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent (FIS powers ~12% of the global economy; auto-assembles evidence across a bank's core systems, evaluates against known typologies, surfaces highest-risk cases, drafts SAR narratives; BMO + Amalgamated Bank are first deployment customers; broader availability targeted H2 2026) forces ≥1 banking regulator (OCC most likely, FRB / FCA / EBA siblings) to publish an agentic-AI use-of-AI-in-banking guidance OR a Model Risk Management addendum that explicitly names agent-based decisioning and sets audit-trail / human-in-the-loop / SAR-narrative-attribution requirements. The forcing function is dual: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 was written for static models, but agentic systems compose tools, call external data brokers via MCP, and chain decisions across multiple core systems in minutes — examiners cannot apply the legacy framework cleanly to a Claude-driven AML pipeline that auto-assembles SAR evidence and drafts the narrative. The OCC is the most-likely first mover because BMO is OCC-supervised at the US holdco level and the May 4 FIS announcement names a regulatory-grade audit trail as a feature; the OCC's existing model-risk leadership (SR 11-7 was Fed-OCC joint) makes an addendum the cleanest delivery shape. FRB SR-letter or FCA Dear-CEO letter follows within one filing cycle.

prediction_summary_locales.en: By Q3 2026 the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch — pitch builder, meeting preparer, earnings reviewer, model builder, market researcher, valuation reviewer, general ledger reconciler, month-end closer, statement auditor, and KYC screener running on Claude Opus 4.7 (state-of-the-art 64.37% on Vals AI Finance Agent benchmark), Microsoft 365 add-ins spanning Excel + PowerPoint + Word with Outlook coming, native MCP connectors for Dun & Bradstreet, Fiscal AI, Financial Modeling Prep, Guidepoint, IBISWorld, SS&C IntraLinks, Third Bridge, Verisk, the Moody's MCP app delivering credit ratings + data on 600M+ public/private companies natively into Claude, and a testimonial roster including Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital — combined with the May 4 BusinessWire FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent (FIS powers ~12% of the global economy; auto-assembles evidence across a bank's core systems, evaluates against known typologies, surfaces highest-risk cases, drafts SAR narratives; BMO + Amalgamated Bank are first deployment customers; broader availability targeted H2 2026) forces ≥1 banking regulator (OCC most likely, FRB / FCA / EBA siblings) to publish an agentic-AI use-of-AI-in-banking guidance OR a Model Risk Management addendum that explicitly names agent-based decisioning and sets audit-trail / human-in-the-loop / SAR-narrative-attribution requirements.
