The OCC is the most-likely first mover because BMO is OCC-supervised at the US holdco level and the May 4 FIS announcement names a regulatory-grade audit trail as a feature; the OCC's existing model-risk leadership (SR 11-7 was Fed-OCC joint) makes an addendum the cleanest delivery shape. FRB SR-letter or FCA Dear-CEO letter follows within one filing cycle.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: 2026年Q3までに、5月5日のAnthropic 10エージェント金融サービス・ローンチ — pitch builder、meeting preparer、earnings reviewer、model builder、market researcher、valuation reviewer、general ledger reconciler、month-end closer、statement auditor、KYC screenerがClaude Opus 4.7上で稼働(Vals AI Finance Agentベンチマークで64.37%の最先端)、Microsoft 365アドインがExcel + PowerPoint + Wordをカバー(Outlookは予定)、Dun & Bradstreet、Fiscal AI、Financial Modeling Prep、Guidepoint、IBISWorld、SS&C IntraLinks、Third Bridge、Veriskへのネイティブ MCPコネクタ、Moody's MCPアプリは6億超の公開・非公開企業の信用格付け + データをClaudeにネイティブで配信、Citadel、BNY、Carlyle、Mizuho、Travelers、Walleye Capitalを含む推薦企業リスト — に、5月4日のBusinessWire FIS + Anthropic AML金融犯罪AIエージェント(FISは世界経済の約12%を支える; 銀行のコア・システム横断で証拠を自動収集、既知の類型と評価、最高リスク事案を浮上、SARナラティブを起草; BMO + Amalgamated Bankが最初の展開顧客; H2 2026に広範な提供を目標)が組み合わさり、≥1の銀行規制当局(OCCが最有力、FRB / FCA / EBAが兄弟)に対し、エージェントAI銀行業務利用ガイダンス、もしくはエージェントベース意思決定に明示的に言及し監査証跡 / human-in-the-loop / SARナラティブ帰属要件を設定するModel Risk Management補遺を公表することを強いる。強制関数は二重: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12は静的モデル向けに書かれたが、エージェント・システムはツールを合成し、MCP経由で外部データ・ブローカーを呼び出し、複数のコア・システムにまたがる意思決定を数分で連鎖させる — 検査官は、SAR証拠を自動収集しナラティブを起草するClaude駆動のAMLパイプラインに、レガシー枠組みをきれいに適用できない。OCCが最有力の先駆者となる根拠は、BMOが米国持株会社レベルでOCC監督下にあり、5月4日のFIS発表が規制当局グレードの監査証跡を機能として名指ししているため; OCCの既存のモデルリスク・リーダーシップ(SR 11-7はFed-OCC合同)が、補遺を最もクリーンな配信形にする。FRB SRレターまたはFCAのDear-CEOレターは1ファイリング・サイクル以内に追随する。
prediction_summary_locales.es: Para Q3 2026, el lanzamiento del 5 de mayo de Anthropic con 10 agentes de servicios financieros — pitch builder, meeting preparer, earnings reviewer, model builder, market researcher, valuation reviewer, general ledger reconciler, month-end closer, statement auditor y KYC screener corriendo sobre Claude Opus 4.7 (estado del arte 64.37% en el benchmark Vals AI Finance Agent), add-ins de Microsoft 365 que abarcan Excel + PowerPoint + Word con Outlook próximamente, conectores MCP nativos para Dun & Bradstreet, Fiscal AI, Financial Modeling Prep, Guidepoint, IBISWorld, SS&C IntraLinks, Third Bridge, Verisk, la app MCP de Moody's entregando ratings de crédito + datos sobre 600M+ empresas públicas/privadas nativamente dentro de Claude, y un roster de testimonios incluyendo Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital — combinado con el FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent del 4 de mayo en BusinessWire (FIS opera ~12% de la economía global; auto-ensambla evidencia a través de los sistemas centrales de un banco, evalúa contra tipologías conocidas, presenta los casos de mayor riesgo, redacta narrativas SAR; BMO + Amalgamated Bank son los primeros clientes de despliegue; disponibilidad más amplia objetivo H2 2026) obliga a ≥1 regulador bancario (OCC el más probable, FRB / FCA / EBA hermanos) a publicar una guía de uso de IA en banca agéntica O un adendum de Gestión de Riesgo de Modelo que nombre explícitamente la toma de decisiones basada en agentes y establezca requisitos de pista de auditoría / human-in-the-loop / atribución de narrativa SAR. La función forzante es dual: SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 fue escrito para modelos estáticos, pero los sistemas agénticos componen herramientas, llaman a brokers de datos externos vía MCP y encadenan decisiones a través de múltiples sistemas centrales en minutos — los examinadores no pueden aplicar limpiamente el marco heredado a un pipeline AML conducido por Claude que auto-ensambla evidencia SAR y redacta la narrativa. El OCC es el más probable primer movedor porque BMO está supervisado por OCC a nivel de holdco de EE.UU. y el anuncio del 4 de mayo de FIS nombra una pista de auditoría de grado regulatorio como una característica; el liderazgo existente de riesgo de modelo del OCC (SR 11-7 fue conjunto Fed-OCC) hace que un adendum sea la forma de entrega más limpia. Una carta SR de FRB o carta Dear-CEO de FCA sigue dentro de un ciclo de presentación.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch — pitch builder, meeting preparer, earnings reviewer, model builder, market researcher, valuation reviewer, general ledger reconciler, month-end closer, statement auditor, at KYC screener na tumatakbo sa Claude Opus 4.7 (state-of-the-art 64.37% sa Vals AI Finance Agent benchmark), Microsoft 365 add-ins na sumasaklaw sa Excel + PowerPoint + Word na may Outlook na paparating, native MCP connectors para sa Dun & Bradstreet, Fiscal AI, Financial Modeling Prep, Guidepoint, IBISWorld, SS&C IntraLinks, Third Bridge, Verisk, ang Moody's MCP app na naghahatid ng credit ratings + data sa 600M+ public/private companies nang native sa Claude, at testimonial roster kasama ang Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital — pinagsama sa May 4 BusinessWire FIS + Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent (FIS powers ~12% ng global economy; auto-assembles evidence sa kabuuan ng core systems ng bangko, sinusuri laban sa kilalang typologies, sinasakyang ang highest-risk cases, dini-draft ang SAR narratives; BMO + Amalgamated Bank ang first deployment customers; broader availability targeted H2 2026) ay pumipilit sa ≥1 banking regulator (OCC pinakamalamang, FRB / FCA / EBA siblings) na maglathala ng agentic-AI use-of-AI-in-banking guidance O Model Risk Management addendum na tahasang nagngangalan sa agent-based decisioning at nagtatakda ng audit-trail / human-in-the-loop / SAR-narrative-attribution requirements. Dual ang forcing function: ang SR 11-7 / OCC 2011-12 ay isinulat para sa static models, ngunit ang agentic systems ay nag-co-compose ng tools, tinatawag ang external data brokers sa pamamagitan ng MCP, at chains ng decisions sa kabuuan ng maraming core systems sa loob ng ilang minuto — hindi malinis na ma-apply ng examiners ang legacy framework sa Claude-driven AML pipeline na auto-assembles ng SAR evidence at dini-draft ang narrative. Ang OCC ang pinakamalamang na first mover dahil ang BMO ay OCC-supervised sa US holdco level at pinangalanan ng May 4 FIS announcement ang regulatory-grade audit trail bilang feature; ginagawang pinakamalinis na delivery shape ng existing model-risk leadership ng OCC (ang SR 11-7 ay Fed-OCC joint) ang isang addendum. Susunod ang FRB SR-letter o FCA Dear-CEO letter sa loob ng isang filing cycle.

description.en: **Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.** AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log + guardrail story, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills all surface in the same window. By H2 2026, a registry standard for distributing agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) will grow alongside MCP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「エージェントレジストリ」モデルへの収束。** AWS Agent Registry、NemoClawの監査ログ+ガードレール体制、Hermes Agentの自己学習スキルがすべて同じ時期に登場している。2026年下半期までに、エージェント成果物(スキル、ツール権限、監査トレース)を配布するためのレジストリ標準がMCPと並行して成長するだろう。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Convergencia hacia un modelo de "Registro de Agentes".** AWS Agent Registry, la propuesta de registro de auditoría + barreras de seguridad de NemoClaw y las habilidades autoaprendidas de Hermes Agent surgen en la misma ventana. Para H2 2026, un estándar de registro para distribuir artefactos de agentes (habilidades, permisos de herramientas, trazas de auditoría) crecerá junto con MCP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Convergence patungo sa isang "Agent Registry" model.** Ang AWS Agent Registry, ang audit-log + guardrail story ng NemoClaw, at ang self-learned skills ng Hermes Agent ay lahat lumitaw sa parehong window. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, isang registry standard para sa pag-distribute ng agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) ang lalago kasabay ng MCP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

plain_language.en: Several companies just launched ways to share AI agents and their permissions. Soon, one common format will let agents move between platforms safely.
plain_language.ja: 複数の企業がAIエージェントとその権限を共有する仕組みを発表したばかりだ。まもなく、共通フォーマットによってエージェントが安全にプラットフォーム間を移動できるようになるだろう。
plain_language.es: Varias empresas acaban de lanzar formas de compartir agentes de IA y sus permisos. Pronto, un formato común permitirá que los agentes se muevan entre plataformas de forma segura.
plain_language.fil: Ilang kumpanya ang naglunsad kamakailan ng mga paraan para magbahagi ng AI agents at kanilang permissions. Sa lalong madaling panahon, isang common format ang magbibigay-daan sa agents na lumipat sa pagitan ng platforms nang ligtas.

summary_short_locales.en: AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log and guardrail tooling, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills appear in the same window. By H2 2026, a registry standard for distributing agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) is expected to grow alongside MCP.
summary_short_locales.ja: AWS Agent Registry、NemoClawの監査ログとガードレールツール、Hermes Agentの自己学習スキルが同じ時期に登場している。2026年下半期までに、エージェント成果物(スキル、ツール権限、監査トレース)を配布するためのレジストリ標準がMCPと並行して成長すると予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: AWS Agent Registry, las herramientas de registro de auditoría y barreras de seguridad de NemoClaw y las habilidades autoaprendidas de Hermes Agent aparecen en la misma ventana. Para H2 2026, se espera que un estándar de registro para distribuir artefactos de agentes (habilidades, permisos de herramientas, trazas de auditoría) crezca junto con MCP.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang AWS Agent Registry, ang audit-log at guardrail tooling ng NemoClaw, at ang self-learned skills ng Hermes Agent ay lumitaw sa parehong window. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, asahan na isang registry standard para sa pag-distribute ng agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) ang lalago kasabay ng MCP.

bridges.text: Okta's Showcase 2026 blueprint with Agent Discovery & Governance plus Agent Gateway aggregating an MCP registry, the Cross App Access protocol for agent-to-app connections, AWS Bedrock AgentCore staging Coding Skills across Claude Code / Codex / Cursor, and TrueFoundry's zero-trust MCP framing converge on the registry-style distribution surface the prediction projects.

text_locales.en: Okta's Showcase 2026 blueprint with Agent Discovery & Governance plus Agent Gateway aggregating an MCP registry, the Cross App Access protocol for agent-to-app connections, AWS Bedrock AgentCore staging Coding Skills across Claude Code / Codex / Cursor, and TrueFoundry's zero-trust MCP framing converge on the registry-style distribution surface the prediction projects.
text_locales.ja: OktaのShowcase 2026ブループリントは、Agent Discovery & Governanceに加えてMCPレジストリを集約するAgent Gateway、エージェント対アプリ接続のためのCross App Accessプロトコル、Claude Code / Codex / CursorにわたってCoding SkillsをステージングするAWS Bedrock AgentCore、TrueFoundryのゼロトラストMCPフレーミングと共に、予測が射影するレジストリ型の配信表面に収束する。
text_locales.es: El blueprint Showcase 2026 de Okta con Agent Discovery & Governance más Agent Gateway agregando un registro MCP, el protocolo Cross App Access para conexiones agente-a-app, AWS Bedrock AgentCore preparando Coding Skills a través de Claude Code / Codex / Cursor, y el encuadre zero-trust MCP de TrueFoundry convergen en la superficie de distribución estilo registro que la predicción proyecta.
text_locales.fil: Ang Okta's Showcase 2026 blueprint na may Agent Discovery & Governance plus Agent Gateway na nag-aaggregate ng MCP registry, ang Cross App Access protocol para sa agent-to-app connections, ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore na nag-stage ng Coding Skills sa Claude Code / Codex / Cursor, at ang TrueFoundry's zero-trust MCP framing ay nag-converge sa registry-style distribution surface na pinagpapalagay ng prediction.

bridges.text: AWS Bedrock AgentCore's 3-API-call managed harness with pre-built coding skills staged for Claude Code / Codex / Cursor next week and HyperFRAME's Identity-as-the-Last-Firewall framing of Okta's first-class AI-agent identity reinforce the lifecycle-and-permissions layer the prediction projects, but stop short of a shared cross-vendor artifact format.

text_locales.en: AWS Bedrock AgentCore's 3-API-call managed harness with pre-built coding skills staged for Claude Code / Codex / Cursor next week and HyperFRAME's Identity-as-the-Last-Firewall framing of Okta's first-class AI-agent identity reinforce the lifecycle-and-permissions layer the prediction projects, but stop short of a shared cross-vendor artifact format.
text_locales.ja: AWS Bedrock AgentCoreの3 APIコール構成のマネージド・ハーネスとClaude Code / Codex / Cursorのために来週ステージングされるプリビルドのコーディング・スキル、HyperFRAMEのOktaのファースト・クラスAIエージェント・アイデンティティに対するIdentity-as-the-Last-Firewallの枠組みが、予測が想定するライフサイクル+権限レイヤーを補強しているが、ベンダー横断の共有アーティファクト形式までには至っていない。
text_locales.es: El managed harness de 3 llamadas a API de AWS Bedrock AgentCore con skills de codificación preconstruidos preparado para Claude Code / Codex / Cursor la próxima semana y el encuadre Identity-as-the-Last-Firewall de HyperFRAME de la identidad de primera clase del agente de IA de Okta refuerzan la capa de ciclo-de-vida-y-permisos que la predicción proyecta, pero se quedan cortos de un formato de artefacto compartido entre proveedores.
text_locales.fil: Ang 3-API-call managed harness ng AWS Bedrock AgentCore na may pre-built coding skills na staged para sa Claude Code / Codex / Cursor sa susunod na linggo at ang Identity-as-the-Last-Firewall framing ng HyperFRAME sa first-class AI-agent identity ng Okta ay nagpapatibay sa lifecycle-and-permissions layer na inaasahan ng prediction, ngunit hindi umaabot sa shared cross-vendor artifact format.

bridges.text: AWS Bedrock AgentCore's 3-API-call managed harness with pre-built skills, Okta's GA-on-Apr-30 first-class AI-agent identity, and Keycard's task-scoped revocable-token control plane converge on the same lifecycle-and-permissions layer the prediction projects, sharpening the precondition for a registry standard but stopping short of a shared cross-vendor artifact format.

text_locales.en: AWS Bedrock AgentCore's 3-API-call managed harness with pre-built skills, Okta's GA-on-Apr-30 first-class AI-agent identity, and Keycard's task-scoped revocable-token control plane converge on the same lifecycle-and-permissions layer the prediction projects, sharpening the precondition for a registry standard but stopping short of a shared cross-vendor artifact format.
text_locales.ja: AWS Bedrock AgentCoreの3 APIコール構成のマネージド・ハーネスとプリビルド・スキル、Oktaの4月30日GAによるファースト・クラスのAIエージェント・アイデンティティ、Keycardのタスク・スコープの取消可能トークン・コントロールプレーンが、予測が想定する同じライフサイクル+権限レイヤーに収束し、レジストリ標準の前提条件をシャープにしているが、ベンダー横断の共有アーティファクト形式までには至っていない。
text_locales.es: El managed harness de 3 llamadas a API de AWS Bedrock AgentCore con skills preconstruidos, la identidad de primera clase de agente de IA en GA-on-Apr-30 de Okta, y el plano de control de tokens revocables con alcance de tarea de Keycard convergen en la misma capa de ciclo-de-vida-y-permisos que la predicción proyecta, agudizando la precondición para un estándar de registro pero quedándose corto de un formato de artefacto compartido entre proveedores.
text_locales.fil: Ang 3-API-call managed harness ng AWS Bedrock AgentCore na may pre-built skills, ang GA-on-Apr-30 first-class AI-agent identity ng Okta, at ang task-scoped revocable-token control plane ng Keycard ay nagsasama-sama sa parehong lifecycle-and-permissions layer na ipinroprojeto ng prediksyon, na pinatatalas ang precondition para sa registry standard pero hindi umaabot sa shared cross-vendor artifact format.

bridges.text: Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with managed MCP and A2A production, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's Managed Harness + CLI + prebuilt skills, and OpenAI Workspace Agents land together — three hyperscaler agent surfaces converging on the same lifecycle, audit, and skills story, sharpening the precondition for a registry standard but stopping short of a portable artifact spec.

text_locales.en: Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with managed MCP and A2A production, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's Managed Harness + CLI + prebuilt skills, and OpenAI Workspace Agents land together — three hyperscaler agent surfaces converging on the same lifecycle, audit, and skills story, sharpening the precondition for a registry standard but stopping short of a portable artifact spec.
text_locales.ja: managedなMCPとA2A本番を備えたGoogle Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCoreのManaged Harness + CLI + プリビルトskills、OpenAI Workspace Agentsが同時に着地した。3つのハイパースケーラーのエージェント面が同じライフサイクル、監査、skillsのストーリーに収斂しており、レジストリ標準の前提条件を強化しているが、ポータブルなアーティファクト仕様には至っていない。
text_locales.es: Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform con MCP gestionado y A2A en producción, Managed Harness + CLI + skills preconstruidos de AWS Bedrock AgentCore, y OpenAI Workspace Agents aterrizan juntos — tres superficies de agentes de hyperscalers convergiendo en la misma historia de ciclo de vida, auditoría y skills, agudizando la precondición para un estándar de registro pero quedándose corto de una especificación de artefacto portable.
text_locales.fil: Ang Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform na may managed MCP at A2A production, ang Managed Harness + CLI + prebuilt skills ng AWS Bedrock AgentCore, at ang OpenAI Workspace Agents ay sabay-sabay na bumabagsak — tatlong hyperscaler agent surfaces na nagsasama-sama sa parehong lifecycle, audit, at skills story, na nagpapatalas sa precondition para sa registry standard pero hindi umaabot sa portable artifact spec.

bridges.text: Per-vendor agent runtimes keep maturing in parallel: OpenClaw tightens scoping, NemoClaw stays as the enterprise wrapper, and Hermes ships a Tool Gateway with MCP OAuth 2.1 and OSV malware scans. The structural-force claim still holds, but no shared registry artifact format crosses vendors yet.

text_locales.en: Per-vendor agent runtimes keep maturing in parallel: OpenClaw tightens scoping, NemoClaw stays as the enterprise wrapper, and Hermes ships a Tool Gateway with MCP OAuth 2.1 and OSV malware scans. The structural-force claim still holds, but no shared registry artifact format crosses vendors yet.
text_locales.ja: ベンダー個別のエージェントランタイムは並行して成熟し続けている:OpenClawはスコーピングを強化し、NemoClawはエンタープライズラッパーとして定着し、HermesはMCP OAuth 2.1とOSVマルウェアスキャンを備えたTool Gatewayを出荷した。構造的力学の主張は依然として成立しているが、共有レジストリのアーティファクトフォーマットはまだベンダーをまたいで現れていない。
text_locales.es: Los runtimes de agentes por proveedor siguen madurando en paralelo: OpenClaw endurece el alcance, NemoClaw permanece como el envoltorio empresarial, y Hermes envia un Tool Gateway con MCP OAuth 2.1 y escaneos de malware OSV. La afirmacion de fuerza estructural aun se mantiene, pero ningun formato de artefacto de registro compartido cruza entre proveedores aun.
text_locales.fil: Ang per-vendor agent runtimes ay patuloy na umuunlad nang parallel: hinihigpitan ng OpenClaw ang scoping, ang NemoClaw ay nananatiling enterprise wrapper, at ang Hermes ay nag-ship ng Tool Gateway na may MCP OAuth 2.1 at OSV malware scans. Ang structural-force claim ay tumitibay pa rin, ngunit walang shared registry artifact format ang tumatawid sa mga vendors.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.** AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log + guardrail story, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills all surface in the same window. By H2 2026, a registry standard for distributing agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) will grow alongside MCP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.** AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log + guardrail story, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills all surface in the same window. By H2 2026, a registry standard for distributing agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) will grow alongside MCP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.** AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log + guardrail story, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills all surface in the same window. By H2 2026, a registry standard for distributing agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) will grow alongside MCP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「エージェントレジストリ」モデルへの収束。** AWS Agent Registry、NemoClawの監査ログ+ガードレール体制、Hermes Agentの自己学習スキルがすべて同じ時期に登場している。2026年下半期までに、エージェント成果物(スキル、ツール権限、監査トレース)を配布するためのレジストリ標準がMCPと並行して成長するだろう。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Convergencia hacia un modelo de "Registro de Agentes".** AWS Agent Registry, la propuesta de registro de auditoría + barreras de seguridad de NemoClaw y las habilidades autoaprendidas de Hermes Agent surgen en la misma ventana. Para H2 2026, un estándar de registro para distribuir artefactos de agentes (habilidades, permisos de herramientas, trazas de auditoría) crecerá junto con MCP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Convergence patungo sa isang "Agent Registry" model.** Ang AWS Agent Registry, ang audit-log + guardrail story ng NemoClaw, at ang self-learned skills ng Hermes Agent ay lahat lumitaw sa parehong window. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, isang registry standard para sa pag-distribute ng agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) ang lalago kasabay ng MCP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.short_label: US state codifies agent-as-first-class-identity statute by Q3 2026
nodes.title: US state codifies agent-as-first-class-identity statute by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **AI への世論の反発が拘束力のあるエージェント・ガバナンス・ルールへ転化する — Q3 2026 までに、米国少なくとも 1 州が Okta の Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway パターンを反映した「自律エージェントの法定アイデンティティ」法を出荷する。** 4/16 の Altman 自宅への襲撃 + 4/15 の CNBC データセンター反発記事 + 4/26 の Salt Security データ (「組織の 48.9% が AI エージェントトラフィックを監視できない」) + **4/30** の Okta for AI Agents GA (Agent Discovery、Agent Gateway、仮想 MCP サーバレジストリ、認証情報の保管庫化 + 自動ローテーション、ユニバーサルログアウトを搭載) が、規制の前倒しを構成する。米国の 1 州 (CA、NY もしくは TX が有力) が Q3 2026 までに **エージェントをファーストクラスのアイデンティティとして登録すること、MCP コールチェーンのロギング、アクション単位の同意**を義務付ける法令を、Cross App Access プロトコルのセマンティクスを反映する形で出荷する。EU AI 法第 26 条の執行が並行して始動する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **La reacción de la opinión pública contra la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes — para el Q3 2026 al menos un estado de EE.UU. entrega una Ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Autónomos" reflejando el patrón Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16 de abril a la casa de Altman + la pieza del 15 de abril de CNBC sobre la reacción contra los datacenters + los datos de Salt Security del 26 de abril ("48.9% de las organizaciones no pueden monitorear el tráfico de AI-agent") + Okta for AI Agents GA el **30 de abril** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual-MCP-server, vaulting de credenciales + auto-rotación, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE.UU. (CA, NY o TX probable) entrega un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga **el registro de agente como identidad de primera clase, el logging de la cadena de llamadas MCP y el consentimiento por acción**, reflejando la semántica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicación del Artículo 26 del EU AI Act se activa en paralelo. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI ay magiging binding agent-governance rules — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isang US state ay magpapadala ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na sumasalamin sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang Apr 16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + ang Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% ng orgs ay hindi makakapag-monitor ng AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA noong **Apr 30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ay bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ay magpapadala ng statute pagsapit ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na sumasalamin sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement ay magti-trigger nang parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. detail.summary_short: Apr 15 CNBC public-opinion data, Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home, Apr 26 Salt Security finding 48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic, and Apr 30 Okta for AI Agents GA together push at least one US state (CA, NY, or TX) to ship a Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents Act by Q3 2026.

summary_short_locales.en: Apr 15 CNBC public-opinion data, Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home, Apr 26 Salt Security finding 48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic, and Apr 30 Okta for AI Agents GA together push at least one US state (CA, NY, or TX) to ship a Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents Act by Q3 2026.
summary_short_locales.ja: 4/15 の CNBC 世論データ、4/16 の Altman 自宅への襲撃、4/26 の Salt Security による「組織の 48.9% が AI エージェントトラフィックを監視できない」との所見、そして 4/30 の Okta for AI Agents GA が一体となり、米国少なくとも 1 州 (CA、NY もしくは TX) を Q3 2026 までに「自律エージェントの法定アイデンティティ」法を出荷する方向へ押し出す。
summary_short_locales.es: Los datos de opinión pública del 15 de abril de CNBC, los ataques del 16 de abril a la casa de Altman, el hallazgo del 26 de abril de Salt Security de que el 48.9% de las organizaciones no pueden monitorear el tráfico de AI-agent, y el GA de Okta for AI Agents del 30 de abril empujan juntos a al menos un estado de EE.UU. (CA, NY o TX) a entregar una Ley de Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Autónomos para el Q3 2026.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Apr 15 CNBC public-opinion data, Apr 16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman, Apr 26 Salt Security finding na 48.9% ng orgs ay hindi makakapag-monitor ng AI-agent traffic, at Apr 30 Okta for AI Agents GA ay magkakasamang magtutulak sa kahit isang US state (CA, NY, o TX) na magpadala ng Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents Act pagsapit ng Q3 2026.

bridges.text: The RSAC-week Microsoft + Cisco + CSA convergence on agent-as-first-class-identity strengthens the structural force a state-level statute would codify, but no California, New York, or Texas legislative draft surfaces in the window.

text_locales.en: The RSAC-week Microsoft + Cisco + CSA convergence on agent-as-first-class-identity strengthens the structural force a state-level statute would codify, but no California, New York, or Texas legislative draft surfaces in the window.
text_locales.ja: RSACウィークのMicrosoft + Cisco + CSAのエージェントをファーストクラス・アイデンティティとして扱うことへの収斂は、州レベル法案が成文化するであろう構造的な強制力を強化するが、California、New York、Texasの立法草案はウィンドウ内で浮上しない。
text_locales.es: La convergencia de Microsoft + Cisco + CSA durante la semana de RSAC sobre agente-como-identidad-de-primera-clase fortalece la fuerza estructural que un estatuto a nivel estatal codificaría, pero ningún borrador legislativo de California, Nueva York o Texas aparece en la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang RSAC-week Microsoft + Cisco + CSA convergence sa agent-as-first-class-identity ay nagpapatibay sa structural force na ko-codify-pin ng state-level statute, ngunit walang California, New York, o Texas legislative draft na lumilitaw sa window.

bridges.text: Microsoft's Agent 365 GA and the CSA Identity-in-AI piece show the agent-as-first-class-identity primitive landing on the commercial side at $15/user/mo, which is the operational schema a state statute would point to. The structural force of the prediction holds, but the legislative-pull remains industry-led rather than state-codified for now.

text_locales.en: Microsoft's Agent 365 GA and the CSA Identity-in-AI piece show the agent-as-first-class-identity primitive landing on the commercial side at $15/user/mo, which is the operational schema a state statute would point to. The structural force of the prediction holds, but the legislative-pull remains industry-led rather than state-codified for now.
text_locales.ja: MicrosoftのAgent 365 GAとCSAのIdentity-in-AI記事は、エージェント・ファーストクラス・アイデンティティ・プリミティブが商業側で$15/user/moで着地したことを示す。これは州法令が指し示す運用上のスキーマだ。予測の構造的力は保持されているが、立法プルは現時点では州が成文化するのではなく業界主導のままだ。
text_locales.es: La GA de Agent 365 de Microsoft y la pieza CSA Identity-in-AI muestran la primitiva de agente-como-identidad-de-primera-clase aterrizando del lado comercial a $15/usuario/mes, que es el esquema operacional al que apuntaría un estatuto estatal. La fuerza estructural de la predicción se sostiene, pero la presión legislativa permanece liderada por la industria en lugar de codificada por el estado por ahora.
text_locales.fil: Ipinapakita ng Agent 365 GA ng Microsoft at ng CSA Identity-in-AI piece na ang agent-as-first-class-identity primitive ay dumarating sa commercial side sa $15/user/mo, na siyang operational schema na tutukuyin ng isang state statute. Ang structural force ng prediction ay nananatili, ngunit ang legislative-pull ay nananatiling industry-led sa halip na state-codified sa kasalukuyan.

bridges.text: CSA's identity reframing plus Agent 365's tenant-level policy primitives give a future state statute the implementation surface the prediction assumes, even though no California, New York, or Texas bill has yet been introduced.

text_locales.en: CSA's identity reframing plus Agent 365's tenant-level policy primitives give a future state statute the implementation surface the prediction assumes, even though no California, New York, or Texas bill has yet been introduced.
text_locales.ja: CSAのアイデンティティ再構成と、Agent 365のテナントレベルポリシープリミティブは、California、New York、またはTexasの法案がまだ提出されていないものの、予測が想定する将来の州法令の実装サーフェスを与える。
text_locales.es: El replanteo de identidad de CSA más las primitivas de política a nivel de inquilino de Agent 365 dan a un futuro estatuto estatal la superficie de implementación que la predicción asume, aunque ningún proyecto de ley de California, Nueva York o Texas haya sido presentado todavía.
text_locales.fil: Ang identity reframing ng CSA kasama ang tenant-level policy primitives ng Agent 365 ay nagbibigay sa future state statute ng implementation surface na ipinapalagay ng prediction, kahit walang California, New York, o Texas bill ang naipakilala pa.

bridges.text: CSAI's STAR-for-AI Catastrophic Risk Annex, AARM, and ATF specifications plus Microsoft's Zero Trust for AI guidance compose the technical substrate the statutory thesis depends on — agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent are converging through industry self-regulation. The legislative side has not yet shipped but the substrate is in place for a CA / NY / TX move.

text_locales.en: CSAI's STAR-for-AI Catastrophic Risk Annex, AARM, and ATF specifications plus Microsoft's Zero Trust for AI guidance compose the technical substrate the statutory thesis depends on — agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent are converging through industry self-regulation. The legislative side has not yet shipped but the substrate is in place for a CA / NY / TX move.
text_locales.ja: CSAIのSTAR-for-AI Catastrophic Risk Annex、AARM、ATF仕様に加え、MicrosoftのZero Trust for AIガイダンスは、法定テーゼが依拠する技術基盤を構成する ― エージェント・アズ・ファーストクラス・アイデンティティ登録、MCPコールチェーンログ記録、アクションごとの同意は業界の自己規制を通じて収束している。立法側はまだ出荷していないが、CA / NY / TXの動きのための基盤は整っている。
text_locales.es: El STAR-for-AI Catastrophic Risk Annex de CSAI, las especificaciones AARM y ATF más la guía de Zero Trust for AI de Microsoft componen el sustrato técnico sobre el cual depende la tesis estatutaria — registro de agente-como-identidad-de-primera-clase, logging de cadena de llamadas MCP, y consentimiento por-acción están convergiendo a través de auto-regulación industrial. El lado legislativo aún no ha enviado pero el sustrato está en su lugar para un movimiento de CA / NY / TX.
text_locales.fil: Ang STAR-for-AI Catastrophic Risk Annex, AARM, at ATF specifications ng CSAI plus ang Zero Trust for AI guidance ng Microsoft ay bumubuo sa technical substrate na pinanindigan ng statutory thesis — agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent ay nagko-converge sa pamamagitan ng industry self-regulation. Ang legislative side ay hindi pa nag-ship ngunit ang substrate ay nasa lugar para sa CA / NY / TX move.

bridges.text: The CSA ATF framework + Novita Sandbox cover the technical substrate the prediction's statutory thesis depends on (agent-as-first-class-identity registration, per-action consent, MCP-call-chain logging) but the legislative side has not yet shipped. The substrate is in place for a CA / NY / TX move, not the move itself.

text_locales.en: The CSA ATF framework + Novita Sandbox cover the technical substrate the prediction's statutory thesis depends on (agent-as-first-class-identity registration, per-action consent, MCP-call-chain logging) but the legislative side has not yet shipped. The substrate is in place for a CA / NY / TX move, not the move itself.
text_locales.ja: CSA ATFフレームワーク + Novita Sandboxは、予測の法律的テーゼが依存する技術的基盤(エージェントを第一級アイデンティティとして登録、アクションごとの同意、MCP呼び出しチェーンログ)をカバーするが、立法側はまだ出荷していない。CA / NY / TXの動きのための基盤は整っているが、動き自体ではない。
text_locales.es: El framework ATF de CSA + Novita Sandbox cubren el sustrato técnico del que depende la tesis estatutaria de la predicción (registro de agente-como-identidad-de-primera-clase, consentimiento por acción, logging de cadena-de-llamadas-MCP) pero el lado legislativo aún no se ha enviado. El sustrato está en su sitio para un movimiento de CA / NY / TX, no el movimiento en sí.
text_locales.fil: Ang CSA ATF framework + Novita Sandbox ay sumasaklaw sa technical substrate na pinaghahangaan ng statutory thesis ng prediction (agent-as-first-class-identity registration, per-action consent, MCP-call-chain logging) ngunit ang legislative side ay hindi pa nagpapadala. Ang substrate ay nakalagay para sa CA / NY / TX move, hindi ang move mismo.

bridges.text: Cloud Security Alliance's zero-trust-for-AI-agents framing and Okta for AI Agents Apr 30 GA with Agent Discovery + virtual MCP server registry + credential vaulting + universal logout extend the structural force the prediction names: agent-as-first-class-identity is becoming the assumed baseline. The legislative branch has not moved in the window.

text_locales.en: Cloud Security Alliance's zero-trust-for-AI-agents framing and Okta for AI Agents Apr 30 GA with Agent Discovery + virtual MCP server registry + credential vaulting + universal logout extend the structural force the prediction names: agent-as-first-class-identity is becoming the assumed baseline. The legislative branch has not moved in the window.
text_locales.ja: Cloud Security AllianceのAIエージェント向けゼロトラスト・フレーミングと、Okta for AI Agents 4月30日GA(Agent Discovery + 仮想MCPサーバー・レジストリ + 認証情報保管 + ユニバーサル・ログアウト)が、予測が指摘する構造的な力を拡大する: ファーストクラスID としてのエージェントが想定ベースラインになりつつある。立法府はウィンドウ内で動いていない。
text_locales.es: El framing zero-trust-para-AI-agents de Cloud Security Alliance y el Okta for AI Agents GA del 30 de abril con Agent Discovery + virtual MCP server registry + credential vaulting + universal logout extienden la fuerza estructural que la prediccion nombra: agent-as-first-class-identity se esta convirtiendo en el baseline asumido. La rama legislativa no se ha movido en la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang zero-trust-for-AI-agents framing ng Cloud Security Alliance at ang Okta for AI Agents Apr 30 GA na may Agent Discovery + virtual MCP server registry + credential vaulting + universal logout ay nagpapalawak ng structural force na pinapangalanan ng hula: ang agent-as-first-class-identity ay nagiging assumed baseline. Ang legislative branch ay hindi gumalaw sa window.

bridges.text: Okta's imminent GA stabilizes the reference implementation the prediction expects a state statute to cite, while the broader zero-trust-for-agents consensus keeps the underlying-cause pressure on legislators visible — the cause side is loading even though the legislative artefact is still ahead.

text_locales.en: Okta's imminent GA stabilizes the reference implementation the prediction expects a state statute to cite, while the broader zero-trust-for-agents consensus keeps the underlying-cause pressure on legislators visible — the cause side is loading even though the legislative artefact is still ahead.
text_locales.ja: Okta の差し迫った GA は、予測が州法令が引用すると見込むリファレンス実装を安定化させ、より広いゼロトラスト for エージェントの合意が立法者への根底原因の圧力を可視に保つ — 原因側はロードしているが、立法アーティファクトはまだ先だ。
text_locales.es: El inminente GA de Okta estabiliza la implementación de referencia que la predicción espera que un estatuto estatal cite, mientras el consenso más amplio zero-trust-for-agents mantiene visible la presión de causa subyacente sobre los legisladores — el lado de causa se está cargando aunque el artefacto legislativo aún esté por delante.
text_locales.fil: Ang papalapit na GA ng Okta ay pinapatatag ang reference implementation na inaasahan ng prediction na ici-cite ng state statute, habang ang mas malawak na zero-trust-for-agents consensus ay pinapanatili ang underlying-cause pressure sa mga legislators na visible — naglo-load ang cause side kahit pa nasa unahan pa rin ang legislative artefact.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **AI への世論の反発が拘束力のあるエージェント・ガバナンス・ルールへ転化する — Q3 2026 までに、米国少なくとも 1 州が Okta の Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway パターンを反映した「自律エージェントの法定アイデンティティ」法を出荷する。** 4/16 の Altman 自宅への襲撃 + 4/15 の CNBC データセンター反発記事 + 4/26 の Salt Security データ (「組織の 48.9% が AI エージェントトラフィックを監視できない」) + **4/30** の Okta for AI Agents GA (Agent Discovery、Agent Gateway、仮想 MCP サーバレジストリ、認証情報の保管庫化 + 自動ローテーション、ユニバーサルログアウトを搭載) が、規制の前倒しを構成する。米国の 1 州 (CA、NY もしくは TX が有力) が Q3 2026 までに **エージェントをファーストクラスのアイデンティティとして登録すること、MCP コールチェーンのロギング、アクション単位の同意**を義務付ける法令を、Cross App Access プロトコルのセマンティクスを反映する形で出荷する。EU AI 法第 26 条の執行が並行して始動する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La reacción de la opinión pública contra la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes — para el Q3 2026 al menos un estado de EE.UU. entrega una Ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Autónomos" reflejando el patrón Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16 de abril a la casa de Altman + la pieza del 15 de abril de CNBC sobre la reacción contra los datacenters + los datos de Salt Security del 26 de abril ("48.9% de las organizaciones no pueden monitorear el tráfico de AI-agent") + Okta for AI Agents GA el **30 de abril** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual-MCP-server, vaulting de credenciales + auto-rotación, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE.UU. (CA, NY o TX probable) entrega un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga **el registro de agente como identidad de primera clase, el logging de la cadena de llamadas MCP y el consentimiento por acción**, reflejando la semántica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicación del Artículo 26 del EU AI Act se activa en paralelo. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI ay magiging binding agent-governance rules — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isang US state ay magpapadala ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na sumasalamin sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang Apr 16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + ang Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% ng orgs ay hindi makakapag-monitor ng AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA noong **Apr 30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ay bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ay magpapadala ng statute pagsapit ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na sumasalamin sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement ay magti-trigger nang parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry converges into draft RFC by Q3 2026
nodes.short_label: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry converges into draft RFC by Q3 2026
nodes.title: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry converges into draft RFC by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q3までに、Microsoft Agent 365の5月1日GAでのAWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platformとのレジストリ同期、Anthropic MCP SDKの月間~97Mダウンロード、並行する4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCoreスタックが、クラウド横断のエージェントID + MCPサーバーインベントリ + ツール呼び出しログスキーマを標準的な相互運用層として形式化する公開ドラフトRFC(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation作業部会)へと収斂する。** 強制力はエンタープライズ調達である。Microsoftが$15/user/moでM365管理画面統合を伴うレジストリ同期プリミティブを出荷すれば、AWS + Googleは並行する画面を露出するか、Microsoftスキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAIの4月29日のMITRE-CNA権限 + ATT&CK v19の命名済み手法(MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供する。4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GAは既にビルド/ランタイム層を標準化しているため、欠けているのはレジストリ同期が機能することを証明している相互運用プロトコル層だけだ。Microsoft + AWS + Googleが公開ドラフトRFCで三角測量することが期待される。なぜならベンダー固有のスキーマではM365 + Bedrock + Vertexのインストールベース錨点優位を失うからだ。平易な言葉で言えば: MicrosoftがAIエージェントIDをMicrosoft、Amazon、Googleクラウド間で動作させた — まもなく公開仕様がそれを固定化する。
description.es: **Para Q3 2026, la GA del 1 de mayo de Microsoft Agent 365 con Registry Sync hacia AWS Bedrock + la Plataforma de Agentes Empresariales Gemini de Google Cloud Vertex + el SDK MCP de Anthropic con ~97M de descargas mensuales + la convergencia paralela del 30 de abril del OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore se traduce en un borrador de RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo de IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema de identidad de agentes multi-nube + inventario de servidores MCP + registro de invocaciones de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la contratación empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega la primitiva de registry-sync a $15/usuario/mes con integración en la superficie de administración de M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema de Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI + las técnicas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 (compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue malicioso de agente) aportan la presión estandarizadora del lado de las amenazas; el OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA del 30 de abril ya estandarizan la capa de build/runtime, así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interoperabilidad que el registry-sync demuestra que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador público de RFC porque los esquemas vendor-específicos perderían la ventaja del ancla de base instalada de M365 + Bedrock + Vertex. En lenguaje sencillo: Microsoft acaba de hacer que los IDs de agentes de IA funcionen entre las nubes de Microsoft, Amazon y Google — pronto una especificación pública lo afianzará.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK na may ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel na Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magsasama-sama sa isang inilathalang draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nagbibigay ng pormal na anyo sa cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag inilabas na ng Microsoft ang registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, kailangang ilabas ng AWS + Google ang katumbas na surfaces o masisipsip sila sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority ng CSAI + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ang nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay nagsa-standardize na sa build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pinatunayan ng registry-sync na gumagana; inaasahang magta-triangulate ang Microsoft + AWS + Google sa isang pampublikong draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. Sa madaling salita: pinagana lang ng Microsoft ang AI agent IDs sa kabuuan ng Microsoft, Amazon, at Google clouds — malapit nang lumabas ang isang public spec na maglo-lock niyan.

reasoning.because: Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA ships Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex Gemini Enterprise as a working cross-cloud primitive.
reasoning.given: OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 + AgentCore standardize build / runtime, and CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 add the threat-side pressure.
reasoning.so_that: AWS, Azure, and Google triangulate on a published draft RFC for agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs rather than ceding the schema to one vendor.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI working-group draft RFC.
reasoning.plain_language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds; the three of them will soon publish a shared spec instead of fighting over it.

because.en: Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA ships Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex Gemini Enterprise as a working cross-cloud primitive.
because.ja: Microsoft Agent 365の5月1日GAは、AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex Gemini Enterpriseとのレジストリ同期を機能するクラウド横断プリミティブとして出荷した。
because.es: La GA del 1 de mayo de Microsoft Agent 365 entrega Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex Gemini Enterprise como una primitiva multi-nube en funcionamiento.
because.fil: Ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA ay naglalabas ng Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex Gemini Enterprise bilang gumaganang cross-cloud primitive.

given.en: OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 + AgentCore standardize build / runtime, and CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 add the threat-side pressure.
given.ja: OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 + AgentCoreがビルド/ランタイムを標準化し、CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19が脅威側の圧力を加える。
given.es: OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 + AgentCore estandarizan build / runtime, y CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 añaden la presión del lado de amenazas.
given.fil: Sina-standardize ng OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 + AgentCore ang build / runtime, at idinaragdag ng CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 ang threat-side pressure.

so_that.en: AWS, Azure, and Google triangulate on a published draft RFC for agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs rather than ceding the schema to one vendor.
so_that.ja: AWS、Azure、GoogleがエージェントID + MCPインベントリ + ツール呼び出しログのための公開ドラフトRFCで三角測量し、スキーマを単一ベンダーに譲ることを避ける。
so_that.es: AWS, Azure y Google triangulen sobre un borrador publicado de RFC para identidad de agentes + inventario MCP + registros de invocación de herramientas, en lugar de ceder el esquema a un solo proveedor.
so_that.fil: Magta-triangulate ang AWS, Azure, at Google sa isang inilathalang draft RFC para sa agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs sa halip na ibigay ang schema sa isang vendor.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI working-group draft RFC.
landing.ja: 2026年Q3までに、IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI作業部会のドラフトRFC。
landing.es: Para Q3 2026; borrador de RFC del grupo de trabajo IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI working-group draft RFC.

plain_language.en: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds; the three of them will soon publish a shared spec instead of fighting over it.
plain_language.ja: MicrosoftはAIエージェントIDをMicrosoft、Amazon、Googleクラウド間で動作させたばかりだ。3社はそれを巡って争うのではなく、まもなく共有仕様を公開する。
plain_language.es: Microsoft acaba de hacer que los IDs de agentes de IA funcionen entre las nubes de Microsoft, Amazon y Google; los tres pronto publicarán una especificación compartida en lugar de pelear por ella.
plain_language.fil: Pinagana ng Microsoft ang AI agent IDs sa Microsoft, Amazon, at Google clouds; malapit nang maglathala ang tatlong ito ng shared spec sa halip na mag-away tungkol dito.

title_locales.en: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry converges into draft RFC by Q3 2026
title_locales.ja: クラウド横断のエージェントID + MCPレジストリが2026年Q3までにRFCドラフトに収束する
title_locales.es: Identidad de agentes multi-nube + registro MCP converge en borrador de RFC para Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex, the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0, and CSAI MITRE-CNA pressure converge on a published interop layer. By Q3 2026 an IETF / OpenID / CSAI draft RFC for cross-cloud agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs is expected to ship.

summary_short_locales.en: Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex, the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0, and CSAI MITRE-CNA pressure converge on a published interop layer. By Q3 2026 an IETF / OpenID / CSAI draft RFC for cross-cloud agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs is expected to ship.
summary_short_locales.ja: Microsoft Agent 365 GAのAWS Bedrock + Google Vertexとのレジストリ同期、4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0、CSAI MITRE-CNA圧力が、公開された相互運用層へと収斂する。2026年Q3までに、クラウド横断のエージェントID + MCPインベントリ + ツール呼び出しログのためのIETF / OpenID / CSAIドラフトRFCの出荷が見込まれる。
summary_short_locales.es: La GA de Microsoft Agent 365 con Registry Sync hacia AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex, el OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 del 30 de abril, y la presión de CSAI MITRE-CNA convergen en una capa de interoperabilidad publicada. Para Q3 2026 se espera un borrador de RFC de IETF / OpenID / CSAI sobre identidad de agentes multi-nube + inventario MCP + registros de invocación de herramientas.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex, ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0, at ang CSAI MITRE-CNA pressure ay nagsasama-sama tungo sa isang inilathalang interop layer. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, inaasahang ilalabas ang isang IETF / OpenID / CSAI draft RFC para sa cross-cloud agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs.

bridges.text: Cisco's May 4 Astrix acquisition making non-human-identity discovery + governance an M&A primitive, plus the CSA first-pillar framing, plus ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers (roughly half with no authorization controls) keep the precondition warm: federal CISO offices and banking regulators now need a published-standard reference above the vendor-specific architecture diagrams.

text_locales.en: Cisco's May 4 Astrix acquisition making non-human-identity discovery + governance an M&A primitive, plus the CSA first-pillar framing, plus ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers (roughly half with no authorization controls) keep the precondition warm: federal CISO offices and banking regulators now need a published-standard reference above the vendor-specific architecture diagrams.
text_locales.ja: Ciscoの5月4日 Astrix買収が非人間アイデンティティのディスカバリ + ガバナンスをM&Aプリミティブにすること、CSAの第一の柱フレーミング、約7,000のインターネット公開MCPサーバー(およそ半数は認可制御なし)が前提条件を温存している: 連邦CISOオフィスと銀行規制当局は現在、ベンダー固有のアーキテクチャ図の上の公表された標準リファレンスを必要とする。
text_locales.es: La adquisición Astrix de Cisco del 4 de mayo haciendo del descubrimiento + gobernanza de identidad no humana una primitiva M&A, más el framing de primer pilar de CSA, más ~7,000 servidores MCP expuestos a internet (aproximadamente la mitad sin controles de autorización) mantienen caliente la precondición: las oficinas CISO federales y los reguladores bancarios ahora necesitan una referencia de estándar publicado por encima de los diagramas de arquitectura específicos de proveedores.
text_locales.fil: Ang May 4 Astrix acquisition ng Cisco na ginagawa ang non-human-identity discovery + governance bilang M&A primitive, plus ang first-pillar framing ng CSA, plus ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers (humigit-kumulang kalahati ay walang authorization controls) ay nagpapanatiling mainit ang precondition: ang federal CISO offices at banking regulators ngayon ay nangangailangan ng published-standard reference sa ibabaw ng vendor-specific architecture diagrams.

bridges.text: The RSAC-week Microsoft + Cisco + CSA convergence on agent-as-first-class-identity reinforces the structural force the prediction names: the platform-side schema-lock pressure on AWS + Google is now operative, but no working group publishes a public draft RFC in the window.

text_locales.en: The RSAC-week Microsoft + Cisco + CSA convergence on agent-as-first-class-identity reinforces the structural force the prediction names: the platform-side schema-lock pressure on AWS + Google is now operative, but no working group publishes a public draft RFC in the window.
text_locales.ja: RSACウィークのMicrosoft + Cisco + CSAのエージェントをファーストクラス・アイデンティティとして扱うことへの収斂は、予測が指摘する構造的な強制力を強化する: AWS + Googleに対するプラットフォーム側のスキーマロック・プレッシャーは現在運用されているが、ワーキンググループはウィンドウ内で公開草案RFCを公表しない。
text_locales.es: La convergencia de Microsoft + Cisco + CSA durante la semana RSAC sobre agente-como-identidad-de-primera-clase refuerza la fuerza estructural que la predicción nombra: la presión de bloqueo de esquema del lado plataforma sobre AWS + Google ahora es operativa, pero ningún grupo de trabajo publica un borrador RFC público en la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang RSAC-week Microsoft + Cisco + CSA convergence sa agent-as-first-class-identity ay nagpapatibay sa structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction: ang platform-side schema-lock pressure sa AWS + Google ay aktibo na ngayon, ngunit walang working group na naglalathala ng public draft RFC sa window.

needs.actor: CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA working-group lead
needs.job: publish ATT&CK v19 alignment guidance plus a CVE-disclosure cadence that maps cross-cloud MCP-server compromise and malicious agent deployment onto the draft RFC's schema before Q3 2026
needs.outcome: a CSAI Foundation document tying ATT&CK v19 named techniques to the cross-cloud agent-identity + tool-invocation log schema with a quarterly disclosure cadence
needs.motivation: without a threat-side anchor that maps to the same schema, the RFC reads as a commercial accord rather than a security-grade interop layer

motivation_locales.en: without a threat-side anchor that maps to the same schema, the RFC reads as a commercial accord rather than a security-grade interop layer

motivation_locales.es: sin un ancla del lado de amenazas que se mapee al mismo esquema, el RFC se lee como un acuerdo comercial en lugar de una capa de interoperabilidad de grado de seguridad
motivation_locales.fil: kung walang threat-side anchor na naka-mapa sa parehong schema, ang RFC ay nababasa bilang commercial accord sa halip na security-grade interop layer

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q3までに、Microsoft Agent 365の5月1日GAでのAWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platformとのレジストリ同期、Anthropic MCP SDKの月間~97Mダウンロード、並行する4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCoreスタックが、クラウド横断のエージェントID + MCPサーバーインベントリ + ツール呼び出しログスキーマを標準的な相互運用層として形式化する公開ドラフトRFC(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation作業部会)へと収斂する。** 強制力はエンタープライズ調達である。Microsoftが$15/user/moでM365管理画面統合を伴うレジストリ同期プリミティブを出荷すれば、AWS + Googleは並行する画面を露出するか、Microsoftスキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAIの4月29日のMITRE-CNA権限 + ATT&CK v19の命名済み手法(MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供する。4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GAは既にビルド/ランタイム層を標準化しているため、欠けているのはレジストリ同期が機能することを証明している相互運用プロトコル層だけだ。Microsoft + AWS + Googleが公開ドラフトRFCで三角測量することが期待される。なぜならベンダー固有のスキーマではM365 + Bedrock + Vertexのインストールベース錨点優位を失うからだ。平易な言葉で言えば: MicrosoftがAIエージェントIDをMicrosoft、Amazon、Googleクラウド間で動作させた — まもなく公開仕様がそれを固定化する。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q3 2026, la GA del 1 de mayo de Microsoft Agent 365 con Registry Sync hacia AWS Bedrock + la Plataforma de Agentes Empresariales Gemini de Google Cloud Vertex + el SDK MCP de Anthropic con ~97M de descargas mensuales + la convergencia paralela del 30 de abril del OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore se traduce en un borrador de RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo de IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema de identidad de agentes multi-nube + inventario de servidores MCP + registro de invocaciones de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la contratación empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega la primitiva de registry-sync a $15/usuario/mes con integración en la superficie de administración de M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema de Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI + las técnicas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 (compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue malicioso de agente) aportan la presión estandarizadora del lado de las amenazas; el OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA del 30 de abril ya estandarizan la capa de build/runtime, así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interoperabilidad que el registry-sync demuestra que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador público de RFC porque los esquemas vendor-específicos perderían la ventaja del ancla de base instalada de M365 + Bedrock + Vertex. En lenguaje sencillo: Microsoft acaba de hacer que los IDs de agentes de IA funcionen entre las nubes de Microsoft, Amazon y Google — pronto una especificación pública lo afianzará.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK na may ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel na Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magsasama-sama sa isang inilathalang draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nagbibigay ng pormal na anyo sa cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag inilabas na ng Microsoft ang registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, kailangang ilabas ng AWS + Google ang katumbas na surfaces o masisipsip sila sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority ng CSAI + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ang nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay nagsa-standardize na sa build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pinatunayan ng registry-sync na gumagana; inaasahang magta-triangulate ang Microsoft + AWS + Google sa isang pampublikong draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. Sa madaling salita: pinagana lang ng Microsoft ang AI agent IDs sa kabuuan ng Microsoft, Amazon, at Google clouds — malapit nang lumabas ang isang public spec na maglo-lock niyan.

nodes.label: Hyperscaler publishes analogous JV template with ethics carveouts by Q4 2026
nodes.short_label: Hyperscaler publishes analogous JV template with ethics carveouts by Q4 2026
nodes.title: Hyperscaler publishes analogous JV template with ethics carveouts by Q4 2026
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 the May 4 parallel-JV launch — Anthropic's $1.5B enterprise-AI joint venture with Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M each commitment) + OpenAI's parallel "The Development Company" announcement — combined with the May 1 8-vendor Pentagon classified-network exclusion (Anthropic explicitly out, existing deployments on a 6-month sunset window), the Apr 7 Anthropic Project Glasswing gated-distribution precedent (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs, $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations), and the Apr 28 - May 1 RSAC 2026 stack (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trust framing) forces ≥1 hyperscaler partner (Microsoft / AWS / Google) to publish a structurally analogous JV template with mandatory ethics-carveout language + audited AI-services-revenue-share segment in a 10-Q footnote.** Forcing function is the dual disclosure-pressure: the buyside is being asked to fund $50B (Anthropic round) + $122B (OpenAI round) + the parallel JV stacks without a comparable disclosure shape from the hyperscalers whose Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex deployments are the operative service-delivery substrate. The hyperscaler that publishes first locks in the template. The Microsoft May 1 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release are the operative anchor signals; Microsoft is the most-likely first mover because Bedrock-equivalent Foundry already has the audited-AI-revenue precedent set by the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line-item disclosure, and Microsoft has Anthropic Mythos + Claude integration through Foundry to make a parallel JV plausible. In plain language: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By Q4 2026 the May 4 parallel-JV launch — Anthropic's $1.5B enterprise-AI joint venture with Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M each commitment) + OpenAI's parallel "The Development Company" announcement — combined with the May 1 8-vendor Pentagon classified-network exclusion (Anthropic explicitly out, existing deployments on a 6-month sunset window), the Apr 7 Anthropic Project Glasswing gated-distribution precedent (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs, $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations), and the Apr 28 - May 1 RSAC 2026 stack (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trust framing) forces ≥1 hyperscaler partner (Microsoft / AWS / Google) to publish a structurally analogous JV template with mandatory ethics-carveout language + audited AI-services-revenue-share segment in a 10-Q footnote.** Forcing function is the dual disclosure-pressure: the buyside is being asked to fund $50B (Anthropic round) + $122B (OpenAI round) + the parallel JV stacks without a comparable disclosure shape from the hyperscalers whose Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex deployments are the operative service-delivery substrate. The hyperscaler that publishes first locks in the template. The Microsoft May 1 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release are the operative anchor signals; Microsoft is the most-likely first mover because Bedrock-equivalent Foundry already has the audited-AI-revenue precedent set by the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line-item disclosure, and Microsoft has Anthropic Mythos + Claude integration through Foundry to make a parallel JV plausible. In plain language: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q4までに、5月4日の並行JVローンチ — AnthropicのBlackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachsとの$1.5BエンタープライズAI合弁(各社$300Mコミット) + OpenAIの並行「The Development Company」発表 — に、5月1日の8ベンダーPentagon機密ネットワーク除外(Anthropicは明示的に除外、既存導入は6ヶ月のサンセット期間)、4月7日のAnthropic Project Glasswingゲート配布前例(約50のローンチパートナー + 約40の重要ソフトウェアインフラ組織、$100Mの利用クレジット + $4Mのオープンソースセキュリティ寄付)、4月28日〜5月1日のRSAC 2026スタック(Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trustフレーミング)が組み合わさり、1社以上のハイパースケーラー・パートナー(Microsoft / AWS / Google)に対し、必須の倫理カーブアウト言語 + 監査済みAIサービス売上シェアセグメントを10-Q脚注に含めた構造的に類似のJVテンプレートを公表することを強いる。** 強制関数は二重の開示プレッシャー: バイサイドは$50B(Anthropicラウンド) + $122B(OpenAIラウンド) + 並行JVスタックの資金供給を求められているが、Bedrock / Foundry / Vertexの展開が運用上のサービス提供基盤となっているハイパースケーラーからは同等の開示形状が出ていない。最初に公表したハイパースケーラーがテンプレートを固定する。Microsoftの5月1日 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClawオープンソースリリースが運用上のアンカーシグナル。Microsoftが最有力の先駆者となる根拠は、Bedrock相当のFoundryが4月29日の$37B AIランレート単一ライン項目開示で監査済みAI売上前例を既に確立しており、加えてMicrosoftはAnthropic Mythos + Foundry経由のClaude統合を持つため並行JVが現実的になる点。In plain language: PentagonがAnthropicを締め出した後、AnthropicとOpenAIは同日に投資家資金で支えられた事業部門を立ち上げた — 近いうちにクラウド企業がその形をコピーするだろう。In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para Q4 2026, el lanzamiento paralelo de JV del 4 de mayo — la JV de IA empresarial de $1.5B de Anthropic con Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M de compromiso cada uno) + el anuncio paralelo de OpenAI "The Development Company" — combinado con la exclusión del 1 de mayo de 8 proveedores en la red clasificada del Pentagon (Anthropic explícitamente fuera, despliegues existentes con una ventana de extinción de 6 meses), el precedente de distribución gated del Project Glasswing de Anthropic del 7 de abril (~50 socios de lanzamiento + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software, $100M en créditos de uso + $4M en donaciones de seguridad open-source), y la pila RSAC 2026 del 28 de abril - 1 de mayo (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + framing de Zero Trust de CSA) obliga a ≥1 socio hyperscaler (Microsoft / AWS / Google) a publicar una plantilla de JV estructuralmente análoga con lenguaje obligatorio de exclusión ética + segmento auditado de participación en ingresos de servicios de IA en una nota al pie del 10-Q.** La función forzante es la doble presión de divulgación: se le pide al lado comprador financiar $50B (ronda de Anthropic) + $122B (ronda de OpenAI) + las pilas paralelas de JV sin una forma comparable de divulgación de los hyperscalers cuyos despliegues de Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex son el sustrato operativo de entrega de servicio. El hyperscaler que publique primero bloquea la plantilla. La GA de Microsoft Agent 365 del 1 de mayo + el lanzamiento open-source de Cisco DefenseClaw son las señales ancla operativas; Microsoft es el que más probablemente moverá primero porque Foundry, equivalente a Bedrock, ya tiene el precedente auditado de ingresos de IA establecido por la divulgación de partida única de la tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B del 29 de abril, y Microsoft tiene la integración de Anthropic Mythos + Claude a través de Foundry para hacer plausible una JV paralela. In plain language: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang May 4 parallel-JV launch — ang $1.5B enterprise-AI joint venture ng Anthropic kasama ang Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M each commitment) + ang parallel "The Development Company" announcement ng OpenAI — pinagsama sa May 1 8-vendor Pentagon classified-network exclusion (tahasang inalis ang Anthropic, may 6-month sunset window ang umiiral na deployments), ang Apr 7 Anthropic Project Glasswing gated-distribution precedent (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs, $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations), at ang Apr 28 - May 1 RSAC 2026 stack (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trust framing) ay pumipilit ng ≥1 hyperscaler partner (Microsoft / AWS / Google) na maglathala ng structurally analogous JV template na may mandatoryong ethics-carveout language + audited AI-services-revenue-share segment sa 10-Q footnote.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual disclosure-pressure: hinihingi sa buyside na pondohan ang $50B (Anthropic round) + $122B (OpenAI round) + ang parallel JV stacks nang walang katumbas na disclosure shape mula sa mga hyperscaler na ang Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex deployments ang siyang operative service-delivery substrate. Ang hyperscaler na unang maglathala ay nag-lalock-in ng template. Ang Microsoft May 1 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release ang siyang operative anchor signals; ang Microsoft ang pinakamalamang na first mover dahil ang Bedrock-equivalent Foundry ay mayroon nang audited-AI-revenue precedent na itinakda ng Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line-item disclosure, at mayroon ang Microsoft ng Anthropic Mythos + Claude integration sa pamamagitan ng Foundry upang gawing posible ang parallel JV. In plain language: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape. In plain language: In plain language:
