because.fil: Parehong inilunsad ng Anthropic + OpenAI ang parallel investor-funded enterprise-AI JVs sa parehong May 4 news cycle.

given.en: Pentagon's May 1 8-vendor exclusion forces frontier labs to ship a structured commercial-deployment shape outside classified procurement.
given.ja: Pentagonの5月1日の8ベンダー除外が、フロンティア・ラボに対し機密調達の外側で構造化された商業展開形状を出荷することを強いている。
given.es: La exclusión de 8 proveedores del Pentagon del 1 de mayo obliga a los laboratorios de frontera a entregar una forma estructurada de despliegue comercial fuera de la adquisición clasificada.
given.fil: Pinipilit ng May 1 8-vendor exclusion ng Pentagon ang frontier labs na magpadala ng structured commercial-deployment shape sa labas ng classified procurement.

so_that.en: ≥1 hyperscaler partner ships an analogous JV template with mandatory ethics carveouts + audited AI-services-revenue-share footnote.
so_that.ja: 1社以上のハイパースケーラー・パートナーが、必須の倫理カーブアウト + 監査済みAIサービス売上シェア脚注を含む類似のJVテンプレートを出荷する。
so_that.es: ≥1 socio hyperscaler entrega una plantilla de JV análoga con exclusiones éticas obligatorias + nota al pie de participación auditada en ingresos de servicios de IA.
so_that.fil: ≥1 hyperscaler partner ang nagpapadala ng analogous JV template na may mandatoryong ethics carveouts + audited AI-services-revenue-share footnote.

landing.en: By Q4 2026; Microsoft most-likely first mover via Foundry + Anthropic Mythos integration.
landing.ja: 2026年Q4までに。MicrosoftがFoundry + Anthropic Mythos統合を経由する最有力の先駆者。
landing.es: Para Q4 2026; Microsoft es el más probable primer movedor a través de la integración de Foundry + Anthropic Mythos.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q4 2026; ang Microsoft ang pinakamalamang na first mover sa pamamagitan ng Foundry + Anthropic Mythos integration.

plain_language.en: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape.
plain_language.ja: PentagonがAnthropicを締め出した後、AnthropicとOpenAIは同日に投資家資金で支えられた事業部門を立ち上げた — 近いうちにクラウド企業がその形をコピーするだろう。
plain_language.es: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape.
plain_language.fil: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape.

title_locales.en: Hyperscaler publishes analogous JV template with ethics carveouts by Q4 2026
title_locales.ja: ハイパースケーラーが倫理的除外規定を含む類似のJVテンプレートを2026年Q4までに公表する
title_locales.es: Hyperscaler publica plantilla de JV analoga con excepciones eticas para Q4 2026
title_locales.fil: Maglalabas ang hyperscaler ng katulad na JV template na may ethics carveouts pagsapit ng Q4 2026

detail.summary_short: On May 4 Anthropic launched a $1.5B enterprise-AI JV with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs while OpenAI announced a parallel "The Development Company" arm. Combined with the May 1 Pentagon exclusion of Anthropic, by Q4 2026 a hyperscaler partner is expected to publish a structurally analogous JV template with audited AI-services-revenue-share disclosure.

summary_short_locales.en: On May 4 Anthropic launched a $1.5B enterprise-AI JV with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs while OpenAI announced a parallel "The Development Company" arm. Combined with the May 1 Pentagon exclusion of Anthropic, by Q4 2026 a hyperscaler partner is expected to publish a structurally analogous JV template with audited AI-services-revenue-share disclosure.
summary_short_locales.ja: 5月4日、AnthropicはBlackstone、Hellman & Friedman、Goldman Sachsと$1.5BのエンタープライズAI JVをローンチし、OpenAIは並行する「The Development Company」部門を発表した。5月1日のPentagonによるAnthropic除外と組み合わさり、2026年Q4までに、ハイパースケーラー・パートナーが監査済みAIサービス売上シェア開示を伴う構造的に類似のJVテンプレートを公表することが期待される。
summary_short_locales.es: El 4 de mayo Anthropic lanzó una JV de IA empresarial de $1.5B con Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman y Goldman Sachs mientras que OpenAI anunció una rama paralela "The Development Company". Combinado con la exclusión de Anthropic del Pentagon del 1 de mayo, para Q4 2026 se espera que un socio hyperscaler publique una plantilla de JV estructuralmente análoga con divulgación auditada de participación en ingresos de servicios de IA.
summary_short_locales.fil: Noong May 4, inilunsad ng Anthropic ang $1.5B enterprise-AI JV kasama ang Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, at Goldman Sachs habang inanunsyo ng OpenAI ang parallel "The Development Company" arm. Pinagsama sa May 1 Pentagon exclusion ng Anthropic, pagsapit ng Q4 2026 inaasahan na maglathala ang isang hyperscaler partner ng structurally analogous JV template na may audited AI-services-revenue-share disclosure.

bridges.text: The May 5 Anthropic 10-agent finance launch with native Microsoft 365 add-ins, MCP connectors to Moody's + D&B + IBISWorld, and Citadel + BNY + Carlyle adopters — combined with the May 4 FIS AML co-build — directly advances the consequence the hyperscaler JV-template prediction (May 4) names: the structured-equity wrapper is operationalized as vertical-product distribution within the same week, Anthropic run-rate exceeding $30B.

text_locales.en: The May 5 Anthropic 10-agent finance launch with native Microsoft 365 add-ins, MCP connectors to Moody's + D&B + IBISWorld, and Citadel + BNY + Carlyle adopters — combined with the May 4 FIS AML co-build — directly advances the consequence the hyperscaler JV-template prediction (May 4) names: the structured-equity wrapper is operationalized as vertical-product distribution within the same week, Anthropic run-rate exceeding $30B.
text_locales.ja: 5月5日のAnthropicによる10エージェントの金融ローンチは、ネイティブMicrosoft 365アドイン、Moody's + D&B + IBISWorldへのMCPコネクター、Citadel + BNY + Carlyleの採用顧客とともに — 5月4日のFIS AML共同構築と組み合わさり — ハイパースケーラーJVテンプレート予測(5月4日)が指摘する帰結を直接前進させる: 構造化エクイティ・ラッパーは同じ週内に垂直製品配布として運用化され、Anthropicのランレートは $30B を超える。
text_locales.es: El lanzamiento de 10 agentes financieros de Anthropic del 5 de mayo con complementos nativos para Microsoft 365, conectores MCP a Moody's + D&B + IBISWorld, y adoptantes Citadel + BNY + Carlyle — combinado con el co-build AML de FIS del 4 de mayo — avanza directamente la consecuencia que la predicción de la plantilla JV del hyperscaler (4 de mayo) nombra: el envoltorio de capital estructurado se operacionaliza como distribución de productos verticales dentro de la misma semana, con la tasa de ejecución de Anthropic superando $30B.
text_locales.fil: Ang May 5 Anthropic 10-agent finance launch na may native Microsoft 365 add-ins, MCP connectors sa Moody's + D&B + IBISWorld, at Citadel + BNY + Carlyle adopters — pinagsama sa May 4 FIS AML co-build — ay direktang nagpapasulong sa consequence na pinangalanan ng hyperscaler JV-template prediction (May 4): ang structured-equity wrapper ay operational na bilang vertical-product distribution sa loob ng parehong linggo, na ang Anthropic run-rate ay lumalampas sa $30B.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q4 2026 the May 4 parallel-JV launch — Anthropic's $1.5B enterprise-AI joint venture with Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M each commitment) + OpenAI's parallel "The Development Company" announcement — combined with the May 1 8-vendor Pentagon classified-network exclusion (Anthropic explicitly out, existing deployments on a 6-month sunset window), the Apr 7 Anthropic Project Glasswing gated-distribution precedent (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs, $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations), and the Apr 28 - May 1 RSAC 2026 stack (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trust framing) forces ≥1 hyperscaler partner (Microsoft / AWS / Google) to publish a structurally analogous JV template with mandatory ethics-carveout language + audited AI-services-revenue-share segment in a 10-Q footnote.** Forcing function is the dual disclosure-pressure: the buyside is being asked to fund $50B (Anthropic round) + $122B (OpenAI round) + the parallel JV stacks without a comparable disclosure shape from the hyperscalers whose Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex deployments are the operative service-delivery substrate. The hyperscaler that publishes first locks in the template. The Microsoft May 1 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release are the operative anchor signals; Microsoft is the most-likely first mover because Bedrock-equivalent Foundry already has the audited-AI-revenue precedent set by the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line-item disclosure, and Microsoft has Anthropic Mythos + Claude integration through Foundry to make a parallel JV plausible. In plain language: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q4までに、5月4日の並行JVローンチ — AnthropicのBlackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachsとの$1.5BエンタープライズAI合弁(各社$300Mコミット) + OpenAIの並行「The Development Company」発表 — に、5月1日の8ベンダーPentagon機密ネットワーク除外(Anthropicは明示的に除外、既存導入は6ヶ月のサンセット期間)、4月7日のAnthropic Project Glasswingゲート配布前例(約50のローンチパートナー + 約40の重要ソフトウェアインフラ組織、$100Mの利用クレジット + $4Mのオープンソースセキュリティ寄付)、4月28日〜5月1日のRSAC 2026スタック(Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trustフレーミング)が組み合わさり、1社以上のハイパースケーラー・パートナー(Microsoft / AWS / Google)に対し、必須の倫理カーブアウト言語 + 監査済みAIサービス売上シェアセグメントを10-Q脚注に含めた構造的に類似のJVテンプレートを公表することを強いる。** 強制関数は二重の開示プレッシャー: バイサイドは$50B(Anthropicラウンド) + $122B(OpenAIラウンド) + 並行JVスタックの資金供給を求められているが、Bedrock / Foundry / Vertexの展開が運用上のサービス提供基盤となっているハイパースケーラーからは同等の開示形状が出ていない。最初に公表したハイパースケーラーがテンプレートを固定する。Microsoftの5月1日 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClawオープンソースリリースが運用上のアンカーシグナル。Microsoftが最有力の先駆者となる根拠は、Bedrock相当のFoundryが4月29日の$37B AIランレート単一ライン項目開示で監査済みAI売上前例を既に確立しており、加えてMicrosoftはAnthropic Mythos + Foundry経由のClaude統合を持つため並行JVが現実的になる点。In plain language: PentagonがAnthropicを締め出した後、AnthropicとOpenAIは同日に投資家資金で支えられた事業部門を立ち上げた — 近いうちにクラウド企業がその形をコピーするだろう。In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q4 2026, el lanzamiento paralelo de JV del 4 de mayo — la JV de IA empresarial de $1.5B de Anthropic con Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M de compromiso cada uno) + el anuncio paralelo de OpenAI "The Development Company" — combinado con la exclusión del 1 de mayo de 8 proveedores en la red clasificada del Pentagon (Anthropic explícitamente fuera, despliegues existentes con una ventana de extinción de 6 meses), el precedente de distribución gated del Project Glasswing de Anthropic del 7 de abril (~50 socios de lanzamiento + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software, $100M en créditos de uso + $4M en donaciones de seguridad open-source), y la pila RSAC 2026 del 28 de abril - 1 de mayo (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + framing de Zero Trust de CSA) obliga a ≥1 socio hyperscaler (Microsoft / AWS / Google) a publicar una plantilla de JV estructuralmente análoga con lenguaje obligatorio de exclusión ética + segmento auditado de participación en ingresos de servicios de IA en una nota al pie del 10-Q.** La función forzante es la doble presión de divulgación: se le pide al lado comprador financiar $50B (ronda de Anthropic) + $122B (ronda de OpenAI) + las pilas paralelas de JV sin una forma comparable de divulgación de los hyperscalers cuyos despliegues de Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex son el sustrato operativo de entrega de servicio. El hyperscaler que publique primero bloquea la plantilla. La GA de Microsoft Agent 365 del 1 de mayo + el lanzamiento open-source de Cisco DefenseClaw son las señales ancla operativas; Microsoft es el que más probablemente moverá primero porque Foundry, equivalente a Bedrock, ya tiene el precedente auditado de ingresos de IA establecido por la divulgación de partida única de la tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B del 29 de abril, y Microsoft tiene la integración de Anthropic Mythos + Claude a través de Foundry para hacer plausible una JV paralela. In plain language: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang May 4 parallel-JV launch — ang $1.5B enterprise-AI joint venture ng Anthropic kasama ang Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M each commitment) + ang parallel "The Development Company" announcement ng OpenAI — pinagsama sa May 1 8-vendor Pentagon classified-network exclusion (tahasang inalis ang Anthropic, may 6-month sunset window ang umiiral na deployments), ang Apr 7 Anthropic Project Glasswing gated-distribution precedent (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs, $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations), at ang Apr 28 - May 1 RSAC 2026 stack (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trust framing) ay pumipilit ng ≥1 hyperscaler partner (Microsoft / AWS / Google) na maglathala ng structurally analogous JV template na may mandatoryong ethics-carveout language + audited AI-services-revenue-share segment sa 10-Q footnote.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual disclosure-pressure: hinihingi sa buyside na pondohan ang $50B (Anthropic round) + $122B (OpenAI round) + ang parallel JV stacks nang walang katumbas na disclosure shape mula sa mga hyperscaler na ang Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex deployments ang siyang operative service-delivery substrate. Ang hyperscaler na unang maglathala ay nag-lalock-in ng template. Ang Microsoft May 1 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release ang siyang operative anchor signals; ang Microsoft ang pinakamalamang na first mover dahil ang Bedrock-equivalent Foundry ay mayroon nang audited-AI-revenue precedent na itinakda ng Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line-item disclosure, at mayroon ang Microsoft ng Anthropic Mythos + Claude integration sa pamamagitan ng Foundry upang gawing posible ang parallel JV. In plain language: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape. In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: NIST publishes non-human-identity control profile by Q4 2026

nodes.title: NIST publishes non-human-identity control profile by Q4 2026
nodes.description: Cisco's May 4 $400M Astrix Security acquisition makes non-human-identity (NHI) governance an explicit M&A-tier primitive on the same week as Microsoft Agent 365 GA (May 1, $15/user/mo M365 E7 SKU with per-agent Defender relationship map + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) and the May 1 Cloud Security Alliance posting that names identity as Zero Trust's first pillar in the agentic-AI era. The structural backdrop is severe: ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers as of early 2026 with roughly half operating with no authorization controls, AI agents and other non-human identities now outnumber human users ~100:1 in major enterprises (per Cisco's customer survey), and MCP itself ships with no built-in identity, no least-privilege enforcement, and no audit trail. Cisco's planned integration of Astrix into Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM converges with Microsoft's per-agent identity model into a de-facto two-vendor NHI control-plane primitive — but the procurement tier above (federal CISO offices, banking regulators, healthcare HIPAA-scoped buyers) requires a published-standard reference, not a vendor-specific architecture diagram. By Q4 2026 NIST is expected to publish a dedicated NHI control profile (most likely as a SP 800-207-series Zero Trust supplement or an SP 800-53 control-family overlay) treating machine identities, agent identities, and service-account identities as a distinct compliance category with discovery, lifecycle, least-privilege, and audit-trail control families. CISA agentic-AI guidance and SEC cyber-disclosure-rule commentary follow within one quarter via the same forcing function — the $400M Astrix M&A price tag is itself a regulator-readable signal that the category has crossed into balance-sheet materiality.

description.en: Cisco's May 4 $400M Astrix Security acquisition makes non-human-identity (NHI) governance an explicit M&A-tier primitive on the same week as Microsoft Agent 365 GA (May 1, $15/user/mo M365 E7 SKU with per-agent Defender relationship map + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) and the May 1 Cloud Security Alliance posting that names identity as Zero Trust's first pillar in the agentic-AI era. The structural backdrop is severe: ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers as of early 2026 with roughly half operating with no authorization controls, AI agents and other non-human identities now outnumber human users ~100:1 in major enterprises (per Cisco's customer survey), and MCP itself ships with no built-in identity, no least-privilege enforcement, and no audit trail. Cisco's planned integration of Astrix into Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM converges with Microsoft's per-agent identity model into a de-facto two-vendor NHI control-plane primitive — but the procurement tier above (federal CISO offices, banking regulators, healthcare HIPAA-scoped buyers) requires a published-standard reference, not a vendor-specific architecture diagram. By Q4 2026 NIST is expected to publish a dedicated NHI control profile (most likely as a SP 800-207-series Zero Trust supplement or an SP 800-53 control-family overlay) treating machine identities, agent identities, and service-account identities as a distinct compliance category with discovery, lifecycle, least-privilege, and audit-trail control families. CISA agentic-AI guidance and SEC cyber-disclosure-rule commentary follow within one quarter via the same forcing function — the $400M Astrix M&A price tag is itself a regulator-readable signal that the category has crossed into balance-sheet materiality.
description.ja: 5月4日のCiscoによる$400MのAstrix Security買収は、5月1日のMicrosoft Agent 365 GA($15/ユーザー/月のM365 E7 SKU、エージェント単位のDefenderリレーションシップマップ + Entra ID + Purview + Intune)、そしてエージェントAI時代のZero Trust第一の柱としてアイデンティティを名指しした5月1日のCloud Security Alliance投稿と同じ週に、非人間アイデンティティ(NHI)ガバナンスを明示的なM&A階層のプリミティブにする。構造的な背景は深刻だ: 2026年初頭時点で約7,000のインターネット公開MCPサーバーがあり、その約半数が認可コントロールなしで稼働、AIエージェントその他の非人間アイデンティティが大手企業内で人間ユーザーを約100:1で上回る(Ciscoの顧客調査)、そしてMCP自体は組み込みアイデンティティ、最小権限、監査証跡を一切備えていない。CiscoによるAstrixのCisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAMへの統合計画は、Microsoftのエージェント単位アイデンティティ・モデルと収斂してデファクトの2ベンダーNHIコントロール・プレーン・プリミティブを形成する — しかしその上の調達階層(連邦CISOオフィス、銀行規制当局、HIPAAスコープのヘルスケア・バイヤー)は、ベンダー固有のアーキテクチャ図ではなく公表標準のリファレンスを要求する。2026年Q4までに、NISTは専用のNHIコントロール・プロファイルを公表することが期待される(SP 800-207系のZero Trust補遺、もしくはSP 800-53コントロール・ファミリー・オーバーレイの形が最有力)。マシン・アイデンティティ、エージェント・アイデンティティ、サービス・アカウント・アイデンティティを、発見、ライフサイクル、最小権限、監査証跡のコントロール・ファミリーを伴う独立したコンプライアンス・カテゴリとして扱う。CISAのエージェントAIガイダンスとSECのサイバー開示ルール・コメンタリーは同じ強制関数で1四半期以内に追随する — $400MのAstrix M&A価格自体が、カテゴリがバランスシート重要性に達したことを示す規制当局可読のシグナルである。
description.es: La adquisición del 4 de mayo de Astrix Security por $400M de Cisco hace de la gobernanza de identidad no-humana (NHI) un primitivo explícito de nivel M&A en la misma semana que la GA de Microsoft Agent 365 (1 de mayo, SKU M365 E7 a $15/user/mo con mapa de relaciones por agente de Defender + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) y la publicación del 1 de mayo de Cloud Security Alliance que nombra a la identidad como el primer pilar de Zero Trust en la era de la IA agéntica. El telón de fondo estructural es severo: ~7,000 servidores MCP expuestos a internet a comienzos de 2026 con aproximadamente la mitad operando sin controles de autorización, los agentes de IA y otras identidades no-humanas ahora superan en número a los usuarios humanos ~100:1 en empresas grandes (según la encuesta de clientes de Cisco), y MCP mismo se entrega sin identidad incorporada, sin aplicación de mínimo privilegio y sin pista de auditoría. La integración planeada de Astrix por Cisco en Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM converge con el modelo de identidad por agente de Microsoft hacia un primitivo de plano de control de NHI de facto de dos vendors — pero el nivel de adquisición superior (oficinas federales de CISO, reguladores bancarios, compradores con alcance HIPAA en salud) requiere una referencia de estándar publicado, no un diagrama de arquitectura específico de vendor. Para Q4 2026 se espera que NIST publique un perfil de control de NHI dedicado (más probablemente como un suplemento de la serie SP 800-207 de Zero Trust o una superposición de familia de controles de SP 800-53) tratando las identidades de máquina, identidades de agente e identidades de cuentas de servicio como una categoría de cumplimiento distinta con familias de controles de descubrimiento, ciclo de vida, mínimo privilegio y pista de auditoría. La guía de IA agéntica de CISA y el comentario de la regla de divulgación cibernética de la SEC siguen dentro de un trimestre vía la misma función forzante — el precio de M&A de Astrix de $400M es en sí mismo una señal legible para reguladores de que la categoría ha cruzado a materialidad de balance.
description.fil: Ang May 4 $400M Astrix Security acquisition ng Cisco ay ginagawang explicit M&A-tier primitive ang non-human-identity (NHI) governance sa parehong linggo ng Microsoft Agent 365 GA (May 1, $15/user/mo M365 E7 SKU na may per-agent Defender relationship map + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) at ng May 1 Cloud Security Alliance posting na nagngangalan sa identity bilang unang pillar ng Zero Trust sa agentic-AI era. Malala ang structural backdrop: ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers noong unang bahagi ng 2026 na halos kalahati ay tumatakbo nang walang authorization controls, ang AI agents at ibang non-human identities ay ngayon mas marami kaysa sa human users sa ratio na ~100:1 sa mga major enterprises (ayon sa Cisco customer survey), at ang MCP mismo ay nag-ship nang walang built-in identity, walang least-privilege enforcement, at walang audit trail. Ang planned integration ng Cisco ng Astrix sa Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM ay nag-co-converge sa per-agent identity model ng Microsoft papasok sa de-facto two-vendor NHI control-plane primitive — ngunit ang procurement tier sa itaas (federal CISO offices, banking regulators, healthcare HIPAA-scoped buyers) ay nangangailangan ng nailathalang-pamantayang reference, hindi vendor-specific architecture diagram. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, inaasahan na maglathala ang NIST ng nakatuong NHI control profile (pinakamalamang bilang SP 800-207-series Zero Trust supplement o SP 800-53 control-family overlay) na tinatrato ang machine identities, agent identities, at service-account identities bilang natatanging compliance category na may discovery, lifecycle, least-privilege, at audit-trail control families. Susunod ang CISA agentic-AI guidance at SEC cyber-disclosure-rule commentary sa loob ng isang quarter sa pamamagitan ng parehong forcing function — ang $400M Astrix M&A price tag mismo ay regulator-readable signal na ang category ay tumawid na sa balance-sheet materiality.

summary.en: Cisco's May 4 $400M Astrix Security acquisition makes non-human-identity (NHI) governance an explicit M&A-tier primitive on the same week as Microsoft Agent 365 GA (May 1, $15/user/mo M365 E7 SKU with per-agent Defender relationship map + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) and the May 1 Cloud Security Alliance posting that names identity as Zero Trust's first pillar in the agentic-AI era. The structural backdrop is severe: ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers as of early 2026 with roughly half operating with no authorization controls, AI agents and other non-human identities now outnumber human users ~100:1 in major enterprises (per Cisco's customer survey), and MCP itself ships with no built-in identity, no least-privilege enforcement, and no audit trail. Cisco's planned integration of Astrix into Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM converges with Microsoft's per-agent identity model into a de-facto two-vendor NHI control-plane primitive — but the procurement tier above (federal CISO offices, banking regulators, healthcare HIPAA-scoped buyers) requires a published-standard reference, not a vendor-specific architecture diagram. By Q4 2026 NIST is expected to publish a dedicated NHI control profile (most likely as a SP 800-207-series Zero Trust supplement or an SP 800-53 control-family overlay) treating machine identities, agent identities, and service-account identities as a distinct compliance category with discovery, lifecycle, least-privilege, and audit-trail control families. CISA agentic-AI guidance and SEC cyber-disclosure-rule commentary follow within one quarter via the same forcing function — the $400M Astrix M&A price tag is itself a regulator-readable signal that the category has crossed into balance-sheet materiality.
summary.ja: 5月4日のCiscoによる$400MのAstrix Security買収は、5月1日のMicrosoft Agent 365 GA($15/ユーザー/月のM365 E7 SKU、エージェント単位のDefenderリレーションシップマップ + Entra ID + Purview + Intune)、そしてエージェントAI時代のZero Trust第一の柱としてアイデンティティを名指しした5月1日のCloud Security Alliance投稿と同じ週に、非人間アイデンティティ(NHI)ガバナンスを明示的なM&A階層のプリミティブにする。構造的な背景は深刻だ: 2026年初頭時点で約7,000のインターネット公開MCPサーバーがあり、その約半数が認可コントロールなしで稼働、AIエージェントその他の非人間アイデンティティが大手企業内で人間ユーザーを約100:1で上回る(Ciscoの顧客調査)、そしてMCP自体は組み込みアイデンティティ、最小権限、監査証跡を一切備えていない。CiscoによるAstrixのCisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAMへの統合計画は、Microsoftのエージェント単位アイデンティティ・モデルと収斂してデファクトの2ベンダーNHIコントロール・プレーン・プリミティブを形成する — しかしその上の調達階層(連邦CISOオフィス、銀行規制当局、HIPAAスコープのヘルスケア・バイヤー)は、ベンダー固有のアーキテクチャ図ではなく公表標準のリファレンスを要求する。2026年Q4までに、NISTは専用のNHIコントロール・プロファイルを公表することが期待される(SP 800-207系のZero Trust補遺、もしくはSP 800-53コントロール・ファミリー・オーバーレイの形が最有力)。マシン・アイデンティティ、エージェント・アイデンティティ、サービス・アカウント・アイデンティティを、発見、ライフサイクル、最小権限、監査証跡のコントロール・ファミリーを伴う独立したコンプライアンス・カテゴリとして扱う。CISAのエージェントAIガイダンスとSECのサイバー開示ルール・コメンタリーは同じ強制関数で1四半期以内に追随する — $400MのAstrix M&A価格自体が、カテゴリがバランスシート重要性に達したことを示す規制当局可読のシグナルである。
summary.es: La adquisición del 4 de mayo de Astrix Security por $400M de Cisco hace de la gobernanza de identidad no-humana (NHI) un primitivo explícito de nivel M&A en la misma semana que la GA de Microsoft Agent 365 (1 de mayo, SKU M365 E7 a $15/user/mo con mapa de relaciones por agente de Defender + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) y la publicación del 1 de mayo de Cloud Security Alliance que nombra a la identidad como el primer pilar de Zero Trust en la era de la IA agéntica. El telón de fondo estructural es severo: ~7,000 servidores MCP expuestos a internet a comienzos de 2026 con aproximadamente la mitad operando sin controles de autorización, los agentes de IA y otras identidades no-humanas ahora superan en número a los usuarios humanos ~100:1 en empresas grandes (según la encuesta de clientes de Cisco), y MCP mismo se entrega sin identidad incorporada, sin aplicación de mínimo privilegio y sin pista de auditoría. La integración planeada de Astrix por Cisco en Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM converge con el modelo de identidad por agente de Microsoft hacia un primitivo de plano de control de NHI de facto de dos vendors — pero el nivel de adquisición superior (oficinas federales de CISO, reguladores bancarios, compradores con alcance HIPAA en salud) requiere una referencia de estándar publicado, no un diagrama de arquitectura específico de vendor. Para Q4 2026 se espera que NIST publique un perfil de control de NHI dedicado (más probablemente como un suplemento de la serie SP 800-207 de Zero Trust o una superposición de familia de controles de SP 800-53) tratando las identidades de máquina, identidades de agente e identidades de cuentas de servicio como una categoría de cumplimiento distinta con familias de controles de descubrimiento, ciclo de vida, mínimo privilegio y pista de auditoría. La guía de IA agéntica de CISA y el comentario de la regla de divulgación cibernética de la SEC siguen dentro de un trimestre vía la misma función forzante — el precio de M&A de Astrix de $400M es en sí mismo una señal legible para reguladores de que la categoría ha cruzado a materialidad de balance.
summary.fil: Ang May 4 $400M Astrix Security acquisition ng Cisco ay ginagawang explicit M&A-tier primitive ang non-human-identity (NHI) governance sa parehong linggo ng Microsoft Agent 365 GA (May 1, $15/user/mo M365 E7 SKU na may per-agent Defender relationship map + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) at ng May 1 Cloud Security Alliance posting na nagngangalan sa identity bilang unang pillar ng Zero Trust sa agentic-AI era. Malala ang structural backdrop: ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers noong unang bahagi ng 2026 na halos kalahati ay tumatakbo nang walang authorization controls, ang AI agents at ibang non-human identities ay ngayon mas marami kaysa sa human users sa ratio na ~100:1 sa mga major enterprises (ayon sa Cisco customer survey), at ang MCP mismo ay nag-ship nang walang built-in identity, walang least-privilege enforcement, at walang audit trail. Ang planned integration ng Cisco ng Astrix sa Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM ay nag-co-converge sa per-agent identity model ng Microsoft papasok sa de-facto two-vendor NHI control-plane primitive — ngunit ang procurement tier sa itaas (federal CISO offices, banking regulators, healthcare HIPAA-scoped buyers) ay nangangailangan ng nailathalang-pamantayang reference, hindi vendor-specific architecture diagram. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, inaasahan na maglathala ang NIST ng nakatuong NHI control profile (pinakamalamang bilang SP 800-207-series Zero Trust supplement o SP 800-53 control-family overlay) na tinatrato ang machine identities, agent identities, at service-account identities bilang natatanging compliance category na may discovery, lifecycle, least-privilege, at audit-trail control families. Susunod ang CISA agentic-AI guidance at SEC cyber-disclosure-rule commentary sa loob ng isang quarter sa pamamagitan ng parehong forcing function — ang $400M Astrix M&A price tag mismo ay regulator-readable signal na ang category ay tumawid na sa balance-sheet materiality.

needs.actor: Fortune-500 financial-services CISO commenting on the NIST initial public draft
needs.job: submit substantive public-comment feedback that ties the proposed NHI control families back to concrete operational findings — MCP-server inventory gaps, service-account proliferation, and agentic-AI lateral-movement scenarios already observed inside the bank's own Microsoft Agent 365 and Anthropic-finance-agent deployments.
needs.outcome: Filed public comment (and an industry-coalition joint comment with FS-ISAC peers) that shapes the final control profile to include audit-trail attribution requirements compatible with SR 11-7 model-risk and SEC cyber-disclosure reporting.
needs.motivation: Avoid being forced into a control profile that mismatches existing model-risk and cyber-disclosure controls — better to invest comment cycles upfront than retrofit a published standard against bank-specific operational reality.

job_locales.en: submit substantive public-comment feedback that ties the proposed NHI control families back to concrete operational findings — MCP-server inventory gaps, service-account proliferation, and agentic-AI lateral-movement scenarios already observed inside the bank's own Microsoft Agent 365 and Anthropic-finance-agent deployments.

job_locales.es: presentar feedback sustantivo de comentario público que ate las familias de control NHI propuestas de regreso a hallazgos operativos concretos — brechas de inventario de servidores MCP, proliferación de cuentas de servicio y escenarios de movimiento lateral de IA agéntica ya observados dentro de los propios despliegues del banco de Microsoft Agent 365 y agentes financieros de Anthropic.
job_locales.fil: magsumite ng substantive public-comment feedback na nag-uugnay sa iminumungkahing NHI control families pabalik sa concrete operational findings — MCP-server inventory gaps, service-account proliferation, at agentic-AI lateral-movement scenarios na naobserbahan na sa loob ng sariling Microsoft Agent 365 at Anthropic-finance-agent deployments ng bangko.

outcome_locales.en: Filed public comment (and an industry-coalition joint comment with FS-ISAC peers) that shapes the final control profile to include audit-trail attribution requirements compatible with SR 11-7 model-risk and SEC cyber-disclosure reporting.
outcome_locales.ja: 提出されたパブリック・コメント(およびFS-ISAC同業者との業界連合共同コメント)が、最終コントロール・プロファイルにSR 11-7モデル・リスクおよびSECサイバー開示報告と互換性のある監査証跡帰属要件を含むよう形作る。
outcome_locales.es: Comentario público presentado (y un comentario conjunto de coalición industrial con pares FS-ISAC) que da forma al perfil de control final para incluir requisitos de atribución de pista de auditoría compatibles con riesgo de modelo SR 11-7 y reporte de divulgación cibernética de la SEC.
outcome_locales.fil: Naipasang public comment (at industry-coalition joint comment kasama ang FS-ISAC peers) na hinuhubog ang final control profile upang isama ang audit-trail attribution requirements na compatible sa SR 11-7 model-risk at SEC cyber-disclosure reporting.

motivation_locales.en: Avoid being forced into a control profile that mismatches existing model-risk and cyber-disclosure controls — better to invest comment cycles upfront than retrofit a published standard against bank-specific operational reality.
motivation_locales.ja: 既存のモデル・リスクおよびサイバー開示コントロールと不一致のコントロール・プロファイルに強制されることを避ける — 公表された標準を銀行固有の運用実態に対して後追いで適応させるよりも、コメント・サイクルに事前投資する方が良い。
motivation_locales.es: Evitar ser forzado a un perfil de control que no coincida con los controles existentes de riesgo de modelo y divulgación cibernética — mejor invertir ciclos de comentario por adelantado que retrofitar un estándar publicado contra la realidad operativa específica del banco.
motivation_locales.fil: Iwasan na mapilit sa control profile na hindi tumutugma sa existing model-risk at cyber-disclosure controls — mas mabuti ang mag-invest ng comment cycles upfront kaysa retrofit ng nailathalang pamantayan laban sa bank-specific operational reality.

job_locales.es: definir el alcance y publicar un perfil de control de identidad no-humana dedicado (suplemento Zero Trust SP 800-207 o superposición de familia de controles SP 800-53) que nombre identidades de máquina, identidades de agente e identidades de cuentas de servicio como una categoría de cumplimiento distinta con familias de controles de descubrimiento, ciclo de vida, mínimo privilegio y pista de auditoría.
job_locales.fil: i-scope at maglathala ng nakatuong non-human-identity control profile (SP 800-207 Zero Trust supplement o SP 800-53 control-family overlay) na nagngangalan sa machine identities, agent identities, at service-account identities bilang natatanging compliance category na may discovery, lifecycle, least-privilege, at audit-trail control families.

outcome_locales.en: Public draft (initial public draft + final) of the NHI control profile with mapped controls, reference architectures, and a community-of-interest comment cycle closed before federal CISO adoption windows.
outcome_locales.ja: マッピングされたコントロール、リファレンス・アーキテクチャ、連邦CISO採用ウィンドウ前にクローズされたコミュニティ・オブ・インタレスト・コメント・サイクルを伴うNHIコントロール・プロファイルの公開ドラフト(初回公開ドラフト + 最終版)。
outcome_locales.es: Borrador público (borrador público inicial + final) del perfil de control NHI con controles mapeados, arquitecturas de referencia y un ciclo de comentarios de community-of-interest cerrado antes de las ventanas de adopción del CISO federal.
outcome_locales.fil: Pampublikong draft (initial public draft + final) ng NHI control profile na may mapped controls, reference architectures, at community-of-interest comment cycle na sarado bago ang federal CISO adoption windows.

motivation_locales.en: Cisco's $400M Astrix M&A plus Microsoft Agent 365 GA signal the category has crossed into balance-sheet materiality; without a published-standard reference, federal and banking buyers cannot procure against vendor-specific NHI architectures.
motivation_locales.ja: Ciscoの$400M Astrix M&AとMicrosoft Agent 365 GAは、カテゴリがバランスシート重要性に達したことをシグナルする; 公表標準のリファレンスなしでは、連邦・銀行バイヤーはベンダー固有のNHIアーキテクチャに対して調達できない。
motivation_locales.es: La M&A Astrix de $400M de Cisco más la GA de Microsoft Agent 365 señalan que la categoría ha cruzado a materialidad de balance; sin una referencia de estándar publicado, los compradores federales y bancarios no pueden adquirir contra arquitecturas NHI específicas de vendor.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang $400M Astrix M&A ng Cisco plus ang Microsoft Agent 365 GA ay nagse-signal na tumawid na ang category sa balance-sheet materiality; nang walang nailathalang-pamantayang reference, hindi maka-procure ang federal at banking buyers laban sa vendor-specific NHI architectures.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: Cisco's May 4 $400M Astrix Security acquisition makes non-human-identity (NHI) governance an explicit M&A-tier primitive on the same week as Microsoft Agent 365 GA (May 1, $15/user/mo M365 E7 SKU with per-agent Defender relationship map + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) and the May 1 Cloud Security Alliance posting that names identity as Zero Trust's first pillar in the agentic-AI era. The structural backdrop is severe: ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers as of early 2026 with roughly half operating with no authorization controls, AI agents and other non-human identities now outnumber human users ~100:1 in major enterprises (per Cisco's customer survey), and MCP itself ships with no built-in identity, no least-privilege enforcement, and no audit trail. Cisco's planned integration of Astrix into Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM converges with Microsoft's per-agent identity model into a de-facto two-vendor NHI control-plane primitive — but the procurement tier above (federal CISO offices, banking regulators, healthcare HIPAA-scoped buyers) requires a published-standard reference, not a vendor-specific architecture diagram. By Q4 2026 NIST is expected to publish a dedicated NHI control profile (most likely as a SP 800-207-series Zero Trust supplement or an SP 800-53 control-family overlay) treating machine identities, agent identities, and service-account identities as a distinct compliance category with discovery, lifecycle, least-privilege, and audit-trail control families. CISA agentic-AI guidance and SEC cyber-disclosure-rule commentary follow within one quarter via the same forcing function — the $400M Astrix M&A price tag is itself a regulator-readable signal that the category has crossed into balance-sheet materiality.

prediction_summary_locales.en: Cisco's May 4 $400M Astrix Security acquisition makes non-human-identity (NHI) governance an explicit M&A-tier primitive on the same week as Microsoft Agent 365 GA (May 1, $15/user/mo M365 E7 SKU with per-agent Defender relationship map + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) and the May 1 Cloud Security Alliance posting that names identity as Zero Trust's first pillar in the agentic-AI era. The structural backdrop is severe: ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers as of early 2026 with roughly half operating with no authorization controls, AI agents and other non-human identities now outnumber human users ~100:1 in major enterprises (per Cisco's customer survey), and MCP itself ships with no built-in identity, no least-privilege enforcement, and no audit trail. Cisco's planned integration of Astrix into Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM converges with Microsoft's per-agent identity model into a de-facto two-vendor NHI control-plane primitive — but the procurement tier above (federal CISO offices, banking regulators, healthcare HIPAA-scoped buyers) requires a published-standard reference, not a vendor-specific architecture diagram. By Q4 2026 NIST is expected to publish a dedicated NHI control profile (most likely as a SP 800-207-series Zero Trust supplement or an SP 800-53 control-family overlay) treating machine identities, agent identities, and service-account identities as a distinct compliance category with discovery, lifecycle, least-privilege, and audit-trail control families. CISA agentic-AI guidance and SEC cyber-disclosure-rule commentary follow within one quarter via the same forcing function — the $400M Astrix M&A price tag is itself a regulator-readable signal that the category has crossed into balance-sheet materiality.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: 5月4日のCiscoによる$400MのAstrix Security買収は、5月1日のMicrosoft Agent 365 GA($15/ユーザー/月のM365 E7 SKU、エージェント単位のDefenderリレーションシップマップ + Entra ID + Purview + Intune)、そしてエージェントAI時代のZero Trust第一の柱としてアイデンティティを名指しした5月1日のCloud Security Alliance投稿と同じ週に、非人間アイデンティティ(NHI)ガバナンスを明示的なM&A階層のプリミティブにする。構造的な背景は深刻だ: 2026年初頭時点で約7,000のインターネット公開MCPサーバーがあり、その約半数が認可コントロールなしで稼働、AIエージェントその他の非人間アイデンティティが大手企業内で人間ユーザーを約100:1で上回る(Ciscoの顧客調査)、そしてMCP自体は組み込みアイデンティティ、最小権限、監査証跡を一切備えていない。CiscoによるAstrixのCisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAMへの統合計画は、Microsoftのエージェント単位アイデンティティ・モデルと収斂してデファクトの2ベンダーNHIコントロール・プレーン・プリミティブを形成する — しかしその上の調達階層(連邦CISOオフィス、銀行規制当局、HIPAAスコープのヘルスケア・バイヤー)は、ベンダー固有のアーキテクチャ図ではなく公表標準のリファレンスを要求する。2026年Q4までに、NISTは専用のNHIコントロール・プロファイルを公表することが期待される(SP 800-207系のZero Trust補遺、もしくはSP 800-53コントロール・ファミリー・オーバーレイの形が最有力)。マシン・アイデンティティ、エージェント・アイデンティティ、サービス・アカウント・アイデンティティを、発見、ライフサイクル、最小権限、監査証跡のコントロール・ファミリーを伴う独立したコンプライアンス・カテゴリとして扱う。CISAのエージェントAIガイダンスとSECのサイバー開示ルール・コメンタリーは同じ強制関数で1四半期以内に追随する — $400MのAstrix M&A価格自体が、カテゴリがバランスシート重要性に達したことを示す規制当局可読のシグナルである。
prediction_summary_locales.es: La adquisición del 4 de mayo de Astrix Security por $400M de Cisco hace de la gobernanza de identidad no-humana (NHI) un primitivo explícito de nivel M&A en la misma semana que la GA de Microsoft Agent 365 (1 de mayo, SKU M365 E7 a $15/user/mo con mapa de relaciones por agente de Defender + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) y la publicación del 1 de mayo de Cloud Security Alliance que nombra a la identidad como el primer pilar de Zero Trust en la era de la IA agéntica. El telón de fondo estructural es severo: ~7,000 servidores MCP expuestos a internet a comienzos de 2026 con aproximadamente la mitad operando sin controles de autorización, los agentes de IA y otras identidades no-humanas ahora superan en número a los usuarios humanos ~100:1 en empresas grandes (según la encuesta de clientes de Cisco), y MCP mismo se entrega sin identidad incorporada, sin aplicación de mínimo privilegio y sin pista de auditoría. La integración planeada de Astrix por Cisco en Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM converge con el modelo de identidad por agente de Microsoft hacia un primitivo de plano de control de NHI de facto de dos vendors — pero el nivel de adquisición superior (oficinas federales de CISO, reguladores bancarios, compradores con alcance HIPAA en salud) requiere una referencia de estándar publicado, no un diagrama de arquitectura específico de vendor. Para Q4 2026 se espera que NIST publique un perfil de control de NHI dedicado (más probablemente como un suplemento de la serie SP 800-207 de Zero Trust o una superposición de familia de controles de SP 800-53) tratando las identidades de máquina, identidades de agente e identidades de cuentas de servicio como una categoría de cumplimiento distinta con familias de controles de descubrimiento, ciclo de vida, mínimo privilegio y pista de auditoría. La guía de IA agéntica de CISA y el comentario de la regla de divulgación cibernética de la SEC siguen dentro de un trimestre vía la misma función forzante — el precio de M&A de Astrix de $400M es en sí mismo una señal legible para reguladores de que la categoría ha cruzado a materialidad de balance.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: Ang May 4 $400M Astrix Security acquisition ng Cisco ay ginagawang explicit M&A-tier primitive ang non-human-identity (NHI) governance sa parehong linggo ng Microsoft Agent 365 GA (May 1, $15/user/mo M365 E7 SKU na may per-agent Defender relationship map + Entra ID + Purview + Intune) at ng May 1 Cloud Security Alliance posting na nagngangalan sa identity bilang unang pillar ng Zero Trust sa agentic-AI era. Malala ang structural backdrop: ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers noong unang bahagi ng 2026 na halos kalahati ay tumatakbo nang walang authorization controls, ang AI agents at ibang non-human identities ay ngayon mas marami kaysa sa human users sa ratio na ~100:1 sa mga major enterprises (ayon sa Cisco customer survey), at ang MCP mismo ay nag-ship nang walang built-in identity, walang least-privilege enforcement, at walang audit trail. Ang planned integration ng Cisco ng Astrix sa Cisco Identity Intelligence + Secure Access + Duo IAM ay nag-co-converge sa per-agent identity model ng Microsoft papasok sa de-facto two-vendor NHI control-plane primitive — ngunit ang procurement tier sa itaas (federal CISO offices, banking regulators, healthcare HIPAA-scoped buyers) ay nangangailangan ng nailathalang-pamantayang reference, hindi vendor-specific architecture diagram. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, inaasahan na maglathala ang NIST ng nakatuong NHI control profile (pinakamalamang bilang SP 800-207-series Zero Trust supplement o SP 800-53 control-family overlay) na tinatrato ang machine identities, agent identities, at service-account identities bilang natatanging compliance category na may discovery, lifecycle, least-privilege, at audit-trail control families. Susunod ang CISA agentic-AI guidance at SEC cyber-disclosure-rule commentary sa loob ng isang quarter sa pamamagitan ng parehong forcing function — ang $400M Astrix M&A price tag mismo ay regulator-readable signal na ang category ay tumawid na sa balance-sheet materiality.

By Q3 2026, CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs will be a Patch Tuesday regular. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

plain_language.en: Hackers hide commands in things AI tools read, like pull requests or web pages, and the AI runs them. Soon vendors will patch this every month.
plain_language.ja: ハッカーはAIツールが読むもの、たとえばプルリクエストやWebページにコマンドを隠し、AIにそれを実行させる。まもなくベンダーは毎月これにパッチを当てるようになるだろう。
plain_language.es: Los hackers ocultan comandos en cosas que las herramientas de IA leen, como pull requests o páginas web, y la IA los ejecuta. Pronto los proveedores parchearán esto cada mes.
plain_language.fil: Ang mga hacker ay nagtatago ng commands sa mga bagay na binabasa ng AI tools, tulad ng pull requests o web pages, at pinapatakbo ito ng AI. Sa lalong madaling panahon, magpapatch ang mga vendor nito buwan-buwan.

detail.summary_short: Indirect prompt injection is hardening into a recurring CVE category: successful attacks +190% YoY, and CVE-2025-53773-style RCE-from-PR-body flaws reproduce easily. By Q3 2026, CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs become a regular Patch Tuesday fixture.

summary_short_locales.en: Indirect prompt injection is hardening into a recurring CVE category: successful attacks +190% YoY, and CVE-2025-53773-style RCE-from-PR-body flaws reproduce easily. By Q3 2026, CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs become a regular Patch Tuesday fixture.
summary_short_locales.ja: 間接プロンプトインジェクションは継続的なCVEカテゴリへと固まりつつある。攻撃成功率は前年比+190%増加し、CVE-2025-53773型のPR本文からのRCE脆弱性は容易に再現できる。2026年第3四半期までに、CVSS 8.0以上のLLM統合関連CVEは定期的なPatch Tuesdayの定番となる。
summary_short_locales.es: La inyección indirecta de prompts se está consolidando como una categoría de CVE recurrente: ataques exitosos +190% interanual, y los fallos al estilo de CVE-2025-53773 RCE-desde-cuerpo-de-PR se reproducen fácilmente. Para Q3 2026, los CVE de integración de LLM con CVSS 8.0+ se convierten en un elemento habitual de Patch Tuesday.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang indirect prompt injection ay tumitigas bilang recurring CVE category: matagumpay na attacks +190% YoY, at ang CVE-2025-53773-style RCE-from-PR-body flaws ay madaling reproducible. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs ay magiging regular na Patch Tuesday fixture.

bridges.text: SGLang's CVSS 9.8 Jinja2 SSTI with public PoC and CERT/CC VU#915947, Pillar Security's Antigravity prompt-injection sandbox escape via the `find_by_name -X` flag, and The Hacker News' coverage of Google's Antigravity patch land three concurrent CVSS-8+ LLM-integration items in the same window, materializing the cadence precondition.

text_locales.en: SGLang's CVSS 9.8 Jinja2 SSTI with public PoC and CERT/CC VU#915947, Pillar Security's Antigravity prompt-injection sandbox escape via the `find_by_name -X` flag, and The Hacker News' coverage of Google's Antigravity patch land three concurrent CVSS-8+ LLM-integration items in the same window, materializing the cadence precondition.
text_locales.ja: SGLangのCVSS 9.8 Jinja2 SSTI(公開PoCとCERT/CC VU#915947付き)、Pillar SecurityのAntigravityプロンプト・インジェクション・サンドボックス・エスケープ(`find_by_name -X`フラグ経由)、The Hacker NewsによるGoogleのAntigravityパッチのカバレッジは、ウィンドウ内に3件の同時CVSS 8+ LLM統合案件を着地させ、ケイデンスの前提条件を実体化する。
text_locales.es: El CVSS 9.8 Jinja2 SSTI de SGLang con PoC público y CERT/CC VU#915947, el escape de sandbox de Antigravity de Pillar Security mediante el flag `find_by_name -X`, y la cobertura de The Hacker News del parche Antigravity de Google aterrizan tres elementos concurrentes con CVSS 8+ de integración LLM en la misma ventana, materializando la precondición de cadencia.
text_locales.fil: Ang SGLang's CVSS 9.8 Jinja2 SSTI na may public PoC at CERT/CC VU#915947, ang Pillar Security's Antigravity prompt-injection sandbox escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X` flag, at ang The Hacker News' coverage ng Google's Antigravity patch ay naglalabas ng tatlong concurrent CVSS-8+ LLM-integration items sa parehong window, na nagma-materialize sa cadence precondition.

bridges.text: Welcome.AI's SharePoint-form vector analysis, PointGuard's structural over-sharing framing of CVE-2026-21520, Tenable's three CISO-level risks from simple prompt injection, and Capa Learning's confirmed post-patch exfiltration land together as four concurrent indirect-injection signals materializing the CVSS 8.0+ category precondition.

text_locales.en: Welcome.AI's SharePoint-form vector analysis, PointGuard's structural over-sharing framing of CVE-2026-21520, Tenable's three CISO-level risks from simple prompt injection, and Capa Learning's confirmed post-patch exfiltration land together as four concurrent indirect-injection signals materializing the CVSS 8.0+ category precondition.
text_locales.ja: Welcome.AIのSharePointフォーム・ベクトル分析、PointGuardのCVE-2026-21520の構造的過剰共有の枠組み、Tenableの単純なプロンプト・インジェクションによる3つのCISOレベルのリスク、Capa Learningのパッチ後流出確認が同時に着地し、CVSS 8.0+カテゴリの前提条件を物質化する4件の同時並行的な間接インジェクション・シグナルとなる。
text_locales.es: El análisis del vector de formularios de SharePoint de Welcome.AI, el encuadre estructural de over-sharing de PointGuard sobre CVE-2026-21520, los tres riesgos a nivel CISO de Tenable de la inyección simple de prompt, y la exfiltración post-parche confirmada por Capa Learning aterrizan juntos como cuatro señales concurrentes de inyección indirecta materializando la precondición de la categoría CVSS 8.0+.
text_locales.fil: Ang SharePoint-form vector analysis ng Welcome.AI, ang structural over-sharing framing ng PointGuard sa CVE-2026-21520, ang tatlong CISO-level risks ng Tenable mula sa simple prompt injection, at ang nakumpirmang post-patch exfiltration ng Capa Learning ay magkakasamang dumating bilang apat na sabay-sabay na indirect-injection signals na nagpapamateryalisa sa CVSS 8.0+ category precondition.

bridges.text: Ten in-the-wild indirect-injection payloads targeting crawlers and RAG, Antigravity's Pattern-parameter prompt injection chaining to RCE in restrictive mode, and the Copilot Studio + Agentforce PipeLeak pair land together — three concurrent indirect-injection-driven attack reports materialize the precondition that LLM-integration codepaths feed CVSS 8.0+ entries.

text_locales.en: Ten in-the-wild indirect-injection payloads targeting crawlers and RAG, Antigravity's Pattern-parameter prompt injection chaining to RCE in restrictive mode, and the Copilot Studio + Agentforce PipeLeak pair land together — three concurrent indirect-injection-driven attack reports materialize the precondition that LLM-integration codepaths feed CVSS 8.0+ entries.
text_locales.ja: クローラとRAGを標的とする10件の実環境間接インジェクション・ペイロード、制限モードでRCEに連鎖するAntigravityのPattern-parameterプロンプト・インジェクション、そしてCopilot Studio + Agentforce PipeLeakの組み合わせが同時に着地する ― 3件の同時並行的な間接インジェクション主導の攻撃レポートが、LLM統合コードパスがCVSS 8.0+エントリを供給するという前提条件を物質化する。
text_locales.es: Diez payloads de inyección indirecta in-the-wild dirigidos a crawlers y RAG, la inyección de prompt vía parámetro Pattern de Antigravity encadenando a RCE en modo restrictivo, y el par Copilot Studio + Agentforce PipeLeak aterrizan juntos — tres reportes concurrentes de ataques impulsados por inyección indirecta materializan la precondición de que las rutas de código de integración LLM alimentan entradas CVSS 8.0+.
text_locales.fil: Ang sampung in-the-wild indirect-injection payloads na nagta-target sa crawlers at RAG, ang Pattern-parameter prompt injection ng Antigravity na nagcha-chain papuntang RCE sa restrictive mode, at ang Copilot Studio + Agentforce PipeLeak pair ay sabay na bumagsak — tatlong magkakasabay na indirect-injection-driven attack reports na nagma-materialize sa precondition na ang LLM-integration codepaths ay nagpapakain sa CVSS 8.0+ entries.

bridges.text: The Apr 22 critical-CVE batch (Xerte 9.8, Esri ArcGIS 9.8, OAuth2 Proxy 9.1, Jellystat, EspoCRM, Nimiq) keeps Patch-Tuesday-grade severity flowing and Gemini Enterprise's AI Control Center frames indirect-injection / over-sharing as a governance category, but no AI-integration CVE explicitly lands inside this window.

text_locales.en: The Apr 22 critical-CVE batch (Xerte 9.8, Esri ArcGIS 9.8, OAuth2 Proxy 9.1, Jellystat, EspoCRM, Nimiq) keeps Patch-Tuesday-grade severity flowing and Gemini Enterprise's AI Control Center frames indirect-injection / over-sharing as a governance category, but no AI-integration CVE explicitly lands inside this window.
text_locales.ja: 4月22日のクリティカルCVEバッチ(Xerte 9.8、Esri ArcGIS 9.8、OAuth2 Proxy 9.1、Jellystat、EspoCRM、Nimiq)はPatch Tuesday級の深刻度を維持し、Gemini EnterpriseのAI Control Centerは間接的インジェクション / 過剰共有をガバナンスのカテゴリとして位置付けているが、AI統合のCVEはこのウィンドウ内で明示的に着地していない。
text_locales.es: El lote crítico de CVEs del 22 de abril (Xerte 9.8, Esri ArcGIS 9.8, OAuth2 Proxy 9.1, Jellystat, EspoCRM, Nimiq) mantiene fluyendo la severidad de grado Patch-Tuesday y el AI Control Center de Gemini Enterprise enmarca la inyección indirecta / over-sharing como una categoría de gobernanza, pero ningún CVE de integración de IA aterriza explícitamente dentro de esta ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apr 22 critical-CVE batch (Xerte 9.8, Esri ArcGIS 9.8, OAuth2 Proxy 9.1, Jellystat, EspoCRM, Nimiq) ay nagpapanatili ng Patch-Tuesday-grade severity na dumadaloy at ang AI Control Center ng Gemini Enterprise ay nagbabalangkas ng indirect-injection / over-sharing bilang governance category, pero walang AI-integration CVE na malinaw na bumabagsak sa loob ng window na ito.

bridges.text: Three concurrent CVSS 9.8+ LLM-integration CVEs land inside the window — OpenClaw sandbox bypass, Antigravity prompt-injection RCE, and continuing SGLang SSTI — exactly the Patch-Tuesday-grade cadence the prediction projects, with CCB Belgium even issuing an emergency advisory.

text_locales.en: Three concurrent CVSS 9.8+ LLM-integration CVEs land inside the window — OpenClaw sandbox bypass, Antigravity prompt-injection RCE, and continuing SGLang SSTI — exactly the Patch-Tuesday-grade cadence the prediction projects, with CCB Belgium even issuing an emergency advisory.
text_locales.ja: ウィンドウ内で同時にCVSS 9.8+のLLM連携CVEが3件着地した — OpenClawサンドボックス回避、AntigravityのプロンプトインジェクションRCE、そして継続中のSGLang SSTI — まさに予測が想定するPatch Tuesday級の頻度であり、CCB Belgiumも緊急アドバイザリを発行している。
text_locales.es: Tres CVE concurrentes de integracion LLM CVSS 9.8+ aterrizan dentro de la ventana — bypass de sandbox de OpenClaw, RCE por inyeccion de prompt en Antigravity, y SSTI continuo de SGLang — exactamente la cadencia de grado Patch-Tuesday que la prediccion proyecta, con CCB Belgium emitiendo incluso un aviso de emergencia.
text_locales.fil: Tatlong concurrent CVSS 9.8+ LLM-integration CVEs ang dumating sa loob ng window — OpenClaw sandbox bypass, Antigravity prompt-injection RCE, at patuloy na SGLang SSTI — eksaktong Patch-Tuesday-grade cadence na pinoproyekto ng prediction, kung saan ang CCB Belgium ay nag-isyu pa nga ng emergency advisory.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Indirect prompt injection becomes a top CVE category.** Successful attacks are up +190% YoY, and CVE-2025-53773-style flaws (RCE from PR body) reproduce easily. By Q3 2026, CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs will be a Patch Tuesday regular. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **Indirect prompt injection becomes a top CVE category.** Successful attacks are up +190% YoY, and CVE-2025-53773-style flaws (RCE from PR body) reproduce easily. By Q3 2026, CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs will be a Patch Tuesday regular. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Indirect prompt injection becomes a top CVE category.** Successful attacks are up +190% YoY, and CVE-2025-53773-style flaws (RCE from PR body) reproduce easily. By Q3 2026, CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs will be a Patch Tuesday regular. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **間接プロンプトインジェクションが主要なCVEカテゴリとなる。** 攻撃成功率は前年比+190%増加しており、CVE-2025-53773型の脆弱性(PR本文からのRCE)は容易に再現できる。2026年第3四半期までに、CVSS 8.0以上のLLM統合関連CVEがPatch Tuesdayの常連となるだろう。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La inyección indirecta de prompts se convierte en una categoría de CVE principal.** Los ataques exitosos han aumentado un +190% interanual, y los fallos al estilo de CVE-2025-53773 (RCE desde el cuerpo de un PR) se reproducen fácilmente. Para Q3 2026, los CVE de integración de LLM con CVSS 8.0+ serán habituales en los Patch Tuesday. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang indirect prompt injection ay magiging top CVE category.** Ang matagumpay na pag-atake ay tumaas ng +190% YoY, at ang mga CVE-2025-53773-style flaws (RCE mula sa PR body) ay madaling reproducible. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs ay magiging regular na bahagi ng Patch Tuesday. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Secret leakage through CI / agents becomes the next battleground.** GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection PoCs reproduce across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot — three vendors at once. Through Q2-Q3 2026, a new supply-chain security category, "Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration," will rise to the top of CIS / OWASP risk lists. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **CI / エージェント経由のシークレット漏洩が次の主戦場となる。** GitHub Actionsを介した間接プロンプトインジェクションのPoCが、Claude Code、Gemini CLI、Copilotの3ベンダーで同時期に再現されている。2026年Q2-Q3にかけて、新たなサプライチェーンセキュリティのカテゴリ「Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration」がCIS / OWASPのリスクリストの上位に台頭する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **La fuga de secretos a través de CI / agentes se convierte en el siguiente campo de batalla.** Los PoCs de inyección indirecta de prompts en GitHub Actions se reproducen en Claude Code, Gemini CLI y Copilot — tres proveedores a la vez. Durante el Q2-Q3 2026, una nueva categoría de seguridad de la cadena de suministro, "Exfiltración de Secretos con Agente en el Bucle", ascenderá a la cima de las listas de riesgos de CIS / OWASP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang secret leakage sa pamamagitan ng CI / agents ay magiging susunod na battleground.** Ang GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection PoCs ay reproducible sa Claude Code, Gemini CLI, at Copilot — tatlong vendors nang sabay-sabay. Sa loob ng Q2-Q3 2026, isang bagong supply-chain security category, "Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration," ang aakyat sa tuktok ng CIS / OWASP risk lists. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection PoCs reproduce across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot at once.

given.fil: Ang CI runners ay nagbibigay sa coding agents ng privileged access sa secrets, tokens, at deploy keys sa pamamagitan ng untrusted PR/issue text.

plain_language.en: AI coding helpers can be tricked into leaking passwords from build servers. Soon, security guides will list this as a top risk to fix.
plain_language.ja: AIコーディングアシスタントは、ビルドサーバーからパスワードを漏洩させるよう仕向けられる可能性がある。近いうちに、セキュリティガイドはこれを最優先で対処すべきリスクとして掲載するだろう。
plain_language.es: Los asistentes de codificación con IA pueden ser engañados para filtrar contraseñas de los servidores de compilación. Pronto, las guías de seguridad listarán esto como un riesgo prioritario a corregir.
plain_language.fil: Ang AI coding helpers ay maaaring linlangin upang magpalabas ng mga password mula sa build servers. Sa lalong madaling panahon, ililista ito ng security guides bilang isang top risk na kailangang ayusin.

detail.summary_short: GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection proofs-of-concept reproduce across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot in the same window. Through Q2-Q3 2026, a new supply-chain category, Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration, is expected to rise to the top of CIS and OWASP risk lists.

summary_short_locales.en: GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection proofs-of-concept reproduce across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot in the same window. Through Q2-Q3 2026, a new supply-chain category, Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration, is expected to rise to the top of CIS and OWASP risk lists.
summary_short_locales.ja: GitHub Actionsを介した間接プロンプトインジェクションのPoCが、同時期にClaude Code、Gemini CLI、Copilotで再現されている。2026年Q2-Q3にかけて、新たなサプライチェーンカテゴリ「Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration」がCISおよびOWASPのリスクリスト上位に台頭すると見込まれる。
summary_short_locales.es: Las pruebas de concepto de inyección indirecta de prompts en GitHub Actions se reproducen en Claude Code, Gemini CLI y Copilot en la misma ventana. Durante el Q2-Q3 2026, se espera que una nueva categoría de cadena de suministro, Exfiltración de Secretos con Agente en el Bucle, ascienda a la cima de las listas de riesgos de CIS y OWASP.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection proofs-of-concept ay reproducible sa Claude Code, Gemini CLI, at Copilot sa parehong window. Sa loob ng Q2-Q3 2026, isang bagong supply-chain category, ang Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration, ay inaasahang aakyat sa tuktok ng CIS at OWASP risk lists.

bridges.text: Antigravity sandbox-escape and the rising indirect-prompt-injection prevalence are exactly the underlying-cause primitives for an Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration class to surface — the supporting evidence is good but doesn't yet show OWASP movement.

text_locales.en: Antigravity sandbox-escape and the rising indirect-prompt-injection prevalence are exactly the underlying-cause primitives for an Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration class to surface — the supporting evidence is good but doesn't yet show OWASP movement.
text_locales.ja: Antigravity のサンドボックス エスケープと間接プロンプトインジェクション拡散の上昇は、まさに「Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration」クラスを浮上させる根底原因のプリミティブそのものだ — 支持エビデンスは良好だが、まだ OWASP の動きを示してはいない。
text_locales.es: El escape de sandbox de Antigravity y la creciente prevalencia de prompt-injection indirecto son exactamente las primitivas de causa subyacente para que aflore una clase de Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration — la evidencia de apoyo es buena pero aún no muestra movimiento en OWASP.
text_locales.fil: Ang Antigravity sandbox-escape at ang tumataas na indirect-prompt-injection prevalence ay eksaktong underlying-cause primitives para sa Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration class na lumitaw — ang supporting evidence ay maganda ngunit hindi pa nagpapakita ng OWASP movement.

bridges.text: Pillar Security's Antigravity walkthrough showing the `find_by_name -X` flag insertion bypassing Secure Mode, CSO Online's framing of the same path as file-search-to-RCE, and the Cloud Security Alliance research note on agentic-IDE sandbox escape together confirm a third agentic-CI vendor exposed to the comment-style class, but no OWASP / CIS top-list category named for the pattern lands inside the window.

text_locales.en: Pillar Security's Antigravity walkthrough showing the `find_by_name -X` flag insertion bypassing Secure Mode, CSO Online's framing of the same path as file-search-to-RCE, and the Cloud Security Alliance research note on agentic-IDE sandbox escape together confirm a third agentic-CI vendor exposed to the comment-style class, but no OWASP / CIS top-list category named for the pattern lands inside the window.
text_locales.ja: Pillar SecurityのAntigravityウォークスルー(`find_by_name -X`フラグ挿入によるSecure Modeバイパス)、CSO Onlineの同じパスをファイル検索からRCEへとフレーミング、Cloud Security Allianceのエージェンティック・IDEサンドボックス・エスケープに関するリサーチノートが共に、コメント・スタイルクラスにさらされる第3のエージェンティックCIベンダーを確認するが、パターンを名指しするOWASP / CIS上位リストカテゴリーはウィンドウ内に着地しない。
text_locales.es: El walkthrough de Antigravity de Pillar Security mostrando la inserción del flag `find_by_name -X` evadiendo Secure Mode, el encuadre de CSO Online de la misma vía como búsqueda-de-archivos-a-RCE, y la nota de investigación de Cloud Security Alliance sobre el escape de sandbox en IDE agéntico juntos confirman un tercer vendor de CI agéntico expuesto a la clase de estilo comentario, pero ninguna categoría top-list de OWASP / CIS nombrada para el patrón llega dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Pillar Security's Antigravity walkthrough na nagpapakita ng `find_by_name -X` flag insertion na nilalampasan ang Secure Mode, ang CSO Online's framing ng parehong path bilang file-search-to-RCE, at ang Cloud Security Alliance research note sa agentic-IDE sandbox escape ay magkasamang nagkukumpirma ng pangatlong agentic-CI vendor na na-expose sa comment-style class, ngunit walang OWASP / CIS top-list category na pinangalanan para sa pattern ang lumapag sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: The Hacker News' Nginx UI MCPwn writeup confirming a 2-request takeover via an empty default IP allowlist exposing 12 unauthenticated MCP tool calls reinforces the agent-credential-reachable precondition, but no OWASP / CIS top-list entry naming Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration as a category lands inside the window.

text_locales.en: The Hacker News' Nginx UI MCPwn writeup confirming a 2-request takeover via an empty default IP allowlist exposing 12 unauthenticated MCP tool calls reinforces the agent-credential-reachable precondition, but no OWASP / CIS top-list entry naming Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration as a category lands inside the window.
text_locales.ja: The Hacker NewsのNginx UI MCPwn分析が、12個の認証なしMCPツール・コールを公開する空のデフォルトIPアロウリスト経由の2リクエスト乗っ取りを確認し、エージェント認証情報到達可能の前提条件を補強しているが、ウィンドウ内ではAgent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltrationをカテゴリとして名指しするOWASP / CISトップリスト・エントリは登場していない。
text_locales.es: El writeup MCPwn de Nginx UI de The Hacker News confirmando una toma de control de 2 solicitudes vía una lista de IPs permitidas vacía por defecto exponiendo 12 llamadas a herramientas MCP no autenticadas refuerza la precondición agent-credential-reachable, pero ninguna entrada de top-list OWASP / CIS que nombre Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration como categoría aterriza dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Nginx UI MCPwn writeup ng The Hacker News na nagpapatunay ng 2-request takeover sa pamamagitan ng empty default IP allowlist na naglalantad ng 12 unauthenticated MCP tool calls ay nagpapatibay sa agent-credential-reachable precondition, ngunit walang OWASP / CIS top-list entry na nagpapangalan sa Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration bilang category na lumilitaw sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: Proofpoint's Mercor-to-Mythos connection — 4TB of credentials, biometrics, and API keys leaked through LiteLLM CI/CD becoming the entry path for a frontier-lab breach — plus Exabeam's ABA extension covering all 10 OWASP Agentic Top 10 categories and the formalized AI Insider Threat category across ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini directly materialize the agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil precondition.

text_locales.en: Proofpoint's Mercor-to-Mythos connection — 4TB of credentials, biometrics, and API keys leaked through LiteLLM CI/CD becoming the entry path for a frontier-lab breach — plus Exabeam's ABA extension covering all 10 OWASP Agentic Top 10 categories and the formalized AI Insider Threat category across ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini directly materialize the agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil precondition.
text_locales.ja: ProofpointのMercor-Mythos接続 ― LiteLLM CI/CDを通じて流出した4TBのクレデンシャル、バイオメトリクス、APIキーがフロンティア・ラボ侵害の侵入経路となった ― さらにOWASP Agentic Top 10の10カテゴリ全てをカバーするExabeamのABA拡張、ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini横断で正式化されたAI Insider Threatカテゴリが、エージェント・イン・ザ・ループのクレデンシャル流出の前提条件を直接物質化する。
text_locales.es: La conexión Mercor-a-Mythos de Proofpoint — 4TB de credenciales, biometría y claves API filtrados a través del CI/CD de LiteLLM convirtiéndose en la ruta de entrada para una brecha de laboratorio de frontera — más la extensión de ABA de Exabeam cubriendo las 10 categorías del OWASP Agentic Top 10 y la categoría formalizada de AI Insider Threat en ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini materializan directamente la precondición de exfil de credenciales agent-in-the-loop.
text_locales.fil: Ang Mercor-to-Mythos connection ng Proofpoint — 4TB ng credentials, biometrics, at API keys na nakaleak sa pamamagitan ng LiteLLM CI/CD na naging entry path para sa frontier-lab breach — kasama ang ABA extension ng Exabeam na sumasaklaw sa lahat ng 10 OWASP Agentic Top 10 categories at ang pormal na AI Insider Threat category sa ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini ay direktang nagma-materialize sa agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil precondition.

bridges.text: The Mythos Preview day-one breach via contractor credentials + Mercor leak + naming reconstruction, alongside OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575's X-Forwarded-Uri auth bypass, both materialize the agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil shape with concrete real-world incidents reinforcing the precondition.

text_locales.en: The Mythos Preview day-one breach via contractor credentials + Mercor leak + naming reconstruction, alongside OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575's X-Forwarded-Uri auth bypass, both materialize the agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil shape with concrete real-world incidents reinforcing the precondition.
text_locales.ja: 契約者の認証情報 + Mercorのリーク + 命名再構築によるMythos Previewの初日侵害と、OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575のX-Forwarded-Uri認証バイパスは、いずれもエージェント・イン・ザ・ループの認証情報窃取の形を、前提条件を強化する具体的な実世界のインシデントで実現している。
text_locales.es: La brecha del día uno de Mythos Preview vía credenciales de contratista + filtración de Mercor + reconstrucción de nomenclatura, junto con el bypass de autenticación X-Forwarded-Uri de OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575, ambos materializan la forma de exfiltración de credenciales agent-in-the-loop con incidentes concretos del mundo real reforzando la precondición.
text_locales.fil: Ang day-one breach ng Mythos Preview sa pamamagitan ng contractor credentials + Mercor leak + naming reconstruction, kasama ang X-Forwarded-Uri auth bypass ng OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575, ay parehong nag-aaktwal sa agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil shape gamit ang konkretong real-world incidents na nagpapatibay sa precondition.

bridges.text: Vercel's confirmed supply-chain breach via Context.ai OAuth tokens — with the CEO pointing to AI-assisted attacker speed — and Antigravity's prompt-injection-to-RCE both materialize the agent-in-the-loop exfil shape, putting concrete real-world breaches behind the precondition that ties CI / agents to leaked secrets.

text_locales.en: Vercel's confirmed supply-chain breach via Context.ai OAuth tokens — with the CEO pointing to AI-assisted attacker speed — and Antigravity's prompt-injection-to-RCE both materialize the agent-in-the-loop exfil shape, putting concrete real-world breaches behind the precondition that ties CI / agents to leaked secrets.
text_locales.ja: Context.aiのOAuthトークン経由でVercelが確認したサプライチェーン侵害 — CEOがAI支援による攻撃者の速度を指摘 — と、AntigravityのプロンプトインジェクションからRCEへの転化のいずれもがagent-in-the-loop型の窃取形を実体化させ、CI / エージェントを漏洩した認証情報に結び付ける前提に具体的な現実世界の侵害事例を与えている。
text_locales.es: La brecha confirmada de cadena de suministro de Vercel via tokens OAuth de Context.ai — con el CEO senalando velocidad de atacante asistida por AI — y la RCE por inyeccion de prompt de Antigravity ambas materializan la forma de exfiltracion agente-en-el-loop, poniendo brechas reales concretas detras de la precondicion que ata CI / agentes a secretos filtrados.
text_locales.fil: Ang confirmed supply-chain breach ng Vercel sa pamamagitan ng Context.ai OAuth tokens — kung saan ang CEO ay tumuturo sa AI-assisted attacker speed — at ang prompt-injection-to-RCE ng Antigravity ay parehong nagma-materialize ng agent-in-the-loop exfil shape, naglalagay ng kongkretong real-world breaches sa likod ng precondition na nag-uugnay sa CI / agents sa leaked secrets.

needs.actor: AI coding-agent vendor security team (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)
needs.job: Harden agent CLIs against indirect prompt injection so untrusted PR / issue text cannot coerce secret exfiltration in CI.
needs.outcome: Released agent versions with prompt-injection guardrails, secret-redaction defaults, and documented threat model citing the CI scenario.
needs.motivation: Avoid being the named exfiltration vector in CIS / OWASP entries; protect enterprise CI deals tied to procurement security review.

actor_locales.en: AI coding-agent vendor security team (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)
actor_locales.ja: AIコーディングエージェントベンダーのセキュリティチーム(Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)
actor_locales.es: equipo de seguridad de proveedor de agentes de codificación con IA (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)
actor_locales.fil: AI coding-agent vendor security team (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)

job_locales.en: Harden agent CLIs against indirect prompt injection so untrusted PR / issue text cannot coerce secret exfiltration in CI.
job_locales.ja: 間接プロンプトインジェクションに対してエージェントCLIを堅牢化し、信頼できないPR / IssueテキストがCI内でシークレット抜き出しを強要できないようにする。
job_locales.es: Endurecer las CLIs de agentes contra la inyección indirecta de prompts para que el texto no confiable de PR / issues no pueda forzar la exfiltración de secretos en CI.
job_locales.fil: Patatagin ang agent CLIs laban sa indirect prompt injection upang ang untrusted PR / issue text ay hindi makapwersa ng secret exfiltration sa CI.

outcome_locales.en: Released agent versions with prompt-injection guardrails, secret-redaction defaults, and documented threat model citing the CI scenario.
outcome_locales.ja: プロンプトインジェクションのガードレール、シークレット秘匿化のデフォルト、CIシナリオを引用した文書化された脅威モデルを備えたエージェントの新バージョンをリリースする。
outcome_locales.es: Versiones de agentes lanzadas con guardrails contra inyección de prompts, valores por defecto de redacción de secretos y modelo de amenaza documentado citando el escenario de CI.
outcome_locales.fil: Released agent versions na may prompt-injection guardrails, secret-redaction defaults, at documented threat model na bumabanggit sa CI scenario.

motivation_locales.en: Avoid being the named exfiltration vector in CIS / OWASP entries; protect enterprise CI deals tied to procurement security review.
motivation_locales.ja: CIS / OWASPエントリで名指しの抜き出しベクトルとなることを避け、調達セキュリティレビューに紐づくエンタープライズCI契約を保護する。
motivation_locales.es: Evitar ser el vector de exfiltración nombrado en las entradas de CIS / OWASP; proteger los acuerdos de CI empresariales vinculados a la revisión de seguridad de aprovisionamiento.
motivation_locales.fil: Iwasan na maging named exfiltration vector sa CIS / OWASP entries; protektahan ang enterprise CI deals na nakatali sa procurement security review.

Durante el Q2-Q3 2026, una nueva categoría de seguridad de la cadena de suministro, "Exfiltración de Secretos con Agente en el Bucle", ascenderá a la cima de las listas de riesgos de CIS / OWASP. Sa loob ng Q2-Q3 2026, isang bagong supply-chain security category, "Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration," ang aakyat sa tuktok ng CIS / OWASP risk lists. nodes.description: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming. description.en: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **AIエージェントのセキュリティ標準が「サードパーティベンダー境界」と「URL命名エントロピー」に拡大する。** Mythosの不正アクセスインシデント(契約者 + 命名規則の推測 + サードパーティのデータ漏洩)は、Vercel-Context.aiのサプライチェーンパターンを再現しており、今度はフロンティアモデルのアクセス制御レイヤーで起きた。2026年Q3までに、「フロンティアモデルのプレビュー / 早期アクセスのサードパーティベンダー環境」は、SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forumの共通セキュリティベースラインのクリアが必要となり、エンドポイントURL / サブドメインはランダム化された推測困難な命名へ移行する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Los estándares de seguridad de agentes de IA se extienden a la "frontera de proveedores externos" y la "entropía de nomenclatura de URL."** El incidente de acceso no autorizado de Mythos (contratista + adivinanza de convención de nomenclatura + datos filtrados de terceros) repite el patrón de cadena de suministro de Vercel-Context.ai, esta vez en una capa de control de acceso de modelo de frontera. Para el Q3 2026, los "entornos de proveedores externos para preview / acceso temprano de modelos de frontera" deberán superar una línea base de seguridad común de SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, y las URLs / subdominios de endpoints pasarán a una nomenclatura aleatorizada y difícil de adivinar. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang AI agent security standards ay umaabot na sa "third-party-vendor boundary" at "URL-naming entropy."** Ang Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) ay umuulit sa Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, sa pagkakataong ito sa frontier-model access-control layer. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" ay kakailanganing pumasa sa common security baseline ng SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, at ang mga endpoint URL / subdomain ay lilipat sa randomized, mahirap-hulaang naming. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
