prediction_summary_locales.en: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **推論サーバーが新たな「プリミティブ・サプライチェーン」となる ― Q3 2026に最初のAIインフラ専用CVEクラス(LLM-INFRA-CWE)がNVD強制タグ付きで登場する。** 4月19-26日のシーケンス ― **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF(12時間31分で悪用)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **PillarのAntigravityサンドボックス・エスケープ via `find_by_name -X`** + 4月21日のClaude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot横断のComment-and-Controlプロンプト・インジェクション・チェーン ― が、明確な「推論ランタイム + エージェンティックCI」の攻撃面カテゴリーを構成する。Q3 2026までに、NIST/NVDがCVEスキーマに専用の**「AI-Infra」**タグを追加し、OWASPのLLM Top 10 v2026が**「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」**をトップ3エントリーに格上げし、サプライチェーンSBOMツール(Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera)が**vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollamaのエンジン別シグネチャ・フィード**を標準SKUとして出荷する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro primitiva" — Q3 2026 ve la primera clase de CVE específica de infraestructura de IA (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia del 19-26 de abril — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity de Pillar mediante `find_by_name -X`** + la cadena Comment-and-Control de inyección de prompts del 21 de abril a través de Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — compone una clara categoría de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI agéntico". Para Q3 2026, NIST/NVD añade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, el OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"RCE en Plantilla / Cargador de Servidor de Inferencia"** a una entrada top-3, y las herramientas SBOM de cadena de suministro (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) lanzan **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs estándar. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Nagiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang mga inference servers — sa Q3 2026 makikita ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ang OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 ay magpo-promote ng **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ay magpapadala ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格する — Q4 2026 までに CISA / NIST が KEV とは別の、推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム向けサブカタログを公表する。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然として未パッチ)** + **Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` 経由サンドボックス エスケープ** + **基盤的な CI/CD 依存性における simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE** + **4/21 の Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot をまたぐ Comment-and-Control プロンプトインジェクション連鎖** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス回避** — はもはや「カテゴリーが立ち現れている」段階ではない。NIST の 4 月運用アップデート (CVE 公表数の記録的増加、AI 駆動の評価サポート) と Google の **野生の間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% 前年比増** が CISA / NVD に対し、Q4 2026 までに **SBOM タグ付け必須化を伴う、推論サーバ + エージェンティックツール専用の CVE サブカタログ**を出荷するよう迫る。OWASP の LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 へ格上げする。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **La "clase CVE de AI-Infra" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 ve a CISA / NIST publicar un sub-catálogo para runtimes de inference-server + agentic-CI, separado de KEV.** La secuencia del 19-27 de abril — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (todavía sin parchear)** + **escape de sandbox de Pillar Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en una dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de prompt-injection Comment-and-Control del 21 de abril a través de Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización ops de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación impulsado por IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de prompt-injection indirecto en la naturaleza** de Google fuerzan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **sub-catálogo CVE dedicado a inference-server + agentic-tool** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "AI-Infra CVE class" ay magiging regulatory primitive — pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ilalathala ng CISA / NIST ang sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — ay hindi na isang "category emerging." Ang Apr ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) kasama ang **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise sa wild ng Google** ay pumipilit sa CISA/NVD na magpadala ng **dedikadong inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagsapit ng Q4 2026. Ang LLM Top 10 v2026 ng OWASP ay mag-aangat sa "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" sa top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title_locales.en: CISA + NIST publish inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog by Q4 2026
title_locales.ja: CISA と NIST、Q4 2026 までに推論サーバ + エージェント型ツールの CVE サブカタログを公表
title_locales.es: CISA + NIST publican un sub-catálogo de CVE para servidores de inferencia y herramientas agénticas para Q4 2026
title_locales.fil: CISA at NIST, maglalathala ng inference-server at agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog pagsapit ng Q4 2026

detail.summary_short: Six Apr 19-27 inference-server and agentic-CI exploits (LMDeploy SSRF, SGLang SSTI unpatched, Antigravity sandbox-escape, simple-git RCE, multi-agent prompt-injection, OpenClaw bypass) plus Google's 32% indirect-prompt-injection rise force CISA/NVD to publish a dedicated AI-Infra CVE sub-catalog with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026.

summary_short_locales.en: Six Apr 19-27 inference-server and agentic-CI exploits (LMDeploy SSRF, SGLang SSTI unpatched, Antigravity sandbox-escape, simple-git RCE, multi-agent prompt-injection, OpenClaw bypass) plus Google's 32% indirect-prompt-injection rise force CISA/NVD to publish a dedicated AI-Infra CVE sub-catalog with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026.
summary_short_locales.ja: 4/19-27 の 6 件の推論サーバおよびエージェンティック CI 攻撃 (LMDeploy SSRF、未パッチの SGLang SSTI、Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ、simple-git RCE、マルチエージェント プロンプトインジェクション、OpenClaw 回避) と Google の間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% 増が、CISA / NVD に対し Q4 2026 までに SBOM タグ付け必須化を伴う AI インフラ専用 CVE サブカタログを公表させる。
summary_short_locales.es: Seis exploits del 19-27 de abril en inference-server y agentic-CI (SSRF de LMDeploy, SSTI sin parchear de SGLang, escape de sandbox de Antigravity, RCE de simple-git, prompt-injection multi-agente, bypass de OpenClaw) más el aumento del 32% de prompt-injection indirecto de Google fuerzan a CISA/NVD a publicar un sub-catálogo CVE dedicado a AI-Infra con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026.
summary_short_locales.fil: Anim na Apr 19-27 inference-server at agentic-CI exploits (LMDeploy SSRF, SGLang SSTI hindi na-patch, Antigravity sandbox-escape, simple-git RCE, multi-agent prompt-injection, OpenClaw bypass) kasama ang 32% indirect-prompt-injection rise ng Google ay pumipilit sa CISA/NVD na maglathala ng dedikadong AI-Infra CVE sub-catalog na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagsapit ng Q4 2026.

bridges.text: SGLang CVE-2026-5760's Apr 24 fix confirmed in the NVD detail today closes the longest-running 2026 LLM-tooling vulnerability, while the ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers and the 2,800-3,600 AI-CVE forecast for 2026 (31-69% YoY) keep the precondition warm: inference-server + agentic-tool CVEs are now operationally distinguishable as their own sub-corpus.

text_locales.en: SGLang CVE-2026-5760's Apr 24 fix confirmed in the NVD detail today closes the longest-running 2026 LLM-tooling vulnerability, while the ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers and the 2,800-3,600 AI-CVE forecast for 2026 (31-69% YoY) keep the precondition warm: inference-server + agentic-tool CVEs are now operationally distinguishable as their own sub-corpus.
text_locales.ja: SGLang CVE-2026-5760の4月24日修正が本日NVD詳細で確認されたことは、最長稼働の2026年LLMツーリング脆弱性を閉じる一方、約7,000のインターネット公開MCPサーバーおよび2026年AI-CVE予測の2,800〜3,600件(+31〜69% YoY)が前提条件を温存している: 推論サーバー + エージェンティック・ツールCVEは現在、独自のサブコーパスとして運用上区別可能である。
text_locales.es: El fix del 24 de abril de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 confirmado en el detalle NVD hoy cierra la vulnerabilidad de herramientas LLM más larga corriendo de 2026, mientras que los ~7,000 servidores MCP expuestos a internet y el pronóstico AI-CVE 2,800-3,600 para 2026 (31-69% YoY) mantienen caliente la precondición: los CVEs de servidor de inferencia + herramienta agéntica ahora son operativamente distinguibles como su propio sub-corpus.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apr 24 fix ng SGLang CVE-2026-5760 na kinumpirma sa NVD detail ngayon ay nagsasara sa pinakamatagal na 2026 LLM-tooling vulnerability, habang ang ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers at ang 2,800-3,600 AI-CVE forecast para sa 2026 (31-69% YoY) ay nagpapanatiling mainit ang precondition: ang inference-server + agentic-tool CVEs ay operationally distinguishable na ngayon bilang sariling sub-corpus.

bridges.text: The 15-day SGLang CVE-2026-5760 carry plus the Microsoft Excel XSS + Copilot Agent silent-exfil chain keep the precondition warm: AI-infra-tooling vulnerabilities now persist long enough and span enough host-app surfaces to merit their own regulatory sub-catalog rather than continued KEV-pool aggregation.

text_locales.en: The 15-day SGLang CVE-2026-5760 carry plus the Microsoft Excel XSS + Copilot Agent silent-exfil chain keep the precondition warm: AI-infra-tooling vulnerabilities now persist long enough and span enough host-app surfaces to merit their own regulatory sub-catalog rather than continued KEV-pool aggregation.
text_locales.ja: SGLang CVE-2026-5760の15日間キャリー + Microsoft Excel XSS + Copilot Agentサイレント流出チェーンが前提条件を温存している: AI-infraツールの脆弱性は、KEVプール集約の継続ではなく独自の規制サブカタログを要するに足るほど長く存続し、十分なホストアプリ・サーフェスにまたがるようになっている。
text_locales.es: El acarreo de 15 días de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 más la cadena de exfiltración silenciosa de Microsoft Excel XSS + Copilot Agent mantienen caliente la precondición: las vulnerabilidades de herramientas de infra-IA ahora persisten lo suficiente y abarcan suficientes superficies de aplicaciones host como para merecer su propio subcatálogo regulatorio en lugar de continuar agregándose al pool KEV.
text_locales.fil: Ang 15-day SGLang CVE-2026-5760 carry plus ang Microsoft Excel XSS + Copilot Agent silent-exfil chain ay nagpapanatiling mainit ang precondition: ang AI-infra-tooling vulnerabilities ay nagpapatuloy nang sapat na haba at sumasaklaw sa sapat na host-app surfaces upang karapat-dapat sa kanilang sariling regulatory sub-catalog sa halip na patuloy na KEV-pool aggregation.

bridges.text: CSAI Foundation's MITRE-CNA authority plus ATT&CK v19's named agentic techniques now sit alongside the CISA May 1 KEV cadence and the still-unpatched SGLang CVE, which is exactly the institutional configuration the prediction said would force CISA / NIST to ship an inference-server plus agentic-CI sub-catalog distinct from KEV.

text_locales.en: CSAI Foundation's MITRE-CNA authority plus ATT&CK v19's named agentic techniques now sit alongside the CISA May 1 KEV cadence and the still-unpatched SGLang CVE, which is exactly the institutional configuration the prediction said would force CISA / NIST to ship an inference-server plus agentic-CI sub-catalog distinct from KEV.
text_locales.ja: CSAI FoundationのMITRE-CNA権限とATT&CK v19の命名済みエージェント手法が、CISA 5月1日KEVケイデンスと未だ未パッチのSGLang CVEと並んで位置している。これは予測が、CISA / NISTにKEVとは別個の推論サーバーとエージェントCIサブカタログの出荷を強制すると述べた制度配置そのものだ。
text_locales.es: La autoridad MITRE-CNA de CSAI Foundation más las técnicas agénticas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 ahora se sitúan junto con la cadencia del KEV de CISA del 1 de mayo y el SGLang CVE aún sin parchar, que es exactamente la configuración institucional que la predicción dijo que forzaría a CISA / NIST a entregar un sub-catálogo de servidor de inferencia más CI agéntica distinto del KEV.
text_locales.fil: Ang MITRE-CNA authority ng CSAI Foundation plus ang named agentic techniques ng ATT&CK v19 ay ngayon ay nakaupo kasabay ng CISA May 1 KEV cadence at ng nananatiling unpatched na SGLang CVE, na siyang eksaktong institutional configuration na sinabi ng prediction na magpipilit sa CISA / NIST na maglabas ng inference-server plus agentic-CI sub-catalog na hiwalay sa KEV.

bridges.text: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authorization, ATT&CK v19's named techniques, and CISA's continuing KEV cadence keep the institutional scaffolding aligned with the predicted AI-Infra sub-catalog, even though no separate regulatory primitive has been published yet.

text_locales.en: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authorization, ATT&CK v19's named techniques, and CISA's continuing KEV cadence keep the institutional scaffolding aligned with the predicted AI-Infra sub-catalog, even though no separate regulatory primitive has been published yet.
text_locales.ja: CSAIのMITRE-CNA認可、ATT&CK v19の命名されたテクニック、CISAの継続的なKEVケイデンスが、別個の規制プリミティブはまだ公開されていないものの、予測されたAIインフラサブカタログと制度的足場を整合させ続けている。
text_locales.es: La autorización MITRE-CNA de CSAI, las técnicas nombradas de ATT&CK v19, y la cadencia continua de KEV de CISA mantienen el andamiaje institucional alineado con el sub-catálogo AI-Infra predicho, aunque ninguna primitiva regulatoria separada se haya publicado todavía.
text_locales.fil: Ang MITRE-CNA authorization ng CSAI, ang named techniques ng ATT&CK v19, at ang patuloy na KEV cadence ng CISA ay nagpapanatili ng institutional scaffolding na nakahanay sa hinulang AI-Infra sub-catalog, kahit walang separate regulatory primitive ang nailalathala pa.

bridges.text: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authorization is the cleanest possible institutional confirmation that the AI-Infra CVE class is graduating into a regulatory primitive on the timeline the prediction projects. Pair that with the Apr 30 CISA KEV add and the LiteLLM + SGLang + Spring AI cluster spanning gateway / RAG / inference, and the substrate for a dedicated Q4 2026 sub-catalog is materializing on schedule. Strong signal.

text_locales.en: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authorization is the cleanest possible institutional confirmation that the AI-Infra CVE class is graduating into a regulatory primitive on the timeline the prediction projects. Pair that with the Apr 30 CISA KEV add and the LiteLLM + SGLang + Spring AI cluster spanning gateway / RAG / inference, and the substrate for a dedicated Q4 2026 sub-catalog is materializing on schedule. Strong signal.
text_locales.ja: CSAIのMITRE-CNA認定は、AI-Infra CVEクラスが予測が投影するタイムラインで規制プリミティブに昇格するという最もクリーンな制度的確認である。それを4月30日のCISA KEV追加と、ゲートウェイ／RAG／推論にわたるLiteLLM+SGLang+Spring AIクラスタと組み合わせると、専用Q4 2026サブカタログの基盤がスケジュール通りに具体化している。強いシグナル。
text_locales.es: La autorización CNA-MITRE de CSAI es la confirmación institucional más limpia posible de que la clase de CVE de AI-Infra está graduándose hacia primitiva regulatoria sobre el timeline que la predicción proyecta. Combina eso con la adición CISA KEV del 30 abr y el cluster LiteLLM + SGLang + Spring AI que abarca gateway / RAG / inferencia, y el sustrato para un sub-catálogo dedicado en Q4 2026 se está materializando en el cronograma. Señal fuerte.
text_locales.fil: Ang MITRE-CNA authorization ng CSAI ay ang pinaka-malinis na posibleng institutional confirmation na ang AI-Infra CVE class ay umaakyat sa regulatory primitive sa timeline na ipina-project ng prediction. Pagsamahin iyan sa Apr 30 CISA KEV add at sa LiteLLM + SGLang + Spring AI cluster na sumasaklaw sa gateway / RAG / inference, at ang substrate para sa dedikadong Q4 2026 sub-catalog ay nagma-materialize sa schedule. Strong signal.

bridges.text: ATT&CK v19's named-techniques wave plus the Apr 28 CISA KEV add and SGLang's still-unpatched CVSS 9.8 are the regulator-side and runtime-side pressure the prediction projected. The structural substrate for a dedicated AI-Infra sub-catalog is converging on schedule for the Q4 2026 forecast.

text_locales.en: ATT&CK v19's named-techniques wave plus the Apr 28 CISA KEV add and SGLang's still-unpatched CVSS 9.8 are the regulator-side and runtime-side pressure the prediction projected. The structural substrate for a dedicated AI-Infra sub-catalog is converging on schedule for the Q4 2026 forecast.
text_locales.ja: ATT&CK v19の命名された技法の波に加え、4月28日のCISA KEV追加とSGLangの依然未パッチのCVSS 9.8が、予測が投影した規制側とランタイム側の圧力である。専用のAI-Infraサブカタログのための構造的基盤が2026年Q4予測のスケジュールどおりに収束している。
text_locales.es: La ola de técnicas-nombradas de ATT&CK v19 más el agregado al KEV de CISA del 28 abr y el CVSS 9.8 todavía sin parche de SGLang son la presión del lado regulador y del lado runtime que proyectaba la predicción. El sustrato estructural para un sub-catálogo dedicado de AI-Infra está convergiendo en agenda para el pronóstico de Q4 2026.
text_locales.fil: Ang named-techniques wave ng ATT&CK v19 kasama ang Apr 28 CISA KEV add at ang still-unpatched CVSS 9.8 ng SGLang ay ang regulator-side at runtime-side pressure na inaasahan ng prediction. Ang structural substrate para sa nakatuon na AI-Infra sub-catalog ay nagsasama-sama nang nasa iskedyul para sa Q4 2026 forecast.

bridges.text: Apr 28's CISA KEV adds with May-12 federal deadline plus the SGLang 10+ day unpatched window and the Milesight + Totolink 9.8-cluster reinforce the precondition that the AI-Infra CVE class is reaching the cadence that historically forces a CISA / NIST sub-catalog. The regulatory pull is intensifying without yet producing the dedicated sub-catalog.

text_locales.en: Apr 28's CISA KEV adds with May-12 federal deadline plus the SGLang 10+ day unpatched window and the Milesight + Totolink 9.8-cluster reinforce the precondition that the AI-Infra CVE class is reaching the cadence that historically forces a CISA / NIST sub-catalog. The regulatory pull is intensifying without yet producing the dedicated sub-catalog.
text_locales.ja: 4月28日のCISA KEV追加(5月12日連邦期限)に加えてSGLangの10日以上の未パッチ・ウィンドウとMilesight + Totolinkの9.8クラスタが、AI-Infra CVEクラスが歴史的にCISA / NISTサブカタログを強制したケイデンスに到達しているという前提条件を補強する。専用サブカタログをまだ生み出していなくても、規制のプルが強まっている。
text_locales.es: Los KEV adds del 28 de abril de CISA con deadline federal del 12 de mayo mas la ventana de 10+ dias sin parchear de SGLang y el cluster Milesight + Totolink 9.8 refuerzan la precondicion de que la clase CVE de AI-Infra esta alcanzando la cadencia que historicamente fuerza un sub-catalogo CISA / NIST. El pull regulatorio se intensifica sin todavia producir el sub-catalogo dedicado.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apr 28 CISA KEV adds na may May-12 federal deadline kasama ang SGLang 10+ araw unpatched window at ang Milesight + Totolink 9.8-cluster ay nagpapatibay sa precondition na ang AI-Infra CVE class ay umaabot sa cadence na historically nagpilit ng CISA / NIST sub-catalog. Ang regulatory pull ay tumitindi nang hindi pa nagbubunga ng dedicated sub-catalog.

bridges.text: The unpatched SGLang RCE plus the Totolink quad, Cisco ISE advisory, and rising indirect-injection prevalence continue to stack the underlying-cause primitives the prediction expects to force a dedicated sub-catalog separate from the existing KEV pipeline.

text_locales.en: The unpatched SGLang RCE plus the Totolink quad, Cisco ISE advisory, and rising indirect-injection prevalence continue to stack the underlying-cause primitives the prediction expects to force a dedicated sub-catalog separate from the existing KEV pipeline.
text_locales.ja: 未パッチの SGLang RCE に Totolink 4 連発、Cisco ISE アドバイザリ、間接インジェクション蔓延の上昇が加わって積み上がり続けることは、予測が既存の KEV パイプラインから分離した専用サブカタログを強要すると見込む根底原因のプリミティブそのものだ。
text_locales.es: El RCE SGLang sin parchear más el cuádruple Totolink, el aviso de Cisco ISE, y la creciente prevalencia de inyección indirecta continúan apilando las primitivas de causa subyacente que la predicción espera fuercen un sub-catálogo dedicado separado del pipeline KEV existente.
text_locales.fil: Ang unpatched SGLang RCE plus ang Totolink quad, Cisco ISE advisory, at tumataas na indirect-injection prevalence ay patuloy na nagsasalansan ng underlying-cause primitives na inaasahan ng prediction na magpipilit sa dedikadong sub-catalog na hiwalay sa kasalukuyang KEV pipeline.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格する — Q4 2026 までに CISA / NIST が KEV とは別の、推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム向けサブカタログを公表する。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然として未パッチ)** + **Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` 経由サンドボックス エスケープ** + **基盤的な CI/CD 依存性における simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE** + **4/21 の Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot をまたぐ Comment-and-Control プロンプトインジェクション連鎖** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス回避** — はもはや「カテゴリーが立ち現れている」段階ではない。NIST の 4 月運用アップデート (CVE 公表数の記録的増加、AI 駆動の評価サポート) と Google の **野生の間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% 前年比増** が CISA / NVD に対し、Q4 2026 までに **SBOM タグ付け必須化を伴う、推論サーバ + エージェンティックツール専用の CVE サブカタログ**を出荷するよう迫る。OWASP の LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 へ格上げする。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La "clase CVE de AI-Infra" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 ve a CISA / NIST publicar un sub-catálogo para runtimes de inference-server + agentic-CI, separado de KEV.** La secuencia del 19-27 de abril — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (todavía sin parchear)** + **escape de sandbox de Pillar Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en una dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de prompt-injection Comment-and-Control del 21 de abril a través de Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización ops de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación impulsado por IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de prompt-injection indirecto en la naturaleza** de Google fuerzan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **sub-catálogo CVE dedicado a inference-server + agentic-tool** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "AI-Infra CVE class" ay magiging regulatory primitive — pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ilalathala ng CISA / NIST ang sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — ay hindi na isang "category emerging." Ang Apr ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) kasama ang **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise sa wild ng Google** ay pumipilit sa CISA/NVD na magpadala ng **dedikadong inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagsapit ng Q4 2026. Ang LLM Top 10 v2026 ng OWASP ay mag-aangat sa "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" sa top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: CISA ships AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog with inference-server SBOM by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.ja: **推論サーバ SSTI が単発の CVE から OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 のエントリへ昇格する。CISA は Q3 2026 までに「AI インフラ KEV」サブカタログを出荷する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) は **4/28 時点で依然として未パッチ** (公表後 10 日以上)、公開 PoC が出回っており、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` を伴わない同じ Jinja2 形状は今や vLLM、LMDeploy、隣接する推論サーバを横断するコピペ的クラスとしてフラグされている。**4/27-28 の Totolink CVE 4 連発 (7153 / 7154 / 7156 / 7202、いずれも 9.8)**、**Cisco ISE の認証なし RCE**、**CI/CD における simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE**、**Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` 経由のサンドボックス エスケープ**、そして Google / Forcepoint の **野生における間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% 前年比増** と 10 件の野生のペイロードが組み合わさり — NIST / CISA への圧力が結晶化する。**Q3 2026 までに CISA は専用の「AI インフラ」KEV サブカタログを出荷する**。推論サーバ (vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy) とエージェンティック CI ランタイム (Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw) に対する SBOM タグ付けが必須化される。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 へ格上げする。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El SSTI de inference-server pasa de CVE puntual a entrada del OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publica un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **permanece sin parchear hasta el 28 de abril** (más de 10 días después de la divulgación), con un PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copy-paste que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy, y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple Totolink CVE del 27-28 de abril (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox de Pillar's Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el aumento del 32% interanual de prompt-injection indirecta de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads in-the-wild — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publica un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra" KEV dedicado** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio en servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agentic-CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungo sa OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpapadala ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagsapit ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **nananatiling unpatched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may pampublikong PoC at ang parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon ay nakaflag bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at mga karatig na inference servers. Pinagsama sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`**, at ang **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — ang pressure sa NIST/CISA ay nagkri-crystallize. **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magpapadala ang CISA ng dedikadong "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). Ina-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

plain_language.es: Los servidores de inferencia AI y los agentes de codificación siguen siendo hackeados de la misma manera, así que los reguladores publicarán un catálogo dedicado con etiquetas de ingredientes requeridas.

detail.summary_short: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 stays unpatched with a public PoC while the same Jinja2-SSTI shape spans vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent servers; layered onto the Apr 27-28 Totolink quad, Cisco ISE unauth-RCE, simple-git RCE, Antigravity sandbox-escape, and a 32% IPI rise, CISA ships an AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog by Q3 2026.

summary_short_locales.en: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 stays unpatched with a public PoC while the same Jinja2-SSTI shape spans vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent servers; layered onto the Apr 27-28 Totolink quad, Cisco ISE unauth-RCE, simple-git RCE, Antigravity sandbox-escape, and a 32% IPI rise, CISA ships an AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog by Q3 2026.
summary_short_locales.ja: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 は公開 PoC とともに未パッチのままであり、同じ Jinja2-SSTI 形状は vLLM、LMDeploy、隣接サーバを横断する。4/27-28 の Totolink 4 連発、Cisco ISE の認証なし RCE、simple-git RCE、Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ、IPI 32% 増の上に積み上がり、CISA は Q3 2026 までに AI インフラ KEV サブカタログを出荷する。
summary_short_locales.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 permanece sin parchear con un PoC público mientras la misma forma Jinja2-SSTI abarca vLLM, LMDeploy, y servidores adyacentes; superpuesto al cuádruple Totolink del 27-28 de abril, Cisco ISE unauth-RCE, simple-git RCE, escape de sandbox de Antigravity, y un aumento del 32% IPI, CISA publica un sub-catálogo AI-Infra KEV para Q3 2026.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay nananatiling unpatched na may pampublikong PoC habang ang parehong Jinja2-SSTI shape ay sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at mga karatig na servers; nakapatong sa Apr 27-28 Totolink quad, Cisco ISE unauth-RCE, simple-git RCE, Antigravity sandbox-escape, at 32% IPI rise, magpapadala ang CISA ng AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog pagsapit ng Q3 2026.

bridges.text: The May 5 NVD-confirmed SGLang CVE-2026-5760 fix closes the longest-running 2026 LLM-tooling RCE, but the supply-chain GGUF vector and ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers (roughly half unauthenticated) plus a 31-69% YoY AI-CVE forecast keep the inference-server / template-loader threat-class warm enough to merit a dedicated KEV sub-catalog with SBOM coverage.

text_locales.en: The May 5 NVD-confirmed SGLang CVE-2026-5760 fix closes the longest-running 2026 LLM-tooling RCE, but the supply-chain GGUF vector and ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers (roughly half unauthenticated) plus a 31-69% YoY AI-CVE forecast keep the inference-server / template-loader threat-class warm enough to merit a dedicated KEV sub-catalog with SBOM coverage.
text_locales.ja: 5月5日のNVD確認のSGLang CVE-2026-5760修正は、最長稼働の2026年LLMツーリングRCEを閉じるが、サプライチェーンGGUFベクトル、約7,000のインターネット公開MCPサーバー(およそ半数が未認証)、+31〜69% YoYのAI-CVE予測が、推論サーバー / テンプレートローダー脅威クラスをSBOMカバレッジを伴う専用KEVサブカタログに値するほど温存している。
text_locales.es: El fix de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 confirmado por NVD del 5 de mayo cierra el RCE LLM-tooling más largo corriendo de 2026, pero el vector GGUF de cadena de suministro y los ~7,000 servidores MCP expuestos a internet (aproximadamente la mitad sin autenticación) más un pronóstico AI-CVE de 31-69% YoY mantienen la clase de amenaza servidor-de-inferencia / cargador-de-plantillas suficientemente caliente como para merecer un sub-catálogo KEV dedicado con cobertura SBOM.
text_locales.fil: Ang May 5 NVD-confirmed SGLang CVE-2026-5760 fix ay nagsasara sa pinakamatagal na 2026 LLM-tooling RCE, ngunit ang supply-chain GGUF vector at ~7,000 internet-exposed MCP servers (humigit-kumulang kalahati ay walang authentication) plus ang 31-69% YoY AI-CVE forecast ay nagpapanatiling mainit ang inference-server / template-loader threat-class na sapat upang maging karapat-dapat sa dedicated KEV sub-catalog na may SBOM coverage.

bridges.text: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 staying unpatched at the 15-day mark plus the operative reference treatment in the Stellar Cyber survey reinforces the precondition that inference-server template / loader RCEs deserve a top-3 OWASP slot; the prediction's force holds even without a fresh OWASP or CISA announcement.

text_locales.en: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 staying unpatched at the 15-day mark plus the operative reference treatment in the Stellar Cyber survey reinforces the precondition that inference-server template / loader RCEs deserve a top-3 OWASP slot; the prediction's force holds even without a fresh OWASP or CISA announcement.
text_locales.ja: SGLang CVE-2026-5760が15日マークで未パッチのまま留まること + Stellar Cyber調査での運用上の参照扱いが、推論サーバー・テンプレート / ローダーRCEがOWASPトップ3スロットに値するという前提条件を強化している; 予測の力は、新たなOWASPまたはCISA発表がなくても保たれる。
text_locales.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 permaneciendo sin parchar a la marca de 15 días más el tratamiento de referencia operativo en la encuesta de Stellar Cyber refuerza la precondición de que las RCEs de plantilla / cargador de servidor de inferencia merecen un puesto top-3 en OWASP; la fuerza de la predicción se mantiene incluso sin un anuncio fresco de OWASP o CISA.
text_locales.fil: Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 na nananatiling unpatched sa 15-day mark plus ang operative reference treatment sa Stellar Cyber survey ay nagpapatibay sa precondition na ang inference-server template / loader RCEs ay karapat-dapat sa top-3 OWASP slot; ang force ng prediction ay nananatiling buo kahit walang sariwang OWASP o CISA announcement.

bridges.text: SGLang's 14-day unpatched runway, the May 1 Copy Fail KEV add, and CSAI's MITRE-CNA authority compose the same SSTI-plus-kernel chain the prediction described. The Jinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment shape now reads as a copy-paste class across vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent servers, which is the OWASP-promotion driver.

text_locales.en: SGLang's 14-day unpatched runway, the May 1 Copy Fail KEV add, and CSAI's MITRE-CNA authority compose the same SSTI-plus-kernel chain the prediction described. The Jinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment shape now reads as a copy-paste class across vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent servers, which is the OWASP-promotion driver.
text_locales.ja: SGLangの14日間未パッチランウェイ、5月1日のCopy Fail KEV追加、CSAIのMITRE-CNA権限が、予測が記述したのと同じSSTIプラスカーネルチェーンを構成する。Jinja2をImmutableSandboxedEnvironmentなしで使う形は、vLLM、LMDeploy、隣接サーバーをまたいだコピペクラスとして読まれ、これがOWASP昇格ドライバーだ。
text_locales.es: El runway de 14 días sin parchar de SGLang, el agregado al KEV de Copy Fail del 1 de mayo, y la autoridad MITRE-CNA de CSAI componen la misma cadena SSTI-más-kernel que la predicción describió. La forma Jinja2-sin-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment ahora se lee como una clase copy-paste a través de vLLM, LMDeploy, y servidores adyacentes, que es el driver de promoción OWASP.
text_locales.fil: Ang 14-day unpatched runway ng SGLang, ang May 1 Copy Fail KEV add, at ang MITRE-CNA authority ng CSAI ay bumubuo ng parehong SSTI-plus-kernel chain na inilarawan ng prediction. Ang Jinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment shape ay nababasa na ngayon bilang copy-paste class sa kabuuan ng vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent servers, na siyang OWASP-promotion driver.

bridges.text: SGLang's unpatched-CVSS-9.8 status across 13 days plus the CSAI MITRE-CNA lane keep building the case for an inference-server-class catalogue without yet producing a separate CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog.

text_locales.en: SGLang's unpatched-CVSS-9.8 status across 13 days plus the CSAI MITRE-CNA lane keep building the case for an inference-server-class catalogue without yet producing a separate CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog.
text_locales.ja: SGLangの未パッチCVSS 9.8ステータスが13日間にわたり、加えてCSAI MITRE-CNAレーンが、別個のCISA AIインフラKEVサブカタログをまだ生み出していないものの、推論サーバークラスのカタログ事例を構築し続けている。
text_locales.es: El estado sin parchear con CVSS 9.8 de SGLang durante 13 días más el carril MITRE-CNA de CSAI siguen construyendo el caso para un catálogo de clase de servidor de inferencia sin producir todavía un sub-catálogo separado de AI-Infra KEV de CISA.
text_locales.fil: Ang unpatched-CVSS-9.8 status ng SGLang sa loob ng 13 araw kasama ang CSAI MITRE-CNA lane ay patuloy na nagpapatibay sa kaso para sa inference-server-class catalogue nang hindi pa nakapagpoproduce ng separate CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog.

bridges.text: LiteLLM's pre-auth SQLi is the cleanest extension yet of the Jinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment SSTI shape SGLang exposed, applied at the gateway tier with multi-vendor key blast radius. The CVE telemetry is converging exactly where the prediction said, but the OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry and CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalogue are still upstream of the Q3 2026 deadline.

text_locales.en: LiteLLM's pre-auth SQLi is the cleanest extension yet of the Jinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment SSTI shape SGLang exposed, applied at the gateway tier with multi-vendor key blast radius. The CVE telemetry is converging exactly where the prediction said, but the OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry and CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalogue are still upstream of the Q3 2026 deadline.
text_locales.ja: LiteLLMの事前認証SQLiは、SGLangが露呈したJinja2 without ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment SSTI形状の最もクリーンな拡張であり、マルチベンダーキーブラスト半径でゲートウェイ層に適用されている。CVEテレメトリは予測が述べた通りに収束しているが、OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026エントリーとCISA AI-Infra KEVサブカタログは依然として2026年Q3期限の上流にある。
text_locales.es: El SQLi pre-auth de LiteLLM es la extensión más limpia hasta ahora de la forma SSTI Jinja2-sin-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment que SGLang expuso, aplicada al tier gateway con blast radius de claves multi-vendor. La telemetría de CVE está convergiendo exactamente donde la predicción dijo, pero la entrada OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 y el sub-catálogo CISA AI-Infra KEV todavía están upstream del deadline Q3 2026.
text_locales.fil: Ang pre-auth SQLi ng LiteLLM ay ang pinaka-malinis na extension hanggang ngayon ng Jinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment SSTI shape na inilantad ng SGLang, na inilapat sa gateway tier na may multi-vendor key blast radius. Ang CVE telemetry ay nagko-converge eksaktong kung saan sinabi ng prediction, ngunit ang OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry at CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalogue ay nasa upstream pa rin ng Q3 2026 deadline.

bridges.text: The Spring AI CVE is the cleanest extension yet of the same Jinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment SSTI shape SGLang exposed, but the OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry and CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalogue have not yet shipped. The CVE telemetry is converging exactly where the prediction said; the regulatory codification is one step out.

text_locales.en: The Spring AI CVE is the cleanest extension yet of the same Jinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment SSTI shape SGLang exposed, but the OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry and CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalogue have not yet shipped. The CVE telemetry is converging exactly where the prediction said; the regulatory codification is one step out.
text_locales.ja: Spring AI CVEはSGLangが露呈した同じJinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment SSTI形のこれまで最も明確な拡張だが、OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026エントリとCISA AI-Infra KEVサブカタログはまだ出荷されていない。CVEテレメトリは予測どおりの場所で収束しているが、規制的法典化は1ステップ先である。
text_locales.es: El CVE de Spring AI es la extensión más limpia hasta ahora de la misma forma SSTI Jinja2-sin-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment que expuso SGLang, pero la entrada de OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 y el sub-catálogo CISA AI-Infra KEV aún no se han enviado. La telemetría de CVE está convergiendo exactamente donde dijo la predicción; la codificación regulatoria está un paso fuera.
text_locales.fil: Ang Spring AI CVE ay ang pinakamalinaw na extension hanggang ngayon ng parehong Jinja2-without-ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment SSTI shape na inilantad ng SGLang, ngunit ang OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry at CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalogue ay hindi pa nagpapadala. Ang CVE telemetry ay nagsasama-sama eksakto kung saan sinabi ng prediction; ang regulatory codification ay isang hakbang pa.

bridges.text: SGLang's 10+ day unpatched window with shipping-exploitable v0.5.10, the cross-server SSTI copy-paste class spanning vLLM and LMDeploy, and Apr 28's CISA KEV adds plus the Milesight + Totolink 9.8-cluster directly extend the precondition the prediction names. The pressure on NIST / CISA is building exactly along the inference-server SSTI axis the prediction projects.

text_locales.en: SGLang's 10+ day unpatched window with shipping-exploitable v0.5.10, the cross-server SSTI copy-paste class spanning vLLM and LMDeploy, and Apr 28's CISA KEV adds plus the Milesight + Totolink 9.8-cluster directly extend the precondition the prediction names. The pressure on NIST / CISA is building exactly along the inference-server SSTI axis the prediction projects.
text_locales.ja: SGLangの10日以上の未パッチ・ウィンドウ(悪用可能v0.5.10を出荷)、vLLMとLMDeployにまたがるクロスサーバーSSTIコピペ・クラス、4月28日のCISA KEV追加、Milesight + Totolink 9.8クラスタが、予測が指摘する前提条件を直接拡大する。NIST / CISAへの圧力は、予測が投影する推論サーバーSSTI軸に沿ってまさに構築されている。
text_locales.es: La ventana de 10+ dias sin parchear de SGLang con v0.5.10 explotable enviada, la clase SSTI cross-server copy-paste spanning vLLM y LMDeploy, y los KEV adds del 28 de abril de CISA mas el cluster Milesight + Totolink 9.8 extienden directamente la precondicion que la prediccion nombra. La presion sobre NIST / CISA esta construyendose exactamente a lo largo del eje SSTI de inference-server que la prediccion proyecta.
text_locales.fil: Ang 10+ araw unpatched window ng SGLang kasama ang shipping-exploitable v0.5.10, ang cross-server SSTI copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM at LMDeploy, at ang Apr 28 CISA KEV adds kasama ang Milesight + Totolink 9.8-cluster ay direktang nagpapalawak sa precondition na pinapangalanan ng hula. Ang pressure sa NIST / CISA ay nabubuo nang eksakto sa inference-server SSTI axis na ipino-project ng hula.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **推論サーバ SSTI が単発の CVE から OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 のエントリへ昇格する。CISA は Q3 2026 までに「AI インフラ KEV」サブカタログを出荷する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) は **4/28 時点で依然として未パッチ** (公表後 10 日以上)、公開 PoC が出回っており、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` を伴わない同じ Jinja2 形状は今や vLLM、LMDeploy、隣接する推論サーバを横断するコピペ的クラスとしてフラグされている。**4/27-28 の Totolink CVE 4 連発 (7153 / 7154 / 7156 / 7202、いずれも 9.8)**、**Cisco ISE の認証なし RCE**、**CI/CD における simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE**、**Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` 経由のサンドボックス エスケープ**、そして Google / Forcepoint の **野生における間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% 前年比増** と 10 件の野生のペイロードが組み合わさり — NIST / CISA への圧力が結晶化する。**Q3 2026 までに CISA は専用の「AI インフラ」KEV サブカタログを出荷する**。推論サーバ (vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy) とエージェンティック CI ランタイム (Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw) に対する SBOM タグ付けが必須化される。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 へ格上げする。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El SSTI de inference-server pasa de CVE puntual a entrada del OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publica un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **permanece sin parchear hasta el 28 de abril** (más de 10 días después de la divulgación), con un PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copy-paste que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy, y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple Totolink CVE del 27-28 de abril (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox de Pillar's Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el aumento del 32% interanual de prompt-injection indirecta de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads in-the-wild — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publica un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra" KEV dedicado** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio en servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agentic-CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungo sa OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpapadala ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagsapit ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **nananatiling unpatched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may pampublikong PoC at ang parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon ay nakaflag bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at mga karatig na inference servers. Pinagsama sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`**, at ang **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — ang pressure sa NIST/CISA ay nagkri-crystallize. **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magpapadala ang CISA ng dedikadong "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). Ina-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Agent-skills attack surface lands MITRE-style threat sub-matrix by H2 2026
nodes.short_label: Agent-skills attack surface lands MITRE-style threat sub-matrix by H2 2026
nodes.title: Agent-skills attack surface lands MITRE-style threat sub-matrix by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年H2までに、エージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE-ATT&CK様式のサブマトリクスを獲得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropicの公式スキル、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル/エージェント・トレース)が強制署名+来歴ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocの1,184の悪意あるClawHubスキル + Ciscoの**OpenClawスキル・マーケットプレイス全体での36%のプロンプト・インジェクション率**は、もはや単発ではない — 4月28日のNovita Sandboxは、OpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム向けに構築された最初の商用緩和製品だ。Corpus2Skillが**「ナビゲート可能な成果物としてのスキル」**を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がスキル/ハーネス/プロトコルを2026年の支配的な設計レイヤーと呼ぶことで、攻撃面は今や**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラスのインフラ**となった。2026年H2までに、(a) スキル・ポイズニング + スキル経由の間接プロンプト・インジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンをカバーする公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITRE様式またはNIST主導)、および (b) 公開前に署名済みかつ来歴認証済みのスキルを義務付ける少なくとも1つの主要マーケットプレイス — Anthropicの17スキル・リポジトリ、ClawHub、Multicaのマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceのエージェント・トレース面が最初の候補となる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 la superficie de ataque de agent-skills aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE-ATT&CK y al menos un mercado de skills importante (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face / trazas de agente) envia una puerta de firma + procedencia obligatoria.** Las 1,184 skills maliciosas de ClawHub de ClawHavoc + el **36% de tasa de prompt-injection a traves del mercado de skills de OpenClaw** de Cisco ya no es algo aislado — el Novita Sandbox del 28 de abril es el primer producto comercial de mitigacion construido a proposito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agente-autonomo. Con Corpus2Skill haciendo mainstream **"skills como artefacto navegable"** y el survey Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseno dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un canal lateral. Para el H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas de agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo envenenamiento de skills + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cadenas de privilegio entre-skills, y (b) al menos un mercado importante mandando skills firmadas-y-con-procedencia-atestada antes de publicar — con el repo de 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el mercado de Multica, y la superficie de trazas de agente de Hugging Face como los primeros candidatos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang agent-skills attack surface ay magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix at kahit isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ay maglalabas ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Ang 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills ng ClawHavoc + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa kabuuan ng OpenClaw skill marketplace** ay hindi na one-off — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purpose-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa Corpus2Skill na ginagawang **"skills bilang navigable artifact"** mainstream at ang Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) na tumatawag sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, ang attack surface ay ngayon **first-class infrastructure**, hindi side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin ang (a) inilathalang agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasaklaw sa skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) kahit isang major marketplace na nag-mamandato ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago mag-publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang mga kandidato. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **2026年H2までに、エージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE-ATT&CK様式のサブマトリクスを獲得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropicの公式スキル、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル/エージェント・トレース)が強制署名+来歴ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocの1,184の悪意あるClawHubスキル + Ciscoの**OpenClawスキル・マーケットプレイス全体での36%のプロンプト・インジェクション率**は、もはや単発ではない — 4月28日のNovita Sandboxは、OpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム向けに構築された最初の商用緩和製品だ。Corpus2Skillが**「ナビゲート可能な成果物としてのスキル」**を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がスキル/ハーネス/プロトコルを2026年の支配的な設計レイヤーと呼ぶことで、攻撃面は今や**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラスのインフラ**となった。2026年H2までに、(a) スキル・ポイズニング + スキル経由の間接プロンプト・インジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンをカバーする公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITRE様式またはNIST主導)、および (b) 公開前に署名済みかつ来歴認証済みのスキルを義務付ける少なくとも1つの主要マーケットプレイス — Anthropicの17スキル・リポジトリ、ClawHub、Multicaのマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceのエージェント・トレース面が最初の候補となる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **Para el H2 2026 la superficie de ataque de agent-skills aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE-ATT&CK y al menos un mercado de skills importante (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face / trazas de agente) envia una puerta de firma + procedencia obligatoria.** Las 1,184 skills maliciosas de ClawHub de ClawHavoc + el **36% de tasa de prompt-injection a traves del mercado de skills de OpenClaw** de Cisco ya no es algo aislado — el Novita Sandbox del 28 de abril es el primer producto comercial de mitigacion construido a proposito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agente-autonomo. Con Corpus2Skill haciendo mainstream **"skills como artefacto navegable"** y el survey Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseno dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un canal lateral. Para el H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas de agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo envenenamiento de skills + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cadenas de privilegio entre-skills, y (b) al menos un mercado importante mandando skills firmadas-y-con-procedencia-atestada antes de publicar — con el repo de 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el mercado de Multica, y la superficie de trazas de agente de Hugging Face como los primeros candidatos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang agent-skills attack surface ay magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix at kahit isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ay maglalabas ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Ang 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills ng ClawHavoc + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa kabuuan ng OpenClaw skill marketplace** ay hindi na one-off — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purpose-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa Corpus2Skill na ginagawang **"skills bilang navigable artifact"** mainstream at ang Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) na tumatawag sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, ang attack surface ay ngayon **first-class infrastructure**, hindi side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin ang (a) inilathalang agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasaklaw sa skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) kahit isang major marketplace na nag-mamandato ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago mag-publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang mga kandidato. bridges.text: The Microsoft + Cisco + CSA RSAC convergence on agent-as-first-class-identity plus Stellar Cyber's operative survey treatment keep the precondition warm for a published threat sub-matrix; the platform-side scaffolding is in place even though the marketplace gate is not yet shipped.

text_locales.en: The Microsoft + Cisco + CSA RSAC convergence on agent-as-first-class-identity plus Stellar Cyber's operative survey treatment keep the precondition warm for a published threat sub-matrix; the platform-side scaffolding is in place even though the marketplace gate is not yet shipped.
text_locales.ja: Microsoft + Cisco + CSAのRSACでのエージェントをファーストクラス・アイデンティティとして扱うことへの収斂 + Stellar Cyberの運用上の調査扱いが、公表された脅威サブマトリックスのための前提条件を温存している; マーケットプレイス・ゲートはまだ出荷されていないが、プラットフォーム側の足場は整っている。
text_locales.es: La convergencia RSAC de Microsoft + Cisco + CSA sobre agente-como-identidad-de-primera-clase más el tratamiento operativo de la encuesta de Stellar Cyber mantienen caliente la precondición para una sub-matriz de amenazas publicada; el andamiaje del lado plataforma está en su lugar aunque la puerta de marketplace aún no esté entregada.
text_locales.fil: Ang Microsoft + Cisco + CSA RSAC convergence sa agent-as-first-class-identity plus ang Stellar Cyber's operative survey treatment ay nagpapanatiling mainit ang precondition para sa nailathalang threat sub-matrix; ang platform-side scaffolding ay nakalagay kahit hindi pa nagpapadala ang marketplace gate.

bridges.text: ATT&CK v19's named agentic techniques and CSAI's MITRE-CNA authority sit alongside Microsoft Agent 365's allow/block primitive at $15/user/mo, which is the attack-surface formalization plus marketplace-policy combination the prediction's structural force depends on. The institutional substrate for a published sub-matrix is now in place.

text_locales.en: ATT&CK v19's named agentic techniques and CSAI's MITRE-CNA authority sit alongside Microsoft Agent 365's allow/block primitive at $15/user/mo, which is the attack-surface formalization plus marketplace-policy combination the prediction's structural force depends on. The institutional substrate for a published sub-matrix is now in place.
text_locales.ja: ATT&CK v19の命名済みエージェント手法とCSAIのMITRE-CNA権限が、Microsoft Agent 365の$15/user/moでの許可/ブロックプリミティブと並んで位置している。これは予測の構造的力が依存する攻撃面形式化とマーケットプレイスポリシーの組み合わせだ。公開サブマトリクスのための制度基盤は今や整っている。
text_locales.es: Las técnicas agénticas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 y la autoridad MITRE-CNA de CSAI se sitúan junto con la primitiva allow/block de Microsoft Agent 365 a $15/usuario/mes, que es la combinación de formalización de superficie de ataque más política de marketplace de la que depende la fuerza estructural de la predicción. El sustrato institucional para una sub-matriz publicada está ahora en su lugar.
text_locales.fil: Ang named agentic techniques ng ATT&CK v19 at ang MITRE-CNA authority ng CSAI ay nakaupo kasabay ng allow/block primitive ng Microsoft Agent 365 sa $15/user/mo, na siyang attack-surface formalization plus marketplace-policy combination na inaasahan ng structural force ng prediction. Ang institutional substrate para sa isang inilathalang sub-matrix ay nakapuwesto na ngayon.

bridges.text: ATT&CK v19's named techniques, CSAI's MITRE-CNA lane, Agent 365's tenant-level skills inventory, and BenchGuard's auditing scaffolding all line up tightly with the precondition arc the prediction expects to produce a sub-matrix and a marketplace signing gate.

text_locales.en: ATT&CK v19's named techniques, CSAI's MITRE-CNA lane, Agent 365's tenant-level skills inventory, and BenchGuard's auditing scaffolding all line up tightly with the precondition arc the prediction expects to produce a sub-matrix and a marketplace signing gate.
text_locales.ja: ATT&CK v19の命名されたテクニック、CSAIのMITRE-CNAレーン、Agent 365のテナントレベルスキルインベントリ、BenchGuardの監査基盤がすべて、予測がサブマトリックスとマーケットプレイスの署名ゲートを生み出すと期待する前提条件アークと密接に整合している。
text_locales.es: Las técnicas nombradas de ATT&CK v19, el carril MITRE-CNA de CSAI, el inventario de skills a nivel de inquilino de Agent 365 y el andamiaje de auditoría de BenchGuard se alinean estrechamente con el arco de precondiciones que la predicción espera que produzca una sub-matriz y una puerta de firma de marketplace.
text_locales.fil: Ang named techniques ng ATT&CK v19, ang MITRE-CNA lane ng CSAI, ang tenant-level skills inventory ng Agent 365, at ang auditing scaffolding ng BenchGuard ay magkakahanay nang masinsin sa precondition arc na inaasahan ng prediction na magpoproduce ng sub-matrix at marketplace signing gate.

bridges.text: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authorization plus ATT&CK v19's named-techniques wave plus OpenAI Agents SDK shipping sandbox-as-default across 7 providers compose the institutional + product layers the threat-matrix thesis depends on. The first half of the prediction (sub-matrix) is converging through CSAI + ATT&CK v19 even as the marketplace-signing-gate half remains open. Strong signal on substrate, partial on enforcement.

text_locales.en: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authorization plus ATT&CK v19's named-techniques wave plus OpenAI Agents SDK shipping sandbox-as-default across 7 providers compose the institutional + product layers the threat-matrix thesis depends on. The first half of the prediction (sub-matrix) is converging through CSAI + ATT&CK v19 even as the marketplace-signing-gate half remains open. Strong signal on substrate, partial on enforcement.
text_locales.ja: CSAIのMITRE-CNA認定に加え、ATT&CK v19の命名技法の波、OpenAI Agents SDKが7プロバイダー全体でサンドボックスをデフォルトとして出荷することは、脅威マトリックステーゼが依拠する制度+製品レイヤーを構成する。予測の前半(サブマトリックス)はCSAI+ATT&CK v19を通じて収束しているが、マーケットプレイス署名ゲートの後半は依然として開いている。基盤に強いシグナル、執行に部分的。
text_locales.es: La autorización CNA-MITRE de CSAI más la ola de técnicas-nombradas de ATT&CK v19 más el OpenAI Agents SDK enviando sandbox-as-default a través de 7 proveedores componen las capas institucionales + producto sobre las que depende la tesis de threat-matrix. La primera mitad de la predicción (sub-matriz) está convergiendo a través de CSAI + ATT&CK v19 incluso mientras la mitad del marketplace-signing-gate permanece abierta. Señal fuerte sobre sustrato, parcial sobre enforcement.
text_locales.fil: Ang MITRE-CNA authorization ng CSAI plus ang named-techniques wave ng ATT&CK v19 plus ang OpenAI Agents SDK na naglulunsad ng sandbox-as-default sa 7 providers ay bumubuo sa institutional + product layers na pinanindigan ng threat-matrix thesis. Ang unang kalahati ng prediction (sub-matrix) ay nagko-converge sa pamamagitan ng CSAI + ATT&CK v19 kahit na ang marketplace-signing-gate kalahati ay bukas pa. Strong signal sa substrate, partial sa enforcement.

bridges.text: ATT&CK v19's named-techniques addition is the structural confirmation the prediction's threat-matrix thesis rests on, and SuiteCloud Agent Skills is the first non-foundation-lab vendor publishing skills with signed-distribution. The two halves of the prediction (sub-matrix + marketplace-signing gate) are partially materializing within 24 hours of the forecast.

text_locales.en: ATT&CK v19's named-techniques addition is the structural confirmation the prediction's threat-matrix thesis rests on, and SuiteCloud Agent Skills is the first non-foundation-lab vendor publishing skills with signed-distribution. The two halves of the prediction (sub-matrix + marketplace-signing gate) are partially materializing within 24 hours of the forecast.
text_locales.ja: ATT&CK v19の命名された技法の追加は、予測の脅威マトリクステーゼが依拠する構造的確認であり、SuiteCloud Agent Skillsは署名配布付きでスキルを公開する初の非基盤研究所ベンダーである。予測の2つの半分(サブマトリクス + マーケットプレイス署名ゲート)は予測の24時間以内に部分的に具現化している。
text_locales.es: La adición de técnicas-nombradas de ATT&CK v19 es la confirmación estructural sobre la que descansa la tesis de matriz-de-amenazas de la predicción, y SuiteCloud Agent Skills es el primer vendor no-foundation-lab publicando skills con distribución firmada. Las dos mitades de la predicción (sub-matriz + gate de firma de marketplace) se materializan parcialmente dentro de las 24 horas del pronóstico.
text_locales.fil: Ang named-techniques addition ng ATT&CK v19 ay ang structural confirmation kung saan nakasalalay ang threat-matrix thesis ng prediction, at ang SuiteCloud Agent Skills ay ang unang non-foundation-lab vendor na naglalathala ng skills na may signed-distribution. Ang dalawang kalahati ng prediction (sub-matrix + marketplace-signing gate) ay bahagyang nagpapakita sa loob ng 24 hours ng forecast.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年H2までに、エージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE-ATT&CK様式のサブマトリクスを獲得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropicの公式スキル、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル/エージェント・トレース)が強制署名+来歴ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocの1,184の悪意あるClawHubスキル + Ciscoの**OpenClawスキル・マーケットプレイス全体での36%のプロンプト・インジェクション率**は、もはや単発ではない — 4月28日のNovita Sandboxは、OpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム向けに構築された最初の商用緩和製品だ。Corpus2Skillが**「ナビゲート可能な成果物としてのスキル」**を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がスキル/ハーネス/プロトコルを2026年の支配的な設計レイヤーと呼ぶことで、攻撃面は今や**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラスのインフラ**となった。2026年H2までに、(a) スキル・ポイズニング + スキル経由の間接プロンプト・インジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンをカバーする公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITRE様式またはNIST主導)、および (b) 公開前に署名済みかつ来歴認証済みのスキルを義務付ける少なくとも1つの主要マーケットプレイス — Anthropicの17スキル・リポジトリ、ClawHub、Multicaのマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceのエージェント・トレース面が最初の候補となる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 la superficie de ataque de agent-skills aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE-ATT&CK y al menos un mercado de skills importante (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face / trazas de agente) envia una puerta de firma + procedencia obligatoria.** Las 1,184 skills maliciosas de ClawHub de ClawHavoc + el **36% de tasa de prompt-injection a traves del mercado de skills de OpenClaw** de Cisco ya no es algo aislado — el Novita Sandbox del 28 de abril es el primer producto comercial de mitigacion construido a proposito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agente-autonomo. Con Corpus2Skill haciendo mainstream **"skills como artefacto navegable"** y el survey Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseno dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un canal lateral. Para el H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas de agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo envenenamiento de skills + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cadenas de privilegio entre-skills, y (b) al menos un mercado importante mandando skills firmadas-y-con-procedencia-atestada antes de publicar — con el repo de 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el mercado de Multica, y la superficie de trazas de agente de Hugging Face como los primeros candidatos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang agent-skills attack surface ay magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix at kahit isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ay maglalabas ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Ang 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills ng ClawHavoc + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa kabuuan ng OpenClaw skill marketplace** ay hindi na one-off — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purpose-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa Corpus2Skill na ginagawang **"skills bilang navigable artifact"** mainstream at ang Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) na tumatawag sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, ang attack surface ay ngayon **first-class infrastructure**, hindi side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin ang (a) inilathalang agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasaklaw sa skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) kahit isang major marketplace na nag-mamandato ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago mag-publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang mga kandidato. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
