nodes.title: Agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as MITRE/NIST extension by Q3 2026
nodes.description: By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
description.ja: 2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。**2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。** 4月28日のATT&CK v19 + v5.4フレームワークは、AIエージェントのコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出しの濫用、MCPサーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェントのデプロイをすでに技法として命名している。4月28日のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermesランタイム向けに設計された初の商用緩和製品である。4月28日のSuiteCloud Agent Skills(Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF)は、署名配布をセキュリティ枠組みとしてスキル・アズ・ア・プロダクトを出荷する初の主要な非基盤研究所ベンダーである。4月28日のarxiv 2604.24026(スキル向けSSL表現) + 4月24日のarxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaintが学術的な土台を提供している。強制要因はCisco RSAC 2026の36%プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavocの1,184の悪意あるスキル + 4月23-29日のGoogle +32%のIPI急増である。これらを組み合わせると、2017年のMITRE ATT&CK Mobileと2021年のMITRE ATLASを生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップ弧となる。これらの義務化の最初のものは、基盤研究所からではなく、CISA / NIST、または企業顧客の圧力下にあるマーケットプレイス事業者から直接生まれる可能性が高い。
description.es: Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar. Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar. Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar. **Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar.** El framework ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 del 28 abr ya nombra envenenamiento de contexto de AI-agent, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso del servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28 abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28 abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer vendor mayor no-foundation-lab que envía skills-as-a-product con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 del 28 abr (representación SSL para skills) + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24 abr proporcionan el andamiaje académico. La función forzante es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 de 36% de tasa de prompt-injection + los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc + el alza del +32% en IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, este es el mismo arco de brecha-de-gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. Es probable que el primero de estos mandatos se origine en CISA / NIST o directamente en los operadores de marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales en lugar de en un laboratorio de fundación. description.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ay pinangalanan na ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang mga technique; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa partikular para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang pangunahing non-foundation-lab vendor na nagpapadala ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation para sa skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ay nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagluwal ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandatong ito ay malamang magmula sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa mga marketplace operator sa ilalim ng presyon ng enterprise-customer, hindi mula sa isang foundation lab.

summary.ja: 2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。**2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。** 4月28日のATT&CK v19 + v5.4フレームワークは、AIエージェントのコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出しの濫用、MCPサーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェントのデプロイをすでに技法として命名している。4月28日のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermesランタイム向けに設計された初の商用緩和製品である。4月28日のSuiteCloud Agent Skills(Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF)は、署名配布をセキュリティ枠組みとしてスキル・アズ・ア・プロダクトを出荷する初の主要な非基盤研究所ベンダーである。4月28日のarxiv 2604.24026(スキル向けSSL表現) + 4月24日のarxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaintが学術的な土台を提供している。強制要因はCisco RSAC 2026の36%プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavocの1,184の悪意あるスキル + 4月23-29日のGoogle +32%のIPI急増である。これらを組み合わせると、2017年のMITRE ATT&CK Mobileと2021年のMITRE ATLASを生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップ弧となる。これらの義務化の最初のものは、基盤研究所からではなく、CISA / NIST、または企業顧客の圧力下にあるマーケットプレイス事業者から直接生まれる可能性が高い。
summary.es: Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar. Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar. Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar. **Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar.** El framework ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 del 28 abr ya nombra envenenamiento de contexto de AI-agent, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso del servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28 abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28 abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer vendor mayor no-foundation-lab que envía skills-as-a-product con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 del 28 abr (representación SSL para skills) + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24 abr proporcionan el andamiaje académico. La función forzante es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 de 36% de tasa de prompt-injection + los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc + el alza del +32% en IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, este es el mismo arco de brecha-de-gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. Es probable que el primero de estos mandatos se origine en CISA / NIST o directamente en los operadores de marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales en lugar de en un laboratorio de fundación. summary.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ay pinangalanan na ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang mga technique; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa partikular para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang pangunahing non-foundation-lab vendor na nagpapadala ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation para sa skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ay nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagluwal ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandatong ito ay malamang magmula sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa mga marketplace operator sa ilalim ng presyon ng enterprise-customer, hindi mula sa isang foundation lab.

title_locales.en: Agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as MITRE/NIST extension by Q3 2026
title_locales.ja: エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE/NIST拡張として2026年Q3までに登場
title_locales.es: La sub-matriz de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de MITRE/NIST para Q3 2026
title_locales.fil: Agent-skills threat sub-matrix lalabas bilang MITRE/NIST extension pagsapit ng Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: ATT&CK v19's named techniques (context poisoning, tool-invocation abuse, MCP compromise, malicious agent deployment) plus ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills, Cisco's 36% prompt-injection rate, and a +32% IPI uptick force a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix and an enforced signed + provenance-attested marketplace gate by Q3 2026.

summary_short_locales.en: ATT&CK v19's named techniques (context poisoning, tool-invocation abuse, MCP compromise, malicious agent deployment) plus ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills, Cisco's 36% prompt-injection rate, and a +32% IPI uptick force a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix and an enforced signed + provenance-attested marketplace gate by Q3 2026.
summary_short_locales.ja: ATT&CK v19の命名された技法(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出しの濫用、MCP侵害、悪意あるエージェントのデプロイ)に加え、ClawHavocの1,184の悪意あるスキル、Ciscoの36%プロンプトインジェクション率、+32%のIPI急増が、2026年Q3までに公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスと強制的な署名+来歴認証マーケットプレイスゲートを強制する。
summary_short_locales.es: Las técnicas nombradas en ATT&CK v19 (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos) más los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc, la tasa del 36% de prompt-injection de Cisco y un alza del +32% en IPI fuerzan una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills y un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance en marketplaces para Q3 2026.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang mga pinangalanang technique ng ATT&CK v19 (context poisoning, tool-invocation abuse, MCP compromise, malicious agent deployment) kasama ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc, 36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco, at +32% IPI uptick ay pumipilit ng nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix at ipinatutupad na signed + provenance-attested marketplace gate pagsapit ng Q3 2026.

bridges.text: The RSAC-week enterprise-platform convergence keeps the doctrine side warm but does not advance the specific MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix the prediction names; the marketplace-signing-gate side stays quiet today.

text_locales.en: The RSAC-week enterprise-platform convergence keeps the doctrine side warm but does not advance the specific MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix the prediction names; the marketplace-signing-gate side stays quiet today.
text_locales.ja: RSACウィークのエンタープライズ・プラットフォーム収斂はドクトリン側を温存するが、予測が指摘する具体的なMITRE ATT&CK拡張やNIST AI-RMF付録を前進させない; マーケットプレイス署名ゲート側は本日も静かなままである。
text_locales.es: La convergencia de plataforma empresarial durante la semana RSAC mantiene caliente el lado doctrina pero no avanza la extensión MITRE ATT&CK específica o el apéndice NIST AI-RMF que la predicción nombra; el lado de puerta de firma de marketplace permanece silencioso hoy.
text_locales.fil: Ang RSAC-week enterprise-platform convergence ay nagpapanatiling mainit ang doctrine side ngunit hindi sumusulong sa specific MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix na pinangalanan ng prediction; ang marketplace-signing-gate side ay nananatiling tahimik ngayon.

bridges.text: ATT&CK v19's named techniques, CSAI's MITRE-CNA authority, and Microsoft Agent 365's tools-management allow/block primitive supply the regulatory and marketplace levers the prediction's structural force assumes. SAGE and LiveClawBench add the eval substrate that a published sub-matrix can reference.

text_locales.en: ATT&CK v19's named techniques, CSAI's MITRE-CNA authority, and Microsoft Agent 365's tools-management allow/block primitive supply the regulatory and marketplace levers the prediction's structural force assumes. SAGE and LiveClawBench add the eval substrate that a published sub-matrix can reference.
text_locales.ja: ATT&CK v19の命名済み手法、CSAIのMITRE-CNA権限、Microsoft Agent 365のツール管理許可/ブロックプリミティブが、予測の構造的力が想定する規制とマーケットプレイスのレバーを供給する。SAGEとLiveClawBenchが、公開サブマトリクスが参照できる評価基盤を加える。
text_locales.es: Las técnicas nombradas de ATT&CK v19, la autoridad MITRE-CNA de CSAI, y la primitiva allow/block de gestión de herramientas de Microsoft Agent 365 suministran las palancas regulatorias y de marketplace que asume la fuerza estructural de la predicción. SAGE y LiveClawBench añaden el sustrato de evaluación al que una sub-matriz publicada puede referirse.
text_locales.fil: Ang named techniques ng ATT&CK v19, ang MITRE-CNA authority ng CSAI, at ang tools-management allow/block primitive ng Microsoft Agent 365 ay nagbibigay ng regulatory at marketplace levers na ipinapalagay ng structural force ng prediction. Ang SAGE at LiveClawBench ay nagdaragdag ng eval substrate na maaaring sangguniin ng inilathalang sub-matrix.

bridges.text: ATT&CK v19's published technique names, the CSAI MITRE-CNA lane, and Agent 365's tenant-level enforcement primitive line up with the precondition arc that should make a sub-matrix appendix and a publish-time signing gate inevitable inside Q3.

text_locales.en: ATT&CK v19's published technique names, the CSAI MITRE-CNA lane, and Agent 365's tenant-level enforcement primitive line up with the precondition arc that should make a sub-matrix appendix and a publish-time signing gate inevitable inside Q3.
text_locales.ja: ATT&CK v19の公開されたテクニック名、CSAI MITRE-CNAレーン、Agent 365のテナントレベル強制プリミティブが、Q3内でサブマトリックス付録と公開時署名ゲートを必然にする前提条件アークと整合する。
text_locales.es: Los nombres de técnicas publicados de ATT&CK v19, el carril MITRE-CNA de CSAI, y la primitiva de aplicación a nivel de inquilino de Agent 365 se alinean con el arco de precondiciones que debería hacer inevitable un apéndice de sub-matriz y una puerta de firma en tiempo de publicación dentro del Q3.
text_locales.fil: Ang nailathalang technique names ng ATT&CK v19, ang CSAI MITRE-CNA lane, at ang tenant-level enforcement primitive ng Agent 365 ay nakahanay sa precondition arc na dapat gawing inevitable sa loob ng Q3 ang sub-matrix appendix at publish-time signing gate.

bridges.text: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authorization is the cleanest possible institutional precursor to the prediction's ATT&CK-extension / AI-RMF-appendix thesis, with ATT&CK v19's named-techniques wave already populating the technique slots. The forecast and yesterday's evidence are functionally one-day apart and converging. The marketplace-signing-gate half remains the open leg.

text_locales.en: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authorization is the cleanest possible institutional precursor to the prediction's ATT&CK-extension / AI-RMF-appendix thesis, with ATT&CK v19's named-techniques wave already populating the technique slots. The forecast and yesterday's evidence are functionally one-day apart and converging. The marketplace-signing-gate half remains the open leg.
text_locales.ja: CSAIのMITRE-CNA認定は、予測のATT&CK拡張 / AI-RMF付録テーゼに対する最もクリーンな制度的前駆体であり、ATT&CK v19の命名技法の波はすでに技法スロットを埋めている。予測と昨日の証拠は機能的に1日離れて収束している。マーケットプレイス署名ゲートの後半は依然として開いた脚である。
text_locales.es: La autorización CNA-MITRE de CSAI es el precursor institucional más limpio posible a la tesis de extensión-de-ATT&CK / apéndice-de-AI-RMF de la predicción, con la ola de técnicas-nombradas de ATT&CK v19 ya poblando los slots de técnicas. El forecast y la evidencia de ayer están funcionalmente a un día de distancia y convergiendo. La mitad del marketplace-signing-gate permanece como el leg abierto.
text_locales.fil: Ang MITRE-CNA authorization ng CSAI ay ang pinaka-malinis na posibleng institutional precursor sa ATT&CK-extension / AI-RMF-appendix thesis ng prediction, na may named-techniques wave ng ATT&CK v19 na nagpu-populate na ng technique slots. Ang forecast at evidence ng kahapon ay functionally one-day apart at nagko-converge. Ang marketplace-signing-gate kalahati ay nananatiling bukas na leg.

motivation_locales.en: ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's 36% prompt-injection rate make signing-as-default the only enterprise-acceptable distribution shape; the first marketplace to ship the gate locks in enterprise procurement preference.

motivation_locales.es: Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + la tasa del 36% de prompt-injection de Cisco hacen de la firma-por-defecto la única forma de distribución aceptable empresarialmente; el primer marketplace en enviar el gate bloquea la preferencia de procurement empresarial.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills ng ClawHavoc + 36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco ay ginagawa ang signing-as-default na tanging enterprise-acceptable distribution shape; ang unang marketplace na magpapadala ng gate ay nag-lalock ng enterprise procurement preference.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
detail.prediction_summary: By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: 2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。**2026年Q3までに、公開されたエージェントスキル脅威サブマトリクスがMITRE ATT&CKの第一級拡張またはNIST AI-RMFの付録として登場し、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Faceスキル)が公開前の署名+来歴認証ゲートを強制的に出荷する。** 4月28日のATT&CK v19 + v5.4フレームワークは、AIエージェントのコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出しの濫用、MCPサーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェントのデプロイをすでに技法として命名している。4月28日のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermesランタイム向けに設計された初の商用緩和製品である。4月28日のSuiteCloud Agent Skills(Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF)は、署名配布をセキュリティ枠組みとしてスキル・アズ・ア・プロダクトを出荷する初の主要な非基盤研究所ベンダーである。4月28日のarxiv 2604.24026(スキル向けSSL表現) + 4月24日のarxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaintが学術的な土台を提供している。強制要因はCisco RSAC 2026の36%プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavocの1,184の悪意あるスキル + 4月23-29日のGoogle +32%のIPI急増である。これらを組み合わせると、2017年のMITRE ATT&CK Mobileと2021年のMITRE ATLASを生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップ弧となる。これらの義務化の最初のものは、基盤研究所からではなく、CISA / NIST、または企業顧客の圧力下にあるマーケットプレイス事業者から直接生まれる可能性が高い。
prediction_summary_locales.es: Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar. Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar. Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar. **Para Q3 2026 una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de agent-skills aterriza como extensión de primera clase de MITRE ATT&CK o como apéndice del NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (repo oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance antes de publicar.** El framework ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 del 28 abr ya nombra envenenamiento de contexto de AI-agent, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso del servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28 abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28 abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer vendor mayor no-foundation-lab que envía skills-as-a-product con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 del 28 abr (representación SSL para skills) + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24 abr proporcionan el andamiaje académico. La función forzante es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 de 36% de tasa de prompt-injection + los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc + el alza del +32% en IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, este es el mismo arco de brecha-de-gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. Es probable que el primero de estos mandatos se origine en CISA / NIST o directamente en los operadores de marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales en lugar de en un laboratorio de fundación. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, isang nailathalang agent-skills threat sub-matrix ang papasok bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang pangunahing skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ang magpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ay pinangalanan na ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang mga technique; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa partikular para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang pangunahing non-foundation-lab vendor na nagpapadala ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation para sa skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ay nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagluwal ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandatong ito ay malamang magmula sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa mga marketplace operator sa ilalim ng presyon ng enterprise-customer, hindi mula sa isang foundation lab.

nodes.title: Agentic-AI CVE class lands as CSAI CNA sub-corpus by Q3 2026
nodes.description: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.

description.en: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
description.ja: 2026年Q3までにエージェント型AIのCVEクラスが独立した第一級のCNA発行サブコーパスとなり、CSAIのMITRE認定CNAの下でエージェント／スキル／ハーネス／サンドボックス固有のCVEが50件以上公表され、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)が公開前に署名済み+来歴証明済みの必須ゲートを実装する。4月29日のCSAI MITRE-CNA認定は制度的な火種であり、4月28日のATT&CK v19は技術名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名し、4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDKは7つのサンドボックスプロバイダー(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)全体でデフォルトのプリミティブとしてネイティブサンドボックス実行を出荷し、4月28日のNovita Sandbox+4月28日のAWS Bedrock Managed Agents+4月30日のMicrosoft Foundry hosted agentsはベンダー側の対応を形成し、4月26日のLiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(単一のSQLi行がOpenAI+Anthropic+Bedrockキーを漏洩)+4月28日のSpring AI CVE-2026-40967+繰り越しのSGLang CVE-2026-5760はモデルツールレイヤー注入の影響半径を実証している。強制関数は企業のリスク移転である ― 明示的なAIエージェント任務を持つCNAが存在すれば、開示ケイデンスはランダムパブリッシャーから調整発行者主導へと圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレイスはエンタープライズ顧客を失わずに署名なしデフォルトを維持できなくなる。CSAIの最初のフルクォーター(2026年Q3)が閾値を超える最も可能性の高い着地点である。
description.es: Para Q3 2026 la clase de CVE de IA-agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus de primera clase emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVEs específicas de agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox publicadas bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + atestación de provenance antes de publicar. La autorización CNA-MITRE de CSAI del 29 abr es la chispa institucional; ATT&CK v19 del 28 abr nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abr lanza ejecución sandbox nativa como primitiva por defecto a través de 7 proveedores sandbox (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28 abr + AWS Bedrock Managed Agents del 28 abr + agentes hospedados de Microsoft Foundry del 30 abr forman la contraparte del lado vendor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26 abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28 abr + el carry-forward de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demuestran el blast radius de la inyección en la capa model-tooling. La función forzante es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez que existe una CNA con el mandato explícito de IA-agente, la cadencia de divulgación se comprimirá de publisher-aleatorio a coordinated-issuer-driven, y los marketplaces de skills no podrán permanecer unsigned-by-default sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre de pull de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable para que se cruce el umbral.
description.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at hindi bababa sa isang malaking skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay maglulunsad ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; ang Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ay nagpangalan sa mga technique (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ay naglulunsad ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang bumubuo ng vendor-side counterpart; ang Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row na naglalabas ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay nagpapakita ng model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay ang enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, mag-co-compress ang disclosure cadence mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakaiwas ang skill marketplaces na manatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first-pull-quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ay ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para malagpasan ang threshold.

CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
summary.ja: 2026年Q3までにエージェント型AIのCVEクラスが独立した第一級のCNA発行サブコーパスとなり、CSAIのMITRE認定CNAの下でエージェント／スキル／ハーネス／サンドボックス固有のCVEが50件以上公表され、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)が公開前に署名済み+来歴証明済みの必須ゲートを実装する。4月29日のCSAI MITRE-CNA認定は制度的な火種であり、4月28日のATT&CK v19は技術名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名し、4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDKは7つのサンドボックスプロバイダー(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)全体でデフォルトのプリミティブとしてネイティブサンドボックス実行を出荷し、4月28日のNovita Sandbox+4月28日のAWS Bedrock Managed Agents+4月30日のMicrosoft Foundry hosted agentsはベンダー側の対応を形成し、4月26日のLiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(単一のSQLi行がOpenAI+Anthropic+Bedrockキーを漏洩)+4月28日のSpring AI CVE-2026-40967+繰り越しのSGLang CVE-2026-5760はモデルツールレイヤー注入の影響半径を実証している。強制関数は企業のリスク移転である ― 明示的なAIエージェント任務を持つCNAが存在すれば、開示ケイデンスはランダムパブリッシャーから調整発行者主導へと圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレイスはエンタープライズ顧客を失わずに署名なしデフォルトを維持できなくなる。CSAIの最初のフルクォーター(2026年Q3)が閾値を超える最も可能性の高い着地点である。
summary.es: Para Q3 2026 la clase de CVE de IA-agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus de primera clase emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVEs específicas de agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox publicadas bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + atestación de provenance antes de publicar. La autorización CNA-MITRE de CSAI del 29 abr es la chispa institucional; ATT&CK v19 del 28 abr nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abr lanza ejecución sandbox nativa como primitiva por defecto a través de 7 proveedores sandbox (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28 abr + AWS Bedrock Managed Agents del 28 abr + agentes hospedados de Microsoft Foundry del 30 abr forman la contraparte del lado vendor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26 abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28 abr + el carry-forward de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demuestran el blast radius de la inyección en la capa model-tooling. La función forzante es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez que existe una CNA con el mandato explícito de IA-agente, la cadencia de divulgación se comprimirá de publisher-aleatorio a coordinated-issuer-driven, y los marketplaces de skills no podrán permanecer unsigned-by-default sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre de pull de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable para que se cruce el umbral.
summary.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at hindi bababa sa isang malaking skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay maglulunsad ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; ang Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ay nagpangalan sa mga technique (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ay naglulunsad ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang bumubuo ng vendor-side counterpart; ang Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row na naglalabas ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay nagpapakita ng model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay ang enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, mag-co-compress ang disclosure cadence mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakaiwas ang skill marketplaces na manatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first-pull-quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ay ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para malagpasan ang threshold.

title_locales.en: Agentic-AI CVE class lands as CSAI CNA sub-corpus by Q3 2026
title_locales.ja: エージェント型AIのCVEクラスがCSAI CNAサブコーパスとして2026年Q3までに確立
title_locales.es: La clase de CVE de IA agéntica se establece como sub-corpus de CNA de CSAI para Q3 2026
title_locales.fil: Magiging CSAI CNA sub-corpus ang Agentic-AI CVE class pagsapit ng Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE CNA authorization plus ATT&CK v19's named agentic techniques and parallel sandbox-as-primitive launches at OpenAI, AWS, and Microsoft point to ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs publishing under the CSAI CNA and at least one major skill marketplace mandating signed + provenance-attested gates before publish by Q3 2026.

summary_short_locales.en: CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE CNA authorization plus ATT&CK v19's named agentic techniques and parallel sandbox-as-primitive launches at OpenAI, AWS, and Microsoft point to ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs publishing under the CSAI CNA and at least one major skill marketplace mandating signed + provenance-attested gates before publish by Q3 2026.
summary_short_locales.ja: CSAIの4月29日のMITRE CNA認定に加え、ATT&CK v19が命名したエージェント型技法、OpenAI、AWS、Microsoftの並行するサンドボックス・アズ・プリミティブ・ローンチは、2026年Q3までにCSAI CNAの下で50件以上のエージェント／スキル／ハーネス／サンドボックス固有のCVEが公表され、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイスが公開前に署名済み+来歴証明済みゲートを必須化することを示している。
summary_short_locales.es: La autorización CNA-MITRE de CSAI del 29 abr más las técnicas agénticas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 y los lanzamientos paralelos de sandbox-como-primitiva en OpenAI, AWS y Microsoft apuntan a ≥50 CVEs específicas de agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox publicándose bajo la CNA de CSAI y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills exigiendo gates firmados + atestados con provenance antes de publicar para Q3 2026.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Apr 29 MITRE CNA authorization ng CSAI plus ang named agentic techniques ng ATT&CK v19 at ang parallel sandbox-as-primitive launches sa OpenAI, AWS, at Microsoft ay tumuturo sa ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na maipa-publish sa ilalim ng CSAI CNA at hindi bababa sa isang malaking skill marketplace na mag-mandate ng signed + provenance-attested gates bago mag-publish pagsapit ng Q3 2026.

bridges.text: The 15-day SGLang CVE-2026-5760 carry plus the Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agent silent-exfil chain plus the Stellar Cyber operative survey treatment keep the precondition warm: the agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVE class has the volume and the named-technique scaffolding required before CSAI Foundation's CNA cadence compresses disclosure.

text_locales.en: The 15-day SGLang CVE-2026-5760 carry plus the Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agent silent-exfil chain plus the Stellar Cyber operative survey treatment keep the precondition warm: the agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVE class has the volume and the named-technique scaffolding required before CSAI Foundation's CNA cadence compresses disclosure.
text_locales.ja: SGLang CVE-2026-5760の15日間キャリー + Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agentサイレント流出チェーン + Stellar Cyberの運用上の調査扱いが前提条件を温存する: エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有のCVEクラスは、CSAI FoundationのCNAケイデンスが開示を圧縮する前に必要となる量と命名された手法の足場を持つ。
text_locales.es: El acarreo de 15 días de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 más la cadena de exfiltración silenciosa de Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agent más el tratamiento operativo de la encuesta de Stellar Cyber mantienen caliente la precondición: la clase CVE específica de agente/habilidad/arnés/sandbox tiene el volumen y el andamiaje de técnica nombrada requerido antes de que la cadencia CNA de CSAI Foundation comprima la divulgación.
text_locales.fil: Ang 15-day SGLang CVE-2026-5760 carry plus ang Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agent silent-exfil chain plus ang Stellar Cyber operative survey treatment ay nagpapanatiling mainit ang precondition: ang agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVE class ay may volume at named-technique scaffolding na kailangan bago i-compress ng CSAI Foundation's CNA cadence ang disclosure.

bridges.text: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authority plus ATT&CK v19's named agentic techniques plus the still-unpatched SGLang CVE plus LiteLLM key-leak SQLi compose the disclosure issuance and exemplar pipeline the prediction's >=50-CVE landing depends on. Glasswing's gated-distribution shape is the marketplace-side analog.

text_locales.en: CSAI's MITRE-CNA authority plus ATT&CK v19's named agentic techniques plus the still-unpatched SGLang CVE plus LiteLLM key-leak SQLi compose the disclosure issuance and exemplar pipeline the prediction's >=50-CVE landing depends on. Glasswing's gated-distribution shape is the marketplace-side analog.
text_locales.ja: CSAIのMITRE-CNA権限とATT&CK v19の命名済みエージェント手法、未だ未パッチのSGLang CVE、LiteLLM鍵漏洩SQLiが、予測の>=50-CVEランディングが依存する開示発出と模範パイプラインを構成する。Glasswingのゲート付き配布形は、マーケットプレイス側のアナログだ。
text_locales.es: La autoridad MITRE-CNA de CSAI más las técnicas agénticas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 más el SGLang CVE aún sin parchar más LiteLLM key-leak SQLi componen la tubería de emisión de divulgación y ejemplares de la que depende el aterrizaje de >=50 CVEs de la predicción. La forma de distribución gated de Glasswing es el análogo del lado de marketplace.
text_locales.fil: Ang MITRE-CNA authority ng CSAI plus ang named agentic techniques ng ATT&CK v19 plus ang nananatiling unpatched na SGLang CVE plus LiteLLM key-leak SQLi ay bumubuo ng disclosure issuance at exemplar pipeline na inaasahan ng >=50-CVE landing ng prediction. Ang gated-distribution shape ng Glasswing ang marketplace-side analog.

bridges.text: The CSAI MITRE-CNA lane plus the steady drip of agent-tooling CVEs (SGLang unpatched, IBM Langflow, UTT HiPER, LiteLLM) keep the issuance pipeline fed exactly the way the prediction needs to reach the ≥50-CVE threshold.

text_locales.en: The CSAI MITRE-CNA lane plus the steady drip of agent-tooling CVEs (SGLang unpatched, IBM Langflow, UTT HiPER, LiteLLM) keep the issuance pipeline fed exactly the way the prediction needs to reach the ≥50-CVE threshold.
text_locales.ja: CSAI MITRE-CNAレーンと、エージェントツーリングCVEの安定したドリップ(SGLang未パッチ、IBM Langflow、UTT HiPER、LiteLLM)が、予測が≥50 CVE閾値に到達するために必要な発行パイプラインを正に供給し続けている。
text_locales.es: El carril MITRE-CNA de CSAI más el goteo constante de CVEs de tooling de agentes (SGLang sin parchear, IBM Langflow, UTT HiPER, LiteLLM) mantienen la tubería de emisión alimentada exactamente como la predicción necesita para alcanzar el umbral de ≥50 CVEs.
text_locales.fil: Ang CSAI MITRE-CNA lane kasama ang patuloy na pagdaloy ng agent-tooling CVEs (SGLang unpatched, IBM Langflow, UTT HiPER, LiteLLM) ay nagpapanatili ng pinakain ang issuance pipeline eksakto sa paraang kailangan ng prediction upang abutin ang ≥50-CVE threshold.

motivation_locales.en: Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents make sandbox the default primitive — providers that ship the hardest isolation first lock in the multi-vendor procurement default.

motivation_locales.es: OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abr + Novita Sandbox del 28 abr + agentes hospedados de Microsoft Foundry del 30 abr hacen del sandbox la primitiva por defecto — los proveedores que envían el aislamiento más duro primero bloquean el default de procurement multi-vendor.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.

Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.

prediction_summary_locales.en: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: 2026年Q3までにエージェント型AIのCVEクラスが独立した第一級のCNA発行サブコーパスとなり、CSAIのMITRE認定CNAの下でエージェント／スキル／ハーネス／サンドボックス固有のCVEが50件以上公表され、少なくとも1つの主要なスキルマーケットプレイス(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)が公開前に署名済み+来歴証明済みの必須ゲートを実装する。4月29日のCSAI MITRE-CNA認定は制度的な火種であり、4月28日のATT&CK v19は技術名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名し、4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDKは7つのサンドボックスプロバイダー(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)全体でデフォルトのプリミティブとしてネイティブサンドボックス実行を出荷し、4月28日のNovita Sandbox+4月28日のAWS Bedrock Managed Agents+4月30日のMicrosoft Foundry hosted agentsはベンダー側の対応を形成し、4月26日のLiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(単一のSQLi行がOpenAI+Anthropic+Bedrockキーを漏洩)+4月28日のSpring AI CVE-2026-40967+繰り越しのSGLang CVE-2026-5760はモデルツールレイヤー注入の影響半径を実証している。強制関数は企業のリスク移転である ― 明示的なAIエージェント任務を持つCNAが存在すれば、開示ケイデンスはランダムパブリッシャーから調整発行者主導へと圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレイスはエンタープライズ顧客を失わずに署名なしデフォルトを維持できなくなる。CSAIの最初のフルクォーター(2026年Q3)が閾値を超える最も可能性の高い着地点である。
prediction_summary_locales.es: Para Q3 2026 la clase de CVE de IA-agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus de primera clase emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVEs específicas de agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox publicadas bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + atestación de provenance antes de publicar. La autorización CNA-MITRE de CSAI del 29 abr es la chispa institucional; ATT&CK v19 del 28 abr nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abr lanza ejecución sandbox nativa como primitiva por defecto a través de 7 proveedores sandbox (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28 abr + AWS Bedrock Managed Agents del 28 abr + agentes hospedados de Microsoft Foundry del 30 abr forman la contraparte del lado vendor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26 abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28 abr + el carry-forward de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demuestran el blast radius de la inyección en la capa model-tooling. La función forzante es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez que existe una CNA con el mandato explícito de IA-agente, la cadencia de divulgación se comprimirá de publisher-aleatorio a coordinated-issuer-driven, y los marketplaces de skills no podrán permanecer unsigned-by-default sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre de pull de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable para que se cruce el umbral.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at hindi bababa sa isang malaking skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay maglulunsad ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; ang Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ay nagpangalan sa mga technique (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ay naglulunsad ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang bumubuo ng vendor-side counterpart; ang Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row na naglalabas ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay nagpapakita ng model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay ang enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, mag-co-compress ang disclosure cadence mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakaiwas ang skill marketplaces na manatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first-pull-quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ay ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para malagpasan ang threshold.

nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日のCopy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01の14日期限 + 4月30日のLiteLLM CVE-2026-42208の26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月1日まで未パッチのSGLang CVE-2026-5760という3点セットが、「LLMツーリング層CVEのサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃パターンにする — 少なくとも1つの大手IRファームが、LLMゲートウェイ/エージェントハーネス/推論ランタイムのCVEとLinuxカーネルLPE(Copy Failまたはその後継)を組み合わせて、マルチテナント推論基盤上でフルチェーンrootを取得した実際の侵入の公開ポストモーテムを発表する;少なくとも1つのCSAI-CNA発行のアドバイザリーが、ATT&CK v19のDefense Impairment内で、LLMツーリング+カーネル連鎖を名前付きテクニックとして明示的に切り出す。** 4月28日のATT&CK v19はすでにエージェント関連テクニック(コンテキストポイズニング、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイ)を命名している;5月1日のCopy Failの波が、攻撃者にクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用が確認された(Microsoft Security Blog開示による)汎用Linux LPEを与えた;LiteLLMのSQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keysの先例が、横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAIの4月29日CNA認可は開示発行側であり、IRファームのQ3インシデントレポートにとって最も抵抗の少ない経路は、まさにこの形で組み立てられた1件のクラウドマルチテナント侵入である。In plain language: ハッカーはAIツーリングのバグとLinuxカーネルのバグを連鎖させて、共有AIサーバーを乗っ取れる。In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el H2 2026, el plazo de 14 días BOD-22-01 del Copy Fail del 1 mayo (CVE-2026-31431) + la ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 abr + el trío SGLang CVE-2026-5760 sin parchear hasta el 1 mayo convierte la "weaponización de la cadena de suministro de CVEs de la capa de tooling-LLM" en el patrón dominante de los atacantes — al menos una firma importante de respuesta a incidentes publicará un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que combine un CVE de gateway-LLM / agent-harness / inference-runtime con un LPE del kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para obtener root de cadena completa en inferencia multi-inquilino, y al menos un aviso emitido por CSAI-CNA destacará explícitamente la cadena tooling-LLM + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 abr ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agente malicioso); la ola Copy Fail del 1 mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado en el mundo real contra proveedores de servicios cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fuga-de-claves-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 abr de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidentes Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-inquilino unida exactamente de esta forma. En lenguaje claro: Los hackers pueden encadenar un bug de tooling de IA con un bug del kernel Linux para tomar el control de servidores de IA compartidos. En lenguaje claro: En lenguaje claro:
description.fil: **Sa H2 2026 ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapakahulugan sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang dominanteng attacker pattern — hindi bababa sa isang major IR firm ang maglalathala ng pampublikong post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at hindi bababa sa isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ang explicitly mag-cha-carve out sa LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); ang May 1 Copy Fail wave ay nagbibigay sa attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang Apr 29 CSAI CNA authorization ay ang disclosure-issuance side; ang pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito.

CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. plain_language.es: Los atacantes pueden unir un bug de servidor-IA-compartido con un bug de Linux para tomar control de toda la máquina. Pronto una firma de seguridad contará esa historia.
plain_language.fil: Maaaring pagsamahin ng mga umaatake ang isang shared-AI-server bug sa isang Linux bug para makontrol ang buong machine. Malapit na ikuwento iyon ng isang security firm.

detail.summary_short: May 1 Copy Fail's universal-Linux LPE with cloud-provider in-the-wild use, layered onto the Apr 30 LiteLLM 26-hour SQLi-key-leak and unpatched SGLang RCE, plus ATT&CK v19's agentic technique names and CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization, set up at least one IR-firm public post-mortem and one CSAI CNA advisory naming the LLM-tooling + kernel chain by H2 2026.

summary_short_locales.en: May 1 Copy Fail's universal-Linux LPE with cloud-provider in-the-wild use, layered onto the Apr 30 LiteLLM 26-hour SQLi-key-leak and unpatched SGLang RCE, plus ATT&CK v19's agentic technique names and CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization, set up at least one IR-firm public post-mortem and one CSAI CNA advisory naming the LLM-tooling + kernel chain by H2 2026.
summary_short_locales.ja: 5月1日のCopy Failのクラウドプロバイダー実環境利用付き汎用Linux LPEが、4月30日のLiteLLM 26時間SQLi-key-leakと未パッチのSGLang RCEに重なり、さらにATT&CK v19のエージェント関連テクニック命名とCSAIの4月29日CNA認可が加わって、2026年下半期までに少なくとも1つのIRファーム公開ポストモーテムと、LLMツーリング+カーネル連鎖を命名する1つのCSAI CNAアドバイザリーが整う。
summary_short_locales.es: El LPE Linux universal del Copy Fail del 1 mayo con uso confirmado en proveedores cloud en el mundo real, sumado a la SQLi-fuga-de-claves de 26 horas de LiteLLM del 30 abr y al RCE sin parchear de SGLang, más los nombres de técnicas agénticas de ATT&CK v19 y la autorización CNA del 29 abr de CSAI, montan al menos un post-mortem público de firma IR y un aviso CNA de CSAI nombrando la cadena tooling-LLM + kernel para el H2 2026.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang universal-Linux LPE ng May 1 Copy Fail na may cloud-provider in-the-wild use, na nilagyan ng layer ng Apr 30 LiteLLM 26-hour SQLi-key-leak at unpatched SGLang RCE, kasama ng ATT&CK v19 agentic technique names at ng Apr 29 CNA authorization ng CSAI, ay nagse-set up ng hindi bababa sa isang IR-firm pampublikong post-mortem at isang CSAI CNA advisory na nagpapangalan sa LLM-tooling + kernel chain pagsapit ng H2 2026.

bridges.text: The Stellar Cyber survey treating SGLang CVE-2026-5760 + Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agent silent-exfil chain as the operative late-2026 threat class extends the LLM-tooling-layer leg of the predicted chain; the kernel leg stays quiet today.

text_locales.en: The Stellar Cyber survey treating SGLang CVE-2026-5760 + Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agent silent-exfil chain as the operative late-2026 threat class extends the LLM-tooling-layer leg of the predicted chain; the kernel leg stays quiet today.
text_locales.ja: Stellar Cyber調査がSGLang CVE-2026-5760 + Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agentサイレント流出チェーンを運用上の2026年後半脅威クラスとして扱うことが、予測されたチェーンのLLMツール層レッグを延長する; カーネル・レッグは本日も静かなままである。
text_locales.es: La encuesta de Stellar Cyber tratando SGLang CVE-2026-5760 + cadena de exfiltración silenciosa Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agent como la clase de amenaza operativa de finales de 2026 extiende la pierna de capa de herramientas LLM de la cadena predicha; la pierna de kernel permanece silenciosa hoy.
text_locales.fil: Ang Stellar Cyber survey na nagtatrato sa SGLang CVE-2026-5760 + Microsoft Excel + Copilot Agent silent-exfil chain bilang operative late-2026 threat class ay nagpapahaba sa LLM-tooling-layer leg ng predicted chain; ang kernel leg ay nananatiling tahimik ngayon.

bridges.text: Copy Fail's universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers stacked on the still-unpatched SGLang and LiteLLM key-leak SQLi gives attackers a complete LLM-tooling-plus-kernel template. The chain the prediction names is now visible across the May 1-3 advisory window.

text_locales.en: Copy Fail's universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers stacked on the still-unpatched SGLang and LiteLLM key-leak SQLi gives attackers a complete LLM-tooling-plus-kernel template. The chain the prediction names is now visible across the May 1-3 advisory window.
text_locales.ja: Copy Failのユニバーサル-Linux LPEがクラウドサービスプロバイダに対する野生での使用が確認され、未だ未パッチのSGLangとLiteLLM鍵漏洩SQLiと積層して、攻撃者に完全なLLMツーリングプラスカーネルテンプレートを与える。予測が命名するチェーンは今や5月1-3日のアドバイザリーウィンドウを通じて可視化されている。
text_locales.es: El LPE Linux universal de Copy Fail con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores de servicio de nube apilado sobre el SGLang aún sin parchar y LiteLLM key-leak SQLi da a los atacantes una plantilla LLM-tooling-más-kernel completa. La cadena que la predicción nombra ahora es visible a través de la ventana de avisos del 1-3 de mayo.
text_locales.fil: Ang universal-Linux LPE ng Copy Fail na may kumpirmadong in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers na nakapatong sa nananatiling unpatched na SGLang at LiteLLM key-leak SQLi ay nagbibigay sa attackers ng kumpletong LLM-tooling-plus-kernel template. Ang chain na pinapangalanan ng prediction ay nakikita na ngayon sa kabuuan ng May 1-3 advisory window.

needs.actor: CSAI Foundation MITRE-authorized CNA editor preparing the named-technique advisory
needs.job: Issue a CSAI CNA advisory that explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique inside ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment tactic.
needs.outcome: CVE-numbered advisory with mapping language that names the chain, references the kernel LPE and the LLM-tooling CVE family, and routes detection guidance to defenders.
needs.motivation: CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authorization is only useful once it produces structured advisories; first chain-named advisory establishes the cadence the prediction expects.

actor_locales.fil: CSAI Foundation MITRE-authorized CNA editor na naghahanda ng named-technique advisory

job_locales.en: Issue a CSAI CNA advisory that explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique inside ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment tactic.
job_locales.ja: ATT&CK v19のDefense Impairmentタクティック内で、LLMツーリング+カーネル連鎖を命名されたテクニックとして明示的に切り出すCSAI CNAアドバイザリーを発行する。
job_locales.es: Emitir un aviso CNA de CSAI que destaque explícitamente la cadena tooling-LLM + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro de la táctica Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.
job_locales.fil: Maglabas ng CSAI CNA advisory na explicitly nag-cha-carve out sa LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment tactic ng ATT&CK v19.

outcome_locales.en: CVE-numbered advisory with mapping language that names the chain, references the kernel LPE and the LLM-tooling CVE family, and routes detection guidance to defenders.
outcome_locales.ja: 連鎖を命名し、カーネルLPEとLLMツーリングCVEファミリーを参照し、検出ガイダンスを防御者にルーティングするマッピング言語付きのCVE番号付きアドバイザリー。
outcome_locales.es: Aviso con número CVE con lenguaje de mapeo que nombra la cadena, referencia el LPE del kernel y la familia de CVEs de tooling-LLM, y enruta orientación de detección a los defensores.
outcome_locales.fil: CVE-numbered advisory na may mapping language na nagpapangalan sa chain, tumutukoy sa kernel LPE at sa LLM-tooling CVE family, at nagri-route ng detection guidance sa defenders.

motivation_locales.en: CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authorization is only useful once it produces structured advisories; first chain-named advisory establishes the cadence the prediction expects.
motivation_locales.ja: CSAIの4月29日MITRE-CNA認可は、構造化されたアドバイザリーを生み出して初めて有用となる;最初の連鎖命名アドバイザリーは、予測が期待するケイデンスを確立する。
motivation_locales.es: La autorización MITRE-CNA del 29 abr de CSAI solo es útil una vez que produce avisos estructurados; el primer aviso con cadena nombrada establece la cadencia que la predicción espera.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authorization ng CSAI ay magagamit lamang kapag nakapagprodyus ito ng structured advisories; ang unang chain-named advisory ang nagtatakda ng cadence na inaasahan ng prediction.
