needs.actor: incident-response firm research lead at Mandiant / CrowdStrike / Unit 42 / Volexity
needs.job: Investigate a real cloud-multi-tenant intrusion where attackers chained an LLM-tooling CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE, and prepare a public post-mortem that names the chain and the affected components.
needs.outcome: Public post-mortem post or industry-conference talk documenting one full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference intrusion stitched from inference-runtime / agent-harness CVE plus a Copy Fail or successor LPE.
needs.motivation: Whichever IR firm publishes first defines the canonical narrative for the LLM-tooling + kernel chain and earns the brand-trust dividend that the prior MITRE ATLAS launches produced for early movers.

actor_locales.fil: incident-response firm research lead sa Mandiant / CrowdStrike / Unit 42 / Volexity

job_locales.en: Investigate a real cloud-multi-tenant intrusion where attackers chained an LLM-tooling CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE, and prepare a public post-mortem that names the chain and the affected components.
job_locales.ja: 攻撃者がLLMツーリングCVEとLinuxカーネルLPEを連鎖させた実際のクラウドマルチテナント侵入を調査し、その連鎖と影響を受けたコンポーネントを命名する公開ポストモーテムを準備する。
job_locales.es: Investigar una intrusión real cloud multi-inquilino donde los atacantes encadenaron un CVE de tooling-LLM con un LPE del kernel Linux, y preparar un post-mortem público que nombre la cadena y los componentes afectados.
job_locales.fil: Imbestigahan ang totoong cloud-multi-tenant intrusion kung saan pinagsama ng attackers ang LLM-tooling CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE, at ihanda ang pampublikong post-mortem na nagpapangalan sa chain at sa apektadong components.

outcome_locales.en: Public post-mortem post or industry-conference talk documenting one full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference intrusion stitched from inference-runtime / agent-harness CVE plus a Copy Fail or successor LPE.
outcome_locales.ja: 推論ランタイム / エージェントハーネスCVE + Copy Failまたは後継LPEから組み立てられた1件のフルチェーンroot-on-multi-tenant-inference侵入を文書化する公開ポストモーテム投稿または業界カンファレンス講演。
outcome_locales.es: Publicación de post-mortem público o charla de conferencia de la industria documentando una intrusión root-de-cadena-completa-en-inferencia-multi-inquilino unida a partir de un CVE de inference-runtime / agent-harness más un Copy Fail o LPE sucesor.
outcome_locales.fil: Pampublikong post-mortem post o industry-conference talk na nagdo-dokumento ng isang full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference intrusion na pinagsama mula sa inference-runtime / agent-harness CVE kasama ang Copy Fail o successor LPE.

motivation_locales.en: Whichever IR firm publishes first defines the canonical narrative for the LLM-tooling + kernel chain and earns the brand-trust dividend that the prior MITRE ATLAS launches produced for early movers.
motivation_locales.ja: 最初に公開するIRファームはLLMツーリング+カーネル連鎖の正典ナラティブを定義し、以前のMITRE ATLASローンチが先行者にもたらしたブランド信頼配当を獲得する。
motivation_locales.es: Cualquier firma IR que publique primero define la narrativa canónica para la cadena tooling-LLM + kernel y gana el dividendo de confianza-de-marca que los lanzamientos previos de MITRE ATLAS produjeron para los pioneros.
motivation_locales.fil: Sinumang IR firm ang unang maglalathala ay nagde-define ng canonical narrative para sa LLM-tooling + kernel chain at kumikita ng brand-trust dividend na natamo ng nakaraang MITRE ATLAS launches para sa early movers.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日のCopy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01の14日期限 + 4月30日のLiteLLM CVE-2026-42208の26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月1日まで未パッチのSGLang CVE-2026-5760という3点セットが、「LLMツーリング層CVEのサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃パターンにする — 少なくとも1つの大手IRファームが、LLMゲートウェイ/エージェントハーネス/推論ランタイムのCVEとLinuxカーネルLPE(Copy Failまたはその後継)を組み合わせて、マルチテナント推論基盤上でフルチェーンrootを取得した実際の侵入の公開ポストモーテムを発表する;少なくとも1つのCSAI-CNA発行のアドバイザリーが、ATT&CK v19のDefense Impairment内で、LLMツーリング+カーネル連鎖を名前付きテクニックとして明示的に切り出す。** 4月28日のATT&CK v19はすでにエージェント関連テクニック(コンテキストポイズニング、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイ)を命名している;5月1日のCopy Failの波が、攻撃者にクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用が確認された(Microsoft Security Blog開示による)汎用Linux LPEを与えた;LiteLLMのSQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keysの先例が、横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAIの4月29日CNA認可は開示発行側であり、IRファームのQ3インシデントレポートにとって最も抵抗の少ない経路は、まさにこの形で組み立てられた1件のクラウドマルチテナント侵入である。In plain language: ハッカーはAIツーリングのバグとLinuxカーネルのバグを連鎖させて、共有AIサーバーを乗っ取れる。In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026, el plazo de 14 días BOD-22-01 del Copy Fail del 1 mayo (CVE-2026-31431) + la ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 abr + el trío SGLang CVE-2026-5760 sin parchear hasta el 1 mayo convierte la "weaponización de la cadena de suministro de CVEs de la capa de tooling-LLM" en el patrón dominante de los atacantes — al menos una firma importante de respuesta a incidentes publicará un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que combine un CVE de gateway-LLM / agent-harness / inference-runtime con un LPE del kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para obtener root de cadena completa en inferencia multi-inquilino, y al menos un aviso emitido por CSAI-CNA destacará explícitamente la cadena tooling-LLM + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 abr ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agente malicioso); la ola Copy Fail del 1 mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado en el mundo real contra proveedores de servicios cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fuga-de-claves-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 abr de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidentes Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-inquilino unida exactamente de esta forma. En lenguaje claro: Los hackers pueden encadenar un bug de tooling de IA con un bug del kernel Linux para tomar el control de servidores de IA compartidos. En lenguaje claro: En lenguaje claro:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sa H2 2026 ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapakahulugan sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang dominanteng attacker pattern — hindi bababa sa isang major IR firm ang maglalathala ng pampublikong post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at hindi bababa sa isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ang explicitly mag-cha-carve out sa LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); ang May 1 Copy Fail wave ay nagbibigay sa attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang Apr 29 CSAI CNA authorization ay ang disclosure-issuance side; ang pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito.

nodes.title: Hyperscaler custom AI silicon splits into training vs inference SKUs by H1 2027
nodes.description: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.fil: Custom AI silicon ng mga hyperscaler, mahahati sa training vs inference SKUs pagsapit ng H1 2027

description.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「学習用 vs 推論用のSKU分割」がカスタムAIシリコンの標準仕様になる。** GoogleのTPU 8t / 8i分割は、Trainium-Inferentiaのラインを延伸し、**ハイパースケーラの内製シリコンを学習用と推論用でアーキテクチャ的に分離**することを定着させる。2026年H2 / 2027年H1にかけて、Microsoft MAIAとMeta MTIAも同様のデュアルトラックSKU戦略を採用すると見込まれる — NVIDIA BlackwellやVera Rubinの「単一アーキテクチャで両ワークロード」路線と対立する形になる。推論向けにチューニングされたSKUはネイティブFP4 / MXFP4を前提とし、**$/queryの競争**を2026年Q3にピークへ押し上げる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **La "separacion de SKU entrenamiento-vs-inferencia" se convierte en el estandar para silicio AI personalizado.** La division TPU 8t / 8i de Google extiende la linea Trainium-vs-Inferentia y consolida el **silicio interno de los hyperscalers como arquitectonicamente separado para entrenamiento vs inferencia**. En H2 2026 / H1 2027, se espera que Microsoft MAIA y Meta MTIA adopten la misma estrategia de SKU dual — oponiendose a la "arquitectura unica, ambas cargas de trabajo" de NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin. Los SKU optimizados para inferencia asumen FP4 / MXFP4 nativo e impulsan la **competencia de $/consulta** a un pico en Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "Training-vs-inference SKU split" ay nagiging pamantayan para sa custom AI silicon.** Ang TPU 8t / 8i split ng Google ay nag-eextend sa Trainium-vs-Inferentia line at nag-lo-lock in sa **hyperscaler in-house silicon bilang architecturally separate para sa training vs inference**. Sa H2 2026 / H1 2027, asahan na ang Microsoft MAIA at Meta MTIA ay magtitibay ng parehong dual-track SKU strategy — laban sa "single architecture, both workloads" ng NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin. Ang inference-tuned SKUs ay nag-aassume ng native FP4 / MXFP4 at nagtutulak ng **$/query competition** sa peak sa Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

plain_language.en: Big tech now builds two AI chips: one for training models and one for running them. Cheaper, faster answers will follow soon.
plain_language.ja: 大手テックは現在、AIチップを2種類作っている:モデルを訓練するためのものと、実行するためのものだ。より安く、より速い回答がまもなく続くだろう。
plain_language.es: Las grandes tecnologicas ahora construyen dos chips de AI: uno para entrenar modelos y otro para ejecutarlos. Pronto vendran respuestas mas baratas y rapidas.
plain_language.fil: Ang big tech ngayon ay gumagawa ng dalawang AI chips: isa para sa pag-train ng models at isa para sa pagpapatakbo ng mga ito. Mas mura at mas mabilis na sagot ang susunod sa lalong madaling panahon.

detail.summary_short: Google's TPU 8t / 8i announcement extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia split and codifies hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference. By H2 2026 / H1 2027, Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA are expected to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy, with inference SKUs driving $/query competition to a peak.

summary_short_locales.en: Google's TPU 8t / 8i announcement extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia split and codifies hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference. By H2 2026 / H1 2027, Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA are expected to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy, with inference SKUs driving $/query competition to a peak.
summary_short_locales.ja: GoogleのTPU 8t / 8i発表はTrainium-Inferentia型の分割を延伸し、ハイパースケーラの内製シリコンを学習用と推論用でアーキテクチャ的に分離することを定式化する。2026年H2 / 2027年H1までに、Microsoft MAIAとMeta MTIAも同じデュアルトラックSKU戦略を採用すると見込まれ、推論SKUが$/query競争をピークへ押し上げる。
summary_short_locales.es: El anuncio TPU 8t / 8i de Google extiende la division Trainium-vs-Inferentia y codifica el silicio interno de los hyperscalers como arquitectonicamente separado para entrenamiento vs inferencia. Para H2 2026 / H1 2027, se espera que Microsoft MAIA y Meta MTIA adopten la misma estrategia de SKU dual, con SKU de inferencia llevando la competencia de $/consulta a un pico.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang anunsyo ng TPU 8t / 8i ng Google ay nag-eextend sa Trainium-vs-Inferentia split at nag-cocodify ng hyperscaler in-house silicon bilang architecturally separate para sa training vs inference. Sa pamamagitan ng H2 2026 / H1 2027, ang Microsoft MAIA at Meta MTIA ay inaasahang magtitibay ng parehong dual-track SKU strategy, kung saan ang inference SKUs ay nagtutulak ng $/query competition sa peak.

bridges.text: AWS's Apr 27 roundup deepens the Trainium silicon-level co-engineering with Anthropic and Meta-Graviton CPU at scale, reinforcing that hyperscalers continue to architect inference-class silicon distinct from training-class accelerators. The precondition that custom AI silicon splits cleanly along workload lines holds with fresh partnership detail rather than a new tape-out.

text_locales.en: AWS's Apr 27 roundup deepens the Trainium silicon-level co-engineering with Anthropic and Meta-Graviton CPU at scale, reinforcing that hyperscalers continue to architect inference-class silicon distinct from training-class accelerators. The precondition that custom AI silicon splits cleanly along workload lines holds with fresh partnership detail rather than a new tape-out.
text_locales.ja: AWSの4月27日ラウンドアップは、AnthropicとのTrainiumシリコンレベル協調エンジニアリングとMeta-Gravitonの大規模CPUを深化させ、ハイパースケーラーがトレーニング級アクセラレータとは別個に推論級シリコンを設計し続けていることを補強している。カスタムAIシリコンがワークロード・ラインに沿って明確に分かれるという前提条件は、新しいテープアウトではなく新鮮なパートナーシップの詳細とともに維持されている。
text_locales.es: El roundup del 27 de abril de AWS profundiza la co-ingenieria a nivel de silicio Trainium con Anthropic y Meta-Graviton CPU a escala, reforzando que los hyperscalers continuan arquitecturando silicio inference-class distinto de aceleradores training-class. La precondicion de que el silicio personalizado de IA se divide limpiamente por lineas de workload se mantiene con detalle fresco de partnership en lugar de un nuevo tape-out.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apr 27 roundup ng AWS ay pinapalalim ang Trainium silicon-level co-engineering kasama ang Anthropic at Meta-Graviton CPU sa scale, na nagpapatibay na ang hyperscalers ay patuloy na nag-aarchitect ng inference-class silicon na hiwalay sa training-class accelerators. Ang precondition na ang custom AI silicon ay naghahati nang malinis sa workload lines ay nananatili na may sariwang partnership detail sa halip na bagong tape-out.

bridges.text: AWS doubling down on Trainium for training and Graviton for CPU-heavy agentic workloads reinforces the structural force the prediction names — hyperscaler in-house silicon is the differentiation layer, with workload-specialized SKUs increasingly the operative shape.

text_locales.en: AWS doubling down on Trainium for training and Graviton for CPU-heavy agentic workloads reinforces the structural force the prediction names — hyperscaler in-house silicon is the differentiation layer, with workload-specialized SKUs increasingly the operative shape.
text_locales.ja: AWS がトレーニングに Trainium、CPU 重めのエージェンティック ワークロードに Graviton を二重に賭けていくことは、予測が指す構造的力を補強する — ハイパースケーラの自社シリコンが差別化レイヤーであり、ワークロード特化型 SKU が次第にその作動的形状となっている。
text_locales.es: AWS redoblando con Trainium para entrenamiento y Graviton para cargas agentic intensivas en CPU refuerza la fuerza estructural que la predicción nombra — el silicio interno del hyperscaler es la capa de diferenciación, con SKUs especializados por carga de trabajo cada vez más como la forma operativa.
text_locales.fil: Ang AWS na nagdo-doble down sa Trainium para sa training at Graviton para sa CPU-heavy agentic workloads ay pinatatatag ang structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction — ang in-house silicon ng hyperscaler ang differentiation layer, kasama ang workload-specialized SKUs na lalong nagiging operative shape.

bridges.text: Cerebras' IPO filing speaks to inference-tier specialization but does not directly touch the training-vs-inference SKU split inside the hyperscaler in-house silicon roadmap that the prediction concerns.

text_locales.en: Cerebras' IPO filing speaks to inference-tier specialization but does not directly touch the training-vs-inference SKU split inside the hyperscaler in-house silicon roadmap that the prediction concerns.
text_locales.ja: Cerebras の IPO 申請は推論層の専門化に関係するが、予測が扱うハイパースケーラ内製シリコン ロードマップ内部での学習 vs 推論 SKU 分割には直接触れていない。
text_locales.es: La presentación de IPO de Cerebras habla de la especialización de nivel inferencia pero no toca directamente la división de SKU training-vs-inference dentro del roadmap de silicio in-house de hyperscaler que concierne a la predicción.
text_locales.fil: Ang IPO filing ng Cerebras ay tumutukoy sa inference-tier specialization ngunit hindi direktang humihipo sa training-vs-inference SKU split sa loob ng hyperscaler in-house silicon roadmap na sinasaklaw ng prediction.

bridges.text: Robotics & Automation News' Hannover Messe coverage of NVIDIA GB300 plus Jetson Thor in factory deployments under the Industrial AI Cloud reinforces the single-architecture training-and-inference posture rather than the dual-track split, and no Microsoft MAIA or Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcement lands inside the window.

text_locales.en: Robotics & Automation News' Hannover Messe coverage of NVIDIA GB300 plus Jetson Thor in factory deployments under the Industrial AI Cloud reinforces the single-architecture training-and-inference posture rather than the dual-track split, and no Microsoft MAIA or Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcement lands inside the window.
text_locales.ja: Robotics & Automation NewsのHannover Messeカバレッジ(NVIDIA GB300 + Jetson Thor、Industrial AI Cloud下の工場展開)は、二系統分割ではなく単一アーキテクチャの学習・推論姿勢を補強し、Microsoft MAIAやMeta MTIAの二系統SKU発表はウィンドウ内に着地しない。
text_locales.es: La cobertura de Hannover Messe de Robotics & Automation News sobre NVIDIA GB300 más Jetson Thor en despliegues de fábrica bajo la Industrial AI Cloud refuerza la postura de entrenamiento-e-inferencia de arquitectura única en lugar de la división dual, y ningún anuncio de SKU dual Microsoft MAIA o Meta MTIA llega dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Robotics & Automation News' Hannover Messe coverage ng NVIDIA GB300 plus Jetson Thor sa factory deployments sa ilalim ng Industrial AI Cloud ay nagpapalakas sa single-architecture training-and-inference posture sa halip na dual-track split, at walang Microsoft MAIA o Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcement na lumapag sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: GPT-5.5's API pricing 2x GPT-5.4 with Codex's 40% output-token reduction sharpens the inference $/query axis, while Anthropic-AWS's 5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3 simultaneous-run shape locks the training-side dual-track silicon, keeping the structural split intact even as Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.

text_locales.en: GPT-5.5's API pricing 2x GPT-5.4 with Codex's 40% output-token reduction sharpens the inference $/query axis, while Anthropic-AWS's 5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3 simultaneous-run shape locks the training-side dual-track silicon, keeping the structural split intact even as Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.
text_locales.ja: GPT-5.5のAPI価格がGPT-5.4の2倍となりCodexの40%出力トークン削減で推論$/クエリ軸が鋭くなる一方、Anthropic-AWSの5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3同時稼働の形が学習側のデュアルトラック・シリコンをロックし、Microsoft MAIAとMeta MTIAのデュアルSKU発表が保留中であっても構造的分割が無傷のままである。
text_locales.es: El precio API de GPT-5.5 a 2x GPT-5.4 con la reducción del 40% de tokens de output de Codex agudiza el eje $/consulta de inferencia, mientras la forma de corrida simultánea de Anthropic-AWS de 5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3 bloquea el silicio de doble pista del lado de entrenamiento, manteniendo la división estructural intacta incluso mientras los anuncios de doble SKU de Microsoft MAIA y Meta MTIA permanecen pendientes.
text_locales.fil: Ang API pricing ng GPT-5.5 na 2x GPT-5.4 kasama ang 40% output-token reduction ng Codex ay nagpapatibay sa inference $/query axis, habang ang 5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3 simultaneous-run shape ng Anthropic-AWS ay nagla-lock sa training-side dual-track silicon, na pinananatiling buo ang structural split kahit pa nakabinbin pa ang Microsoft MAIA at Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcements.

bridges.text: Google Cloud Next '26 Day 3 emphasizing TPU 8i inference-optimization (1,152 TPUs, 3x SRAM) reinforces the dual-track SKU split, while NVIDIA Vera Rubin's 6-chip + Groq 3 LPU single-architecture stack hitting mass production sharpens the structural contrast, keeping the underlying market split intact even as MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.

text_locales.en: Google Cloud Next '26 Day 3 emphasizing TPU 8i inference-optimization (1,152 TPUs, 3x SRAM) reinforces the dual-track SKU split, while NVIDIA Vera Rubin's 6-chip + Groq 3 LPU single-architecture stack hitting mass production sharpens the structural contrast, keeping the underlying market split intact even as MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.
text_locales.ja: Google Cloud Next '26のDay 3がTPU 8iの推論最適化(1,152 TPU、SRAM 3倍)を強調することがデュアルトラックSKU分裂を補強し、NVIDIA Vera Rubinの6チップ + Groq 3 LPUシングル・アーキテクチャ・スタックが量産入りすることが構造的対比をシャープにし、MAIA / MTIAのデュアルSKU発表が保留中であっても、根底にある市場分裂は無傷のまま保たれている。
text_locales.es: Google Cloud Next '26 Día 3 enfatizando la optimización de inferencia TPU 8i (1,152 TPUs, SRAM 3x) refuerza la división dual-track SKU, mientras que el stack de 6 chips + Groq 3 LPU de arquitectura única de NVIDIA Vera Rubin alcanzando producción en masa agudiza el contraste estructural, manteniendo intacta la división subyacente del mercado incluso mientras los anuncios de SKU dual MAIA / MTIA permanecen pendientes.
text_locales.fil: Ang Google Cloud Next '26 Day 3 na nagdidiin sa TPU 8i inference-optimization (1,152 TPUs, 3x SRAM) ay nagpapatibay sa dual-track SKU split, habang ang NVIDIA Vera Rubin's 6-chip + Groq 3 LPU single-architecture stack na umaabot sa mass production ay pinatatalas ang structural contrast, na pinapanatili ang underlying market split kahit ang MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements ay nananatiling pending.

bridges.text: NVIDIA's Vera Rubin platform shipping a 7-chip single-architecture stack into mass production sharpens the structural contrast that the prediction draws — hyperscaler dual-track SKU on one side, NVIDIA single-architecture on the other — while keeping the underlying market split intact, even as MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.

text_locales.en: NVIDIA's Vera Rubin platform shipping a 7-chip single-architecture stack into mass production sharpens the structural contrast that the prediction draws — hyperscaler dual-track SKU on one side, NVIDIA single-architecture on the other — while keeping the underlying market split intact, even as MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.
text_locales.ja: NVIDIAのVera Rubinプラットフォームが7チップ単一アーキテクチャスタックを量産にリリースしていることは、予測が描く構造的対比を鮮明にしている ― 一方ではハイパースケーラーのデュアルトラックSKU、他方ではNVIDIAの単一アーキテクチャ ― MAIA / MTIAデュアルSKUの発表が保留中であっても、根本的な市場分裂は維持されている。
text_locales.es: La plataforma Vera Rubin de NVIDIA enviando un stack de 7 chips de arquitectura única a producción en masa agudiza el contraste estructural que dibuja la predicción — SKU dual-track de hyperscaler en un lado, arquitectura única de NVIDIA en el otro — manteniendo intacta la división subyacente del mercado, incluso mientras los anuncios de SKU dual MAIA / MTIA permanecen pendientes.
text_locales.fil: Ang Vera Rubin platform ng NVIDIA na nagpapadala ng 7-chip single-architecture stack sa mass production ay nagpapatalas sa structural contrast na binubuod ng prediction — hyperscaler dual-track SKU sa isang panig, NVIDIA single-architecture sa kabilang panig — habang pinapanatili ang underlying market split, kahit na ang MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements ay nakabinbin pa.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「学習用 vs 推論用のSKU分割」がカスタムAIシリコンの標準仕様になる。** GoogleのTPU 8t / 8i分割は、Trainium-Inferentiaのラインを延伸し、**ハイパースケーラの内製シリコンを学習用と推論用でアーキテクチャ的に分離**することを定着させる。2026年H2 / 2027年H1にかけて、Microsoft MAIAとMeta MTIAも同様のデュアルトラックSKU戦略を採用すると見込まれる — NVIDIA BlackwellやVera Rubinの「単一アーキテクチャで両ワークロード」路線と対立する形になる。推論向けにチューニングされたSKUはネイティブFP4 / MXFP4を前提とし、**$/queryの競争**を2026年Q3にピークへ押し上げる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La "separacion de SKU entrenamiento-vs-inferencia" se convierte en el estandar para silicio AI personalizado.** La division TPU 8t / 8i de Google extiende la linea Trainium-vs-Inferentia y consolida el **silicio interno de los hyperscalers como arquitectonicamente separado para entrenamiento vs inferencia**. En H2 2026 / H1 2027, se espera que Microsoft MAIA y Meta MTIA adopten la misma estrategia de SKU dual — oponiendose a la "arquitectura unica, ambas cargas de trabajo" de NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin. Los SKU optimizados para inferencia asumen FP4 / MXFP4 nativo e impulsan la **competencia de $/consulta** a un pico en Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "Training-vs-inference SKU split" ay nagiging pamantayan para sa custom AI silicon.** Ang TPU 8t / 8i split ng Google ay nag-eextend sa Trainium-vs-Inferentia line at nag-lo-lock in sa **hyperscaler in-house silicon bilang architecturally separate para sa training vs inference**. Sa H2 2026 / H1 2027, asahan na ang Microsoft MAIA at Meta MTIA ay magtitibay ng parehong dual-track SKU strategy — laban sa "single architecture, both workloads" ng NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin. Ang inference-tuned SKUs ay nag-aassume ng native FP4 / MXFP4 at nagtutulak ng **$/query competition** sa peak sa Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: 27B Dense + 1M context becomes default enterprise local-LLM recipe by Q3 2026
nodes.short_label: 27B Dense + 1M context becomes default enterprise local-LLM recipe by Q3 2026
nodes.title: 27B Dense + 1M context becomes default enterprise local-LLM recipe by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「27B Dense + 1Mコンテキスト」が2026年下半期の企業向けローカルLLMのデファクト標準になる。** Qwen3.6-27Bは、MoEルーティングの複雑さなし、単一のRTX 4090で動作、1Mコンテキスト、Apache 2.0というパッケージで、フラッグシップ級のコーディング能力に到達することを実証した。2026年Q3までに、Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemmaはそれぞれ20-30B Dense × 1Mコンテキスト × Apache/Llamaスタイルのモデルをリリースする。70B+ MoEの差別化要素は、マルチモーダル理解、ツールの幅、長期推論に絞られる。オンプレミス推論のデフォルトVRAM要件は、RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GBから**RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**へと下がる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **"27B Dense + contexto de 1M" se convierte en el estándar de facto para LLMs locales empresariales en H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demuestra que el paquete — sin complejidad de enrutamiento MoE, funciona en una sola RTX 4090, contexto de 1M, Apache 2.0 — alcanza capacidad de codificación de grado insignia. Para el Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma cada uno enviará modelos de 20-30B Dense × contexto de 1M × estilo Apache/Llama. Los diferenciadores para 70B+ MoE se reducen a comprensión multimodal, amplitud de herramientas y razonamiento de horizonte largo. El requisito predeterminado de VRAM para inferencia on-prem cambia de RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB a **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **"27B Dense + 1M context" ay nagiging de facto standard para sa enterprise local LLMs sa H2 2026.** Ipinapakita ng Qwen3.6-27B na ang package — walang kompplikasyon ng MoE routing, tumatakbo sa iisang RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — ay umaabot sa flagship-grade coding ability. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma ay ipapadala bawat isa ng 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. Ang mga differentiator para sa 70B+ MoE ay liliit sa multimodal understanding, tool breadth, at long-horizon reasoning. Ang default na VRAM requirement para sa on-prem inference ay babagsak mula sa RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB papunta sa **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: Qwen3.6-27B Dense beats the 397B MoE on SWE-bench Verified at 77.2% on a single RTX 4090 with 1M context under Apache 2.0.
reasoning.given: Dense 20-30B at long context removes MoE routing complexity and fits commodity 24GB VRAM, collapsing on-prem deployment cost.
reasoning.so_that: Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemma converge on a 20-30B Dense × 1M context recipe and 70B+ MoE retreats to multimodal / tool / long-horizon niches.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; ≥3 vendor 20-30B Dense releases + RTX 4090 / M4 Max as default on-prem VRAM.
reasoning.plain_language: A 27B model now matches a 400B one for coding and runs on one gaming GPU. Other labs will copy this recipe in months.

because.en: Qwen3.6-27B Dense beats the 397B MoE on SWE-bench Verified at 77.2% on a single RTX 4090 with 1M context under Apache 2.0.
because.ja: Qwen3.6-27B Denseは、Apache 2.0ライセンスの下、1Mコンテキストで単一のRTX 4090上で、SWE-bench Verifiedで77.2%を記録し397B MoEを上回った。
because.es: Qwen3.6-27B Dense supera al MoE de 397B en SWE-bench Verified con 77.2% en una sola RTX 4090 con contexto de 1M bajo Apache 2.0.
because.fil: Tinatalo ng Qwen3.6-27B Dense ang 397B MoE sa SWE-bench Verified sa 77.2% sa iisang RTX 4090 na may 1M context sa ilalim ng Apache 2.0.

given.en: Dense 20-30B at long context removes MoE routing complexity and fits commodity 24GB VRAM, collapsing on-prem deployment cost.
given.ja: 長コンテキストでの20-30B DenseはMoEルーティングの複雑さを取り除き、汎用品の24GB VRAMに収まるため、オンプレミス展開コストを大幅に削減する。
given.es: Dense 20-30B con contexto largo elimina la complejidad de enrutamiento MoE y cabe en VRAM commodity de 24GB, colapsando el costo de despliegue on-prem.
given.fil: Ang Dense 20-30B sa long context ay nag-aalis ng kompplikasyon ng MoE routing at kumakasya sa commodity 24GB VRAM, na nagpapababa ng on-prem deployment cost.

so_that.en: Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemma converge on a 20-30B Dense × 1M context recipe and 70B+ MoE retreats to multimodal / tool / long-horizon niches.
so_that.ja: Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemmaは20-30B Dense × 1Mコンテキストのレシピに収斂し、70B+ MoEはマルチモーダル / ツール / 長期推論のニッチに後退する。
so_that.es: Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemma convergen en una receta de 20-30B Dense × contexto de 1M y 70B+ MoE se retira a nichos de multimodal / herramientas / horizonte largo.
so_that.fil: Ang Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemma ay magkakaisa sa 20-30B Dense × 1M context recipe at ang 70B+ MoE ay aatras sa multimodal / tool / long-horizon niches.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; ≥3 vendor 20-30B Dense releases + RTX 4090 / M4 Max as default on-prem VRAM.
landing.ja: 2026年Q3までに、3社以上のベンダーが20-30B Dense版をリリース + RTX 4090 / M4 Maxがオンプレミスのデフォルトとなる。
landing.es: Para el Q3 2026; ≥3 lanzamientos de proveedores de 20-30B Dense + RTX 4090 / M4 Max como VRAM on-prem por defecto.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; ≥3 vendor 20-30B Dense releases + RTX 4090 / M4 Max bilang default na on-prem VRAM.

plain_language.en: A 27B model now matches a 400B one for coding and runs on one gaming GPU. Other labs will copy this recipe in months.
plain_language.ja: 27Bモデルが今や400Bモデルとコーディング能力で並び、ゲーミングGPU1枚で動く。他の研究所もこのレシピを数ヶ月以内に真似するだろう。
plain_language.es: Un modelo de 27B ahora iguala a uno de 400B para codificar y funciona en una sola GPU para juegos. Otros laboratorios copiarán esta receta en meses.
plain_language.fil: Ang isang 27B model ngayon ay katumbas ng isang 400B para sa coding at tumatakbo sa isang gaming GPU. Susundan ito ng ibang labs sa loob ng ilang buwan.

title_locales.en: 27B Dense + 1M context becomes default enterprise local-LLM recipe by Q3 2026
title_locales.ja: 27B Dense + 1Mコンテキストが2026年Q3までに企業向けローカルLLMのデフォルトレシピとなる
title_locales.es: 27B Dense + contexto de 1M se convierte en la receta predeterminada para LLM locales empresariales para Q3 2026
title_locales.fil: Magiging default enterprise local-LLM recipe ang 27B Dense + 1M context pagsapit ng Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: Qwen3.6-27B Dense reaches flagship-grade coding (SWE-bench Verified 77.2%) on a single RTX 4090 with 1M context under Apache 2.0, beating its 397B MoE predecessor. By Q3 2026, Mistral, Meta, DeepSeek, and Gemma are expected to ship comparable 20-30B Dense × 1M context models, shifting on-prem VRAM defaults to RTX 4090 / M4 Max.

summary_short_locales.en: Qwen3.6-27B Dense reaches flagship-grade coding (SWE-bench Verified 77.2%) on a single RTX 4090 with 1M context under Apache 2.0, beating its 397B MoE predecessor. By Q3 2026, Mistral, Meta, DeepSeek, and Gemma are expected to ship comparable 20-30B Dense × 1M context models, shifting on-prem VRAM defaults to RTX 4090 / M4 Max.
summary_short_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-27B DenseはApache 2.0ライセンスの下、1Mコンテキストで単一のRTX 4090上でフラッグシップ級のコーディング能力(SWE-bench Verified 77.2%)に到達し、前世代の397B MoEを上回った。2026年Q3までに、Mistral、Meta、DeepSeek、Gemmaが同等の20-30B Dense × 1Mコンテキストモデルをリリースし、オンプレミスVRAMのデフォルトをRTX 4090 / M4 Maxへとシフトさせると予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: Qwen3.6-27B Dense alcanza codificación de grado insignia (SWE-bench Verified 77.2%) en una sola RTX 4090 con contexto de 1M bajo Apache 2.0, superando a su predecesor MoE de 397B. Para el Q3 2026, se espera que Mistral, Meta, DeepSeek y Gemma envíen modelos comparables de 20-30B Dense × contexto de 1M, cambiando los valores predeterminados de VRAM on-prem a RTX 4090 / M4 Max.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Qwen3.6-27B Dense ay umabot sa flagship-grade coding (SWE-bench Verified 77.2%) sa iisang RTX 4090 na may 1M context sa ilalim ng Apache 2.0, na tinatalo ang 397B MoE predecessor nito. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, inaasahang ang Mistral, Meta, DeepSeek, at Gemma ay magpapadala ng katulad na 20-30B Dense × 1M context models, na maglilipat ng on-prem VRAM defaults sa RTX 4090 / M4 Max.

bridges.text: The Qwen 3.6 family at flagship-grade coding ability with 260K context and Apache 2.0 licensing is exactly the open-weight package the prediction's 27B-Dense + 1M-context thesis rests on; today's evidence carries it forward without breaking new ground on the single-RTX-4090 deployment frame. Anthropic retiring the 1M-context beta on the proprietary side is parallel reinforcement for context-length convergence.

text_locales.en: The Qwen 3.6 family at flagship-grade coding ability with 260K context and Apache 2.0 licensing is exactly the open-weight package the prediction's 27B-Dense + 1M-context thesis rests on; today's evidence carries it forward without breaking new ground on the single-RTX-4090 deployment frame. Anthropic retiring the 1M-context beta on the proprietary side is parallel reinforcement for context-length convergence.
text_locales.ja: 260Kコンテキストとフラッグシップ級コーディング能力、Apache 2.0ライセンスを備えたQwen 3.6ファミリーは、予測の27B-Dense + 1Mコンテキストテーゼが依拠するまさにそのオープンウェイトパッケージである。本日のエビデンスは単一のRTX-4090デプロイ枠組みで新たな地平を開くことなくこれを引き継ぐ。Anthropicがプロプライエタリ側で1Mコンテキストベータを廃止したことは、コンテキスト長収束の並行強化である。
text_locales.es: La familia Qwen 3.6 con capacidad de coding de grado flagship con 260K de contexto y licenciamiento Apache 2.0 es exactamente el paquete open-weight sobre el que descansa la tesis 27B-Dense + 1M-contexto de la predicción; la evidencia de hoy la lleva adelante sin abrir terreno nuevo en el frame de despliegue en una sola RTX 4090. Anthropic retirando el beta de 1M de contexto en el lado propietario es refuerzo paralelo para la convergencia de longitud de contexto.
text_locales.fil: Ang Qwen 3.6 family sa flagship-grade coding ability na may 260K context at Apache 2.0 licensing ay eksaktong open-weight package na pinaghahangaan ng 27B-Dense + 1M-context thesis ng prediction; dinadala ng ebidensiya ngayon ito nang hindi sumusulong sa single-RTX-4090 deployment frame. Ang pag-retire ng Anthropic sa 1M-context beta sa proprietary side ay parallel reinforcement para sa context-length convergence.

bridges.text: Qwen3.6-27B's continued top-tier scores at 260K context and DeepSeek V4's 1M-context release sustain the precondition that dense models in the 27B class can match flagship coding ability on a single high-end consumer GPU. The trend holds even though Mistral, Meta, and Gemma have not yet shipped equivalent open Apache-style SKUs in the window.

text_locales.en: Qwen3.6-27B's continued top-tier scores at 260K context and DeepSeek V4's 1M-context release sustain the precondition that dense models in the 27B class can match flagship coding ability on a single high-end consumer GPU. The trend holds even though Mistral, Meta, and Gemma have not yet shipped equivalent open Apache-style SKUs in the window.
text_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-27Bが260Kコンテキストでトップ層スコアを継続し、DeepSeek V4の1Mコンテキスト・リリースが、27Bクラスの密モデルが単一のハイエンドコンシューマーGPU上でフラッグシップ・コーディング能力に匹敵できるという前提条件を支えている。Mistral、Meta、Gemmaがウィンドウ内で同等のApache様式のオープンSKUをまだ出荷していなくても、傾向は維持されている。
text_locales.es: Los scores top-tier continuados de Qwen3.6-27B en contexto 260K y el lanzamiento de contexto 1M de DeepSeek V4 sustentan la precondicion de que los modelos densos en la clase 27B pueden igualar la habilidad de codificacion flagship en una sola GPU consumer high-end. La tendencia se mantiene aunque Mistral, Meta, y Gemma todavia no envien SKUs equivalentes open Apache-style en la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang patuloy na top-tier scores ng Qwen3.6-27B sa 260K context at ang 1M-context release ng DeepSeek V4 ay pinapanatili ang precondition na ang dense models sa 27B class ay maaaring makaagapay sa flagship coding ability sa iisang high-end consumer GPU. Ang trend ay nananatili kahit ang Mistral, Meta, at Gemma ay hindi pa naglalabas ng katumbas na open Apache-style SKUs sa window.

bridges.text: Qwen3.6-27B dense plus 1M context running on a single RTX 4090 is now flanked by Qwen3.6-Max-Preview at the top and DeepSeek V4-Flash on the open mid-tier — the underlying premise behind a 27B Dense × 1M standard is locked in.

text_locales.en: Qwen3.6-27B dense plus 1M context running on a single RTX 4090 is now flanked by Qwen3.6-Max-Preview at the top and DeepSeek V4-Flash on the open mid-tier — the underlying premise behind a 27B Dense × 1M standard is locked in.
text_locales.ja: RTX 4090 1 枚で動く Qwen3.6-27B 密 + 1M コンテキストは今や、トップに Qwen3.6-Max-Preview、オープン中位層に DeepSeek V4-Flash で挟まれている — 27B 密 × 1M を標準とする根底前提は固まっている。
text_locales.es: Qwen3.6-27B densa más contexto 1M corriendo en una sola RTX 4090 ahora está flanqueada por Qwen3.6-Max-Preview en el tope y DeepSeek V4-Flash en el mid-tier abierto — la premisa subyacente detrás de un estándar 27B Dense × 1M está bloqueada.
text_locales.fil: Ang Qwen3.6-27B dense plus 1M context na tumatakbo sa solong RTX 4090 ay ngayon ay sinasaklaw ng Qwen3.6-Max-Preview sa tuktok at ng DeepSeek V4-Flash sa open mid-tier — naka-lock in ang underlying premise sa likod ng 27B Dense x 1M standard.

bridges.text: Qwen3.6-27B's official research page plus the practitioner round-up confirm the "27B Dense × 1M context × Apache" package is real and operative on a single RTX 3090 — the underlying premise behind the prediction's standardization claim is locked in.

text_locales.en: Qwen3.6-27B's official research page plus the practitioner round-up confirm the "27B Dense × 1M context × Apache" package is real and operative on a single RTX 3090 — the underlying premise behind the prediction's standardization claim is locked in.
text_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-27B の公式リサーチページと実務者まとめは、「27B Dense × 1M コンテキスト × Apache」のパッケージが実在し、単一の RTX 3090 で稼働可能であることを確認している — 予測の標準化主張の根底にある前提が確定している。
text_locales.es: La página oficial de investigación de Qwen3.6-27B más el resumen del profesional confirman que el paquete "27B Dense × 1M context × Apache" es real y operativo en una sola RTX 3090 — la premisa subyacente detrás del reclamo de estandarización de la predicción está bloqueada.
text_locales.fil: Ang opisyal na research page ng Qwen3.6-27B kasama ang practitioner round-up ay nagkukumpirma na ang "27B Dense x 1M context x Apache" package ay totoo at gumagana sa isang RTX 3090 — ang underlying premise sa likod ng standardization claim ng prediction ay naka-lock.

bridges.text: Hugging Face's Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 card, MarkTechPost's 77.2% SWE-bench Verified beat over the 397B-A17B MoE at 40 tok/s on RTX 3090, Will-It-Run-AI's VRAM envelope, and buildfastwithai's Terminal-Bench 2.0 = 59.3 matching Opus 4.5 reinforce the dense single-GPU flagship shape, while no Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense parity release lands inside the window.

text_locales.en: Hugging Face's Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 card, MarkTechPost's 77.2% SWE-bench Verified beat over the 397B-A17B MoE at 40 tok/s on RTX 3090, Will-It-Run-AI's VRAM envelope, and buildfastwithai's Terminal-Bench 2.0 = 59.3 matching Opus 4.5 reinforce the dense single-GPU flagship shape, while no Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense parity release lands inside the window.
text_locales.ja: Hugging FaceのQwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0カード、MarkTechPostの77.2% SWE-bench Verified勝利(RTX 3090上40 tok/sで397B-A17B MoEに対し)、Will-It-Run-AIのVRAMエンベロープ、buildfastwithaiのTerminal-Bench 2.0 = 59.3(Opus 4.5に匹敵)が、密シングルGPUフラグシップ形を補強する一方、Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Denseパリティ・リリースはウィンドウ内に着地しない。
text_locales.es: La tarjeta Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 de Hugging Face, el triunfo del 77.2% SWE-bench Verified de MarkTechPost sobre el 397B-A17B MoE a 40 tok/s en RTX 3090, el envoltorio VRAM de Will-It-Run-AI, y el Terminal-Bench 2.0 = 59.3 de buildfastwithai igualando a Opus 4.5 refuerzan la forma de flagship denso de una sola GPU, mientras que ningún lanzamiento de paridad Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense llega dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Hugging Face's Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 card, ang MarkTechPost's 77.2% SWE-bench Verified beat sa 397B-A17B MoE sa 40 tok/s sa RTX 3090, ang Will-It-Run-AI's VRAM envelope, at ang buildfastwithai's Terminal-Bench 2.0 = 59.3 na tumutugma sa Opus 4.5 ay nagpapalakas sa dense single-GPU flagship shape, habang walang Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense parity release na lumapag sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: TechXplore's Hybrid Attention writeup pinning long-context inference cost at 27% of V3.2 with KV cache compressed by 10%, Cryptonomist's open-source 1M-token race framing, and Renovate QR's parallel Qwen 3.5 / Hunyuan 3.0 / V4 development reinforce the Dense + 1M-context local-flagship framing without a Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense parity release inside the window.

text_locales.en: TechXplore's Hybrid Attention writeup pinning long-context inference cost at 27% of V3.2 with KV cache compressed by 10%, Cryptonomist's open-source 1M-token race framing, and Renovate QR's parallel Qwen 3.5 / Hunyuan 3.0 / V4 development reinforce the Dense + 1M-context local-flagship framing without a Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense parity release inside the window.
text_locales.ja: TechXploreのハイブリッド・アテンション分析が長コンテキスト推論コストをV3.2の27%、KVキャッシュを10%圧縮するものとしてピンポイント、Cryptonomistのオープンソース1Mトークンレースの枠組み、Renovate QRの並行Qwen 3.5 / Hunyuan 3.0 / V4開発が、ウィンドウ内のMistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense対等リリースなしでDense + 1Mコンテキストのローカル・フラッグシップの枠組みを補強する。
text_locales.es: El writeup de Hybrid Attention de TechXplore fijando el costo de inferencia de contexto largo al 27% de V3.2 con caché KV comprimida en 10%, el encuadre de Cryptonomist de la carrera open-source de 1M tokens, y el desarrollo paralelo Qwen 3.5 / Hunyuan 3.0 / V4 de Renovate QR refuerzan el encuadre Dense + 1M-context local-flagship sin un lanzamiento de paridad Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Hybrid Attention writeup ng TechXplore na nagpipipi sa long-context inference cost sa 27% ng V3.2 kasama ang KV cache na compressed ng 10%, ang open-source 1M-token race framing ng Cryptonomist, at ang parallel Qwen 3.5 / Hunyuan 3.0 / V4 development ng Renovate QR ay nagpapatibay sa Dense + 1M-context local-flagship framing nang walang Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense parity release sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: AIBase's Qwen3.6-27B coverage emphasizing 1M context + Claude-Code-grade coding, the Qwen3.6-35B-A3B real-hardware guide pinning down 4090-tier defaults, and the 0G x Alibaba per-token on-chain Qwen partnership reinforce the 27-35B Dense local-flagship framing, while no Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemma 20-30B Dense parity release lands inside the window.

text_locales.en: AIBase's Qwen3.6-27B coverage emphasizing 1M context + Claude-Code-grade coding, the Qwen3.6-35B-A3B real-hardware guide pinning down 4090-tier defaults, and the 0G x Alibaba per-token on-chain Qwen partnership reinforce the 27-35B Dense local-flagship framing, while no Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemma 20-30B Dense parity release lands inside the window.
text_locales.ja: AIBaseのQwen3.6-27B報道が1Mコンテキスト + Claude-Codeグレードのコーディングを強調し、Qwen3.6-35B-A3B実機ハードウェア・ガイドが4090ティアのデフォルトを確定し、0G x AlibabaのトークンごとオンチェーンのQwenパートナーシップが27-35B Denseのローカル・フラッグシップの枠組みを補強する一方、Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemmaの20-30B Denseパリティ・リリースはウィンドウ内に登場していない。
text_locales.es: La cobertura de Qwen3.6-27B de AIBase enfatizando contexto de 1M + codificación de grado Claude-Code, la guía de hardware real de Qwen3.6-35B-A3B fijando los predeterminados de nivel 4090, y la alianza Qwen 0G x Alibaba on-chain por token refuerzan el encuadre de modelo insignia local 27-35B Dense, mientras que ningún lanzamiento de paridad Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemma 20-30B Dense aterriza dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang coverage ng AIBase sa Qwen3.6-27B na nagdidiin sa 1M context + Claude-Code-grade coding, ang Qwen3.6-35B-A3B real-hardware guide na nagpipiko ng 4090-tier defaults, at ang 0G x Alibaba per-token on-chain Qwen partnership ay nagpapatibay sa 27-35B Dense local-flagship framing, habang walang Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Gemma 20-30B Dense parity release na bumabagsak sa loob ng window.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「27B Dense + 1Mコンテキスト」が2026年下半期の企業向けローカルLLMのデファクト標準になる。** Qwen3.6-27Bは、MoEルーティングの複雑さなし、単一のRTX 4090で動作、1Mコンテキスト、Apache 2.0というパッケージで、フラッグシップ級のコーディング能力に到達することを実証した。2026年Q3までに、Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemmaはそれぞれ20-30B Dense × 1Mコンテキスト × Apache/Llamaスタイルのモデルをリリースする。70B+ MoEの差別化要素は、マルチモーダル理解、ツールの幅、長期推論に絞られる。オンプレミス推論のデフォルトVRAM要件は、RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GBから**RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**へと下がる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **"27B Dense + contexto de 1M" se convierte en el estándar de facto para LLMs locales empresariales en H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demuestra que el paquete — sin complejidad de enrutamiento MoE, funciona en una sola RTX 4090, contexto de 1M, Apache 2.0 — alcanza capacidad de codificación de grado insignia. Para el Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma cada uno enviará modelos de 20-30B Dense × contexto de 1M × estilo Apache/Llama. Los diferenciadores para 70B+ MoE se reducen a comprensión multimodal, amplitud de herramientas y razonamiento de horizonte largo. El requisito predeterminado de VRAM para inferencia on-prem cambia de RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB a **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **"27B Dense + 1M context" ay nagiging de facto standard para sa enterprise local LLMs sa H2 2026.** Ipinapakita ng Qwen3.6-27B na ang package — walang kompplikasyon ng MoE routing, tumatakbo sa iisang RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — ay umaabot sa flagship-grade coding ability. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma ay ipapadala bawat isa ng 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. Ang mga differentiator para sa 70B+ MoE ay liliit sa multimodal understanding, tool breadth, at long-horizon reasoning. Ang default na VRAM requirement para sa on-prem inference ay babagsak mula sa RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB papunta sa **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. nodes.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.en: Consumer-GPU coding agents displace cloud-only APIs for 30% of devs by Q3 2026
title.ja: コンシューマGPUコーディング・エージェントが、Q3 2026までに開発者の30%においてクラウド専用APIを置き換える
title.es: Los agentes de codificación con GPU de consumo desplazan a las APIs solo en la nube para el 30% de los desarrolladores para Q3 2026
title.fil: Papalitan ng consumer-GPU coding agents ang cloud-only APIs para sa 30% ng devs pagsapit ng Q3 2026

description.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「コンシューマGPUコーディング・エージェント」がQ3 2026までに開発者ワークロードの30%以上でクラウド専用コーディングAPIを置き換える。** 4月22日のQwen3.6-27B(密、SWE-bench Verifiedで397B-A17Bに勝利、**RTX 3090上Q4_K_M ~16.8 GBで40 tok/s**) + 4月23日のOllama MLXプレビュー(M5 Max上でQwen3.5-35B-A3Bが1.57x プリフィル / 1.93x デコード) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%オフAPI(**実質的にClaude Opus 4.7より~28x安い**)が、プロプライエタリ・フロンティアAPIのSaaSモデルに対する**3角圧搾**を構成する。Q3 2026までに、**企業の開発ツールはハイブリッド・ハーネスをデフォルトとする** ― 「コーディング、リファクタ、リント、テスト」にはローカルのQwen 3.6クラスを、「長期計画 / 多ツール推論」にはリモート・フロンティアAPIのみ ― そしてビッグ3 IDE(Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power)はすべて**ローカル・ファースト・トグル**をデフォルトで出荷する。「クラウド専用コーディング・エージェント」は2024年代の遺物となる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El "agente de codificación con GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de codificación solo en la nube para ≥30% de las cargas de desarrollo para Q3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22 de abril (denso, supera a 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 a Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + el preview de Ollama MLX del 23 de abril (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode en M5 Max para Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro con API 75% de descuento (**efectivamente ~28x más barato que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **apretón de 3 esquinas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API de frontera propietaria. Para Q3 2026, **las herramientas de desarrollo empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6-class local para "codificación, refactor, lint, test" + API de frontera remota solo para "planificación de largo horizonte / razonamiento multi-herramienta" — y todos los IDE Big-3 (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) lanzan un **conmutador local-first** por defecto. "Agente de codificación solo en la nube" se convierte en un artefacto de la era de 2024. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "consumer-GPU coding agent" ay magpapalit sa cloud-only coding API para sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagsapit ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, lumalampas sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang **enterprise dev tools ay default na sa hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay magpapadala ng **local-first toggle** by default. Ang "Cloud-only coding agent" ay nagiging 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.title: Consumer-GPU coding agents displace cloud-only APIs for 30% of devs by Q3 2026

reasoning.because: Qwen3.6-27B beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified at 40 tok/s on RTX 3090, Ollama MLX hits 1.57x / 1.93x on M5 Max, and DeepSeek V4-Pro is ~28x cheaper than Opus 4.7.
reasoning.given: Quality, throughput, and price all clear the proprietary-frontier-API bar at consumer-GPU and Apple-Silicon scale in the same window.
reasoning.so_that: Enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness running local for coding / refactor / lint / test and remote only for long-horizon planning.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power ship a local-first toggle as default and cloud-only coding becomes a 2024-era artifact.
reasoning.plain_language: A laptop GPU can now run a coding model that beats the giant cloud ones. So most coding work will move off the cloud bill in about a year.

because.en: Qwen3.6-27B beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified at 40 tok/s on RTX 3090, Ollama MLX hits 1.57x / 1.93x on M5 Max, and DeepSeek V4-Pro is ~28x cheaper than Opus 4.7.
because.ja: Qwen3.6-27BはRTX 3090上40 tok/sでSWE-bench Verifiedの397B-A17Bを上回り、Ollama MLXはM5 Max上で1.57x / 1.93xに達し、DeepSeek V4-ProはOpus 4.7より~28x安い。
because.es: Qwen3.6-27B supera a 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified a 40 tok/s en RTX 3090, Ollama MLX alcanza 1.57x / 1.93x en M5 Max, y DeepSeek V4-Pro es ~28x más barato que Opus 4.7.
because.fil: Ang Qwen3.6-27B ay lumalampas sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified sa 40 tok/s sa RTX 3090, ang Ollama MLX ay umaabot sa 1.57x / 1.93x sa M5 Max, at ang DeepSeek V4-Pro ay ~28x mas mura kaysa Opus 4.7.

given.en: Quality, throughput, and price all clear the proprietary-frontier-API bar at consumer-GPU and Apple-Silicon scale in the same window.
given.ja: 品質、スループット、価格すべてが、同じウィンドウ内でコンシューマGPUとApple Siliconスケールでプロプライエタリ・フロンティアAPIのバーをクリアする。
given.es: Calidad, throughput y precio superan el listón de la API de frontera propietaria a escala de GPU de consumo y Apple Silicon en la misma ventana.
given.fil: Ang quality, throughput, at presyo ay nakapasa lahat sa proprietary-frontier-API bar sa consumer-GPU at Apple-Silicon scale sa parehong window.

so_that.en: Enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness running local for coding / refactor / lint / test and remote only for long-horizon planning.
so_that.ja: 企業の開発ツールはコーディング / リファクタ / リント / テストをローカルで、長期計画のみをリモートで実行するハイブリッド・ハーネスをデフォルトとする。
so_that.es: Las herramientas de desarrollo empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido ejecutando local para codificación / refactor / lint / test y remoto solo para planificación de largo horizonte.
so_that.fil: Ang enterprise dev tools ay default sa hybrid harness na nag-uutos ng local para sa coding / refactor / lint / test at remote lamang para sa long-horizon planning.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power ship a local-first toggle as default and cloud-only coding becomes a 2024-era artifact.
landing.ja: Q3 2026までに;Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Powerがローカル・ファースト・トグルをデフォルトで出荷し、クラウド専用コーディングは2024年代の遺物となる。
landing.es: Para Q3 2026; Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power lanzan un conmutador local-first por defecto y la codificación solo en la nube se convierte en un artefacto de la era de 2024.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; ang Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power ay magpapadala ng local-first toggle bilang default at ang cloud-only coding ay nagiging 2024-era artifact.

plain_language.en: A laptop GPU can now run a coding model that beats the giant cloud ones. So most coding work will move off the cloud bill in about a year.
plain_language.ja: ノートPCのGPUで、巨大なクラウドモデルを上回るコーディング・モデルを実行できるようになった。だから1年程度でほとんどのコーディング作業はクラウドの請求書から外れる。
plain_language.es: A laptop GPU can now run a coding model that beats the giant cloud ones. So most coding work will move off the cloud bill in about a year.
plain_language.fil: A laptop GPU can now run a coding model that beats the giant cloud ones. So most coding work will move off the cloud bill in about a year.

detail.summary_short: Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B beating 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified at 40 tok/s on RTX 3090, Apr 23's Ollama MLX preview hitting 1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max, and DeepSeek V4-Pro at ~28x cheaper than Opus 4.7 squeeze the cloud-only coding API. By Q3 2026, enterprise dev tools are expected to default to a hybrid harness and Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power are expected to ship local-first toggles.

summary_short_locales.en: Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B beating 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified at 40 tok/s on RTX 3090, Apr 23's Ollama MLX preview hitting 1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max, and DeepSeek V4-Pro at ~28x cheaper than Opus 4.7 squeeze the cloud-only coding API. By Q3 2026, enterprise dev tools are expected to default to a hybrid harness and Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power are expected to ship local-first toggles.
summary_short_locales.ja: 4月22日のQwen3.6-27BがRTX 3090上40 tok/sでSWE-bench Verifiedの397B-A17Bを上回り、4月23日のOllama MLXプレビューがM5 Max上で1.57x プリフィル / 1.93x デコードに達し、DeepSeek V4-ProがOpus 4.7より~28x安いことが、クラウド専用コーディングAPIを圧搾する。Q3 2026までに、企業の開発ツールはハイブリッド・ハーネスをデフォルトとし、Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Powerがローカル・ファースト・トグルを出荷することが予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: Qwen3.6-27B del 22 de abril superando a 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified a 40 tok/s en RTX 3090, el preview de Ollama MLX del 23 de abril alcanzando 1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode en M5 Max, y DeepSeek V4-Pro a ~28x más barato que Opus 4.7 aprietan a la API de codificación solo en la nube. Para Q3 2026, se espera que las herramientas de desarrollo empresariales adopten por defecto un harness híbrido y que Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power lancen conmutadores local-first.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B na lumalampas sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified sa 40 tok/s sa RTX 3090, ang Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview na umaabot sa 1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max, at ang DeepSeek V4-Pro sa ~28x mas mura kaysa Opus 4.7 ay sumisikip sa cloud-only coding API. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, inaasahan na ang enterprise dev tools ay magde-default sa hybrid harness at inaasahang ang Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power ay magpapadala ng local-first toggles.

bridges.text: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite at $0.25 per million tokens stacks with DeepSeek V4 Pro and Qwen 3.6 to keep the three-corner cost squeeze on cloud-only coding APIs alive into May. Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference parity and Bonsai-8B at 1.15 GB keep the on-device side of the hybrid harness moving in step with the price compression.

text_locales.en: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite at $0.25 per million tokens stacks with DeepSeek V4 Pro and Qwen 3.6 to keep the three-corner cost squeeze on cloud-only coding APIs alive into May. Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference parity and Bonsai-8B at 1.15 GB keep the on-device side of the hybrid harness moving in step with the price compression.
text_locales.ja: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Liteの$0.25/百万トークンが、DeepSeek V4 ProとQwen 3.6と積層して、5月までクラウド専用コーディングAPIへの三角コスト圧迫を維持する。Unsloth 2026.4.8の推論パリティとBonsai-8Bの1.15 GBが、価格圧縮と歩調を合わせてハイブリッドハーネスのオンデバイス側を動かし続ける。
text_locales.es: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite a $0.25 por millón de tokens se apila con DeepSeek V4 Pro y Qwen 3.6 para mantener vivo el apretón de costos de tres esquinas sobre las APIs de coding solo-nube hasta mayo. La paridad de inferencia de Unsloth 2026.4.8 y Bonsai-8B a 1.15 GB mantienen el lado on-device del harness híbrido moviéndose en sincronía con la compresión de precios.
text_locales.fil: Ang Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite sa $0.25 kada milyong tokens ay pinapatong sa DeepSeek V4 Pro at Qwen 3.6 upang panatilihin ang three-corner cost squeeze sa cloud-only coding APIs hanggang Mayo. Ang Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference parity at Bonsai-8B sa 1.15 GB ay nagpapanatili sa on-device side ng hybrid harness na kasabay ng price compression.

bridges.text: Foundry Local's Windows-native runtime, Unsloth's 20-30% inference speedup, and the Chinese open-weight stack together keep the consumer-GPU coding ceiling rising fast enough to ratify the predicted hybrid-harness shift inside enterprise IDEs.

text_locales.en: Foundry Local's Windows-native runtime, Unsloth's 20-30% inference speedup, and the Chinese open-weight stack together keep the consumer-GPU coding ceiling rising fast enough to ratify the predicted hybrid-harness shift inside enterprise IDEs.
text_locales.ja: Foundry LocalのWindowsネイティブランタイム、Unslothの20-30%推論高速化、中国のオープンウェイトスタックが、エンタープライズIDE内で予測されたハイブリッドハーネスシフトを批准するのに十分な速度でコンシューマーGPUコーディング天井を上げ続けている。
text_locales.es: El runtime nativo de Windows de Foundry Local, la aceleración de inferencia 20-30% de Unsloth, y la pila open-weight china juntos mantienen el techo de codificación de GPU de consumidor subiendo lo bastante rápido para ratificar el cambio predicho de harness híbrido dentro de los IDE empresariales.
text_locales.fil: Ang Windows-native runtime ng Foundry Local, ang 20-30% inference speedup ng Unsloth, at ang Chinese open-weight stack ay magkakasamang nagpapanatili ng pataas na consumer-GPU coding ceiling nang sapat na bilis upang i-ratify ang hinulang hybrid-harness shift sa loob ng enterprise IDEs.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B at iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus Foundry Local's WinML execution-provider integration sustains the consumer-GPU-coding-agent thesis on the local side, while Codex CLI 0.128.0's model-provider-owned discovery pulls in the opposite direction by binding tooling more tightly to cloud accounts. Mixed signal — the local stack is densifying but the cloud stack is also defending.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B at iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus Foundry Local's WinML execution-provider integration sustains the consumer-GPU-coding-agent thesis on the local side, while Codex CLI 0.128.0's model-provider-owned discovery pulls in the opposite direction by binding tooling more tightly to cloud accounts. Mixed signal — the local stack is densifying but the cloud stack is also defending.
text_locales.ja: Bonsai-8BのiPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090スループットに加え、Foundry LocalのWinML実行プロバイダー統合は、ローカル側でコンシューマーGPUコーディングエージェントテーゼを支えるが、Codex CLI 0.128.0のモデルプロバイダー所有のディスカバリーは、ツールをクラウドアカウントにより緊密に結合することで反対方向に引っ張る。混合シグナル ― ローカルスタックは高密度化しているが、クラウドスタックも防衛している。
text_locales.es: Bonsai-8B con throughput en iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 más la integración del execution-provider WinML de Foundry Local sostiene la tesis de consumer-GPU-coding-agent en el lado local, mientras que el discovery model-provider-owned de Codex CLI 0.128.0 tira en dirección opuesta atando el tooling más fuertemente a las cuentas cloud. Señal mixta — el stack local se está densificando pero el stack cloud también se está defendiendo.
text_locales.fil: Ang Bonsai-8B sa iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus ang WinML execution-provider integration ng Foundry Local ay sumusuporta sa consumer-GPU-coding-agent thesis sa local side, habang ang model-provider-owned discovery ng Codex CLI 0.128.0 ay humahatak sa kabilang direksyon sa pamamagitan ng pagbubuklod ng tooling nang mas mahigpit sa cloud accounts. Mixed signal — ang local stack ay tumitindi ngunit ang cloud stack ay nagde-defend din.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B 1-bit at iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus Foundry Local's ~20MB native library on WinML execution providers and vLLM v0.19.0 land the consumer-GPU coding-agent stack densely enough to support the 30%-displacement framing the prediction calls for. The cost-per-token squeeze is real and Windows-default integration is now in reach.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B 1-bit at iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus Foundry Local's ~20MB native library on WinML execution providers and vLLM v0.19.0 land the consumer-GPU coding-agent stack densely enough to support the 30%-displacement framing the prediction calls for. The cost-per-token squeeze is real and Windows-default integration is now in reach.
text_locales.ja: iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090スループットでのBonsai-8B 1ビットに加え、WinML実行プロバイダ上のFoundry Localの約20MBネイティブライブラリとvLLM v0.19.0は、予測が求める30%置換枠組みを支えるのに十分密に消費者向けGPUコーディングエージェントスタックを着地させる。トークンあたりコストの圧縮は本物であり、Windowsデフォルト統合は今や手の届く範囲にある。
text_locales.es: Bonsai-8B 1-bit a throughput de iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 más la librería nativa de ~20MB de Foundry Local sobre execution providers de WinML y vLLM v0.19.0 aterrizan el stack de coding-agent en GPU-de-consumidor lo suficientemente densamente como para soportar el encuadre de 30%-de-desplazamiento que pide la predicción. La compresión de costo-por-token es real y la integración por defecto en Windows está ahora al alcance.
text_locales.fil: Ang Bonsai-8B 1-bit sa iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput kasama ang ~20MB native library ng Foundry Local sa WinML execution providers at ang vLLM v0.19.0 ay naglalapag ng consumer-GPU coding-agent stack na sapat ang lapot upang suportahan ang 30%-displacement framing na hinihingi ng prediction. Tunay ang cost-per-token squeeze at ang Windows-default integration ay malapit na.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B's 1.15 GB single-file deployment at 368 tok/s on RTX 4090, Unsloth's Gemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAM training path, and Multica v0.2.18's vendor-neutral orchestrator deepen the on-device coding-agent stack the prediction stitches together. The 3-corner squeeze on cloud-only coding APIs continues to materialize on consumer hardware.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B's 1.15 GB single-file deployment at 368 tok/s on RTX 4090, Unsloth's Gemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAM training path, and Multica v0.2.18's vendor-neutral orchestrator deepen the on-device coding-agent stack the prediction stitches together. The 3-corner squeeze on cloud-only coding APIs continues to materialize on consumer hardware.
text_locales.ja: Bonsai-8BのRTX 4090上1.15 GBシングルファイル・デプロイメント(368 tok/s)、UnslothのGemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAMトレーニング・パス、Multica v0.2.18のベンダー中立オーケストレーターが、予測が縫い合わせるオンデバイス・コーディング・エージェント・スタックを深化させる。クラウド限定コーディングAPIに対する3コーナー・スクイーズが、コンシューマー・ハードウェア上で物質化し続けている。
text_locales.es: El despliegue de archivo-unico de 1.15 GB de Bonsai-8B a 368 tok/s en RTX 4090, el path de entrenamiento Gemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAM de Unsloth, y el orchestrator vendor-neutral de Multica v0.2.18 profundizan el stack de coding-agent on-device que la prediccion une. La presion de 3-esquinas sobre las APIs de codificacion solo-nube continua materializandose en hardware consumer.
text_locales.fil: Ang 1.15 GB single-file deployment ng Bonsai-8B sa 368 tok/s sa RTX 4090, ang Gemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAM training path ng Unsloth, at ang vendor-neutral orchestrator ng Multica v0.2.18 ay nagpapalalim sa on-device coding-agent stack na pinagsasama-sama ng hula. Ang 3-corner squeeze sa cloud-only coding APIs ay patuloy na nag-mamaterialize sa consumer hardware.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B's on-device throughput, Unsloth's consumer-GPU fine-tuning maturation, and Multica's vendor-neutral orchestration all reinforce the structural conditions the displacement thesis depends on, with the local stack hardening in the same window the prediction expected.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B's on-device throughput, Unsloth's consumer-GPU fine-tuning maturation, and Multica's vendor-neutral orchestration all reinforce the structural conditions the displacement thesis depends on, with the local stack hardening in the same window the prediction expected.
text_locales.ja: Bonsai-8B のオンデバイス スループット、Unsloth のコンシューマ GPU ファインチューニング成熟、Multica のベンダー中立オーケストレーションはいずれも、置換テーゼが依拠する構造的条件を補強する — ローカル スタックは予測が見込んだ同じウィンドウで硬化している。
text_locales.es: El throughput on-device de Bonsai-8B, la maduración de fine-tuning consumer-GPU de Unsloth, y la orquestación vendor-neutral de Multica refuerzan las condiciones estructurales en las que depende la tesis de desplazamiento, con el local stack endureciéndose en la misma ventana que esperaba la predicción.
text_locales.fil: Ang on-device throughput ng Bonsai-8B, ang consumer-GPU fine-tuning maturation ng Unsloth, at ang vendor-neutral orchestration ng Multica ay lahat nagpapatatag sa structural conditions na inaasahan ng displacement thesis, kasama ang local stack na tumitibay sa parehong window na inaasahan ng prediction.

bridges.text: Practitioner momentum (Willison on V4 + SwiftUI), Bonsai's on-device performance, and Foundry Local's developer-path messaging all reinforce the structural conditions the displacement thesis depends on through Apr 25-27.

text_locales.en: Practitioner momentum (Willison on V4 + SwiftUI), Bonsai's on-device performance, and Foundry Local's developer-path messaging all reinforce the structural conditions the displacement thesis depends on through Apr 25-27.
text_locales.ja: 実務者のモメンタム (Willison の V4 + SwiftUI)、Bonsai のオンデバイス性能、そして Foundry Local の開発者パス メッセージングは、いずれも 4/25-27 を通じて置き換え仮説が依存する構造的な条件を補強している。
text_locales.es: El impulso de los profesionales (Willison sobre V4 + SwiftUI), el rendimiento on-device de Bonsai, y el mensaje de camino-de-desarrollador de Foundry Local refuerzan todos las condiciones estructurales de las que depende la tesis del desplazamiento del 25 al 27 de abril.
text_locales.fil: Ang practitioner momentum (Willison sa V4 + SwiftUI), ang on-device performance ng Bonsai, at ang developer-path messaging ng Foundry Local ay lahat nagpapatibay sa structural conditions na inaasa ng displacement thesis sa kabuuan ng Apr 25-27.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
