By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「コンシューマGPUコーディング・エージェント」がQ3 2026までに開発者ワークロードの30%以上でクラウド専用コーディングAPIを置き換える。** 4月22日のQwen3.6-27B(密、SWE-bench Verifiedで397B-A17Bに勝利、**RTX 3090上Q4_K_M ~16.8 GBで40 tok/s**) + 4月23日のOllama MLXプレビュー(M5 Max上でQwen3.5-35B-A3Bが1.57x プリフィル / 1.93x デコード) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%オフAPI(**実質的にClaude Opus 4.7より~28x安い**)が、プロプライエタリ・フロンティアAPIのSaaSモデルに対する**3角圧搾**を構成する。Q3 2026までに、**企業の開発ツールはハイブリッド・ハーネスをデフォルトとする** ― 「コーディング、リファクタ、リント、テスト」にはローカルのQwen 3.6クラスを、「長期計画 / 多ツール推論」にはリモート・フロンティアAPIのみ ― そしてビッグ3 IDE(Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power)はすべて**ローカル・ファースト・トグル**をデフォルトで出荷する。「クラウド専用コーディング・エージェント」は2024年代の遺物となる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "agente de codificación con GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de codificación solo en la nube para ≥30% de las cargas de desarrollo para Q3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22 de abril (denso, supera a 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 a Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + el preview de Ollama MLX del 23 de abril (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode en M5 Max para Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro con API 75% de descuento (**efectivamente ~28x más barato que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **apretón de 3 esquinas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API de frontera propietaria. Para Q3 2026, **las herramientas de desarrollo empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6-class local para "codificación, refactor, lint, test" + API de frontera remota solo para "planificación de largo horizonte / razonamiento multi-herramienta" — y todos los IDE Big-3 (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) lanzan un **conmutador local-first** por defecto. "Agente de codificación solo en la nube" se convierte en un artefacto de la era de 2024. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "consumer-GPU coding agent" ay magpapalit sa cloud-only coding API para sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagsapit ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, lumalampas sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang **enterprise dev tools ay default na sa hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay magpapadala ng **local-first toggle** by default. Ang "Cloud-only coding agent" ay nagiging 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: KV-cache-compression dtype ships as inference-stack deployment knob by Q4 2026
nodes.short_label: KV-cache-compression dtype ships as inference-stack deployment knob by Q4 2026
nodes.title: KV-cache-compression dtype ships as inference-stack deployment knob by Q4 2026
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q4までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeが主要な全推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイメント・ノブとして公開される — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMのすべてが、TurboQuantと少なくとも1つの代替手段(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を備えた`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4月27日〜29日の動向で、これはほぼ確実となった: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに掲載**、**SGLang PR #21419はすでにツリー内**で、フューズドカーネル書き換え(#23134)がbf16スループットの93〜105%に到達、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟度に達し、**PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化をデモ、**コミュニティのMLX + Triton + vLLMポート**が2026年Q2のGoogle公式Pythonリリース前から流通している。経済的な強制関数は、4月28日OpenAIミスのWSJレポートが直撃したのと同じMag-7 capexテープだ: メモリ帯域幅律速のロングコンテキストワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットに移行できれば、トークンあたりの実効コストを約5〜6倍削減できる。2026年Q4までに、ハイパースケーラーはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン単価をオプトイン圧縮キャッシュ階層でゲートし、昨日のレポートが示した増分GPU capexのハードウェア上限テーゼは、GPU削減ではなくこのレバーを通じて締まっていく。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q4 2026 el dtype de compresion de KV-cache se expone como una palanca de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia importante — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM todos envian un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El 27-29 de abril lo convierte en una casi-certeza: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **SGLang PR #21419 ya en el arbol** con una reescritura de kernel fusionado (#23134) alcanzando 93-105% del throughput de bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** en madurez Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demostrando cuantizacion de pool compartido multi-agente, y **ports de la comunidad MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulando antes de que aterrice el lanzamiento oficial Python de Google en el Q2 2026. La funcion forzante economica es la misma cinta de capex Mag-7 que el reporte WSJ del fallo de OpenAI del 28 de abril acaba de quebrar: cada workload de contexto largo limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda moverse de FP16 a 3.5-bit reduce el costo efectivo por token ~5-6x. Para el Q4 2026 los hyperscalers gatean el precio por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sobre tiers opt-in de cache-comprimido, y la tesis del cap-de-hardware-sobre-capex-incremental-de-GPU del reporte de ayer se aprieta via esta palanca en lugar de via menos GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang KV-cache-compression dtype ay ilalabas bilang first-class deployment knob sa bawat major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lahat ay maglalabas ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + kahit isang alternatibo (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ang Apr 27-29 ay ginagawa itong halos kasiguraduhan: **TurboQuant ay lumapag sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 ay nasa-tree na** kasama ang fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umaabot ng 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binasag ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na maaaring lumipat mula FP16 papunta sa 3.5-bit ay nababawasan ang epektibong per-token cost ng ~5-6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang mga hyperscaler ay mag-gate ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at ang hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis mula sa report kahapon ay tumitindi sa pamamagitan ng lever na ito sa halip na sa pamamagitan ng mas kakaunting GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **2026年Q4までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeが主要な全推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイメント・ノブとして公開される — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMのすべてが、TurboQuantと少なくとも1つの代替手段(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を備えた`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4月27日〜29日の動向で、これはほぼ確実となった: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに掲載**、**SGLang PR #21419はすでにツリー内**で、フューズドカーネル書き換え(#23134)がbf16スループットの93〜105%に到達、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟度に達し、**PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化をデモ、**コミュニティのMLX + Triton + vLLMポート**が2026年Q2のGoogle公式Pythonリリース前から流通している。経済的な強制関数は、4月28日OpenAIミスのWSJレポートが直撃したのと同じMag-7 capexテープだ: メモリ帯域幅律速のロングコンテキストワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットに移行できれば、トークンあたりの実効コストを約5〜6倍削減できる。2026年Q4までに、ハイパースケーラーはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン単価をオプトイン圧縮キャッシュ階層でゲートし、昨日のレポートが示した増分GPU capexのハードウェア上限テーゼは、GPU削減ではなくこのレバーを通じて締まっていく。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **Para el Q4 2026 el dtype de compresion de KV-cache se expone como una palanca de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia importante — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM todos envian un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El 27-29 de abril lo convierte en una casi-certeza: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **SGLang PR #21419 ya en el arbol** con una reescritura de kernel fusionado (#23134) alcanzando 93-105% del throughput de bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** en madurez Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demostrando cuantizacion de pool compartido multi-agente, y **ports de la comunidad MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulando antes de que aterrice el lanzamiento oficial Python de Google en el Q2 2026. La funcion forzante economica es la misma cinta de capex Mag-7 que el reporte WSJ del fallo de OpenAI del 28 de abril acaba de quebrar: cada workload de contexto largo limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda moverse de FP16 a 3.5-bit reduce el costo efectivo por token ~5-6x. Para el Q4 2026 los hyperscalers gatean el precio por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sobre tiers opt-in de cache-comprimido, y la tesis del cap-de-hardware-sobre-capex-incremental-de-GPU del reporte de ayer se aprieta via esta palanca en lugar de via menos GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang KV-cache-compression dtype ay ilalabas bilang first-class deployment knob sa bawat major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lahat ay maglalabas ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + kahit isang alternatibo (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ang Apr 27-29 ay ginagawa itong halos kasiguraduhan: **TurboQuant ay lumapag sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 ay nasa-tree na** kasama ang fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umaabot ng 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binasag ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na maaaring lumipat mula FP16 papunta sa 3.5-bit ay nababawasan ang epektibong per-token cost ng ~5-6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang mga hyperscaler ay mag-gate ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at ang hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis mula sa report kahapon ay tumitindi sa pamamagitan ng lever na ito sa halip na sa pamamagitan ng mas kakaunting GPUs. plain_language.en: AI servers are about to ship a single switch that shrinks memory use 5-6x, so cloud providers can charge less per word without buying more chips.

plain_language.es: Los servidores de IA estan a punto de enviar un solo interruptor que reduce el uso de memoria 5-6x, asi que los proveedores de nube pueden cobrar menos por palabra sin comprar mas chips.
plain_language.fil: Ang AI servers ay malapit nang maglabas ng iisang switch na nagpapaliit ng memory use ng 5-6x, kaya ang cloud providers ay maaaring magpa-singil ng mas mura per word nang hindi bumibili ng mas maraming chips.

detail.summary_short: Apr 27-29 stacks the evidence: TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026, SGLang PR #21419 + fused-kernel rewrite #23134 hit 93-105% bf16 throughput, NVIDIA kvpress matures, PolyKV demos multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and community ports circulate. summary_short_locales.en: Apr 27-29 stacks the evidence: TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026, SGLang PR #21419 + fused-kernel rewrite #23134 hit 93-105% bf16 throughput, NVIDIA kvpress matures, PolyKV demos multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and community ports circulate. By Q4 2026 every major inference stack exposes a kv-cache-dtype flag and hyperscalers tier per-token pricing on compressed-cache tiers.
summary_short_locales.ja: 4月27日〜29日が証拠を積み上げた: TurboQuantがICLR 2026に到達、SGLang PR #21419 + フューズドカーネル書き換え#23134がbf16スループットの93〜105%に到達、NVIDIA kvpressが成熟、PolyKVがマルチエージェント共有プール量子化をデモ、コミュニティポートが流通している。2026年Q4までに、主要な全推論スタックがkv-cache-dtypeフラグを公開し、ハイパースケーラーが圧縮キャッシュ階層でトークン単価を階層化する。
summary_short_locales.es: El 27-29 de abril apila la evidencia: TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026, SGLang PR #21419 + reescritura de kernel fusionado #23134 alcanzan 93-105% del throughput de bf16, NVIDIA kvpress madura, PolyKV demuestra cuantizacion de pool compartido multi-agente, y los ports de la comunidad circulan. Para el Q4 2026 cada stack de inferencia importante expone un flag kv-cache-dtype y los hyperscalers tieran el precio por token sobre tiers de cache-comprimido.

Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, bawat major inference stack ay maglalabas ng kv-cache-dtype flag at ang hyperscalers ay mag-tier ng per-token pricing sa compressed-cache tiers.

bridges.text: Cloudflare's Infire engine entering global edge production with prefill/decode disaggregation and a 7%+ vLLM throughput edge adds a third inference-stack candidate alongside SGLang and vLLM. The expanding production-serving Pareto frontier is the substrate a unified KV-cache-compression dtype knob would expose, but no fresh kv-cache-dtype CLI flag ships in the window.

text_locales.en: Cloudflare's Infire engine entering global edge production with prefill/decode disaggregation and a 7%+ vLLM throughput edge adds a third inference-stack candidate alongside SGLang and vLLM. The expanding production-serving Pareto frontier is the substrate a unified KV-cache-compression dtype knob would expose, but no fresh kv-cache-dtype CLI flag ships in the window.
text_locales.ja: Cloudflareの Infireエンジンが、プリフィル/デコード分離と7%以上のvLLMスループット優位を伴ってグローバル・エッジ本番に参入することは、SGLangおよびvLLMと並んで第三の推論スタック候補を加える。拡張する本番サービングのパレート・フロンティアは、統一されたKVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeノブが公開する基盤だが、新たなkv-cache-dtype CLIフラグはウィンドウ内で出荷されない。
text_locales.es: El motor Infire de Cloudflare entrando en producción global edge con desagregación prefill/decode y un margen de throughput de 7%+ sobre vLLM agrega un tercer candidato de stack de inferencia junto a SGLang y vLLM. La frontera Pareto de production-serving en expansión es el sustrato que un knob unificado de compresión KV-cache-dtype expondría, pero ningún flag CLI fresco kv-cache-dtype se entrega en la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Infire engine ng Cloudflare na pumapasok sa global edge production na may prefill/decode disaggregation at 7%+ vLLM throughput edge ay nagdaragdag ng third inference-stack candidate kasama ang SGLang at vLLM. Ang lumalawak na production-serving Pareto frontier ang substrate na ipalalantad ng unified KV-cache-compression dtype knob, ngunit walang sariwang kv-cache-dtype CLI flag na nagshi-ship sa window.

bridges.text: SGLang's measured 29% throughput lead and day-0 model coverage plus Unsloth's 70% VRAM-reduction baseline keep the precondition warm: the inference-stack consolidation around shared-prefix optimization is exactly the substrate a unified kv-cache-dtype knob would expose.

text_locales.en: SGLang's measured 29% throughput lead and day-0 model coverage plus Unsloth's 70% VRAM-reduction baseline keep the precondition warm: the inference-stack consolidation around shared-prefix optimization is exactly the substrate a unified kv-cache-dtype knob would expose.
text_locales.ja: SGLangの計測された29%スループット優位とday-0モデル・カバレッジ + UnslothのVRAM 70%削減ベースラインが前提条件を温存している: 共有プレフィックス最適化を中心とする推論スタック統合は、まさに統一されたkv-cache-dtypeノブが公開する基盤である。
text_locales.es: La ventaja de rendimiento medida del 29% de SGLang y la cobertura de modelo day-0 más la línea base de reducción del 70% de VRAM de Unsloth mantienen caliente la precondición: la consolidación de la pila de inferencia en torno a la optimización de prefijo compartido es exactamente el sustrato que un knob unificado de kv-cache-dtype expondría.
text_locales.fil: Ang sinukat na 29% throughput lead at day-0 model coverage ng SGLang plus ang 70% VRAM-reduction baseline ng Unsloth ay nagpapanatiling mainit ang precondition: ang inference-stack consolidation sa paligid ng shared-prefix optimization ang siyang substrate na ipalalantad ng unified kv-cache-dtype knob.

bridges.text: SGLang's PR #21419 in-tree and #23134 hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, llama.cpp's #20969 thread, NVIDIA kvpress, and the SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBench arxiv wave compose the same multi-stack convergence the prediction needs. The dtype-as-knob rollout is now visibly underway across the Apr 27-29 sequence and is still spreading through May 3.

text_locales.en: SGLang's PR #21419 in-tree and #23134 hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, llama.cpp's #20969 thread, NVIDIA kvpress, and the SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBench arxiv wave compose the same multi-stack convergence the prediction needs. The dtype-as-knob rollout is now visibly underway across the Apr 27-29 sequence and is still spreading through May 3.
text_locales.ja: SGLangのPR #21419がインツリー、#23134がbf16スループット93-105%に到達、llama.cppの#20969スレッド、NVIDIA kvpress、SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBenchのarxivウェーブが、予測が必要とするのと同じマルチスタック収束を構成する。dtype-as-knobロールアウトは4月27-29日シーケンスを通じて目に見える形で進行中で、5月3日まで広がり続けている。
text_locales.es: El PR #21419 in-tree de SGLang y #23134 alcanzando 93-105% de throughput bf16, el hilo #20969 de llama.cpp, NVIDIA kvpress, y la ola arxiv SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBench componen la misma convergencia multi-stack que la predicción necesita. El despliegue de dtype-como-knob ahora está visiblemente en marcha a través de la secuencia del 27-29 de abril y sigue propagándose hasta el 3 de mayo.
text_locales.fil: Ang PR #21419 in-tree at #23134 ng SGLang na umaabot sa 93-105% bf16 throughput, ang #20969 thread ng llama.cpp, NVIDIA kvpress, at ang SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBench arxiv wave ay bumubuo ng parehong multi-stack convergence na kailangan ng prediction. Ang dtype-as-knob rollout ay nakikitang isinasagawa na sa Apr 27-29 sequence at patuloy na kumakalat hanggang May 3.

bridges.text: SGLang's fused-Triton kernel reaching parity throughput, llama.cpp's active community thread, NVIDIA kvpress maturity, and the four-paper arxiv compression wave together fill the precondition pipeline the prediction expects to converge on a unified deployment flag.

text_locales.en: SGLang's fused-Triton kernel reaching parity throughput, llama.cpp's active community thread, NVIDIA kvpress maturity, and the four-paper arxiv compression wave together fill the precondition pipeline the prediction expects to converge on a unified deployment flag.

text_locales.es: El kernel fused-Triton de SGLang alcanzando throughput de paridad, el hilo activo de la comunidad de llama.cpp, la madurez de NVIDIA kvpress, y la ola arxiv de cuatro papers de compresión juntos llenan la tubería de precondiciones que la predicción espera que converja en un flag de despliegue unificado.
text_locales.fil: Ang fused-Triton kernel ng SGLang na umaabot sa parity throughput, ang aktibong community thread ng llama.cpp, ang maturity ng NVIDIA kvpress, at ang four-paper arxiv compression wave ay magkakasamang pinupuno ang precondition pipeline na inaasahan ng prediction na magkakatipon sa unified deployment flag.

Memory-bandwidth-bound long-context cost-cutting at 5-6x is now demonstrated and ported across stacks.

El recorte de costo en long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria a 5-6x ya está demostrado y portado entre stacks.

motivation_locales.en: without first-class kernel + flag support, compressed-cache deployment stays an experimental opt-in and hyperscalers cannot tier per-token pricing on it; whichever runtime ships the polished knob first wins the long-context default

motivation_locales.es: sin soporte de kernel + flag de primera clase, el despliegue de cache-comprimido se queda como opt-in experimental y los hyperscalers no pueden tierar precios por token sobre el; el runtime que envie la palanca pulida primero gana el default de long-context
motivation_locales.fil: kung walang first-class kernel + flag support, ang compressed-cache deployment ay mananatiling experimental opt-in at ang hyperscalers ay hindi makakapag-tier ng per-token pricing dito; sinumang runtime ang unang maglabas ng polished knob ay mananalo sa long-context default

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q4までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeが主要な全推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイメント・ノブとして公開される — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMのすべてが、TurboQuantと少なくとも1つの代替手段(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を備えた`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4月27日〜29日の動向で、これはほぼ確実となった: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに掲載**、**SGLang PR #21419はすでにツリー内**で、フューズドカーネル書き換え(#23134)がbf16スループットの93〜105%に到達、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟度に達し、**PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化をデモ、**コミュニティのMLX + Triton + vLLMポート**が2026年Q2のGoogle公式Pythonリリース前から流通している。経済的な強制関数は、4月28日OpenAIミスのWSJレポートが直撃したのと同じMag-7 capexテープだ: メモリ帯域幅律速のロングコンテキストワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットに移行できれば、トークンあたりの実効コストを約5〜6倍削減できる。2026年Q4までに、ハイパースケーラーはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン単価をオプトイン圧縮キャッシュ階層でゲートし、昨日のレポートが示した増分GPU capexのハードウェア上限テーゼは、GPU削減ではなくこのレバーを通じて締まっていく。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q4 2026 el dtype de compresion de KV-cache se expone como una palanca de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia importante — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM todos envian un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El 27-29 de abril lo convierte en una casi-certeza: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **SGLang PR #21419 ya en el arbol** con una reescritura de kernel fusionado (#23134) alcanzando 93-105% del throughput de bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** en madurez Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demostrando cuantizacion de pool compartido multi-agente, y **ports de la comunidad MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulando antes de que aterrice el lanzamiento oficial Python de Google en el Q2 2026. La funcion forzante economica es la misma cinta de capex Mag-7 que el reporte WSJ del fallo de OpenAI del 28 de abril acaba de quebrar: cada workload de contexto largo limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda moverse de FP16 a 3.5-bit reduce el costo efectivo por token ~5-6x. Para el Q4 2026 los hyperscalers gatean el precio por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sobre tiers opt-in de cache-comprimido, y la tesis del cap-de-hardware-sobre-capex-incremental-de-GPU del reporte de ayer se aprieta via esta palanca en lugar de via menos GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang KV-cache-compression dtype ay ilalabas bilang first-class deployment knob sa bawat major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lahat ay maglalabas ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + kahit isang alternatibo (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ang Apr 27-29 ay ginagawa itong halos kasiguraduhan: **TurboQuant ay lumapag sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 ay nasa-tree na** kasama ang fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umaabot ng 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binasag ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na maaaring lumipat mula FP16 papunta sa 3.5-bit ay nababawasan ang epektibong per-token cost ng ~5-6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang mga hyperscaler ay mag-gate ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at ang hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis mula sa report kahapon ay tumitindi sa pamamagitan ng lever na ito sa halip na sa pamamagitan ng mas kakaunting GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Local-LLM stacks expose unified compressed-KV-cache flag by H2 2026
nodes.short_label: Local-LLM stacks expose unified compressed-KV-cache flag by H2 2026
nodes.title: Local-LLM stacks expose unified compressed-KV-cache flag by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.

description.en: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、すべての主要なローカルLLMエコシステム(vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local)が統一された圧縮KVキャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも1つの代替案 — を公開し、Foundry Local(Microsoft、4月9日GA)はWindows ML / WinML実行プロバイダに紐付いたネイティブTurboQuant統合をWindowsデフォルト最適化として出荷する。** 4月27-29日のエビデンス:SGLang PR #21419がインツリー化、SGLang #23134のfused-Triton-decodeカーネル書き換えがbf16スループットの93–105%に到達、vLLM v0.19.0(4月2日)はtorch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラがデフォルト + Model Runner V2、PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971、4月27日)はマルチエージェント推論向けの共有非対称KVプール、NVIDIA kvpressはDecoding-Press成熟度、llama.cpp #20969のTurboQuant議論スレッドがアクティブ、Unsloth 2026.4.8の推論が20-30%高速化。Foundry Localは欠けていたエンタープライズWindowsエントリポイントである — Microsoftはこれをハードウェア対応のWinML実行プロバイダで任意のアプリにローカルAIをバンドルする約20MBのネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年Q2の明らかな次の一歩はFoundry CatalogでTurboQuantフラグを公開することである。経済的な強制要因はMag 7 capexテープと同じである:FP16から3.5ビットに移行するメモリ帯域幅律速の長文脈ワークロードはすべてトークンあたりの実効コストを約5-6倍削減し、Foundry Localはその切替をエンドデベロッパーに対して不可視にする。
description.es: **Para H2 2026 cada ecosistema mayor de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un knob unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimido — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9 abr) lanza integración nativa de TurboQuant atada a los execution providers de Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia del 27-29 abr: el PR #21419 de SGLang está in-tree; la rescritura de fused-Triton-decode kernel de SGLang #23134 alcanza 93–105% del throughput bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2 abr) trae torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27 abr) es un pool compartido asimétrico de KV para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press; el hilo #20969 de discusión de TurboQuant en llama.cpp está activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial-Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo envía como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con execution providers de WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag de TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag 7: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pasa de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores finales. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang bawat pangunahing local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ay maglalantad ng unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternatibo — at ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ay magpapadala ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 ebidensiya: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite na umabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress sa Decoding-Press maturity; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% mas mabilis. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ipinapadala ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nagbubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang malinaw na susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay ang paglalantad ng TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lumilipat mula FP16 papuntang 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawa ng Foundry Local na hindi nakikita ng end-developer ang switch na iyon.

summary.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang bawat pangunahing local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ay maglalantad ng unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternatibo — at ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ay magpapadala ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 ebidensiya: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite na umabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress sa Decoding-Press maturity; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% mas mabilis. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ipinapadala ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nagbubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang malinaw na susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay ang paglalantad ng TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lumilipat mula FP16 papuntang 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawa ng Foundry Local na hindi nakikita ng end-developer ang switch na iyon.

title_locales.en: Local-LLM stacks expose unified compressed-KV-cache flag by H2 2026
title_locales.ja: ローカルLLMスタックが2026年下半期までに統一された圧縮KVキャッシュフラグを公開
title_locales.es: Los stacks de LLM local exponen un flag unificado de KV-cache comprimido para H2 2026
title_locales.fil: Local-LLM stacks maglalantad ng unified compressed-KV-cache flag pagsapit ng H2 2026

detail.summary_short: Parallel work across SGLang, vLLM, llama.cpp, and Microsoft's Foundry Local plus TurboQuant + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress points to a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob across every major local-LLM stack by H2 2026, with Foundry Local shipping native TurboQuant tied to WinML execution providers.

summary_short_locales.en: Parallel work across SGLang, vLLM, llama.cpp, and Microsoft's Foundry Local plus TurboQuant + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress points to a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob across every major local-LLM stack by H2 2026, with Foundry Local shipping native TurboQuant tied to WinML execution providers.
summary_short_locales.ja: SGLang、vLLM、llama.cpp、MicrosoftのFoundry Local間の並行作業に加え、TurboQuant + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpressが、2026年下半期までにすべての主要なローカルLLMスタック横断で統一された圧縮KVキャッシュデプロイメントノブを示唆し、Foundry LocalはWinML実行プロバイダに紐付いたネイティブTurboQuantを出荷する。
summary_short_locales.es: El trabajo paralelo en SGLang, vLLM, llama.cpp y Foundry Local de Microsoft junto con TurboQuant + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress apunta hacia un knob unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimido en cada stack mayor de LLM local para H2 2026, con Foundry Local lanzando TurboQuant nativo atado a los execution providers de WinML.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang parallel work sa SGLang, vLLM, llama.cpp, at Microsoft's Foundry Local kasama ang TurboQuant + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress ay tumuturo sa unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob sa bawat pangunahing local-LLM stack pagsapit ng H2 2026, na ang Foundry Local ay nagpapadala ng native TurboQuant na nakatali sa WinML execution providers.

bridges.text: SGLang's measured throughput lead and day-0 model coverage plus Unsloth + NVIDIA DGX Spark + Hugging Face joint engineering reinforce the precondition that the local-LLM ecosystem has the kernel-level performance maturity needed before a unified compressed-KV-cache knob lands across the stack.

text_locales.en: SGLang's measured throughput lead and day-0 model coverage plus Unsloth + NVIDIA DGX Spark + Hugging Face joint engineering reinforce the precondition that the local-LLM ecosystem has the kernel-level performance maturity needed before a unified compressed-KV-cache knob lands across the stack.
text_locales.ja: SGLangの計測されたスループット優位とday-0モデル・カバレッジ + Unsloth + NVIDIA DGX Spark + Hugging Face共同エンジニアリングが、ローカルLLMエコシステムが、統一された圧縮KVキャッシュ・ノブがスタック全体に着地する前に必要なカーネルレベルの性能成熟度を持つという前提条件を強化している。
text_locales.es: La ventaja de rendimiento medida de SGLang y la cobertura de modelo day-0 más la ingeniería conjunta Unsloth + NVIDIA DGX Spark + Hugging Face refuerzan la precondición de que el ecosistema local-LLM tiene la madurez de rendimiento a nivel de kernel necesaria antes de que un knob unificado de KV-cache comprimido aterrice en la pila.
text_locales.fil: Ang sinukat na throughput lead at day-0 model coverage ng SGLang plus Unsloth + NVIDIA DGX Spark + Hugging Face joint engineering ay nagpapatibay sa precondition na ang local-LLM ecosystem ay may kernel-level performance maturity na kailangan bago lumapag ang unified compressed-KV-cache knob sa buong stack.

bridges.text: SGLang's fused Triton kernels at parity with bf16, the active llama.cpp TurboQuant thread, Foundry Local at GA on Windows ML, and the SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBench wave compose the same multi-stack convergence the prediction names. The TurboQuant-plus-alternative pattern is now visible in code, papers, and Windows-default deployment substrate at once.

text_locales.en: SGLang's fused Triton kernels at parity with bf16, the active llama.cpp TurboQuant thread, Foundry Local at GA on Windows ML, and the SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBench wave compose the same multi-stack convergence the prediction names. The TurboQuant-plus-alternative pattern is now visible in code, papers, and Windows-default deployment substrate at once.
text_locales.ja: SGLangのフューズドTriton kernelがbf16とパリティ、アクティブなllama.cpp TurboQuantスレッド、Foundry LocalがWindows MLでGA、SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBenchウェーブが、予測が命名するのと同じマルチスタック収束を構成する。TurboQuantプラス代替パターンは今や、コード、論文、Windowsデフォルト展開基盤で同時に可視化されている。
text_locales.es: Los kernels Triton fusionados de SGLang en paridad con bf16, el hilo activo de TurboQuant de llama.cpp, Foundry Local en GA sobre Windows ML, y la ola SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBench componen la misma convergencia multi-stack que la predicción nombra. El patrón TurboQuant-más-alternativa ahora es visible en código, papers, y sustrato de despliegue por defecto de Windows a la vez.
text_locales.fil: Ang fused Triton kernels ng SGLang sa parity ng bf16, ang aktibong llama.cpp TurboQuant thread, Foundry Local sa GA sa Windows ML, at ang SideQuest / DepthKV / PolyKV / KVFundaBench wave ay bumubuo ng parehong multi-stack convergence na pinapangalanan ng prediction. Ang TurboQuant-plus-alternative pattern ay nakikita na ngayon sa code, papers, at Windows-default deployment substrate nang sabay-sabay.

bridges.text: SGLang's near-bf16 fused-Triton numbers, the active llama.cpp thread, NVIDIA kvpress, and PolyKV continue to compose the precondition stack the prediction names; Foundry Local remains positioned exactly where a Windows-default TurboQuant flag would land.

text_locales.en: SGLang's near-bf16 fused-Triton numbers, the active llama.cpp thread, NVIDIA kvpress, and PolyKV continue to compose the precondition stack the prediction names; Foundry Local remains positioned exactly where a Windows-default TurboQuant flag would land.
text_locales.ja: SGLangのbf16近似Fused-Triton数値、アクティブなllama.cppスレッド、NVIDIA kvpress、PolyKVが、予測が指名する前提条件スタックを引き続き構成している;Foundry Localは、WindowsデフォルトTurboQuantフラグが着地する正にその位置に残っている。
text_locales.es: Los números casi-bf16 fused-Triton de SGLang, el hilo activo de llama.cpp, NVIDIA kvpress, y PolyKV continúan componiendo la pila de precondiciones que la predicción nombra; Foundry Local sigue posicionado exactamente donde aterrizaría un flag TurboQuant por defecto de Windows.
text_locales.fil: Ang malapit-sa-bf16 fused-Triton numbers ng SGLang, ang aktibong llama.cpp thread, ang NVIDIA kvpress, at ang PolyKV ay patuloy na bumubuo ng precondition stack na pinangalanan ng prediction; ang Foundry Local ay nananatiling eksaktong nakapwesto kung saan lalapag ang Windows-default TurboQuant flag.

bridges.text: Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Toolkit GA + Foundry Toolbox preview + Observability in Foundry Control Plane GA dense the Windows-default integration substrate the prediction's TurboQuant-tied-to-WinML thesis depends on, while SGLang #23134's fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite + #21419 carry the cross-stack adoption pattern. Strong reinforcing signal.

text_locales.en: Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Toolkit GA + Foundry Toolbox preview + Observability in Foundry Control Plane GA dense the Windows-default integration substrate the prediction's TurboQuant-tied-to-WinML thesis depends on, while SGLang #23134's fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite + #21419 carry the cross-stack adoption pattern. Strong reinforcing signal.
text_locales.ja: 4月30日のMicrosoft Foundry Toolkit GA+Foundry Toolboxプレビュー+Foundry Control Plane Observability GAは、予測のTurboQuant tied to WinMLテーゼが依拠するWindowsデフォルト統合基盤を高密度化する一方、SGLang #23134のfused-Triton-decodeカーネル書き換え+#21419はクロススタック採用パターンを担う。強い強化シグナル。
text_locales.es: Microsoft Foundry Toolkit GA del 30 abr + Foundry Toolbox preview + Observability en Foundry Control Plane GA densifican el sustrato de integración Windows-default sobre el cual depende la tesis de la predicción de TurboQuant-atado-a-WinML, mientras que la rescritura del fused-Triton-decode kernel de SGLang #23134 + #21419 acarrean el patrón de adopción cross-stack. Señal de refuerzo fuerte.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Toolkit GA + Foundry Toolbox preview + Observability sa Foundry Control Plane GA ay nagpapatindi ng Windows-default integration substrate na pinanindigan ng TurboQuant-tied-to-WinML thesis ng prediction, habang ang fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite ng SGLang #23134 + #21419 ay nagdadala ng cross-stack adoption pattern. Strong reinforcing signal.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
detail.prediction_summary: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、すべての主要なローカルLLMエコシステム(vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local)が統一された圧縮KVキャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも1つの代替案 — を公開し、Foundry Local(Microsoft、4月9日GA)はWindows ML / WinML実行プロバイダに紐付いたネイティブTurboQuant統合をWindowsデフォルト最適化として出荷する。** 4月27-29日のエビデンス:SGLang PR #21419がインツリー化、SGLang #23134のfused-Triton-decodeカーネル書き換えがbf16スループットの93–105%に到達、vLLM v0.19.0(4月2日)はtorch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラがデフォルト + Model Runner V2、PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971、4月27日)はマルチエージェント推論向けの共有非対称KVプール、NVIDIA kvpressはDecoding-Press成熟度、llama.cpp #20969のTurboQuant議論スレッドがアクティブ、Unsloth 2026.4.8の推論が20-30%高速化。Foundry Localは欠けていたエンタープライズWindowsエントリポイントである — Microsoftはこれをハードウェア対応のWinML実行プロバイダで任意のアプリにローカルAIをバンドルする約20MBのネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年Q2の明らかな次の一歩はFoundry CatalogでTurboQuantフラグを公開することである。経済的な強制要因はMag 7 capexテープと同じである:FP16から3.5ビットに移行するメモリ帯域幅律速の長文脈ワークロードはすべてトークンあたりの実効コストを約5-6倍削減し、Foundry Localはその切替をエンドデベロッパーに対して不可視にする。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para H2 2026 cada ecosistema mayor de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un knob unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimido — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9 abr) lanza integración nativa de TurboQuant atada a los execution providers de Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia del 27-29 abr: el PR #21419 de SGLang está in-tree; la rescritura de fused-Triton-decode kernel de SGLang #23134 alcanza 93–105% del throughput bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2 abr) trae torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27 abr) es un pool compartido asimétrico de KV para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press; el hilo #20969 de discusión de TurboQuant en llama.cpp está activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial-Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo envía como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con execution providers de WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag de TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag 7: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pasa de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores finales. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang bawat pangunahing local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ay maglalantad ng unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternatibo — at ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ay magpapadala ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 ebidensiya: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite na umabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress sa Decoding-Press maturity; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% mas mabilis. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ipinapadala ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nagbubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang malinaw na susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay ang paglalantad ng TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lumilipat mula FP16 papuntang 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawa ng Foundry Local na hindi nakikita ng end-developer ang switch na iyon.

nodes.label: Unsloth 2026 stack lands as hyperscaler-managed fine-tuning service by H2 2026
nodes.short_label: Unsloth 2026 stack lands as hyperscaler-managed fine-tuning service by H2 2026
nodes.title: Unsloth 2026 stack lands as hyperscaler-managed fine-tuning service by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Unsloth 2026アップデートの波 — 12倍高速MoE学習 + 超ロングコンテキスト強化学習 + 1.8〜3.3倍高速 embedding / BERT / 分類器学習でVRAM 20%削減 + コンテキスト2倍長(Hugging Face共同エンジニアリング) + Unsloth Studio 3月17日 100%オフラインGGUF + Safetensorsランタイム + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garageファインチューニング・ガイド(RTXラップトップ性能2.5倍向上) — がSGLangのH100上での29%スループット優位(RadixAttentionプレフィックスキャッシュをvLLMと共有、約16,200 vs 約12,500 tok/s) + SGLangのMiMo-V2-Flash、Nemotron 3 Nano、Mistral Large 3、LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion、MiniMax M2へのday-0サポート + 4月28日〜5月3日のKVキャッシュarxiv波(SideQuest、DepthKV、KVFundaBench)と組み合わさり、コンシューマーGPU学習をエンタープライズGPU 2024ベースラインと運用上同等にする。1社以上のハイパースケーラー(AWS Bedrock fine-tuning、Azure AI Foundry、またはGoogle Vertex AI)が、コンシューマーGPU → エンタープライズ・ファインチューニング間のギャップを埋めるため、AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Igniteのサイクルまでに、マネージド・ランタイム + IAM + 監査 + コスト最適化GPUプールを伴うマネージドUnsloth-as-a-serviceティアを出荷することが期待される。** 強制関数は調達摩擦の非対称性: 内部Unslothパイロットを持つ企業はコンシューマーGPUで既にVRAM 70%削減の経済性を得ているが、エンタープライズのセキュリティ + ガバナンス要件には、オープンソースCLIでは提供できないマネージド・コントロールプレーンが必要となる。最初に出荷したハイパースケーラーが移行需要を吸収する。Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AIはいずれもランタイム基盤を持っており、欠けているピースは、オープンソースカーネル性能とマネージドIAMエンタープライズ・ガバナンスを統合するファインチューニング・アズ・ア・サービスのサーフェスである。In plain language: ローカルLLM学習は今や2倍高速でVRAMも70%少なくて済む — 近いうちに大手クラウドがそれをマネージドサービスとして貸し出すだろう。In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para H2 2026, la ola de actualización Unsloth 2026 — entrenamiento MoE 12x más rápido + Reinforcement Learning de contexto ultra-largo + entrenamiento de embedding / BERT / clasificador 1.8-3.3x más rápido con 20% menos VRAM y contexto 2x más largo (ingeniería conjunta con Hugging Face) + Unsloth Studio del 17 de marzo con runtime GGUF + Safetensors 100% offline + guía de fine-tuning RTX-AI Garage de NVIDIA DGX Spark (rendimiento de portátil RTX hasta 2.5x) — combinado con la ventaja de rendimiento del 29% de SGLang en H100 (caché de prefijo RadixAttention compartido con vLLM en ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + soporte day-0 de SGLang para MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + la ola arxiv KV-cache del 28 de abril al 3 de mayo (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) hace que el entrenamiento en GPU de consumo sea operativamente equivalente a la línea base de GPU empresarial de 2024; se espera que ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) entregue un nivel gestionado de Unsloth-as-a-service con runtime gestionado + IAM + auditoría + pool de GPU optimizado en costo para cerrar la brecha entre fine-tuning en GPU de consumo → empresarial antes de los ciclos de AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite.** La función forzante es la asimetría de fricción de adquisición: las empresas con pilotos internos de Unsloth ya ven la economía de reducción del 70% de VRAM en GPUs de consumo, pero la seguridad + gobernanza empresarial demanda un plano de control gestionado que el CLI open-source no proporciona; el hyperscaler que entregue primero absorbe la migración. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI tienen todos el sustrato de runtime; la pieza que falta es la superficie de fine-tuning-as-a-service que unifica el rendimiento del kernel open-source con la gobernanza empresarial de IAM gestionada. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training na may 20% less VRAM at 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — pinagsama sa SGLang 29% throughput advantage sa H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared sa vLLM sa ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support para sa MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + ang Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) ay ginagawang operationally equivalent ang consumer-GPU training sa enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; inaasahan na ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) ang magpapadala ng managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier na may managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool upang isara ang consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap bago ang AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Ang forcing function ay ang procurement-friction asymmetry: ang mga enterprises na may panloob na Unsloth pilots ay nakakita na ng 70%-VRAM-reduction economics sa consumer GPUs, ngunit ang enterprise security + governance ay humihingi ng managed control plane na hindi maibibigay ng open-source CLI; sinumang hyperscaler ang unang magpapadala ay sumusubsob sa migration. Ang Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI ay lahat may runtime substrate; ang nawawalang piraso ay ang fine-tuning-as-a-service surface na nagbubuklod sa open-source kernel performance sa managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

detail.summary_short: Unsloth's 2026 wave (12x MoE training, 1.8-3.3x faster BERT/embedding with 20% less VRAM via joint Hugging Face work) plus NVIDIA DGX Spark guidance and SGLang's 29% H100 throughput lead make consumer-GPU training match the 2024 enterprise-GPU baseline. By H2 2026 a hyperscaler is expected to ship a managed Unsloth fine-tuning tier.

summary_short_locales.en: Unsloth's 2026 wave (12x MoE training, 1.8-3.3x faster BERT/embedding with 20% less VRAM via joint Hugging Face work) plus NVIDIA DGX Spark guidance and SGLang's 29% H100 throughput lead make consumer-GPU training match the 2024 enterprise-GPU baseline. By H2 2026 a hyperscaler is expected to ship a managed Unsloth fine-tuning tier.
summary_short_locales.ja: Unslothの2026年波(12倍MoE学習、Hugging Face共同作業によりVRAM 20%減で1.8〜3.3倍高速のBERT/embedding) + NVIDIA DGX Sparkガイダンス + SGLangのH100 29%スループット優位が、コンシューマーGPU学習を2024年エンタープライズGPUベースラインに到達させる。2026年下半期までに、ハイパースケーラーがマネージドUnslothファインチューニング・ティアを出荷することが期待される。
summary_short_locales.es: La ola 2026 de Unsloth (entrenamiento MoE 12x, BERT/embedding 1.8-3.3x más rápido con 20% menos VRAM mediante trabajo conjunto con Hugging Face) más la guía de NVIDIA DGX Spark y la ventaja de rendimiento del 29% en H100 de SGLang hacen que el entrenamiento en GPU de consumo iguale la línea base de GPU empresarial de 2024. Para H2 2026 se espera que un hyperscaler entregue un nivel gestionado de fine-tuning Unsloth.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang 2026 wave ng Unsloth (12x MoE training, 1.8-3.3x faster BERT/embedding na may 20% less VRAM sa pamamagitan ng joint Hugging Face work) plus ang NVIDIA DGX Spark guidance at ang 29% H100 throughput lead ng SGLang ay nagpapatugma sa consumer-GPU training sa 2024 enterprise-GPU baseline. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, inaasahan na magpadala ang isang hyperscaler ng managed Unsloth fine-tuning tier.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Unsloth 2026アップデートの波 — 12倍高速MoE学習 + 超ロングコンテキスト強化学習 + 1.8〜3.3倍高速 embedding / BERT / 分類器学習でVRAM 20%削減 + コンテキスト2倍長(Hugging Face共同エンジニアリング) + Unsloth Studio 3月17日 100%オフラインGGUF + Safetensorsランタイム + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garageファインチューニング・ガイド(RTXラップトップ性能2.5倍向上) — がSGLangのH100上での29%スループット優位(RadixAttentionプレフィックスキャッシュをvLLMと共有、約16,200 vs 約12,500 tok/s) + SGLangのMiMo-V2-Flash、Nemotron 3 Nano、Mistral Large 3、LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion、MiniMax M2へのday-0サポート + 4月28日〜5月3日のKVキャッシュarxiv波(SideQuest、DepthKV、KVFundaBench)と組み合わさり、コンシューマーGPU学習をエンタープライズGPU 2024ベースラインと運用上同等にする。1社以上のハイパースケーラー(AWS Bedrock fine-tuning、Azure AI Foundry、またはGoogle Vertex AI)が、コンシューマーGPU → エンタープライズ・ファインチューニング間のギャップを埋めるため、AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Igniteのサイクルまでに、マネージド・ランタイム + IAM + 監査 + コスト最適化GPUプールを伴うマネージドUnsloth-as-a-serviceティアを出荷することが期待される。** 強制関数は調達摩擦の非対称性: 内部Unslothパイロットを持つ企業はコンシューマーGPUで既にVRAM 70%削減の経済性を得ているが、エンタープライズのセキュリティ + ガバナンス要件には、オープンソースCLIでは提供できないマネージド・コントロールプレーンが必要となる。最初に出荷したハイパースケーラーが移行需要を吸収する。Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AIはいずれもランタイム基盤を持っており、欠けているピースは、オープンソースカーネル性能とマネージドIAMエンタープライズ・ガバナンスを統合するファインチューニング・アズ・ア・サービスのサーフェスである。In plain language: ローカルLLM学習は今や2倍高速でVRAMも70%少なくて済む — 近いうちに大手クラウドがそれをマネージドサービスとして貸し出すだろう。In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para H2 2026, la ola de actualización Unsloth 2026 — entrenamiento MoE 12x más rápido + Reinforcement Learning de contexto ultra-largo + entrenamiento de embedding / BERT / clasificador 1.8-3.3x más rápido con 20% menos VRAM y contexto 2x más largo (ingeniería conjunta con Hugging Face) + Unsloth Studio del 17 de marzo con runtime GGUF + Safetensors 100% offline + guía de fine-tuning RTX-AI Garage de NVIDIA DGX Spark (rendimiento de portátil RTX hasta 2.5x) — combinado con la ventaja de rendimiento del 29% de SGLang en H100 (caché de prefijo RadixAttention compartido con vLLM en ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + soporte day-0 de SGLang para MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + la ola arxiv KV-cache del 28 de abril al 3 de mayo (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) hace que el entrenamiento en GPU de consumo sea operativamente equivalente a la línea base de GPU empresarial de 2024; se espera que ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) entregue un nivel gestionado de Unsloth-as-a-service con runtime gestionado + IAM + auditoría + pool de GPU optimizado en costo para cerrar la brecha entre fine-tuning en GPU de consumo → empresarial antes de los ciclos de AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite.** La función forzante es la asimetría de fricción de adquisición: las empresas con pilotos internos de Unsloth ya ven la economía de reducción del 70% de VRAM en GPUs de consumo, pero la seguridad + gobernanza empresarial demanda un plano de control gestionado que el CLI open-source no proporciona; el hyperscaler que entregue primero absorbe la migración. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI tienen todos el sustrato de runtime; la pieza que falta es la superficie de fine-tuning-as-a-service que unifica el rendimiento del kernel open-source con la gobernanza empresarial de IAM gestionada. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training na may 20% less VRAM at 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — pinagsama sa SGLang 29% throughput advantage sa H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared sa vLLM sa ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support para sa MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + ang Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) ay ginagawang operationally equivalent ang consumer-GPU training sa enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; inaasahan na ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) ang magpapadala ng managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier na may managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool upang isara ang consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap bago ang AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Ang forcing function ay ang procurement-friction asymmetry: ang mga enterprises na may panloob na Unsloth pilots ay nakakita na ng 70%-VRAM-reduction economics sa consumer GPUs, ngunit ang enterprise security + governance ay humihingi ng managed control plane na hindi maibibigay ng open-source CLI; sinumang hyperscaler ang unang magpapadala ay sumusubsob sa migration. Ang Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI ay lahat may runtime substrate; ang nawawalang piraso ay ang fine-tuning-as-a-service surface na nagbubuklod sa open-source kernel performance sa managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:
