description.en: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **GGUFのサプライチェーンが新たな戦場になる。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(GGUF経由のJinja2 SSTIによるRCE)は、「モデルファイル自体が実行可能コードのキャリアである」という事実を可視化した。2026年Q3までに、Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScopeはmodel-card + chat_templateの署名検証またはサンドボックス実行をベースラインとして要求するようになる。Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLMはGGUFロード時のSSTIスキャンをデフォルトで有効化する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Las cadenas de suministro de GGUF son el nuevo campo de batalla.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (SSTI de Jinja2 a través de GGUF, RCE) hace visible el hecho de que "los propios archivos de modelo son portadores de código ejecutable". Para el Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope exigirán verificación de firma de model-card + chat_template o ejecución en sandbox como base; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM activarán el escaneo de SSTI por defecto en el momento de carga de GGUF. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang GGUF supply chains ang bagong battleground.** Ginagawang nakikita ng SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI sa pamamagitan ng GGUF, RCE) ang katotohanan na "ang model files mismo ay carriers ng executable code." Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, hihilingin ng Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope ang model-card + chat_template signature verification o sandboxed execution bilang baseline; i-eenable ng Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM ang SSTI scanning bilang default sa oras ng GGUF load. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ships a Jinja2 SSTI in GGUF chat_template parsing yielding RCE on model load.
reasoning.given: GGUF files embed executable templates, so model artifacts function as carriers of arbitrary code.
reasoning.so_that: Hubs gate uploads behind signed model-cards and chat_templates, and serving runtimes scan for SSTI at GGUF load time.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; HF / Ollama / ModelScope + Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM.
reasoning.plain_language: A bug in SGLang shows model files can hide harmful code, so big model hubs and inference servers will start checking them before running.

because.en: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ships a Jinja2 SSTI in GGUF chat_template parsing yielding RCE on model load.
because.ja: SGLang CVE-2026-5760は、GGUFのchat_templateパース処理にJinja2 SSTIを内包しており、モデルロード時にRCEを引き起こす。
because.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 incluye un SSTI de Jinja2 en el análisis de chat_template de GGUF que produce RCE al cargar el modelo.
because.fil: Naglalathala ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ng Jinja2 SSTI sa GGUF chat_template parsing na nagdudulot ng RCE sa model load.

given.en: GGUF files embed executable templates, so model artifacts function as carriers of arbitrary code.
given.ja: GGUFファイルは実行可能なテンプレートを埋め込んでいるため、モデルアーティファクトは任意コードのキャリアとして機能する。
given.es: Los archivos GGUF incrustan plantillas ejecutables, por lo que los artefactos del modelo funcionan como portadores de código arbitrario.
given.fil: Ang GGUF files ay nag-eembed ng executable templates, kaya ang model artifacts ay gumagana bilang carriers ng arbitrary code.

so_that.en: Hubs gate uploads behind signed model-cards and chat_templates, and serving runtimes scan for SSTI at GGUF load time.
so_that.ja: ハブは署名済みmodel-cardとchat_templateの背後でアップロードをゲーティングし、サービングランタイムはGGUFロード時にSSTIをスキャンする。
so_that.es: Los hubs filtran las cargas tras model-cards y chat_templates firmados, y los runtimes de servicio escanean en busca de SSTI en el momento de carga de GGUF.
so_that.fil: Ang hubs ay nag-gate ng uploads sa likod ng signed model-cards at chat_templates, at ang serving runtimes ay nag-scan para sa SSTI sa oras ng GGUF load.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; HF / Ollama / ModelScope + Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM.
landing.ja: 2026年Q3まで; HF / Ollama / ModelScope + Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM。
landing.es: Para el Q3 2026; HF / Ollama / ModelScope + Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; HF / Ollama / ModelScope + Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM.

plain_language.en: A bug in SGLang shows model files can hide harmful code, so big model hubs and inference servers will start checking them before running.
plain_language.ja: SGLangのバグはモデルファイルが有害コードを隠せることを示しており、大手モデルハブと推論サーバーは実行前にチェックを開始する。
plain_language.es: Un fallo en SGLang muestra que los archivos de modelo pueden ocultar código dañino, así que los grandes hubs de modelos y servidores de inferencia comenzarán a verificarlos antes de ejecutarlos.
plain_language.fil: Ipinapakita ng isang bug sa SGLang na maaaring magtago ang model files ng nakakapinsalang code, kaya magsisimulang i-check ng malalaking model hubs at inference servers ang mga ito bago patakbuhin.

detail.summary_short: SGLang CVE-2026-5760, a Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF chat_template parsing, shows that model files carry executable code. By Q3 2026, Hugging Face, Ollama, and ModelScope are expected to require signed model-cards or sandboxes, and Foundry Local, Bedrock, and vLLM to enable SSTI scanning at GGUF load.

summary_short_locales.en: SGLang CVE-2026-5760, a Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF chat_template parsing, shows that model files carry executable code. By Q3 2026, Hugging Face, Ollama, and ModelScope are expected to require signed model-cards or sandboxes, and Foundry Local, Bedrock, and vLLM to enable SSTI scanning at GGUF load.
summary_short_locales.ja: SGLang CVE-2026-5760(GGUFのchat_templateパース経由のJinja2 SSTI)は、モデルファイルが実行可能コードを運んでいることを示した。2026年Q3までに、Hugging Face、Ollama、ModelScopeは署名済みmodel-cardまたはサンドボックスを要求し、Foundry Local、Bedrock、vLLMはGGUFロード時のSSTIスキャンを有効化する見込みだ。
summary_short_locales.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760, un SSTI de Jinja2 a través del análisis de chat_template de GGUF, muestra que los archivos de modelo llevan código ejecutable. Para el Q3 2026, se espera que Hugging Face, Ollama y ModelScope exijan model-cards firmados o sandboxes, y que Foundry Local, Bedrock y vLLM activen el escaneo de SSTI en la carga de GGUF.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760, isang Jinja2 SSTI sa pamamagitan ng GGUF chat_template parsing, ay nagpapakita na ang model files ay nagdadala ng executable code. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Hugging Face, Ollama, at ModelScope ay inaasahang hihiling ng signed model-cards o sandboxes, at ang Foundry Local, Bedrock, at vLLM ay mag-eenable ng SSTI scanning sa GGUF load.

bridges.text: SGLang's GGUF-borne Jinja2 SSTI staying exploitable 10+ days after disclosure makes the prediction's premise — that model files are executable carriers — the operative defect this week, hardening the structural cause behind chat-template verification as a baseline.

text_locales.en: SGLang's GGUF-borne Jinja2 SSTI staying exploitable 10+ days after disclosure makes the prediction's premise — that model files are executable carriers — the operative defect this week, hardening the structural cause behind chat-template verification as a baseline.
text_locales.ja: SGLang の GGUF 由来の Jinja2 SSTI が公開後 10 日以上にわたって悪用可能なままであることは、予測の前提 — モデルファイルは実行可能なキャリアである — を今週の作動的欠陥とし、chat-template 検証をベースラインとする構造的原因を硬化させている。
text_locales.es: El SSTI Jinja2 transportado por GGUF de SGLang manteniéndose explotable más de 10 días después de la divulgación hace que la premisa de la predicción — que los archivos de modelo son portadores ejecutables — sea el defecto operativo de esta semana, endureciendo la causa estructural detrás de la verificación de chat-template como línea base.
text_locales.fil: Ang GGUF-borne Jinja2 SSTI ng SGLang na nananatiling exploitable 10+ araw matapos ang disclosure ay ginagawang operative defect ng linggong ito ang premise ng prediction — na ang model files ay executable carriers — na nagpapatatag sa structural cause sa likod ng chat-template verification bilang baseline.

bridges.text: SGLang remaining unpatched after the disclosure window plus cross-vendor copy-paste-vulnerability framing makes the prediction's premise — that model files are executable carriers — visibly load-bearing this week. Strong signal on the structural cause.

text_locales.en: SGLang remaining unpatched after the disclosure window plus cross-vendor copy-paste-vulnerability framing makes the prediction's premise — that model files are executable carriers — visibly load-bearing this week. Strong signal on the structural cause.
text_locales.ja: SGLang が開示ウィンドウを過ぎても未パッチのままである点に加え、ベンダーをまたぐコピーアンドペースト脆弱性のフレーミングが、予測の前提 — モデルファイルが実行可能なキャリアであるという点 — を今週、可視的に荷重を支える存在にしている。構造的な原因に対するシグナルは強い。
text_locales.es: SGLang sin parchear después de la ventana de divulgación más el encuadre de copy-paste-vulnerability cross-vendor hace que la premisa de la predicción — que los archivos de modelo son portadores ejecutables — sea visiblemente determinante esta semana. Señal fuerte sobre la causa estructural.
text_locales.fil: Ang SGLang na nananatiling hindi na-patch pagkatapos ng disclosure window kasama ang cross-vendor copy-paste-vulnerability framing ay ginagawang nakikitang load-bearing ngayong linggo ang premise ng prediction — na ang model files ay executable carriers. Malakas na signal sa structural cause.

bridges.text: The Hacker News' SGLang CVE-2026-5760 walkthrough of Jinja2 SSTI in `tokenizer.chat_template` with a public PoC at github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE and CERT/CC VU#915947 issued without an upstream patch makes the GGUF-as-executable-carrier risk concrete, while no Hugging Face, Ollama, or ModelScope template-signing default ships inside the window.

text_locales.en: The Hacker News' SGLang CVE-2026-5760 walkthrough of Jinja2 SSTI in `tokenizer.chat_template` with a public PoC at github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE and CERT/CC VU#915947 issued without an upstream patch makes the GGUF-as-executable-carrier risk concrete, while no Hugging Face, Ollama, or ModelScope template-signing default ships inside the window.
text_locales.ja: The Hacker NewsのSGLang CVE-2026-5760ウォークスルー(`tokenizer.chat_template`内のJinja2 SSTI、github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCEでの公開PoCと、上流パッチなしで発行されたCERT/CC VU#915947付き)が、GGUFを実行可能キャリアとするリスクを具体化する一方、Hugging Face、Ollama、ModelScopeのテンプレート署名デフォルトはウィンドウ内に出荷されない。
text_locales.es: El walkthrough de The Hacker News de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 con Jinja2 SSTI en `tokenizer.chat_template` con un PoC público en github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE y CERT/CC VU#915947 emitido sin un parche upstream concreta el riesgo GGUF-como-portador-ejecutable, mientras que ningún default de firma de plantilla de Hugging Face, Ollama o ModelScope llega dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang The Hacker News' SGLang CVE-2026-5760 walkthrough ng Jinja2 SSTI sa `tokenizer.chat_template` na may public PoC sa github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE at CERT/CC VU#915947 na inilabas nang walang upstream patch ay nagpapakita ng GGUF-as-executable-carrier risk na konkreto, habang walang Hugging Face, Ollama, o ModelScope template-signing default na ipinadala sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: Picus Security's missing-middleware root cause, Dark Reading's first-of-its-kind MCP-integration framing, BleepingComputer's active-exploitation confirmation, and The Hacker News' MCPwn writeup together expose the protocol-as-supply-chain risk parallel to GGUF, but no Hugging Face / Ollama / ModelScope template-signing or sandboxed-execution default ships inside the window.

text_locales.en: Picus Security's missing-middleware root cause, Dark Reading's first-of-its-kind MCP-integration framing, BleepingComputer's active-exploitation confirmation, and The Hacker News' MCPwn writeup together expose the protocol-as-supply-chain risk parallel to GGUF, but no Hugging Face / Ollama / ModelScope template-signing or sandboxed-execution default ships inside the window.
text_locales.ja: Picus Securityのミドルウェア欠落の根本原因、Dark Readingの初のMCP統合の枠組み、BleepingComputerのアクティブ・エクスプロイト確認、The Hacker NewsのMCPwn分析が、GGUFと並行するプロトコル=サプライチェーン・リスクを露呈しているが、ウィンドウ内ではHugging Face / Ollama / ModelScopeのテンプレート署名やサンドボックス実行デフォルトは出荷されていない。
text_locales.es: La causa raíz de middleware faltante de Picus Security, el encuadre primero-en-su-clase de integración MCP de Dark Reading, la confirmación de explotación activa de BleepingComputer y el writeup MCPwn de The Hacker News juntos exponen el riesgo protocolo-como-cadena-de-suministro paralelo a GGUF, pero ninguna política predeterminada de template-signing o ejecución sandboxed de Hugging Face / Ollama / ModelScope se envía dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang missing-middleware root cause ng Picus Security, ang first-of-its-kind MCP-integration framing ng Dark Reading, ang active-exploitation confirmation ng BleepingComputer, at ang MCPwn writeup ng The Hacker News ay magkakasamang naglalantad sa protocol-as-supply-chain risk na kahanay ng GGUF, ngunit walang Hugging Face / Ollama / ModelScope template-signing o sandboxed-execution default na ipinadala sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4's open-weight drop on Hugging Face with native 1M context, the persisting SGLang CVE-2026-5760 SSTI-through-GGUF advisory at CVSS 9.8 with no Q2 roadmap fix, and llama.cpp + Ollama Apr 23-24 releases shipping without signature-verification gates keep the structural fact alive that model artifacts ship executable templates while no hub-default mitigation lands.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4's open-weight drop on Hugging Face with native 1M context, the persisting SGLang CVE-2026-5760 SSTI-through-GGUF advisory at CVSS 9.8 with no Q2 roadmap fix, and llama.cpp + Ollama Apr 23-24 releases shipping without signature-verification gates keep the structural fact alive that model artifacts ship executable templates while no hub-default mitigation lands.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4のネイティブ1MコンテキストでのHugging Faceへのオープンウェイト投下、CVSS 9.8でQ2ロードマップ修正がないまま継続するSGLang CVE-2026-5760 SSTI-through-GGUFアドバイザリ、署名検証ゲートなしで出荷される4月23-24日のllama.cpp + Ollamaリリースが、モデル・アーティファクトが実行可能なテンプレートを出荷するという構造的事実を生かし続けている一方、ハブ・デフォルトの軽減策は登場していない。
text_locales.es: La caída de pesos abiertos de DeepSeek V4 en Hugging Face con contexto de 1M nativo, el aviso persistente de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 SSTI-vía-GGUF en CVSS 9.8 sin arreglo en el roadmap Q2, y los lanzamientos del 23-24 de abril de llama.cpp + Ollama enviando sin gates de verificación de firma mantienen vivo el hecho estructural de que los artefactos de modelo envían plantillas ejecutables mientras ninguna mitigación predeterminada por hub aterriza.
text_locales.fil: Ang open-weight drop ng DeepSeek V4 sa Hugging Face na may native 1M context, ang patuloy na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 SSTI-through-GGUF advisory sa CVSS 9.8 nang walang Q2 roadmap fix, at ang llama.cpp + Ollama Apr 23-24 releases na nagpapadala nang walang signature-verification gates ay nagpapanatiling buhay sa structural fact na ang model artifacts ay nagpapadala ng executable templates habang walang hub-default mitigation ang bumabagsak.

bridges.text: Qwen3.6-27B's simultaneous BF16 + FP8 drop on Hugging Face and ModelScope, with GGUF distribution running on llama.cpp without any signature-verification gate, keeps the structural fact alive that model artifacts ship executable templates, while the persistent SGLang CVE-2026-5760 advisory still has no hub-default mitigation answer.

text_locales.en: Qwen3.6-27B's simultaneous BF16 + FP8 drop on Hugging Face and ModelScope, with GGUF distribution running on llama.cpp without any signature-verification gate, keeps the structural fact alive that model artifacts ship executable templates, while the persistent SGLang CVE-2026-5760 advisory still has no hub-default mitigation answer.
text_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-27BのHugging FaceとModelScopeへの同時BF16 + FP8ドロップ、署名検証ゲートなしのllama.cppでのGGUF配布は、モデルアーティファクトが実行可能なテンプレートをリリースするという構造的事実を生かし続けており、一方で持続するSGLang CVE-2026-5760のアドバイザリは依然としてハブデフォルトの緩和策の答えを持っていない。
text_locales.es: El lanzamiento simultáneo BF16 + FP8 de Qwen3.6-27B en Hugging Face y ModelScope, con distribución GGUF ejecutándose en llama.cpp sin ningún gate de verificación de firma, mantiene viva el hecho estructural de que los artefactos de modelo envían plantillas ejecutables, mientras que el aviso persistente de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 todavía no tiene respuesta de mitigación predeterminada por hub.
text_locales.fil: Ang sabay-sabay na drop ng BF16 + FP8 ng Qwen3.6-27B sa Hugging Face at ModelScope, na may GGUF distribution na tumatakbo sa llama.cpp nang walang signature-verification gate, ay nagpapanatiling buhay sa structural fact na ang model artifacts ay nagpapadala ng executable templates, habang ang persistent SGLang CVE-2026-5760 advisory ay wala pa ring hub-default mitigation answer.

bridges.text: SGLang CVE-2026-5760's continued reporting and the explicit ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment mitigation recommendation reinforce the structural fact that GGUF chat_templates carry executable code on load, but no hub or serving runtime has yet announced default-on signature verification or sandboxed loading.

text_locales.en: SGLang CVE-2026-5760's continued reporting and the explicit ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment mitigation recommendation reinforce the structural fact that GGUF chat_templates carry executable code on load, but no hub or serving runtime has yet announced default-on signature verification or sandboxed loading.
text_locales.ja: SGLang CVE-2026-5760の継続報告と、明示的に推奨されるImmutableSandboxedEnvironmentによる緩和策は、GGUFのchat_templateがロード時に実行可能コードを運ぶという構造的事実を強化しているが、いずれのハブもサービングランタイムも、署名検証のデフォルト有効化やサンドボックスローディングを発表していない。
text_locales.es: El reporte continuo de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 y la recomendacion explicita de mitigacion ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment refuerzan el hecho estructural de que los chat_templates GGUF llevan codigo ejecutable al cargar, pero ningun hub o runtime de servicio ha anunciado aun verificacion de firma activada por defecto o carga sandboxed.
text_locales.fil: Ang patuloy na reporting ng SGLang CVE-2026-5760 at ang explicit ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment mitigation recommendation ay nagpapatibay sa structural fact na ang GGUF chat_templates ay nagdadala ng executable code sa load, ngunit walang hub o serving runtime ang nag-anunsyo pa ng default-on signature verification o sandboxed loading.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." prediction_summary_locales.en: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **GGUFのサプライチェーンが新たな戦場になる。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(GGUF経由のJinja2 SSTIによるRCE)は、「モデルファイル自体が実行可能コードのキャリアである」という事実を可視化した。2026年Q3までに、Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScopeはmodel-card + chat_templateの署名検証またはサンドボックス実行をベースラインとして要求するようになる。Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLMはGGUFロード時のSSTIスキャンをデフォルトで有効化する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Las cadenas de suministro de GGUF son el nuevo campo de batalla.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (SSTI de Jinja2 a través de GGUF, RCE) hace visible el hecho de que "los propios archivos de modelo son portadores de código ejecutable". Para el Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope exigirán verificación de firma de model-card + chat_template o ejecución en sandbox como base; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM activarán el escaneo de SSTI por defecto en el momento de carga de GGUF. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang GGUF supply chains ang bagong battleground.** Ginagawang nakikita ng SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI sa pamamagitan ng GGUF, RCE) ang katotohanan na "ang model files mismo ay carriers ng executable code." Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, hihilingin ng Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope ang model-card + chat_template signature verification o sandboxed execution bilang baseline; i-eenable ng Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM ang SSTI scanning bilang default sa oras ng GGUF load. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Frontier cyber-AI export-control category emerges by Q3 2026
nodes.short_label: Frontier cyber-AI export-control category emerges by Q3 2026
nodes.title: Frontier cyber-AI export-control category emerges by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills. In plain language: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.en: Frontier cyber-AI export-control category emerges by Q3 2026
title.ja: フロンティアのサイバーAI輸出規制カテゴリーが2026年Q3までに新設される
title.es: Surge categoría de control de exportación para IA cibernética frontera para Q3 2026
title.fil: Lilitaw ang frontier cyber-AI export-control category pagsapit ng Q3 2026

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills. In plain language: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q3までに、4月7日のAnthropic Mythos PreviewのProject Glasswing下での発表(~50社のローンチパートナー + ~40の重要ソフトウェアインフラ組織 + $100Mの利用クレジット + $4Mのオープンソースセキュリティ寄付)、4月30日のBloombergによるNSA Project AetherのMythosと機密主権サイバーツールのベンチマーク開示、5月1日のPentagon CTO声明によるAnthropic排除リストとNSA Mythos関与の分離が、米国がフロンティアサイバー能力AI輸出規制カテゴリーを正式に定義する規制プルを生み出す。少なくとも1つの政府発出(Cat 5 part 2のデュアルユース暗号下のBIS商務省輸出規制規則、または並行するサイバー能力カテゴリー、NIST AI Cyber Center RFIフォローアップ、ホワイトハウス大統領令)がフロンティアサイバーAIをライセンス必須カテゴリーとして明示的に命名する。少なくとも他に2つのファウンデーションラボ(OpenAI、Google DeepMind、xAI、Mistral、Cohere)が、Glasswingパターンを反映する公開パートナーリスト開示を伴う同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷する。** 強制力はAether開示が表面化させた非対称性である。Pentagonが調達を拒否した同じモデルが、NSAが主権サイバーベンチマークで依存しているモデルだ。これにより、行政府が規制カテゴリーを未定義のままにすることは不可能となる。4月29日のCSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA権限 + ATT&CK v19の命名済み手法(MCPサーバー侵害、ツール呼び出し悪用)が開示側の規制インフラを提供する。最も抵抗の少ない経路はBISがCat 5下で規則を発出することだ。なぜなら30年のデュアルユース技術の前例があり、オープンソースのエージェントスキルを遅延させるFDA型の本格承認体制を切り出すことを避けられるからだ。平易な言葉で言えば: NSAがAnthropicの最強AIをMicrosoftバグ探しに借り始めたとき、米国政府は他に誰がそれを借りられるかを規制し始めなければならなくなった。
description.es: **Para Q3 2026, el lanzamiento del 7 de abril de Anthropic Mythos Preview bajo Project Glasswing (~50 socios de lanzamiento + ~40 organizaciones de software-infraestructura crítica + $100M en créditos de uso + $4M en donaciones de seguridad de código abierto) + la divulgación de Bloomberg del 30 de abril sobre el Project Aether de la NSA que evalúa Mythos contra herramientas cibernéticas soberanas clasificadas + la declaración del CTO del Pentágono del 1 de mayo separando la lista negra de Anthropic de la colaboración Mythos-NSA crea la presión regulatoria para que EE. UU. defina formalmente una categoría de control de exportación de IA de cibercapacidad frontera — al menos una emisión gubernamental (regla de control de exportación del BIS del Departamento de Comercio bajo Cat 5 parte 2 criptografía de doble uso o una categoría paralela de cibercapacidad, seguimiento de RFI del NIST AI Cyber Center, u orden ejecutiva de la Casa Blanca) nombra explícitamente la IA de cibercapacidad frontera como categoría que requiere licencia; al menos otros dos laboratorios de modelos fundacionales (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) entregan un programa comparable de distribución gated con divulgación pública de lista de socios reflejando el patrón de Glasswing.** La función forzante es la asimetría que la divulgación de Aether expone: el mismo modelo que el Pentágono se negó a contratar es del que la NSA depende para la evaluación de cibercapacidades soberanas, lo que hace imposible que el ejecutivo deje la categoría regulatoria sin definir; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI Foundation + las técnicas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 (compromiso de servidor MCP, abuso de invocación de herramientas) proveen la infraestructura regulatoria del lado de divulgación. El camino de menor resistencia es que el BIS emita una regla bajo Cat 5 porque tiene 30 años de precedente de tecnología de doble uso y evita tallar todo el régimen de aprobación tipo FDA que ralentizaría las habilidades de agentes de código abierto. En lenguaje sencillo: Cuando la NSA empezó a tomar prestada la IA más potente de Anthropic para encontrar bugs de Microsoft, el gobierno de EE. UU. tuvo que empezar a regular quién más puede tomarla prestada.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether na nag-bebenchmark ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na naghihiwalay ng Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na pormal na tukuyin ang isang frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — hindi bababa sa isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ang tahasang magpapangalan sa frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; hindi bababa sa dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ang maglalabas ng katumbas na gated-distribution program na may pampublikong partner-list disclosure na sumasalamin sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na inilantad ng Aether disclosure: ang parehong modelo na tinanggihang bilhin ng Pentagon ay ang umaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapahirap sa executive branch na iwanang hindi tinukoy ang regulatory category; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ang nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. Ang pinakamadaling daan ay maglabas ang BIS ng panuntunan sa ilalim ng Cat 5 dahil mayroon itong 30 taong dual-use-tech precedent at iniiwasan nito ang pagbabaha-bahagi ng buong FDA-style approval regime na magpapabagal sa open-source agent skills. Sa madaling salita: nang nagsimulang humiram ang NSA ng pinakamalakas na AI ng Anthropic para hanapin ang Microsoft bugs, kinailangang regulahin ng US government kung sino pa ang maaaring humiram nito.

summary.en: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills. In plain language: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it. En lenguaje sencillo: Cuando la NSA empezó a tomar prestada la IA más potente de Anthropic para encontrar bugs de Microsoft, el gobierno de EE. UU. tuvo que empezar a regular quién más puede tomarla prestada.
summary.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether na nag-bebenchmark ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na naghihiwalay ng Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na pormal na tukuyin ang isang frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — hindi bababa sa isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ang tahasang magpapangalan sa frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; hindi bababa sa dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ang maglalabas ng katumbas na gated-distribution program na may pampublikong partner-list disclosure na sumasalamin sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na inilantad ng Aether disclosure: ang parehong modelo na tinanggihang bilhin ng Pentagon ay ang umaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapahirap sa executive branch na iwanang hindi tinukoy ang regulatory category; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ang nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. Ang pinakamadaling daan ay maglabas ang BIS ng panuntunan sa ilalim ng Cat 5 dahil mayroon itong 30 taong dual-use-tech precedent at iniiwasan nito ang pagbabaha-bahagi ng buong FDA-style approval regime na magpapabagal sa open-source agent skills. Sa madaling salita: nang nagsimulang humiram ang NSA ng pinakamalakas na AI ng Anthropic para hanapin ang Microsoft bugs, kinailangang regulahin ng US government kung sino pa ang maaaring humiram nito.

reasoning.because: Bloomberg Apr 30 disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarks Anthropic Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools while the Pentagon excludes Anthropic from procurement.

reasoning.so_that: The executive branch defines a frontier cyber-capability category, and at least two more foundation labs publish Glasswing-style gated programs.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; one BIS rule, NIST AI Cyber Center follow-up, or executive order plus two parallel gated programs.
reasoning.plain_language: The NSA is using Anthropic's most powerful AI to hunt Microsoft bugs while the Pentagon refuses to buy it; the government will turn that contradiction into an export-license category.

because.en: Bloomberg Apr 30 disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarks Anthropic Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools while the Pentagon excludes Anthropic from procurement.
because.ja: Bloombergが4月30日に、PentagonがAnthropicを調達から排除する一方でNSA Project AetherがAnthropic Mythosを機密主権サイバーツールに対してベンチマークしていることを開示した。
because.es: Bloomberg divulgó el 30 de abril que el Project Aether de la NSA evalúa Anthropic Mythos contra herramientas cibernéticas soberanas clasificadas mientras el Pentágono excluye a Anthropic de la contratación.
because.fil: Inihayag ng Bloomberg noong Apr 30 na ang NSA Project Aether ay nagbe-benchmark ng Anthropic Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools habang inaalis ng Pentagon ang Anthropic mula sa procurement.

given.en: Mythos launched gated under Project Glasswing with ~50 partners, $100M credits, and $4M open-source donations, and CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 supply the disclosure infrastructure.
given.ja: MythosはProject Glasswing下で~50パートナー、$100Mクレジット、$4Mのオープンソース寄付でゲート付きで発表され、CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19が開示インフラを供給する。
given.es: Mythos se lanzó gated bajo Project Glasswing con ~50 socios, $100M en créditos y $4M en donaciones de código abierto, y CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 proveen la infraestructura de divulgación.
given.fil: Ang Mythos ay inilunsad nang gated sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing na may ~50 partners, $100M credits, at $4M open-source donations, at ang CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 ay naghahatid ng disclosure infrastructure.

so_that.en: The executive branch defines a frontier cyber-capability category, and at least two more foundation labs publish Glasswing-style gated programs.
so_that.ja: 行政府がフロンティアサイバー能力カテゴリーを定義し、少なくとも他に2つのファウンデーションラボがGlasswing型のゲート付きプログラムを公開する。
so_that.es: El ejecutivo defina una categoría de cibercapacidad frontera, y al menos dos laboratorios fundacionales más publiquen programas gated estilo Glasswing.
so_that.fil: Tinutukoy ng executive branch ang isang frontier cyber-capability category, at hindi bababa sa dalawa pang foundation labs ang maglalathala ng Glasswing-style gated programs.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; one BIS rule, NIST AI Cyber Center follow-up, or executive order plus two parallel gated programs.

landing.es: Para Q3 2026; una regla del BIS, seguimiento del NIST AI Cyber Center, u orden ejecutiva más dos programas gated paralelos.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; isang BIS rule, NIST AI Cyber Center follow-up, o executive order kasama ang dalawang parallel gated programs.

plain_language.en: The NSA is using Anthropic's most powerful AI to hunt Microsoft bugs while the Pentagon refuses to buy it; the government will turn that contradiction into an export-license category.
plain_language.ja: NSAはAnthropicの最強AIを使ってMicrosoftバグを狩っているのに、Pentagonはその購入を拒否している。政府はその矛盾を輸出ライセンスカテゴリーに変えるだろう。
plain_language.es: La NSA está usando la IA más potente de Anthropic para cazar bugs de Microsoft mientras el Pentágono se niega a comprarla; el gobierno convertirá esa contradicción en una categoría que requiere licencia de exportación.
plain_language.fil: Ginagamit ng NSA ang pinakamalakas na AI ng Anthropic para manghuli ng Microsoft bugs habang tumatangging bilhin ito ng Pentagon; gagawing export-license category ng gobyerno ang kontradiksyong iyon.

detail.summary_short: Apr 7 Mythos Preview under Project Glasswing, Apr 30 Bloomberg disclosure of NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos, and the May 1 Pentagon CTO carve-out compose a regulatory pull-forward. By Q3 2026 a BIS, NIST, or executive issuance is expected to name frontier cyber-AI as license-required, with two more labs shipping gated-distribution programs.

summary_short_locales.en: Apr 7 Mythos Preview under Project Glasswing, Apr 30 Bloomberg disclosure of NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos, and the May 1 Pentagon CTO carve-out compose a regulatory pull-forward. By Q3 2026 a BIS, NIST, or executive issuance is expected to name frontier cyber-AI as license-required, with two more labs shipping gated-distribution programs.
summary_short_locales.ja: 4月7日のProject Glasswing下のMythos Preview、4月30日のBloombergによるMythosをベンチマークするNSA Project Aetherの開示、5月1日のPentagon CTOの切り分けが、規制の前倒しを構成する。2026年Q3までに、BIS、NIST、または大統領令の発出がフロンティアサイバーAIをライセンス必須として命名し、さらに2つのラボがゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷することが見込まれる。
summary_short_locales.es: El Mythos Preview del 7 de abril bajo Project Glasswing, la divulgación de Bloomberg del 30 de abril sobre el Project Aether de la NSA evaluando Mythos, y la salvaguarda del CTO del Pentágono del 1 de mayo componen un empuje regulatorio. Para Q3 2026 se espera una emisión del BIS, NIST u orden ejecutiva nombrando la IA de cibercapacidad frontera como categoría que requiere licencia, con dos laboratorios más entregando programas de distribución gated.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Apr 7 Mythos Preview sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing, ang Apr 30 Bloomberg disclosure ng NSA Project Aether na nagbe-benchmark ng Mythos, at ang May 1 Pentagon CTO carve-out ay bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, inaasahang magpapangalan ang isang BIS, NIST, o executive issuance sa frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required, kasama ang dalawa pang labs na maglalabas ng gated-distribution programs.

bridges.text: Anthropic's May 4 JV announcement keeping Project Glasswing gated-distribution as the operative reference shape plus the Stellar Cyber survey treating frontier cyber-AI as a regulatory axis reinforce the precondition: the gated-distribution + MITRE-CNA scaffolding the prediction names is now visible alongside enterprise commercial-deployment communication.

text_locales.en: Anthropic's May 4 JV announcement keeping Project Glasswing gated-distribution as the operative reference shape plus the Stellar Cyber survey treating frontier cyber-AI as a regulatory axis reinforce the precondition: the gated-distribution + MITRE-CNA scaffolding the prediction names is now visible alongside enterprise commercial-deployment communication.
text_locales.ja: Project Glasswingゲート配布を運用上の参照形状として保つAnthropicの5月4日 JV発表 + フロンティア・サイバーAIを規制軸として扱うStellar Cyber調査が前提条件を強化する: 予測が指摘するゲート配布 + MITRE-CNAの足場は、現在エンタープライズ商業展開コミュニケーションと並んで目に見える。
text_locales.es: El anuncio de la JV del 4 de mayo de Anthropic manteniendo Project Glasswing distribución gated como la forma de referencia operativa más la encuesta de Stellar Cyber tratando cyber-IA de frontera como un eje regulatorio refuerzan la precondición: el andamiaje de distribución gated + MITRE-CNA que la predicción nombra ahora es visible junto a la comunicación de despliegue comercial empresarial.
text_locales.fil: Ang May 4 JV announcement ng Anthropic na nagpapanatili sa Project Glasswing gated-distribution bilang operative reference shape plus ang Stellar Cyber survey na nagtatrato sa frontier cyber-AI bilang regulatory axis ay nagpapatibay sa precondition: ang gated-distribution + MITRE-CNA scaffolding na pinangalanan ng prediction ay nakikita na ngayon kasama ang enterprise commercial-deployment communication.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills. In plain language: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills. In plain language: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q3までに、4月7日のAnthropic Mythos PreviewのProject Glasswing下での発表(~50社のローンチパートナー + ~40の重要ソフトウェアインフラ組織 + $100Mの利用クレジット + $4Mのオープンソースセキュリティ寄付)、4月30日のBloombergによるNSA Project AetherのMythosと機密主権サイバーツールのベンチマーク開示、5月1日のPentagon CTO声明によるAnthropic排除リストとNSA Mythos関与の分離が、米国がフロンティアサイバー能力AI輸出規制カテゴリーを正式に定義する規制プルを生み出す。少なくとも1つの政府発出(Cat 5 part 2のデュアルユース暗号下のBIS商務省輸出規制規則、または並行するサイバー能力カテゴリー、NIST AI Cyber Center RFIフォローアップ、ホワイトハウス大統領令)がフロンティアサイバーAIをライセンス必須カテゴリーとして明示的に命名する。少なくとも他に2つのファウンデーションラボ(OpenAI、Google DeepMind、xAI、Mistral、Cohere)が、Glasswingパターンを反映する公開パートナーリスト開示を伴う同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷する。** 強制力はAether開示が表面化させた非対称性である。Pentagonが調達を拒否した同じモデルが、NSAが主権サイバーベンチマークで依存しているモデルだ。これにより、行政府が規制カテゴリーを未定義のままにすることは不可能となる。4月29日のCSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA権限 + ATT&CK v19の命名済み手法(MCPサーバー侵害、ツール呼び出し悪用)が開示側の規制インフラを提供する。最も抵抗の少ない経路はBISがCat 5下で規則を発出することだ。なぜなら30年のデュアルユース技術の前例があり、オープンソースのエージェントスキルを遅延させるFDA型の本格承認体制を切り出すことを避けられるからだ。平易な言葉で言えば: NSAがAnthropicの最強AIをMicrosoftバグ探しに借り始めたとき、米国政府は他に誰がそれを借りられるかを規制し始めなければならなくなった。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q3 2026, el lanzamiento del 7 de abril de Anthropic Mythos Preview bajo Project Glasswing (~50 socios de lanzamiento + ~40 organizaciones de software-infraestructura crítica + $100M en créditos de uso + $4M en donaciones de seguridad de código abierto) + la divulgación de Bloomberg del 30 de abril sobre el Project Aether de la NSA que evalúa Mythos contra herramientas cibernéticas soberanas clasificadas + la declaración del CTO del Pentágono del 1 de mayo separando la lista negra de Anthropic de la colaboración Mythos-NSA crea la presión regulatoria para que EE. UU. defina formalmente una categoría de control de exportación de IA de cibercapacidad frontera — al menos una emisión gubernamental (regla de control de exportación del BIS del Departamento de Comercio bajo Cat 5 parte 2 criptografía de doble uso o una categoría paralela de cibercapacidad, seguimiento de RFI del NIST AI Cyber Center, u orden ejecutiva de la Casa Blanca) nombra explícitamente la IA de cibercapacidad frontera como categoría que requiere licencia; al menos otros dos laboratorios de modelos fundacionales (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) entregan un programa comparable de distribución gated con divulgación pública de lista de socios reflejando el patrón de Glasswing.** La función forzante es la asimetría que la divulgación de Aether expone: el mismo modelo que el Pentágono se negó a contratar es del que la NSA depende para la evaluación de cibercapacidades soberanas, lo que hace imposible que el ejecutivo deje la categoría regulatoria sin definir; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI Foundation + las técnicas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 (compromiso de servidor MCP, abuso de invocación de herramientas) proveen la infraestructura regulatoria del lado de divulgación. El camino de menor resistencia es que el BIS emita una regla bajo Cat 5 porque tiene 30 años de precedente de tecnología de doble uso y evita tallar todo el régimen de aprobación tipo FDA que ralentizaría las habilidades de agentes de código abierto. En lenguaje sencillo: Cuando la NSA empezó a tomar prestada la IA más potente de Anthropic para encontrar bugs de Microsoft, el gobierno de EE. UU. tuvo que empezar a regular quién más puede tomarla prestada.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether na nag-bebenchmark ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na naghihiwalay ng Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na pormal na tukuyin ang isang frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — hindi bababa sa isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ang tahasang magpapangalan sa frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; hindi bababa sa dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ang maglalabas ng katumbas na gated-distribution program na may pampublikong partner-list disclosure na sumasalamin sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na inilantad ng Aether disclosure: ang parehong modelo na tinanggihang bilhin ng Pentagon ay ang umaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapahirap sa executive branch na iwanang hindi tinukoy ang regulatory category; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ang nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. Ang pinakamadaling daan ay maglabas ang BIS ng panuntunan sa ilalim ng Cat 5 dahil mayroon itong 30 taong dual-use-tech precedent at iniiwasan nito ang pagbabaha-bahagi ng buong FDA-style approval regime na magpapabagal sa open-source agent skills. Sa madaling salita: nang nagsimulang humiram ang NSA ng pinakamalakas na AI ng Anthropic para hanapin ang Microsoft bugs, kinailangang regulahin ng US government kung sino pa ang maaaring humiram nito.

nodes.title: Bonsai 8B anchors 1-bit native training as default edge-LLM recipe by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter. description.en: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **1ビットネイティブ訓練が事後量子化に代わる主流の手法となる。** Bonsai 8Bは1.15 GBで本番品質の出力を実証している。事後の4/8ビット量子化ではなく、訓練段階から1ビットを前提に設計することが、エッジLLMの標準となるだろう。次の四半期以内にQwenとLlamaファミリーの1ビット派生モデルが続くと予想される。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El entrenamiento nativo de 1 bit se convierte en la alternativa dominante a la cuantización post-hoc.** Bonsai 8B demuestra una salida con calidad de producción a 1,15 GB. Diseñar para 1 bit desde el entrenamiento, en lugar de cuantización post-hoc de 4/8 bits, se convertirá en el estándar para los LLM en el borde. Se esperan derivados de 1 bit de las familias Qwen y Llama dentro del próximo trimestre. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang 1-bit native training ay magiging dominanteng alternatibo sa post-hoc quantization.** Ipinapakita ng Bonsai 8B ang production-quality output sa 1.15 GB. Ang pag-disenyo para sa 1-bit mula sa training, sa halip na 4/8-bit post-quantization, ay magiging standard para sa edge LLMs. Asahan ang 1-bit derivatives ng Qwen at Llama families sa loob ng susunod na quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.title: Bonsai 8B anchors 1-bit native training as default edge-LLM recipe by Q3 2026
detail.title_clean: Bonsai 8B anchors 1-bit native training as default edge-LLM recipe by Q3 2026

reasoning.because: Bonsai 8B ships production-quality output at 1.15 GB by training natively in 1-bit.
reasoning.given: Edge LLM deployment is memory-bound; post-hoc 4/8-bit quantization caps achievable compression.
reasoning.so_that: Native 1-bit training becomes the default edge-LLM recipe and 1-bit Qwen/Llama derivatives ship.
reasoning.landing: Within ~1 quarter; open-weight Qwen + Llama family forks lead.
reasoning.plain_language: A 1.15 GB model already works well. Training tiny from day one beats shrinking later, so expect tiny copies of popular models soon.

because.en: Bonsai 8B ships production-quality output at 1.15 GB by training natively in 1-bit.
because.ja: Bonsai 8Bは1ビットでネイティブに訓練することで、1.15 GBで本番品質の出力を提供している。
because.es: Bonsai 8B entrega salida con calidad de producción a 1,15 GB al entrenarse de forma nativa en 1 bit.
because.fil: Ang Bonsai 8B ay nag-ship ng production-quality output sa 1.15 GB sa pamamagitan ng natively na training sa 1-bit.

given.en: Edge LLM deployment is memory-bound; post-hoc 4/8-bit quantization caps achievable compression.
given.ja: エッジLLMのデプロイメントはメモリ制約があり、事後の4/8ビット量子化では達成できる圧縮率に限界がある。
given.es: El despliegue de LLM en el borde está limitado por la memoria; la cuantización post-hoc de 4/8 bits limita la compresión alcanzable.
given.fil: Ang Edge LLM deployment ay memory-bound; ang post-hoc 4/8-bit quantization ay naglilimita sa nakukuhang compression.

so_that.en: Native 1-bit training becomes the default edge-LLM recipe and 1-bit Qwen/Llama derivatives ship.
so_that.ja: 1ビットネイティブ訓練がエッジLLMの標準レシピとなり、1ビット版QwenやLlama派生モデルが登場する。
so_that.es: El entrenamiento nativo de 1 bit se convierte en la receta predeterminada para LLM en el borde y se publican derivados de 1 bit de Qwen/Llama.
so_that.fil: Ang native 1-bit training ay magiging default na edge-LLM recipe at ang 1-bit Qwen/Llama derivatives ay maglulunsad.

landing.en: Within ~1 quarter; open-weight Qwen + Llama family forks lead.
landing.ja: 約1四半期以内に、オープンウェイトのQwen+Llamaファミリーフォークが先行する。
landing.es: Dentro de aproximadamente 1 trimestre; las bifurcaciones de pesos abiertos de las familias Qwen + Llama lideran.
landing.fil: Sa loob ng ~1 quarter; nangunguna ang open-weight Qwen + Llama family forks.

plain_language.en: A 1.15 GB model already works well. Training tiny from day one beats shrinking later, so expect tiny copies of popular models soon.
plain_language.ja: 1.15 GBのモデルがすでに十分動作している。最初から小さく訓練するほうが後から縮小するよりも優れているため、人気モデルの小型版がまもなく登場すると予想される。
plain_language.es: Un modelo de 1,15 GB ya funciona bien. Entrenar pequeño desde el primer día supera a reducir el tamaño después, así que se esperan pronto copias diminutas de los modelos populares.
plain_language.fil: Ang 1.15 GB na model ay gumagana na nang maayos. Ang pag-train nang maliit mula sa unang araw ay mas mabuti kaysa sa pag-shrink mamaya, kaya asahan ang maliliit na kopya ng popular na models sa lalong madaling panahon.

title_locales.en: Bonsai 8B anchors 1-bit native training as default edge-LLM recipe by Q3 2026
title_locales.ja: Bonsai 8Bが牽引、1ビットネイティブ訓練が2026年Q3までにエッジLLMの標準レシピとして定着
title_locales.es: Bonsai 8B consolida el entrenamiento nativo de 1 bit como receta predeterminada de LLM en el edge para el Q3 2026
title_locales.fil: Bonsai 8B nag-aangkla sa 1-bit native training bilang default na edge-LLM recipe pagsapit ng Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: Bonsai 8B's 1.15 GB production-quality result shows native 1-bit training outperforms post-hoc 4/8-bit quantization for edge deployment. Within roughly one quarter, open-weight 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families are expected to follow this recipe.

summary_short_locales.en: Bonsai 8B's 1.15 GB production-quality result shows native 1-bit training outperforms post-hoc 4/8-bit quantization for edge deployment. Within roughly one quarter, open-weight 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families are expected to follow this recipe.
summary_short_locales.ja: Bonsai 8Bの1.15 GBで本番品質という結果は、1ビットネイティブ訓練がエッジデプロイメント向けに事後の4/8ビット量子化を上回ることを示している。約1四半期以内に、オープンウェイトの1ビット派生版QwenおよびLlamaファミリーがこのレシピに続くと予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: El resultado de calidad de producción de 1,15 GB de Bonsai 8B muestra que el entrenamiento nativo de 1 bit supera a la cuantización post-hoc de 4/8 bits para el despliegue en el borde. Dentro de aproximadamente un trimestre, se espera que los derivados de pesos abiertos de 1 bit de las familias Qwen y Llama sigan esta receta.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang 1.15 GB production-quality result ng Bonsai 8B ay nagpapakita na ang native 1-bit training ay nakakahigit sa post-hoc 4/8-bit quantization para sa edge deployment. Sa loob ng halos isang quarter, asahan na ang open-weight 1-bit derivatives ng Qwen at Llama families ay susunod sa recipe na ito.

bridges.text: PromptQuorum's hardware guide keeps Bonsai-class 1-bit models in the consumer-tier comparison across Mac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell / 96GB Spark, but no fresh 1-bit-native checkpoint or Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative ships inside the window, leaving the trend visible but not advanced.

text_locales.en: PromptQuorum's hardware guide keeps Bonsai-class 1-bit models in the consumer-tier comparison across Mac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell / 96GB Spark, but no fresh 1-bit-native checkpoint or Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative ships inside the window, leaving the trend visible but not advanced.
text_locales.ja: PromptQuorumのハードウェアガイドはBonsaiクラスの1-bitモデルをMac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell / 96GB Sparkにわたるコンシューマ層の比較に位置付け続けるが、ウィンドウ内に新たな1-bitネイティブのチェックポイントやQwen / Llama 1-bit派生は出荷されず、トレンドは可視のままだが進展しない。
text_locales.es: La guía de hardware de PromptQuorum mantiene los modelos de 1-bit clase Bonsai en la comparación de nivel de consumo a través de Mac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell / 96GB Spark, pero ningún nuevo checkpoint nativo de 1-bit ni derivado 1-bit de Qwen / Llama llega dentro de la ventana, dejando la tendencia visible pero sin avanzar.
text_locales.fil: Pinapanatili ng PromptQuorum's hardware guide ang Bonsai-class 1-bit models sa consumer-tier comparison sa Mac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell / 96GB Spark, ngunit walang bagong 1-bit-native checkpoint o Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative ang inilabas sa loob ng window, na iniiwan ang trend na nakikita ngunit hindi sumusulong.

bridges.text: PromptQuorum's hardware guide keeps Bonsai-class 1-bit positioning alive across the new Mac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell tiers, but no fresh 1-bit-from-scratch checkpoint or Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative lands inside the window, leaving the trend neither advanced nor refuted.

text_locales.en: PromptQuorum's hardware guide keeps Bonsai-class 1-bit positioning alive across the new Mac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell tiers, but no fresh 1-bit-from-scratch checkpoint or Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative lands inside the window, leaving the trend neither advanced nor refuted.
text_locales.ja: PromptQuorumのハードウェア・ガイドは、新しいMac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell層全体でBonsaiクラスの1-bitポジショニングを生かし続けているが、ウィンドウ内では新しい1-bitスクラッチからのチェックポイントもQwen / Llamaの1-bit派生も登場せず、トレンドは進展も反証もされないままとなっている。
text_locales.es: La guía de hardware de PromptQuorum mantiene viva la posición de 1-bit clase Bonsai a través de los nuevos niveles Mac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell, pero ningún checkpoint 1-bit-from-scratch fresco ni derivado Qwen / Llama 1-bit aterriza dentro de la ventana, dejando la tendencia ni avanzada ni refutada.
text_locales.fil: Pinanatili ng hardware guide ng PromptQuorum ang Bonsai-class 1-bit positioning sa kabuuan ng bagong Mac mini M4 / RTX 5090 / RTX 6000 Pro Blackwell tiers, ngunit walang sariwang 1-bit-from-scratch checkpoint o Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative ang lumilitaw sa loob ng window, na iniwan ang trend na hindi sumusulong o napabulaanan.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B MLX 1-bit's continued Apple Silicon distribution at 1.15 GB across M2 / M3 / M4 keeps the precondition observation alive, while The Register's framing of 1-bit-native as a path to free AI from cloud dependence reinforces the underlying economics; no new lab ships a 1-bit-from-scratch checkpoint or Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative inside the window.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B MLX 1-bit's continued Apple Silicon distribution at 1.15 GB across M2 / M3 / M4 keeps the precondition observation alive, while The Register's framing of 1-bit-native as a path to free AI from cloud dependence reinforces the underlying economics; no new lab ships a 1-bit-from-scratch checkpoint or Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative inside the window.
text_locales.ja: Bonsai-8B MLX 1-bitがM2 / M3 / M4全体で1.15 GBという継続的なApple Silicon配布を続けることで前提条件の観察を生かし、The Registerの「1-bitネイティブはAIをクラウド依存から解放する道」という枠組みが根底にある経済性を補強しているが、ウィンドウ内では1-bitスクラッチからの新しいチェックポイントもQwen / Llamaの1-bit派生もリリースされていない。
text_locales.es: La distribución continua de Bonsai-8B MLX 1-bit en Apple Silicon a 1.15 GB en M2 / M3 / M4 mantiene viva la observación de precondición, mientras que el encuadre de The Register de 1-bit-nativo como un camino para liberar la IA de la dependencia de la nube refuerza la economía subyacente; ningún laboratorio nuevo envía un checkpoint de 1-bit-from-scratch ni un derivado de Qwen / Llama 1-bit dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang patuloy na Apple Silicon distribution ng Bonsai-8B MLX 1-bit sa 1.15 GB sa M2 / M3 / M4 ay nagpapanatiling buhay sa precondition observation, habang ang framing ng The Register sa 1-bit-native bilang daan upang palayain ang AI mula sa cloud dependence ay nagpapatibay sa underlying economics; walang bagong lab ang nagpapadala ng 1-bit-from-scratch checkpoint o Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B's continued reporting (1.15 GB, 12-14x smaller, 6x faster on RTX 4090, native llama.cpp / MLX support) keeps the precondition observation alive but the window adds no fresh 1-bit-native checkpoint and no Qwen or Llama 1-bit derivative, so the underlying claim continues without new acceleration.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B's continued reporting (1.15 GB, 12-14x smaller, 6x faster on RTX 4090, native llama.cpp / MLX support) keeps the precondition observation alive but the window adds no fresh 1-bit-native checkpoint and no Qwen or Llama 1-bit derivative, so the underlying claim continues without new acceleration.
text_locales.ja: Bonsai-8Bの継続的な報道(1.15 GB、12-14倍小さく、RTX 4090で6倍高速、ネイティブのllama.cpp / MLXサポート)は前提条件の観察を生かしているが、ウィンドウ内では新たな1-bitネイティブのチェックポイントもQwenまたはLlamaの1-bit派生も追加されておらず、根本的な主張は新たな加速なしに継続している。
text_locales.es: El reporte continuo de Bonsai-8B (1.15 GB, 12-14x más pequeño, 6x más rápido en RTX 4090, soporte nativo de llama.cpp / MLX) mantiene viva la observación de precondición pero la ventana no añade ningún checkpoint nativo de 1-bit fresco ni ningún derivado de Qwen o Llama 1-bit, por lo que la afirmación subyacente continúa sin nueva aceleración.
text_locales.fil: Ang patuloy na pag-uulat sa Bonsai-8B (1.15 GB, 12-14x mas maliit, 6x mas mabilis sa RTX 4090, native llama.cpp / MLX support) ay nagpapanatiling buhay sa precondition observation pero ang window ay walang idinadagdag na sariwang 1-bit-native checkpoint at walang Qwen o Llama 1-bit derivative, kaya nagpapatuloy ang underlying claim nang walang bagong acceleration.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B's continued visibility (1.15 GB, 12-14x smaller, 6x faster on RTX 4090) keeps the precondition observation alive but the window adds no new 1-bit native training launch and no Qwen or Llama 1-bit derivative, so the underlying claim continues without fresh acceleration.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B's continued visibility (1.15 GB, 12-14x smaller, 6x faster on RTX 4090) keeps the precondition observation alive but the window adds no new 1-bit native training launch and no Qwen or Llama 1-bit derivative, so the underlying claim continues without fresh acceleration.
text_locales.ja: Bonsai-8Bの継続的な可視性(1.15 GB、12〜14倍小さく、RTX 4090で6倍高速)は前提となる観測を生かし続けているが、本ウィンドウでは新たな1-bitネイティブ学習のローンチもQwenまたはLlamaの1-bit派生も加わっておらず、根底の主張は新たな加速なしに継続している。
text_locales.es: La continua visibilidad de Bonsai-8B (1.15 GB, 12-14x mas pequeno, 6x mas rapido en RTX 4090) mantiene viva la observacion de precondicion pero la ventana no agrega ningun nuevo lanzamiento de entrenamiento nativo de 1-bit ni derivado de 1-bit de Qwen o Llama, por lo que la afirmacion subyacente continua sin nueva aceleracion.
text_locales.fil: Ang patuloy na visibility ng Bonsai-8B (1.15 GB, 12-14x mas maliit, 6x mas mabilis sa RTX 4090) ay nagpapanatili ng buhay sa precondition observation, ngunit ang window ay walang idinadagdag na bagong 1-bit native training launch at walang Qwen o Llama 1-bit derivative, kaya ang underlying claim ay nagpapatuloy nang walang bagong acceleration.

needs.actor: edge-LLM model researcher at an open-weights frontier lab
needs.job: Design a 1-bit-native training recipe for an open-weights mid-size LLM family, replicating the Bonsai 8B production-quality result.
needs.outcome: Public release of a 1-bit-native checkpoint in the Qwen or Llama family with quality matching its 4/8-bit post-quantized peer.
needs.motivation: Capturing the edge-LLM standard-recipe slot before competitors locks in citation share, downstream tooling, and hardware-vendor co-marketing.

actor_locales.en: edge-LLM model researcher at an open-weights frontier lab
actor_locales.ja: オープンウェイトのフロンティアラボに所属するエッジLLMモデル研究者
actor_locales.es: investigador de modelos LLM en el borde en un laboratorio frontera de pesos abiertos
actor_locales.fil: edge-LLM model researcher sa isang open-weights frontier lab

job_locales.en: Design a 1-bit-native training recipe for an open-weights mid-size LLM family, replicating the Bonsai 8B production-quality result.
job_locales.ja: オープンウェイトの中規模LLMファミリー向けに、Bonsai 8Bの本番品質の結果を再現する1ビットネイティブ訓練レシピを設計する。
job_locales.es: Diseñar una receta de entrenamiento nativo de 1 bit para una familia de LLM de tamaño medio con pesos abiertos, replicando el resultado de calidad de producción de Bonsai 8B.
job_locales.fil: Mag-disenyo ng 1-bit-native training recipe para sa isang open-weights mid-size LLM family, ginagaya ang production-quality result ng Bonsai 8B.

outcome_locales.en: Public release of a 1-bit-native checkpoint in the Qwen or Llama family with quality matching its 4/8-bit post-quantized peer.
outcome_locales.ja: QwenまたはLlamaファミリーで、4/8ビット事後量子化版と同等の品質を持つ1ビットネイティブチェックポイントの公開リリース。
outcome_locales.es: Lanzamiento público de un punto de control nativo de 1 bit en la familia Qwen o Llama con calidad equivalente a su par post-cuantizado de 4/8 bits.
outcome_locales.fil: Public release ng isang 1-bit-native checkpoint sa Qwen o Llama family na may quality na katumbas ng 4/8-bit post-quantized peer nito.

motivation_locales.en: Capturing the edge-LLM standard-recipe slot before competitors locks in citation share, downstream tooling, and hardware-vendor co-marketing.
motivation_locales.ja: 競合より先にエッジLLMの標準レシピの座を獲得することで、引用シェア、下流ツール、ハードウェアベンダーの共同マーケティングを確保できる。
motivation_locales.es: Capturar el espacio de receta estándar para LLM en el borde antes que los competidores fija la cuota de citas, las herramientas posteriores y el co-marketing con proveedores de hardware.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang pagkuha ng edge-LLM standard-recipe slot bago i-lock ng mga competitors ang citation share, downstream tooling, at hardware-vendor co-marketing.

needs.actor: on-device inference runtime engineer at a mobile/edge runtime vendor
needs.job: Land production-grade 1-bit kernels and packed-weight loaders so 1-bit checkpoints run faster than their 4-bit-quantized peers on phone-class hardware.
needs.outcome: Release notes showing 1-bit checkpoints loading at sub-1.5 GB and beating 4-bit latency in the runtime's standard benchmark suite.
needs.motivation: Whichever runtime ships first-class 1-bit support becomes the default deployment target for the next wave of 1-bit derivatives.

actor_locales.en: on-device inference runtime engineer at a mobile/edge runtime vendor
actor_locales.ja: モバイル/エッジランタイムベンダーのオンデバイス推論ランタイムエンジニア
actor_locales.es: ingeniero de runtime de inferencia en dispositivo en un proveedor de runtime móvil/borde
actor_locales.fil: on-device inference runtime engineer sa isang mobile/edge runtime vendor

job_locales.en: Land production-grade 1-bit kernels and packed-weight loaders so 1-bit checkpoints run faster than their 4-bit-quantized peers on phone-class hardware.
job_locales.ja: 1ビットチェックポイントが、スマホクラスのハードウェアで4ビット量子化版より高速に動作するように、本番品質の1ビットカーネルとパック済み重みローダーを実装する。
job_locales.es: Implementar kernels de 1 bit con calidad de producción y cargadores de pesos empaquetados para que los puntos de control de 1 bit se ejecuten más rápido que sus pares cuantizados de 4 bits en hardware tipo teléfono.
job_locales.fil: Mag-land ng production-grade 1-bit kernels at packed-weight loaders para ang 1-bit checkpoints ay tumakbo nang mas mabilis kaysa sa kanilang 4-bit-quantized peers sa phone-class hardware.

outcome_locales.en: Release notes showing 1-bit checkpoints loading at sub-1.5 GB and beating 4-bit latency in the runtime's standard benchmark suite.
outcome_locales.ja: 1ビットチェックポイントが1.5 GB未満で読み込まれ、ランタイムの標準ベンチマークスイートで4ビットのレイテンシを上回ることを示すリリースノート。
outcome_locales.es: Notas de lanzamiento que muestran puntos de control de 1 bit cargándose con menos de 1,5 GB y superando la latencia de 4 bits en la suite de benchmarks estándar del runtime.
outcome_locales.fil: Release notes na nagpapakita ng 1-bit checkpoints na nag-loload sa sub-1.5 GB at tinatalo ang 4-bit latency sa standard benchmark suite ng runtime.

motivation_locales.en: Whichever runtime ships first-class 1-bit support becomes the default deployment target for the next wave of 1-bit derivatives.
motivation_locales.ja: 1ビットを一級サポートするランタイムが、次世代の1ビット派生モデルのデフォルトデプロイ先となる。
motivation_locales.es: Cualquier runtime que ofrezca soporte de primera clase para 1 bit se convierte en el objetivo de despliegue predeterminado para la próxima ola de derivados de 1 bit.
motivation_locales.fil: Anumang runtime ang unang mag-ship ng first-class 1-bit support ay magiging default deployment target para sa susunod na wave ng 1-bit derivatives.

needs.actor: open-weights model-family release maintainer (Qwen / Llama line steward)
needs.job: Publish a 1-bit-native derivative of the family's flagship sub-10B checkpoint alongside the existing 4/8-bit quantized variants.
needs.outcome: An official 1-bit checkpoint card on Hugging Face under the canonical org, with parity-grade evals and a sub-1.5 GB artifact.
needs.motivation: Defending the family's status as the default open-weights edge target; ceding 1-bit to a rival fragments the ecosystem around their releases.

outcome_locales.fil: Isang official 1-bit checkpoint card sa Hugging Face sa ilalim ng canonical org, na may parity-grade evals at sub-1.5 GB artifact.

motivation_locales.en: Defending the family's status as the default open-weights edge target; ceding 1-bit to a rival fragments the ecosystem around their releases.
motivation_locales.ja: ファミリーがオープンウェイトのデフォルトエッジターゲットとしての地位を守る。1ビットをライバルに譲ることは、自社リリースを中心としたエコシステムを分断させる。
motivation_locales.es: Defender el estatus de la familia como objetivo predeterminado de pesos abiertos en el borde; ceder 1 bit a un rival fragmenta el ecosistema en torno a sus lanzamientos.
motivation_locales.fil: Pagtatanggol sa katayuan ng family bilang default open-weights edge target; ang pagbibigay ng 1-bit sa kalaban ay magdudulot ng fragmentation sa ecosystem na nakapaligid sa kanilang releases.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **1ビットネイティブ訓練が事後量子化に代わる主流の手法となる。** Bonsai 8Bは1.15 GBで本番品質の出力を実証している。事後の4/8ビット量子化ではなく、訓練段階から1ビットを前提に設計することが、エッジLLMの標準となるだろう。次の四半期以内にQwenとLlamaファミリーの1ビット派生モデルが続くと予想される。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El entrenamiento nativo de 1 bit se convierte en la alternativa dominante a la cuantización post-hoc.** Bonsai 8B demuestra una salida con calidad de producción a 1,15 GB. Diseñar para 1 bit desde el entrenamiento, en lugar de cuantización post-hoc de 4/8 bits, se convertirá en el estándar para los LLM en el borde. Se esperan derivados de 1 bit de las familias Qwen y Llama dentro del próximo trimestre. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang 1-bit native training ay magiging dominanteng alternatibo sa post-hoc quantization.** Ipinapakita ng Bonsai 8B ang production-quality output sa 1.15 GB. Ang pag-disenyo para sa 1-bit mula sa training, sa halip na 4/8-bit post-quantization, ay magiging standard para sa edge LLMs. Asahan ang 1-bit derivatives ng Qwen at Llama families sa loob ng susunod na quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Closed-weight frontier crystallizes as open weights cap at 35B-A3B by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **オープンウェイトの地政学的分裂に対する独自モデルの再拡大。** Qwen3.6-Max-Previewの「独自仕様、APIのみ」への転換と、AnthropicによるMythos Previewの段階的ゲーティングが並行することで、2026年Q3は**「最強モデル = クローズドウェイト」**が結晶化する瞬間となる。一方でオープンウェイトは、本番運用において35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama系列に集約され、「実用はローカル、フロンティアはクラウド」という線引きが定式化される。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Re-expansión propietaria frente a una división geopolítica de pesos abiertos.** El giro "propietario, solo API" de Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, junto con la apertura escalonada de Mythos Preview por parte de Anthropic, hace del Q3 2026 el momento en que se cristaliza **"el modelo más fuerte = pesos cerrados"**. Los pesos abiertos, mientras tanto, se concentran en las líneas 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama para producción, formalizando la línea: local para utilidad, nube para la frontera. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Proprietary re-expansion laban sa open-weight geopolitical split.** Ang "proprietary, API-only" pivot ng Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, kasabay ng staged gating ng Anthropic sa Mythos Preview, ay ginagawa ang Q3 2026 bilang sandali kung kailan **nag-cri-crystallize ang "strongest model = closed weights"**. Ang open weights, samantala, ay nakakonsentra sa 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines para sa production, na nag-formalize sa linya: local para sa utility, cloud para sa frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview pivoted API-only and Anthropic gated Mythos Preview in the same window
reasoning.given: frontier-tier compute + safety overhead make open-weight release uneconomic for top-of-stack labs
reasoning.so_that: by Q3 2026 the strongest publicly available models are uniformly closed, with open weights settling at the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama production tier
reasoning.landing: by Q3 2026; ≥2 frontier labs API-only + open-weight ceiling at ~35B-A3B class
reasoning.plain_language: The biggest models are going behind paywalls while smaller open ones stay free, so people will use local models for everyday tasks and cloud for the hardest ones.

because.fil: Ang Qwen3.6-Max-Preview ay nag-pivot na API-only at ginating ng Anthropic ang Mythos Preview sa parehong window

given.fil: ang frontier-tier compute + safety overhead ay ginagawang uneconomic ang open-weight release para sa top-of-stack labs

so_that.en: by Q3 2026 the strongest publicly available models are uniformly closed, with open weights settling at the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama production tier
so_that.ja: 2026年Q3までに、公開されている最強モデルはすべてクローズドとなり、オープンウェイトは35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llamaの本番層に落ち着く
so_that.es: para el Q3 2026 los modelos públicamente disponibles más fuertes son uniformemente cerrados, con los pesos abiertos asentándose en el nivel de producción 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama
so_that.fil: pagsapit ng Q3 2026 ang pinakamalakas na publicly available models ay uniformly closed, na ang open weights ay nakaupo sa 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama production tier

plain_language.en: The biggest models are going behind paywalls while smaller open ones stay free, so people will use local models for everyday tasks and cloud for the hardest ones.
plain_language.ja: 最大級モデルは課金壁の向こう側に行き、より小さなオープンモデルは無料のままなので、人々は日常タスクにはローカルモデル、最難タスクにはクラウドを使うようになる。
plain_language.es: Los modelos más grandes están pasando detrás de muros de pago mientras los más pequeños y abiertos siguen siendo gratis, así que la gente usará modelos locales para tareas cotidianas y la nube para las más difíciles.
plain_language.fil: Ang pinakamalalaking models ay pumupunta sa likod ng paywalls habang ang mas maliliit na open ones ay nananatiling libre, kaya gagamitin ng mga tao ang local models para sa pang-araw-araw na tasks at cloud para sa pinakamahihirap.
