detail.summary_short: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's API-only pivot and Anthropic's gating of Mythos Preview together mark Q3 2026 as the point where the strongest models are uniformly closed weights. Open-weight releases concentrate on the 35B-A3B, Bonsai, and Llama production tiers, formalizing a split between local utility models and cloud frontier models.

summary_short_locales.en: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's API-only pivot and Anthropic's gating of Mythos Preview together mark Q3 2026 as the point where the strongest models are uniformly closed weights. Open-weight releases concentrate on the 35B-A3B, Bonsai, and Llama production tiers, formalizing a split between local utility models and cloud frontier models.
summary_short_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-Max-PreviewのAPIのみへの転換と、AnthropicによるMythos Previewのゲーティングが揃って、2026年Q3を「最強モデルが一様にクローズドウェイト」となる転換点として位置づける。オープンウェイトのリリースは35B-A3B、Bonsai、Llamaの本番層に集約され、ローカル実用モデルとクラウドフロンティアモデルとの分離が定式化される。
summary_short_locales.es: El giro a solo API de Qwen3.6-Max-Preview y la restricción por Anthropic de Mythos Preview marcan juntos el Q3 2026 como el punto en que los modelos más fuertes son uniformemente de pesos cerrados. Los lanzamientos de pesos abiertos se concentran en los niveles de producción 35B-A3B, Bonsai y Llama, formalizando una división entre modelos locales de utilidad y modelos de frontera en la nube.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang API-only pivot ng Qwen3.6-Max-Preview at ang gating ng Anthropic sa Mythos Preview ay magkasamang nagmamarka sa Q3 2026 bilang punto kung saan ang pinakamalakas na models ay uniformly closed weights. Ang open-weight releases ay nakakonsentra sa 35B-A3B, Bonsai, at Llama production tiers, na nag-formalize ng split sa pagitan ng local utility models at cloud frontier models.

bridges.text: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's API-only stance plus Mythos gating against DeepSeek V4's open-weight price aggression keep the geopolitical-split structure intact: the Western flagships keep tightening proprietary access while the Chinese open tier widens.

text_locales.en: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's API-only stance plus Mythos gating against DeepSeek V4's open-weight price aggression keep the geopolitical-split structure intact: the Western flagships keep tightening proprietary access while the Chinese open tier widens.
text_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview の API 限定スタンスと Mythos のゲーティングが、DeepSeek V4 のオープンウェイト価格攻勢に対して維持されることで、地政学的分断構造はそのまま保たれる — 西側のフラッグシップは独自アクセスをさらに引き締め、中国のオープン階層は広がっていく。
text_locales.es: La postura solo-API de Qwen3.6-Max-Preview más el cierre de Mythos contra la agresión de precio open-weight de DeepSeek V4 mantienen intacta la estructura de división geopolítica: los buques insignia occidentales siguen ajustando el acceso propietario mientras el tier abierto chino se ensancha.
text_locales.fil: Ang API-only stance ng Qwen3.6-Max-Preview kasama ang Mythos gating laban sa open-weight price aggression ng DeepSeek V4 ay pinapanatili ang geopolitical-split structure: patuloy na hinihigpitan ng Western flagships ang proprietary access habang lumalawak ang Chinese open tier.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4 staying open-weights and price-aggressive while practitioner consensus calls it near-frontier reinforces the geopolitical-split structure: Chinese labs are widening the open-tier corridor while Western flagships keep tightening proprietary access.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4 staying open-weights and price-aggressive while practitioner consensus calls it near-frontier reinforces the geopolitical-split structure: Chinese labs are widening the open-tier corridor while Western flagships keep tightening proprietary access.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4 がオープンウェイトと攻撃的な価格設定を維持しつつ、実務者コンセンサスがそれをほぼフロンティア級と評している点は、地政学的分断の構造を補強している: 中国系ラボがオープン階層の回廊を広げている一方で、西側のフラッグシップは独自アクセスを締め続けている。
text_locales.es: DeepSeek V4 manteniéndose con pesos abiertos y precios agresivos mientras el consenso de los profesionales lo llama casi-frontier refuerza la estructura de división geopolítica: los laboratorios chinos están ampliando el corredor de nivel abierto mientras los buques insignia occidentales siguen apretando el acceso propietario.
text_locales.fil: Ang DeepSeek V4 na nananatiling open-weights at price-aggressive habang tinatawag ito ng practitioner consensus na near-frontier ay nagpapatibay sa geopolitical-split structure: pinapalawak ng Chinese labs ang open-tier corridor habang ang Western flagships ay patuloy na hinihigpitan ang proprietary access.

bridges.text: Apidog's GPT-5.5 pricing breakdown locking the API-only paid tier at 2x GPT-5.4 with GPT-5.5 Pro at $30 / $180 per M tokens and gHacks' DeepSeek V4-Pro coverage at ~7x cheaper than Opus 4.7 with Huawei Ascend tuning per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece materialize both halves of the structural split in the same window.

text_locales.en: Apidog's GPT-5.5 pricing breakdown locking the API-only paid tier at 2x GPT-5.4 with GPT-5.5 Pro at $30 / $180 per M tokens and gHacks' DeepSeek V4-Pro coverage at ~7x cheaper than Opus 4.7 with Huawei Ascend tuning per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece materialize both halves of the structural split in the same window.
text_locales.ja: ApidogのGPT-5.5価格分解(API専用有料層をGPT-5.4の2倍、GPT-5.5 ProをMトークンあたり$30 / $180で固定)とgHacksのDeepSeek V4-Proカバレッジ(Opus 4.7より~7x安い、4月26日のBloomberg-CCTV記事に従ったファーウェイ・アセンドのチューニング付き)が、構造的分裂の両半分を同じウィンドウ内に実体化する。
text_locales.es: El desglose de precios GPT-5.5 de Apidog fijando el nivel de pago solo-API a 2x GPT-5.4 con GPT-5.5 Pro a $30 / $180 por M tokens y la cobertura de DeepSeek V4-Pro de gHacks a ~7x más barato que Opus 4.7 con ajuste para Huawei Ascend según la pieza de Bloomberg-CCTV del 26 de abril materializan ambas mitades de la división estructural en la misma ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apidog's GPT-5.5 pricing breakdown na nagla-lock sa API-only paid tier sa 2x GPT-5.4 na may GPT-5.5 Pro sa $30 / $180 per M tokens at ang gHacks' DeepSeek V4-Pro coverage sa ~7x mas mura kaysa Opus 4.7 na may Huawei Ascend tuning ayon sa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece ay nagma-materialize sa parehong halves ng structural split sa parehong window.

bridges.text: Apidog's GPT-5.5 pricing breakdown locking the API-only paid tier at 2x GPT-5.4 with GPT-5.5 Pro at $30 / $180 per M tokens, alongside Xinhua framing DeepSeek V4 as matching the best open-source options, materializes both halves of the structural split — proprietary frontier paid-tier and open-weight production tier consolidating in the Chinese-lab line — in the same window.

text_locales.en: Apidog's GPT-5.5 pricing breakdown locking the API-only paid tier at 2x GPT-5.4 with GPT-5.5 Pro at $30 / $180 per M tokens, alongside Xinhua framing DeepSeek V4 as matching the best open-source options, materializes both halves of the structural split — proprietary frontier paid-tier and open-weight production tier consolidating in the Chinese-lab line — in the same window.
text_locales.ja: ApidogのGPT-5.5価格分析がAPI限定有料層をGPT-5.4の2倍、GPT-5.5 Proを$30 / $180 per Mトークンでロックすること、加えてXinhuaがDeepSeek V4を最高のオープンソース・オプションに匹敵するものとして枠組みすることが、構造的分割の両半分 ― プロプライエタリ・フロンティア有料層と中国系研究所ラインで統合するオープンウェイト本番層 ― を同じウィンドウ内で物質化する。
text_locales.es: El desglose de precios de GPT-5.5 de Apidog bloqueando el nivel pago solo-API a 2x GPT-5.4 con GPT-5.5 Pro a $30 / $180 por M tokens, junto con Xinhua enmarcando a DeepSeek V4 como igualando las mejores opciones de código abierto, materializa ambas mitades de la división estructural — frontera propietaria de nivel pago y nivel de producción de pesos abiertos consolidándose en la línea del laboratorio chino — en la misma ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang GPT-5.5 pricing breakdown ng Apidog na nagla-lock sa API-only paid tier sa 2x GPT-5.4 na may GPT-5.5 Pro sa $30 / $180 per M tokens, kasama ang Xinhua na nag-frame sa DeepSeek V4 bilang katumbas ng pinakamahusay na open-source options, ay nagpapamateryalisa sa dalawang halves ng structural split — proprietary frontier paid-tier at open-weight production tier na nagkokonsolida sa Chinese-lab line — sa parehong window.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4 + Tencent Hunyuan Hy3 Preview landing as open weights inside the same week with a self-rated 3-6-month gap to the proprietary frontier, alongside GPT-5.5's API-only paid-tier launch and Mythos's staged gating, fits both halves of the structural split — closed weights for the frontier / staged tier, open weights consolidating in Chinese-lab production tier — strengthening the structural force.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4 + Tencent Hunyuan Hy3 Preview landing as open weights inside the same week with a self-rated 3-6-month gap to the proprietary frontier, alongside GPT-5.5's API-only paid-tier launch and Mythos's staged gating, fits both halves of the structural split — closed weights for the frontier / staged tier, open weights consolidating in Chinese-lab production tier — strengthening the structural force.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4 + Tencent Hunyuan Hy3 Previewが同じ週にプロプライエタリ・フロンティアと自己評価3-6ヶ月の差でオープンウェイトとして登場し、GPT-5.5のAPI限定有料層ローンチとMythosの段階的ゲーティングと並んで、構造的分裂の両半分 ― フロンティア / 段階層のクローズドウェイト、中国ラボの本番層に集約するオープンウェイト ― に適合し、構造的力を強化している。
text_locales.es: DeepSeek V4 + Tencent Hunyuan Hy3 Preview aterrizando como pesos abiertos dentro de la misma semana con una brecha autoclasificada de 3-6 meses respecto a la frontera propietaria, junto con el lanzamiento solo-API de nivel pago de GPT-5.5 y el staged gating de Mythos, encaja con ambas mitades de la división estructural — pesos cerrados para la frontera / nivel staged, pesos abiertos consolidándose en el nivel de producción de laboratorios chinos — fortaleciendo la fuerza estructural.
text_locales.fil: Ang DeepSeek V4 + Tencent Hunyuan Hy3 Preview na bumabagsak bilang open weights sa loob ng parehong linggo na may self-rated 3-6-month gap sa proprietary frontier, kasama ng API-only paid-tier launch ng GPT-5.5 at staged gating ng Mythos, ay tumutugma sa parehong halves ng structural split — closed weights para sa frontier / staged tier, open weights na nagsasama-sama sa Chinese-lab production tier — pinatatatag ang structural force.

bridges.text: Mythos Preview's continued staged-gated third-party-only access pattern alongside Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 reaching Claude Opus 4.5 / 4.6-class coding directly fits both halves of the structural split — closed weights for the frontier / staged tier, open weights consolidating at the 27-35B Dense production tier — strengthening the prediction's underlying force.

text_locales.en: Mythos Preview's continued staged-gated third-party-only access pattern alongside Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 reaching Claude Opus 4.5 / 4.6-class coding directly fits both halves of the structural split — closed weights for the frontier / staged tier, open weights consolidating at the 27-35B Dense production tier — strengthening the prediction's underlying force.
text_locales.ja: Mythos Previewの継続的なステージドゲートのサードパーティ専用アクセスパターンと、Claude Opus 4.5 / 4.6級のコーディングに到達したQwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0は、構造的分裂の両半分にちょうど合致している ― フロンティア / ステージドティア向けにクローズドウェイト、27-35B Denseの本番ティアに統合されるオープンウェイト ― 予測の根本的な力を強化している。
text_locales.es: El patrón continuo de acceso solo de terceros con staged-gated de Mythos Preview junto con Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 alcanzando codificación de clase Claude Opus 4.5 / 4.6 encaja directamente con ambas mitades de la división estructural — pesos cerrados para el nivel de frontera / staged, pesos abiertos consolidándose en el nivel de producción 27-35B Dense — fortaleciendo la fuerza subyacente de la predicción.
text_locales.fil: Ang patuloy na staged-gated third-party-only access pattern ng Mythos Preview kasama ang Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 na umaabot sa Claude Opus 4.5 / 4.6-class coding ay tahasang umaakma sa dalawang halves ng structural split — closed weights para sa frontier / staged tier, open weights na nagsasama-sama sa 27-35B Dense production tier — na nagpapalakas sa underlying force ng prediction.

bridges.text: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's hosted-only stance with statistically significant agentic-coding deltas plus AISI's Mythos Preview evaluation under Project Glasswing partner-only access (AWS / Apple / Google / JPMC / Microsoft / NVIDIA) directly extend the precondition that frontier labs gate top-tier models behind staged closed access while open-weight cadence stays at the 35B-A3B class.

text_locales.en: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's hosted-only stance with statistically significant agentic-coding deltas plus AISI's Mythos Preview evaluation under Project Glasswing partner-only access (AWS / Apple / Google / JPMC / Microsoft / NVIDIA) directly extend the precondition that frontier labs gate top-tier models behind staged closed access while open-weight cadence stays at the 35B-A3B class.
text_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-Max-Previewのホスト限定姿勢と統計的に有意なエージェント型コーディングのデルタ、加えてProject Glasswingパートナー限定アクセス(AWS / Apple / Google / JPMC / Microsoft / NVIDIA)下でのAISIによるMythos Preview評価は、フロンティアラボがトップ層モデルを段階的なクローズドアクセスでゲーティングし、オープンウェイトのリリースペースを35B-A3Bクラスにとどめるという前提を直接延伸している。
text_locales.es: La postura solo-hospedada de Qwen3.6-Max-Preview con deltas estadisticamente significativos de codificacion agentica mas la evaluacion AISI del Mythos Preview bajo acceso solo-de-socios de Project Glasswing (AWS / Apple / Google / JPMC / Microsoft / NVIDIA) extienden directamente la precondicion de que los laboratorios frontera bloquean modelos de nivel superior detras de acceso cerrado por etapas mientras la cadencia open-weight permanece en la clase 35B-A3B.
text_locales.fil: Ang hosted-only stance ng Qwen3.6-Max-Preview na may statistically significant agentic-coding deltas kasama ng Mythos Preview evaluation ng AISI sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing partner-only access (AWS / Apple / Google / JPMC / Microsoft / NVIDIA) ay direktang nag-eextend sa precondition na ang frontier labs ay nag-gate ng top-tier models sa likod ng staged closed access habang ang open-weight cadence ay nananatili sa 35B-A3B class.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **オープンウェイトの地政学的分裂に対する独自モデルの再拡大。** Qwen3.6-Max-Previewの「独自仕様、APIのみ」への転換と、AnthropicによるMythos Previewの段階的ゲーティングが並行することで、2026年Q3は**「最強モデル = クローズドウェイト」**が結晶化する瞬間となる。一方でオープンウェイトは、本番運用において35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama系列に集約され、「実用はローカル、フロンティアはクラウド」という線引きが定式化される。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Re-expansión propietaria frente a una división geopolítica de pesos abiertos.** El giro "propietario, solo API" de Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, junto con la apertura escalonada de Mythos Preview por parte de Anthropic, hace del Q3 2026 el momento en que se cristaliza **"el modelo más fuerte = pesos cerrados"**. Los pesos abiertos, mientras tanto, se concentran en las líneas 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama para producción, formalizando la línea: local para utilidad, nube para la frontera. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Proprietary re-expansion laban sa open-weight geopolitical split.** Ang "proprietary, API-only" pivot ng Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, kasabay ng staged gating ng Anthropic sa Mythos Preview, ay ginagawa ang Q3 2026 bilang sandali kung kailan **nag-cri-crystallize ang "strongest model = closed weights"**. Ang open weights, samantala, ay nakakonsentra sa 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines para sa production, na nag-formalize sa linya: local para sa utility, cloud para sa frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Open-weight 1M-context era arrives as the new floor by Q3 2026
nodes.short_label: Open-weight 1M-context era arrives as the new floor by Q3 2026
nodes.title: Open-weight 1M-context era arrives as the new floor by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.en: Open-weight 1M-context era arrives as the new floor by Q3 2026
title.ja: オープンウェイトの1Mコンテキスト時代がQ3 2026までに新たな標準として到来する
title.es: La era del contexto de 1M con pesos abiertos llega como el nuevo piso para el Q3 2026
title.fil: Dumarating ang open-weight 1M-context era bilang bagong floor pagsapit ng Q3 2026

description.en: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「1Mコンテキストがデフォルト」のオープンウェイト時代がQ3 2026までに本格到来する。** DeepSeek V4の「1Mコンテキストは後付けではなく設計段階から組み込み」、Qwen3.6-27Bの262K → 1M拡張、Claude Opus 4.7の1Mコンテキスト(Bedrock)、GPT-5.5の長コンテキスト強化は、すべて同じ方向を指している。Q3 2026までに、「ネイティブ1Mコンテキスト」がオープンウェイトの最低水準となり、既存の32K-128Kモデルはレガシーに転落する。RAGパイプラインは「検索 → コンテキスト挿入」から「全部投入 + 動的プルーニング」へと反転し、ベクトルDBベンダーは「長コンテキスト・キャッシュ最適化レイヤー」への再定義を迫られる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **La era de "contexto de 1M por defecto" en pesos abiertos llega de lleno para el Q3 2026.** El "contexto de 1M diseñado de origen, no añadido a la fuerza" de DeepSeek V4, la extensión de 262K → 1M de Qwen3.6-27B, el contexto de 1M de Claude Opus 4.7 (Bedrock) y el refuerzo de contexto largo de GPT-5.5 apuntan todos en la misma dirección. Para el Q3 2026, el "contexto de 1M nativo" se convierte en el piso para los pesos abiertos, y los modelos existentes de 32K-128K caen al nivel legacy. Los pipelines RAG cambian de "búsqueda → inserción de contexto" a "volcar todo + poda dinámica", y los proveedores de bases de datos vectoriales son empujados a redefinirse como "capas de optimización de caché de contexto largo". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "1M context bilang default" open-weight era ay buong dadating sa Q3 2026.** Ang "1M context designed in, not bolted on" ng DeepSeek V4, ang 262K to 1M extension ng Qwen3.6-27B, ang 1M context ng Claude Opus 4.7 (Bedrock), at ang long-context strengthening ng GPT-5.5 ay lahat tumuturo sa parehong direksyon. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang "native 1M context" ay nagiging floor para sa open weights, at ang umiiral na 32K-128K models ay babagsak sa legacy. Ang RAG pipelines ay lumilipat mula sa "search → context-insert" papunta sa "dump everything in + dynamic prune," at ang mga vendor ng vector DB ay napipilitang i-redefine ang sarili bilang "long-context cache optimization layers." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.title: Open-weight 1M-context era arrives as the new floor by Q3 2026
detail.title_clean: Open-weight 1M-context era arrives as the new floor by Q3 2026

reasoning.because: DeepSeek V4 ships native 1M context, Qwen3.6-27B extends 262K to 1M, Claude Opus 4.7 hits 1M on Bedrock, and GPT-5.5 strengthens long context.
reasoning.given: Hybrid attention drops 1M-context FLOPs to 27% and KV cache to 10% of V3.2, making 1M context affordable in open weights.
reasoning.so_that: Native 1M context becomes the open-weight floor and RAG flips from search-then-insert to dump-everything-plus-dynamic-prune workflows.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; 32K-128K open-weight models drop to legacy and vector-DB vendors reposition.
reasoning.plain_language: Big AI models can now read a whole library at once, and cheap open-weight versions are catching up. Soon any model under that size will look outdated.

because.en: DeepSeek V4 ships native 1M context, Qwen3.6-27B extends 262K to 1M, Claude Opus 4.7 hits 1M on Bedrock, and GPT-5.5 strengthens long context.
because.ja: DeepSeek V4はネイティブ1Mコンテキストを搭載してリリースされ、Qwen3.6-27Bは262Kを1Mに拡張、Claude Opus 4.7はBedrockで1Mに到達し、GPT-5.5は長コンテキストを強化している。
because.es: DeepSeek V4 envía contexto de 1M nativo, Qwen3.6-27B extiende de 262K a 1M, Claude Opus 4.7 alcanza 1M en Bedrock, y GPT-5.5 refuerza el contexto largo.
because.fil: Ang DeepSeek V4 ay nagpapadala ng native 1M context, pinalalawak ng Qwen3.6-27B ang 262K papuntang 1M, ang Claude Opus 4.7 ay umaabot sa 1M sa Bedrock, at pinatatatag ng GPT-5.5 ang long context.

given.en: Hybrid attention drops 1M-context FLOPs to 27% and KV cache to 10% of V3.2, making 1M context affordable in open weights.
given.ja: ハイブリッド・アテンションにより1MコンテキストのFLOPsはV3.2比で27%、KVキャッシュは10%まで低下し、オープンウェイトでも1Mコンテキストが手の届く価格となった。
given.es: La atención híbrida reduce los FLOPs de contexto de 1M al 27% y la caché KV al 10% de V3.2, haciendo el contexto de 1M asequible en pesos abiertos.
given.fil: Ibinababa ng Hybrid Attention ang 1M-context FLOPs sa 27% at ang KV cache sa 10% ng V3.2, na ginagawang abot-kaya ang 1M context sa open weights.

so_that.en: Native 1M context becomes the open-weight floor and RAG flips from search-then-insert to dump-everything-plus-dynamic-prune workflows.
so_that.ja: ネイティブ1Mコンテキストがオープンウェイトの最低水準となり、RAGは検索後挿入から全部投入+動的プルーニングのワークフローへと反転する。
so_that.es: El contexto de 1M nativo se convierte en el piso de pesos abiertos y RAG cambia de búsqueda-luego-inserción a flujos de volcar-todo-más-poda-dinámica.
so_that.fil: Ang native 1M context ay nagiging open-weight floor at ang RAG ay lumilipat mula sa search-then-insert papunta sa dump-everything-plus-dynamic-prune workflows.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; 32K-128K open-weight models drop to legacy and vector-DB vendors reposition.
landing.ja: Q3 2026までに、32K-128Kのオープンウェイトモデルはレガシーに転落し、ベクトルDBベンダーは再ポジショニングを迫られる。
landing.es: Para el Q3 2026; los modelos de pesos abiertos de 32K-128K caen al nivel legacy y los proveedores de bases de datos vectoriales se reposicionan.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; ang 32K-128K open-weight models ay babagsak sa legacy at magpoposisyon muli ang mga vendor ng vector DB.

plain_language.en: Big AI models can now read a whole library at once, and cheap open-weight versions are catching up. Soon any model under that size will look outdated.
plain_language.ja: 巨大なAIモデルが今や図書館全体を一度に読み込めるようになり、安価なオープンウェイト版も追いついている。間もなくこのサイズ未満のどんなモデルも時代遅れに見えるだろう。
plain_language.es: Los grandes modelos de IA ahora pueden leer una biblioteca entera de una sola vez, y las versiones baratas de pesos abiertos están alcanzándolos. Pronto cualquier modelo por debajo de ese tamaño parecerá obsoleto.
plain_language.fil: Maaari nang basahin ng malalaking AI models ang isang buong library nang sabay-sabay, at humahabol na ang mga murang open-weight versions. Hindi magtatagal, magmumukhang luma ang sinumang model sa ibaba ng laking iyon.

title_locales.en: Open-weight 1M-context era arrives as the new floor by Q3 2026
title_locales.ja: オープンウェイトの1Mコンテキスト時代がQ3 2026までに新たな標準として到来する
title_locales.es: La era del contexto de 1M con pesos abiertos llega como el nuevo piso para el Q3 2026
title_locales.fil: Dumarating ang open-weight 1M-context era bilang bagong floor pagsapit ng Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: DeepSeek V4's native 1M context, Qwen3.6-27B's 262K to 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M on Bedrock, and GPT-5.5's long-context push all converge. By Q3 2026, native 1M context is expected to become the open-weight floor and RAG pipelines flip from search-and-insert to dump-and-prune.

summary_short_locales.en: DeepSeek V4's native 1M context, Qwen3.6-27B's 262K to 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M on Bedrock, and GPT-5.5's long-context push all converge. By Q3 2026, native 1M context is expected to become the open-weight floor and RAG pipelines flip from search-and-insert to dump-and-prune.
summary_short_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4のネイティブ1Mコンテキスト、Qwen3.6-27Bの262Kから1Mへの拡張、Claude Opus 4.7のBedrockでの1M、GPT-5.5の長コンテキスト推進が収束している。Q3 2026までに、ネイティブ1Mコンテキストがオープンウェイトの最低水準となり、RAGパイプラインは検索-挿入から投入-プルーニングへと反転すると予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: El contexto de 1M nativo de DeepSeek V4, la extensión de 262K a 1M de Qwen3.6-27B, el 1M de Claude Opus 4.7 en Bedrock, y el empuje de contexto largo de GPT-5.5 convergen todos. Para el Q3 2026, se espera que el contexto de 1M nativo se convierta en el piso de pesos abiertos y que los pipelines RAG cambien de buscar-e-insertar a volcar-y-podar.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang native 1M context ng DeepSeek V4, ang 262K to 1M extension ng Qwen3.6-27B, ang 1M ng Claude Opus 4.7 sa Bedrock, at ang long-context push ng GPT-5.5 ay lahat nagsasama-sama. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang native 1M context ay inaasahang magiging open-weight floor at ang RAG pipelines ay lilipat mula sa search-and-insert papunta sa dump-and-prune.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4 carrying 1M-context Hybrid-Attention plus Anthropic retiring its 1M-context beta to make 1M standard pricing on Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6 directly reinforces the open-weight 1M-as-default thesis. PolyKV's 97.7% KV-cache cut on shared multi-agent inference is exactly the long-context-cache replacement architecture the prediction projects. Strong reinforcing signal across both legs.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4 carrying 1M-context Hybrid-Attention plus Anthropic retiring its 1M-context beta to make 1M standard pricing on Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6 directly reinforces the open-weight 1M-as-default thesis. PolyKV's 97.7% KV-cache cut on shared multi-agent inference is exactly the long-context-cache replacement architecture the prediction projects. Strong reinforcing signal across both legs.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4が1MコンテキストのHybrid-Attentionを担い、Anthropicが1Mコンテキストベータを廃止してSonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6で1Mを標準価格化することは、オープンウェイト1Mデフォルトのテーゼを直接強化する。PolyKVの共有マルチエージェント推論における97.7%のKVキャッシュ削減は、まさに予測が投影する長コンテキストキャッシュ置換アーキテクチャである。両側で強い強化シグナル。
text_locales.es: DeepSeek V4 acarreando Hybrid-Attention de 1M-context más Anthropic retirando su beta de 1M-context para hacer que 1M sea pricing estándar en Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6 refuerza directamente la tesis de open-weight 1M-as-default. El recorte del 97.7% del KV-cache de PolyKV en inferencia multi-agente compartida es exactamente la arquitectura de reemplazo de long-context-cache que la predicción proyecta. Señal de refuerzo fuerte en ambos legs.
text_locales.fil: Ang DeepSeek V4 na nagdadala ng 1M-context Hybrid-Attention plus ang Anthropic na nag-retire ng 1M-context beta nito para gawing 1M standard pricing sa Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6 ay direktang nagpapatibay sa open-weight 1M-as-default thesis. Ang 97.7% KV-cache cut ng PolyKV sa shared multi-agent inference ay eksaktong long-context-cache replacement architecture na ipina-project ng prediction. Strong reinforcing signal sa magkabilang leg.

bridges.text: The Spring AI vector-DB query-plane CVE is direct evidence that vendors are repositioning vector stores into the inference-server-class attack surface — the architectural shift the prediction anticipated. PolyKV's shared asymmetric KV-pool plus DeepSeek V4's native 1M context fill in the long-context-cache replacement architecture. Strong signal across multiple legs of the thesis.

text_locales.en: The Spring AI vector-DB query-plane CVE is direct evidence that vendors are repositioning vector stores into the inference-server-class attack surface — the architectural shift the prediction anticipated. PolyKV's shared asymmetric KV-pool plus DeepSeek V4's native 1M context fill in the long-context-cache replacement architecture. Strong signal across multiple legs of the thesis.
text_locales.ja: Spring AIベクトルDBクエリプレーンCVEは、ベンダーがベクトルストアを推論サーバクラスの攻撃面に再配置していることの直接的な証拠である — 予測が予期したアーキテクチャ的シフトである。PolyKVの共有非対称KVプールに加え、DeepSeek V4のネイティブ1Mコンテキストが長文脈キャッシュ置換アーキテクチャを埋める。テーゼの複数の脚にわたる強いシグナル。
text_locales.es: El CVE de Spring AI en el plano de query del vector-DB es evidencia directa de que los vendors están reposicionando los vector stores hacia la superficie de ataque clase inference-server — el cambio arquitectónico que anticipaba la predicción. El pool asimétrico compartido de KV de PolyKV más el contexto nativo 1M de DeepSeek V4 completan la arquitectura de reemplazo del cache de contexto largo. Señal fuerte a través de múltiples patas de la tesis.
text_locales.fil: Ang Spring AI vector-DB query-plane CVE ay direktang ebidensiya na nire-reposisyon ng vendors ang vector stores tungo sa inference-server-class attack surface — ang architectural shift na inaasahan ng prediction. Ang shared asymmetric KV-pool ng PolyKV kasama ang native 1M context ng DeepSeek V4 ay pumupuno sa long-context-cache replacement architecture. Matibay na signal sa maraming legs ng thesis.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4 ships 1M context as a designed-in property, Corpus2Skill demonstrates that hierarchical-skill-tree navigation beats dense retrieval and agentic RAG on WixQA without an embedding index at serve time, and PolyKV proposes a shared multi-agent KV-cache pool. Together they materialize the consequence the prediction projects: pipelines flip from search-then-insert to dump-and-prune, and vector DBs are pushed toward long-context cache layers.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4 ships 1M context as a designed-in property, Corpus2Skill demonstrates that hierarchical-skill-tree navigation beats dense retrieval and agentic RAG on WixQA without an embedding index at serve time, and PolyKV proposes a shared multi-agent KV-cache pool. Together they materialize the consequence the prediction projects: pipelines flip from search-then-insert to dump-and-prune, and vector DBs are pushed toward long-context cache layers.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4が1Mコンテキストを設計上の特性として出荷し、Corpus2Skillが階層的スキル・ツリー・ナビゲーションがサーブ時に埋め込みインデックスなしでWixQA上で密検索とagentic RAGを上回ることを実証し、PolyKVが共有マルチエージェントKVキャッシュ・プールを提案する。これらが組み合わさり、予測が投影する結果を物質化する: パイプラインがsearch-then-insertからdump-and-pruneに反転し、ベクトルDBはロングコンテキスト・キャッシュ層に押し進められる。
text_locales.es: DeepSeek V4 envia contexto 1M como propiedad disenada-por-dentro, Corpus2Skill demuestra que la navegacion de skill-tree jerarquico supera a dense retrieval y agentic RAG en WixQA sin un indice de embedding en serve time, y PolyKV propone un pool de KV-cache compartido multi-agente. Juntos materializan la consecuencia que la prediccion proyecta: los pipelines voltean de search-then-insert a dump-and-prune, y los vector DBs son empujados hacia capas de cache long-context.
text_locales.fil: Ang DeepSeek V4 ay naglalabas ng 1M context bilang designed-in property, ang Corpus2Skill ay nagpapakita na ang hierarchical-skill-tree navigation ay tinatalo ang dense retrieval at agentic RAG sa WixQA nang walang embedding index sa serve time, at ang PolyKV ay nagmumungkahi ng shared multi-agent KV-cache pool. Magkakasama silang nag-mamaterialize ng konsekwensyang ipino-project ng hula: ang pipelines ay lumilipat mula search-then-insert papunta sa dump-and-prune, at ang vector DBs ay itinutulak patungo sa long-context cache layers.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4's designed-in 1M context compute economics plus Opus 4.7's 1M ceiling on Bedrock reinforce the underlying premise that native 1M is now the floor rather than a bolt-on extension across both open and proprietary surfaces.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4's designed-in 1M context compute economics plus Opus 4.7's 1M ceiling on Bedrock reinforce the underlying premise that native 1M is now the floor rather than a bolt-on extension across both open and proprietary surfaces.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4 のはじめから組み込まれた 1M コンテキスト計算経済学と Bedrock 上の Opus 4.7 の 1M 上限は、ネイティブ 1M がオープン側と独自側の両表面でアドオン拡張ではなく床になっているという根底前提を補強する。
text_locales.es: La economía de cómputo de contexto 1M diseñada de DeepSeek V4 más el techo 1M de Opus 4.7 en Bedrock refuerzan la premisa subyacente de que 1M nativo es ahora el piso en lugar de una extensión bolt-on a través de superficies tanto abiertas como propietarias.
text_locales.fil: Ang designed-in 1M context compute economics ng DeepSeek V4 plus ang 1M ceiling ng Opus 4.7 sa Bedrock ay pinatatatag ang underlying premise na ang native 1M ay floor ngayon sa halip na bolt-on extension sa parehong open at proprietary surfaces.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4's designed-in 1M context plus Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension reinforce the underlying premise that native 1M is now the open-weight floor, not a bolt-on.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4's designed-in 1M context plus Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension reinforce the underlying premise that native 1M is now the open-weight floor, not a bolt-on.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4 の設計時点での 1M コンテキストと Qwen3.6-27B の 262K → 1M 拡張は、ネイティブな 1M が今やオープンウェイトのフロアであり、後付けではないという根底前提を補強している。
text_locales.es: El 1M context diseñado en DeepSeek V4 más la extensión 262K → 1M de Qwen3.6-27B refuerzan la premisa subyacente de que el 1M nativo es ahora el piso de pesos abiertos, no un agregado.
text_locales.fil: Ang designed-in 1M context ng DeepSeek V4 kasama ang 262K -> 1M extension ng Qwen3.6-27B ay nagpapatibay sa underlying premise na ang native 1M ay ngayon ang open-weight floor, hindi bolt-on.

bridges.text: gHacks' confirmation of DeepSeek V4's Hybrid Attention cutting memory 9.5x-13.7x at 1M-token context with Huawei Ascend tuning and ~7x lower cost than Opus 4.7 plus Hugging Face's Qwen3.6-27B card with 262K context extensible to 1M deliver two concurrent native-1M open-weight confirmations inside the window.

text_locales.en: gHacks' confirmation of DeepSeek V4's Hybrid Attention cutting memory 9.5x-13.7x at 1M-token context with Huawei Ascend tuning and ~7x lower cost than Opus 4.7 plus Hugging Face's Qwen3.6-27B card with 262K context extensible to 1M deliver two concurrent native-1M open-weight confirmations inside the window.
text_locales.ja: gHacksによるDeepSeek V4のハイブリッド・アテンション(1Mトークン・コンテキストでメモリを9.5x-13.7x削減、ファーウェイ・アセンドのチューニング、Opus 4.7より~7x低コスト)の確認に加え、Hugging FaceのQwen3.6-27Bカード(262Kコンテキスト、1Mまで拡張可能)が、ウィンドウ内に2件の同時ネイティブ1Mオープンウェイト確認を提供する。
text_locales.es: La confirmación de gHacks de Hybrid Attention de DeepSeek V4 recortando memoria 9.5x-13.7x a contexto de 1M tokens con ajuste para Huawei Ascend y ~7x menor costo que Opus 4.7 más la tarjeta Qwen3.6-27B de Hugging Face con contexto 262K extensible a 1M entregan dos confirmaciones concurrentes de open-weight nativo-1M dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang gHacks' confirmation ng DeepSeek V4's Hybrid Attention na nagba-bawas ng memory ng 9.5x-13.7x sa 1M-token context na may Huawei Ascend tuning at ~7x mas mababang gastos kaysa Opus 4.7 plus ang Hugging Face's Qwen3.6-27B card na may 262K context na maaaring i-extend sa 1M ay naghahatid ng dalawang concurrent native-1M open-weight confirmations sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: TechXplore's Hybrid Attention writeup pinning long-context inference cost at 27% of V3.2 with KV cache at 10%, Cryptonomist's open-source 1M-token race framing, and OFox's release guide confirming 1.6T MoE / 1M context / Apache 2.0 / immediate API availability give three concurrent confirmations of native 1M context in open weights.

text_locales.en: TechXplore's Hybrid Attention writeup pinning long-context inference cost at 27% of V3.2 with KV cache at 10%, Cryptonomist's open-source 1M-token race framing, and OFox's release guide confirming 1.6T MoE / 1M context / Apache 2.0 / immediate API availability give three concurrent confirmations of native 1M context in open weights.
text_locales.ja: TechXploreのハイブリッド・アテンション分析が長コンテキスト推論コストをV3.2の27%、KVキャッシュを10%にピンポイント、Cryptonomistのオープンソース1Mトークンレースの枠組み、OFoxのリリース・ガイドが1.6T MoE / 1Mコンテキスト / Apache 2.0 / 即時API利用可能を確認することが、オープンウェイトでのネイティブ1Mコンテキストの3つの同時並行的確認を提供する。
text_locales.es: El writeup de Hybrid Attention de TechXplore fijando el costo de inferencia de contexto largo al 27% de V3.2 con caché KV al 10%, el encuadre de Cryptonomist de la carrera open-source de 1M tokens, y la guía de lanzamiento de OFox confirmando 1.6T MoE / contexto 1M / Apache 2.0 / disponibilidad inmediata de API dan tres confirmaciones concurrentes de contexto 1M nativo en pesos abiertos.
text_locales.fil: Ang Hybrid Attention writeup ng TechXplore na nagpipipi sa long-context inference cost sa 27% ng V3.2 kasama ang KV cache sa 10%, ang open-source 1M-token race framing ng Cryptonomist, at ang release guide ng OFox na nagkukumpirma ng 1.6T MoE / 1M context / Apache 2.0 / agarang API availability ay nagbibigay ng tatlong sabay-sabay na kumpirmasyon ng native 1M context sa open weights.

outcome_locales.es: superficie de producto en GA enfatizando la optimización de caché de contexto largo (offload de caché KV, prompt caching embedding-aware, retrieval-as-prune) con rutas de integración documentadas hacia runtimes de modelo de contexto de 1M

motivation_locales.en: if vector DBs stay framed as search-only retrieval, the value prop collapses as native 1M context becomes default; whichever vendor ships the cache-layer story first holds the long-context spend
motivation_locales.ja: ベクトルDBが検索専用のリトリーバルとして枠組みされ続けると、ネイティブ1Mコンテキストがデフォルトになるにつれてバリュー・プロップが崩壊する;最初にキャッシュ・レイヤー・ストーリーを出荷したベンダーが長コンテキスト支出を保持する
motivation_locales.es: si las bases de datos vectoriales se mantienen enmarcadas como retrieval solo de búsqueda, la propuesta de valor colapsa a medida que el contexto de 1M nativo se convierte en predeterminado; el primer proveedor que envíe la historia de capa de caché captura el gasto de contexto largo
motivation_locales.fil: kung mananatili ang vector DBs bilang search-only retrieval, gumuguho ang value prop habang nagiging default ang native 1M context; alinmang vendor ang unang magpadala ng cache-layer story ay humahawak sa long-context spend

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「1Mコンテキストがデフォルト」のオープンウェイト時代がQ3 2026までに本格到来する。** DeepSeek V4の「1Mコンテキストは後付けではなく設計段階から組み込み」、Qwen3.6-27Bの262K → 1M拡張、Claude Opus 4.7の1Mコンテキスト(Bedrock)、GPT-5.5の長コンテキスト強化は、すべて同じ方向を指している。Q3 2026までに、「ネイティブ1Mコンテキスト」がオープンウェイトの最低水準となり、既存の32K-128Kモデルはレガシーに転落する。RAGパイプラインは「検索 → コンテキスト挿入」から「全部投入 + 動的プルーニング」へと反転し、ベクトルDBベンダーは「長コンテキスト・キャッシュ最適化レイヤー」への再定義を迫られる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La era de "contexto de 1M por defecto" en pesos abiertos llega de lleno para el Q3 2026.** El "contexto de 1M diseñado de origen, no añadido a la fuerza" de DeepSeek V4, la extensión de 262K → 1M de Qwen3.6-27B, el contexto de 1M de Claude Opus 4.7 (Bedrock) y el refuerzo de contexto largo de GPT-5.5 apuntan todos en la misma dirección. Para el Q3 2026, el "contexto de 1M nativo" se convierte en el piso para los pesos abiertos, y los modelos existentes de 32K-128K caen al nivel legacy. Los pipelines RAG cambian de "búsqueda → inserción de contexto" a "volcar todo + poda dinámica", y los proveedores de bases de datos vectoriales son empujados a redefinirse como "capas de optimización de caché de contexto largo". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "1M context bilang default" open-weight era ay buong dadating sa Q3 2026.** Ang "1M context designed in, not bolted on" ng DeepSeek V4, ang 262K to 1M extension ng Qwen3.6-27B, ang 1M context ng Claude Opus 4.7 (Bedrock), at ang long-context strengthening ng GPT-5.5 ay lahat tumuturo sa parehong direksyon. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang "native 1M context" ay nagiging floor para sa open weights, at ang umiiral na 32K-128K models ay babagsak sa legacy. Ang RAG pipelines ay lumilipat mula sa "search → context-insert" papunta sa "dump everything in + dynamic prune," at ang mga vendor ng vector DB ay napipilitang i-redefine ang sarili bilang "long-context cache optimization layers." nodes.label: AMD discloses AI-accelerator revenue as 10-Q segment footnote by Q3 2026
nodes.short_label: AMD discloses AI-accelerator revenue as 10-Q segment footnote by Q3 2026
nodes.title: AMD discloses AI-accelerator revenue as 10-Q segment footnote by Q3 2026
nodes.description: By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — Q1 revenue $10.25B (vs $9.85B consensus, +38% YoY), adjusted EPS $1.37 (vs $1.27 consensus, +9.6% beat), Data Center segment $5.78B at +57% YoY (consensus $5.56B / +51.5%), non-GAAP gross margin 55%, Q2 guide $11.2B +/- $300M (vs Street $10.52B, implying +50.6% YoY and +9.1% sequential), CEO Lisa Su declaring Data Center now the "primary driver of revenue and earnings growth," MI450 Series + Helios customer engagement "strengthening," AMD shares +4.4% after-hours — combined with the Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent, the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV launches that monetize frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper, the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch with native Microsoft 365 + Moody's MCP integration, and the standing $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape forces AMD (or a NVIDIA / Broadcom sibling) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate. The disclosure precedent is most likely to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape — a single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout — rather than a more invasive cloud-segment-style disclosure regime. Forcing function is the asymmetric narrative pressure: Lisa Su has now publicly named Data Center the primary growth engine on the print itself, but the segment still bundles EPYC server CPUs with Instinct MI300/MI325 AI accelerators; buyside models cannot triangulate accelerator-only ASP and unit economics from the bundled line, and the May 5 Anthropic-finance-agent + FIS-AML stack makes the AI-accelerator-only sub-line the operative buyside disclosure ask. AMD CFO commentary on the next earnings call is the lead indicator; NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure.

description.en: By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — Q1 revenue $10.25B (vs $9.85B consensus, +38% YoY), adjusted EPS $1.37 (vs $1.27 consensus, +9.6% beat), Data Center segment $5.78B at +57% YoY (consensus $5.56B / +51.5%), non-GAAP gross margin 55%, Q2 guide $11.2B +/- $300M (vs Street $10.52B, implying +50.6% YoY and +9.1% sequential), CEO Lisa Su declaring Data Center now the "primary driver of revenue and earnings growth," MI450 Series + Helios customer engagement "strengthening," AMD shares +4.4% after-hours — combined with the Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent, the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV launches that monetize frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper, the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch with native Microsoft 365 + Moody's MCP integration, and the standing $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape forces AMD (or a NVIDIA / Broadcom sibling) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate. The disclosure precedent is most likely to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape — a single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout — rather than a more invasive cloud-segment-style disclosure regime. Forcing function is the asymmetric narrative pressure: Lisa Su has now publicly named Data Center the primary growth engine on the print itself, but the segment still bundles EPYC server CPUs with Instinct MI300/MI325 AI accelerators; buyside models cannot triangulate accelerator-only ASP and unit economics from the bundled line, and the May 5 Anthropic-finance-agent + FIS-AML stack makes the AI-accelerator-only sub-line the operative buyside disclosure ask. AMD CFO commentary on the next earnings call is the lead indicator; NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure.
description.ja: 2026年Q3までに、AMDの5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — Q1売上 $10.25B(コンセンサス $9.85B 対比、前年比+38%)、調整後EPS $1.37(コンセンサス $1.27 対比、+9.6%ビート)、データセンター・セグメント $5.78B 前年比+57%(コンセンサス $5.56B / +51.5%)、非GAAP粗利率55%、Q2ガイダンス $11.2B ±$300M(ストリート $10.52B 対比、前年比+50.6%、前期比+9.1%)、CEOのLisa Suがデータセンターを「売上と利益成長の主要ドライバー」と宣言、MI450 Series + Heliosの顧客エンゲージメントは「強化中」、AMD株価はアフターアワーズで+4.4% — に、4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例、5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAIの並行JVローンチ(フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーとして収益化)、5月5日のAnthropic 10エージェント金融サービス・ローンチ(Microsoft 365 + Moody's MCPネイティブ統合)、そして$700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープが組み合わさり、AMD(あるいはNVIDIA / Broadcomの兄弟)に対し、SECの強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント型開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形(任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目)を最も高い確率で踏襲する。強制関数は非対称的な物語プレッシャー: Lisa Suが現在データセンターを主要成長エンジンと公に決算自体で名指ししたが、セグメントは依然としてEPYCサーバーCPUとInstinct MI300/MI325 AIアクセラレータをバンドルしており、バイサイドのモデルではバンドル・ラインからアクセラレータ専用ASPとユニット・エコノミクスを三角測量できない。5月5日のAnthropic金融エージェント + FIS-AMLスタックは、AIアクセラレータ専用サブラインを実務上のバイサイド開示要求に押し上げる。次回決算電話でのAMD CFOコメンタリーが先行指標、NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーを通じて1〜2回のファイリング・サイクル以内に追随する。
description.es: Para Q3 2026, el reporte Q1 2026 de AMD del 5 de mayo — ingresos Q1 de $10.25B (vs consenso de $9.85B, +38% YoY), EPS ajustado de $1.37 (vs consenso de $1.27, +9.6% de superación), segmento Data Center en $5.78B con +57% YoY (consenso de $5.56B / +51.5%), margen bruto no-GAAP del 55%, guía Q2 de $11.2B +/- $300M (vs Street $10.52B, lo que implica +50.6% YoY y +9.1% secuencial), la CEO Lisa Su declarando que Data Center es ahora el "motor principal del crecimiento de ingresos y ganancias", el engagement de clientes con MI450 Series + Helios "fortaleciéndose", las acciones de AMD +4.4% after-hours — combinado con el precedente del 29 de abril de la nota al pie de partida única de tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT, los lanzamientos paralelos de JV de Anthropic + OpenAI del 4 de mayo que monetizan la IA de frontera como un envoltorio de capital estructurado, el lanzamiento del 5 de mayo de Anthropic con 10 agentes de servicios financieros con integración nativa de Microsoft 365 + MCP de Moody's, y la cinta permanente de capex de IA Big-Tech 2026 de $700B obliga a AMD (o a un hermano NVIDIA / Broadcom) a publicar ingresos exclusivos de aceleradores de IA como nota al pie de segmento del 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato de la SEC. El precedente de divulgación es más probable que refleje la forma de la nota al pie de tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT — una partida única con desglose suplementario opcional — en lugar de un régimen de divulgación más invasivo al estilo de segmento de nube. La función forzante es la presión narrativa asimétrica: Lisa Su ahora ha nombrado públicamente a Data Center como el motor principal de crecimiento sobre el reporte mismo, pero el segmento aún agrupa CPUs servidor EPYC con aceleradores de IA Instinct MI300/MI325; los modelos del lado comprador no pueden triangular el ASP exclusivo de aceleradores ni la economía unitaria desde la línea agrupada, y el stack del 5 de mayo de agentes financieros de Anthropic + AML de FIS hace que la sub-línea exclusiva de aceleradores de IA sea la solicitud operativa de divulgación del lado comprador. El comentario del CFO de AMD en la próxima llamada de ganancias es el indicador líder; NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación vía presión de divulgación competitiva.
description.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — Q1 revenue $10.25B (vs $9.85B consensus, +38% YoY), adjusted EPS $1.37 (vs $1.27 consensus, +9.6% beat), Data Center segment $5.78B sa +57% YoY (consensus $5.56B / +51.5%), non-GAAP gross margin 55%, Q2 guide $11.2B +/- $300M (vs Street $10.52B, na nagpapahiwatig ng +50.6% YoY at +9.1% sequential), idineklara ni CEO Lisa Su na ang Data Center na ngayon ang "primary driver of revenue and earnings growth," ang MI450 Series + Helios customer engagement ay "strengthening," tumaas ng 4.4% ang AMD shares after-hours — pinagsama sa Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent, ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV launches na nagmu-monetize ng frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper, ang May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch na may native Microsoft 365 + Moody's MCP integration, at ang nakatayong $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape ay pumipilit sa AMD (o sa NVIDIA / Broadcom sibling) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate. Ang disclosure precedent ay pinakamalamang na susunod sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape — single-line-item na may opsyonal na supplementary breakout — sa halip na sa mas invasive na cloud-segment-style disclosure regime. Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetric narrative pressure: tahasan nang pinangalanan ni Lisa Su ang Data Center bilang primary growth engine sa print mismo, ngunit ang segment ay bundling pa rin ang EPYC server CPUs sa Instinct MI300/MI325 AI accelerators; hindi ma-triangulate ng buyside models ang accelerator-only ASP at unit economics mula sa bundled line, at ang May 5 Anthropic-finance-agent + FIS-AML stack ang nagpapagawa sa AI-accelerator-only sub-line bilang operative buyside disclosure ask. Ang AMD CFO commentary sa susunod na earnings call ang lead indicator; susunod ang NVIDIA + Broadcom sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure.

reasoning.because: AMD Q1 print landed +38% YoY $10.25B with Data Center +57% YoY at $5.78B, named primary driver by Lisa Su.
reasoning.given: MSFT $37B AI run-rate single-line precedent + parallel May 4 AI-JV equity wrappers + $700B 2026 capex tape harden the buyside disclosure bar.
reasoning.so_that: AMD publishes AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote (MI300/MI325/MI450 split from EPYC) ahead of any SEC mandate.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; AMD most-likely first mover, NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles.
reasoning.plain_language: AMD's data center sales jumped 57 percent and Lisa Su called it the main growth engine, so investors will want AI chip revenue shown separately.

given.en: MSFT $37B AI run-rate single-line precedent + parallel May 4 AI-JV equity wrappers + $700B 2026 capex tape harden the buyside disclosure bar.
given.ja: MSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン前例 + 5月4日の並行AI-JVエクイティラッパー + $700Bの2026年capexテープがバイサイドの開示水準を硬化させている。
given.es: El precedente de partida única de tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT + los envoltorios de capital paralelos de JV de IA del 4 de mayo + la cinta de capex 2026 de $700B endurecen la barra de divulgación del lado comprador.
given.fil: Ang MSFT $37B AI run-rate single-line precedent + parallel May 4 AI-JV equity wrappers + $700B 2026 capex tape ay nagpapatigas sa buyside disclosure bar.

so_that.en: AMD publishes AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote (MI300/MI325/MI450 split from EPYC) ahead of any SEC mandate.
so_that.ja: AMDがAIアクセラレータ専用売上(MI300/MI325/MI450をEPYCから分離)をSEC強制以前に10-Qセグメント脚注として公表する。
so_that.es: AMD publica ingresos exclusivos de aceleradores de IA como nota al pie de segmento del 10-Q (división MI300/MI325/MI450 de EPYC) antes de cualquier mandato de la SEC.
so_that.fil: Maglathala ang AMD ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote (MI300/MI325/MI450 hiwalay sa EPYC) bago ang anumang SEC mandate.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; AMD most-likely first mover, NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles.
landing.ja: 2026年Q3まで; AMDが最有力の先駆者、NVIDIA + Broadcomは1〜2回のファイリング・サイクル以内で追随。
landing.es: Para Q3 2026; AMD el más probable primer movedor, NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; AMD ang pinakamalamang na first mover, susunod ang NVIDIA + Broadcom sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles.

plain_language.en: AMD's data center sales jumped 57 percent and Lisa Su called it the main growth engine, so investors will want AI chip revenue shown separately.
plain_language.ja: AMDのデータセンター売上は前年比57%急増し、Lisa Suが主要成長エンジンと呼んだ — 投資家はAIチップ売上を別ラインで見たがるはずだ。
plain_language.es: Las ventas de Data Center de AMD saltaron 57 por ciento y Lisa Su lo llamó el motor principal de crecimiento, así que los inversionistas querrán que se muestren los ingresos de chips de IA por separado.
plain_language.fil: Tumalon ng 57 percent ang data center sales ng AMD at tinawag ito ni Lisa Su na pangunahing growth engine, kaya gugustuhin ng investors na ipakita nang hiwalay ang AI chip revenue.

title_locales.en: AMD discloses AI-accelerator revenue as 10-Q segment footnote by Q3 2026
title_locales.ja: AMDが2026年Q3までにAIアクセラレータ売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として開示する
title_locales.es: AMD divulga ingresos de aceleradores de IA como nota al pie de segmento del 10-Q para Q3 2026
title_locales.fil: Maglalathala ang AMD ng AI-accelerator revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote pagsapit ng Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: AMD's May 5 Q1 print beat ($10.25B, +38% YoY; Data Center $5.78B, +57% YoY) with Lisa Su naming Data Center the primary growth driver and Q2 guide $11.2B. Combined with the MSFT $37B AI run-rate precedent, by Q3 2026 AMD is expected to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote.

summary_short_locales.en: AMD's May 5 Q1 print beat ($10.25B, +38% YoY; Data Center $5.78B, +57% YoY) with Lisa Su naming Data Center the primary growth driver and Q2 guide $11.2B. Combined with the MSFT $37B AI run-rate precedent, by Q3 2026 AMD is expected to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote.
summary_short_locales.ja: AMDの5月5日 Q1決算は$10.25B(前年比+38%)、データセンター$5.78B(前年比+57%)で着地し、Lisa Suがデータセンターを主要成長ドライバーと名指し、Q2ガイダンスは$11.2B。MSFT $37B AIランレート前例と組み合わさり、2026年Q3までにAMDがAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することが期待される。
summary_short_locales.es: El reporte Q1 de AMD del 5 de mayo superó expectativas ($10.25B, +38% YoY; Data Center $5.78B, +57% YoY) con Lisa Su nombrando a Data Center como el motor principal de crecimiento y guía Q2 de $11.2B. Combinado con el precedente de tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT, para Q3 2026 se espera que AMD publique ingresos exclusivos de aceleradores de IA como nota al pie de segmento del 10-Q.
summary_short_locales.fil: Tinalo ng AMD May 5 Q1 print ang consensus ($10.25B, +38% YoY; Data Center $5.78B, +57% YoY) habang pinangalanan ni Lisa Su ang Data Center bilang primary growth driver at Q2 guide $11.2B. Pinagsama sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate precedent, pagsapit ng Q3 2026 inaasahang maglathala ang AMD ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote.

needs.actor: AMD CFO Jean Hu + Investor Relations + Chief Accounting Officer
needs.job: draft an AI-accelerator-only revenue line as a 10-Q segment footnote that splits MI300 / MI325 / MI450 from EPYC server CPUs inside the Data Center segment.
needs.outcome: 10-Q footnote disclosing AI-accelerator-only revenue with optional supplementary unit-economics breakout, walked through external auditor review and referenced on the next earnings call.
needs.motivation: Lisa Su has now publicly named Data Center the primary growth engine on the Q1 print, but buyside cannot triangulate accelerator-only ASP from the bundled line; voluntary disclosure pre-empts a more invasive SEC cloud-segment-style regime.

job_locales.en: draft an AI-accelerator-only revenue line as a 10-Q segment footnote that splits MI300 / MI325 / MI450 from EPYC server CPUs inside the Data Center segment.
job_locales.ja: データセンター・セグメント内でMI300 / MI325 / MI450をEPYCサーバーCPUから分離するAIアクセラレータ専用売上ラインを10-Qセグメント脚注として起草する。
job_locales.es: redactar una línea de ingresos exclusiva de aceleradores de IA como nota al pie de segmento del 10-Q que separe MI300 / MI325 / MI450 de las CPUs servidor EPYC dentro del segmento Data Center.
job_locales.fil: i-draft ang AI-accelerator-only revenue line bilang 10-Q segment footnote na naghihiwalay sa MI300 / MI325 / MI450 mula sa EPYC server CPUs sa loob ng Data Center segment.

outcome_locales.en: 10-Q footnote disclosing AI-accelerator-only revenue with optional supplementary unit-economics breakout, walked through external auditor review and referenced on the next earnings call.
outcome_locales.ja: AIアクセラレータ専用売上を任意の補足ユニット・エコノミクス・ブレイクアウトとともに開示する10-Q脚注を、外部監査人レビューを通過させ、次回決算電話で参照する。
outcome_locales.es: Nota al pie del 10-Q divulgando ingresos exclusivos de aceleradores de IA con desglose suplementario opcional de economía unitaria, recorrida con revisión del auditor externo y referenciada en la próxima llamada de ganancias.
outcome_locales.fil: 10-Q footnote na nagde-disclose ng AI-accelerator-only revenue na may opsyonal na supplementary unit-economics breakout, dumaan sa external auditor review at sinanggi sa susunod na earnings call.

motivation_locales.en: Lisa Su has now publicly named Data Center the primary growth engine on the Q1 print, but buyside cannot triangulate accelerator-only ASP from the bundled line; voluntary disclosure pre-empts a more invasive SEC cloud-segment-style regime.
motivation_locales.ja: Lisa SuがQ1決算でデータセンターを主要成長エンジンと公に名指ししたが、バイサイドはバンドル・ラインからアクセラレータ専用ASPを三角測量できない; 任意開示はより侵襲的なSECクラウドセグメント型体制を先取りする。
motivation_locales.es: Lisa Su ahora ha nombrado públicamente a Data Center como el motor principal de crecimiento sobre el reporte Q1, pero el lado comprador no puede triangular el ASP exclusivo de aceleradores desde la línea agrupada; la divulgación voluntaria se anticipa a un régimen más invasivo estilo segmento de nube de la SEC.
motivation_locales.fil: Tahasan nang pinangalanan ni Lisa Su ang Data Center bilang primary growth engine sa Q1 print, ngunit hindi ma-triangulate ng buyside ang accelerator-only ASP mula sa bundled line; pinipigilan ng voluntary disclosure ang mas invasive na SEC cloud-segment-style regime.

needs.actor: Big-3 hyperscaler AI-infrastructure procurement leads (Microsoft Azure, AWS, Google Cloud) plus their sell-side semiconductor analyst counterparties (Bernstein, Morgan Stanley, Mizuho, RBC, DA Davidson)

needs.motivation: $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape forces buyside discipline; without an accelerator-only line the customer cannot model vendor unit economics or roadmap risk against MI450 + Helios competitive engagement.

job_locales.en: drive the buyside disclosure ask by writing AI-accelerator-only revenue segmentation into procurement scorecards and into client-facing valuation models so vendors that opt out of footnote disclosure face an explicit valuation discount.
job_locales.ja: AIアクセラレータ専用売上のセグメント化を調達スコアカードとクライアント向けバリュエーション・モデルに書き込み、脚注開示をオプトアウトしたベンダーが明示的なバリュエーション割引に直面するようにすることで、バイサイドの開示要求を駆動する。
job_locales.es: impulsar la solicitud de divulgación del lado comprador escribiendo la segmentación de ingresos exclusivos de aceleradores de IA en scorecards de adquisición y en modelos de valuación de cara al cliente para que los vendors que opten por no hacer la divulgación de nota al pie enfrenten un descuento de valuación explícito.
job_locales.fil: itulak ang buyside disclosure ask sa pamamagitan ng pagsulat ng AI-accelerator-only revenue segmentation papasok sa procurement scorecards at sa client-facing valuation models upang ang mga vendors na tumatanggi sa footnote disclosure ay humarap sa explicit valuation discount.

outcome_locales.en: Hyperscaler vendor-scorecards plus published sell-side coverage notes that treat AI-accelerator-revenue segmentation as the disclosure baseline through the H2 2026 earnings cycles.
outcome_locales.ja: ハイパースケーラー・ベンダー・スコアカードと公表されたセルサイド・カバレッジ・ノートが、H2 2026決算サイクルを通じてAIアクセラレータ売上セグメント化を開示ベースラインとして扱う。
outcome_locales.es: Scorecards de vendors hyperscaler más notas de cobertura del sell-side publicadas que tratan la segmentación de ingresos de aceleradores de IA como la línea base de divulgación a través de los ciclos de ganancias H2 2026.
outcome_locales.fil: Hyperscaler vendor-scorecards plus published sell-side coverage notes na tumatrato sa AI-accelerator-revenue segmentation bilang disclosure baseline sa buong H2 2026 earnings cycles.

motivation_locales.en: $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape forces buyside discipline; without an accelerator-only line the customer cannot model vendor unit economics or roadmap risk against MI450 + Helios competitive engagement.
motivation_locales.ja: $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープがバイサイド規律を強いる; アクセラレータ専用ラインなしでは、顧客はベンダーのユニット・エコノミクスやMI450 + Helios競合エンゲージメントに対するロードマップ・リスクをモデル化できない。
motivation_locales.es: La cinta de capex de IA Big-Tech 2026 de $700B fuerza disciplina del lado comprador; sin una línea exclusiva de aceleradores el cliente no puede modelar la economía unitaria del vendor o el riesgo de roadmap contra el engagement competitivo de MI450 + Helios.
motivation_locales.fil: Pinipilit ng $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape ang buyside discipline; nang walang accelerator-only line hindi ma-model ng customer ang vendor unit economics o roadmap risk laban sa MI450 + Helios competitive engagement.

outcome_locales.fil: SEC staff comment letter (o Dear-Issuer-style guidance) na nakadirekta sa AMD / NVIDIA / Broadcom na humihingi ng AI-accelerator revenue disaggregation sa ilalim ng ASC 280 segment-reporting principles.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — Q1 revenue $10.25B (vs $9.85B consensus, +38% YoY), adjusted EPS $1.37 (vs $1.27 consensus, +9.6% beat), Data Center segment $5.78B at +57% YoY (consensus $5.56B / +51.5%), non-GAAP gross margin 55%, Q2 guide $11.2B +/- $300M (vs Street $10.52B, implying +50.6% YoY and +9.1% sequential), CEO Lisa Su declaring Data Center now the "primary driver of revenue and earnings growth," MI450 Series + Helios customer engagement "strengthening," AMD shares +4.4% after-hours — combined with the Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent, the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV launches that monetize frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper, the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch with native Microsoft 365 + Moody's MCP integration, and the standing $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape forces AMD (or a NVIDIA / Broadcom sibling) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate. The disclosure precedent is most likely to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape — a single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout — rather than a more invasive cloud-segment-style disclosure regime. Forcing function is the asymmetric narrative pressure: Lisa Su has now publicly named Data Center the primary growth engine on the print itself, but the segment still bundles EPYC server CPUs with Instinct MI300/MI325 AI accelerators; buyside models cannot triangulate accelerator-only ASP and unit economics from the bundled line, and the May 5 Anthropic-finance-agent + FIS-AML stack makes the AI-accelerator-only sub-line the operative buyside disclosure ask. AMD CFO commentary on the next earnings call is the lead indicator; NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure.

AMD CFO commentary on the next earnings call is the lead indicator; NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: 2026年Q3までに、AMDの5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — Q1売上 $10.25B(コンセンサス $9.85B 対比、前年比+38%)、調整後EPS $1.37(コンセンサス $1.27 対比、+9.6%ビート)、データセンター・セグメント $5.78B 前年比+57%(コンセンサス $5.56B / +51.5%)、非GAAP粗利率55%、Q2ガイダンス $11.2B ±$300M(ストリート $10.52B 対比、前年比+50.6%、前期比+9.1%)、CEOのLisa Suがデータセンターを「売上と利益成長の主要ドライバー」と宣言、MI450 Series + Heliosの顧客エンゲージメントは「強化中」、AMD株価はアフターアワーズで+4.4% — に、4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例、5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAIの並行JVローンチ(フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーとして収益化)、5月5日のAnthropic 10エージェント金融サービス・ローンチ(Microsoft 365 + Moody's MCPネイティブ統合)、そして$700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープが組み合わさり、AMD(あるいはNVIDIA / Broadcomの兄弟)に対し、SECの強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント型開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形(任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目)を最も高い確率で踏襲する。強制関数は非対称的な物語プレッシャー: Lisa Suが現在データセンターを主要成長エンジンと公に決算自体で名指ししたが、セグメントは依然としてEPYCサーバーCPUとInstinct MI300/MI325 AIアクセラレータをバンドルしており、バイサイドのモデルではバンドル・ラインからアクセラレータ専用ASPとユニット・エコノミクスを三角測量できない。5月5日のAnthropic金融エージェント + FIS-AMLスタックは、AIアクセラレータ専用サブラインを実務上のバイサイド開示要求に押し上げる。次回決算電話でのAMD CFOコメンタリーが先行指標、NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーを通じて1〜2回のファイリング・サイクル以内に追随する。
prediction_summary_locales.es: Para Q3 2026, el reporte Q1 2026 de AMD del 5 de mayo — ingresos Q1 de $10.25B (vs consenso de $9.85B, +38% YoY), EPS ajustado de $1.37 (vs consenso de $1.27, +9.6% de superación), segmento Data Center en $5.78B con +57% YoY (consenso de $5.56B / +51.5%), margen bruto no-GAAP del 55%, guía Q2 de $11.2B +/- $300M (vs Street $10.52B, lo que implica +50.6% YoY y +9.1% secuencial), la CEO Lisa Su declarando que Data Center es ahora el "motor principal del crecimiento de ingresos y ganancias", el engagement de clientes con MI450 Series + Helios "fortaleciéndose", las acciones de AMD +4.4% after-hours — combinado con el precedente del 29 de abril de la nota al pie de partida única de tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT, los lanzamientos paralelos de JV de Anthropic + OpenAI del 4 de mayo que monetizan la IA de frontera como un envoltorio de capital estructurado, el lanzamiento del 5 de mayo de Anthropic con 10 agentes de servicios financieros con integración nativa de Microsoft 365 + MCP de Moody's, y la cinta permanente de capex de IA Big-Tech 2026 de $700B obliga a AMD (o a un hermano NVIDIA / Broadcom) a publicar ingresos exclusivos de aceleradores de IA como nota al pie de segmento del 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato de la SEC. El precedente de divulgación es más probable que refleje la forma de la nota al pie de tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT — una partida única con desglose suplementario opcional — en lugar de un régimen de divulgación más invasivo al estilo de segmento de nube. La función forzante es la presión narrativa asimétrica: Lisa Su ahora ha nombrado públicamente a Data Center como el motor principal de crecimiento sobre el reporte mismo, pero el segmento aún agrupa CPUs servidor EPYC con aceleradores de IA Instinct MI300/MI325; los modelos del lado comprador no pueden triangular el ASP exclusivo de aceleradores ni la economía unitaria desde la línea agrupada, y el stack del 5 de mayo de agentes financieros de Anthropic + AML de FIS hace que la sub-línea exclusiva de aceleradores de IA sea la solicitud operativa de divulgación del lado comprador. El comentario del CFO de AMD en la próxima llamada de ganancias es el indicador líder; NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación vía presión de divulgación competitiva.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — Q1 revenue $10.25B (vs $9.85B consensus, +38% YoY), adjusted EPS $1.37 (vs $1.27 consensus, +9.6% beat), Data Center segment $5.78B sa +57% YoY (consensus $5.56B / +51.5%), non-GAAP gross margin 55%, Q2 guide $11.2B +/- $300M (vs Street $10.52B, na nagpapahiwatig ng +50.6% YoY at +9.1% sequential), idineklara ni CEO Lisa Su na ang Data Center na ngayon ang "primary driver of revenue and earnings growth," ang MI450 Series + Helios customer engagement ay "strengthening," tumaas ng 4.4% ang AMD shares after-hours — pinagsama sa Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent, ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV launches na nagmu-monetize ng frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper, ang May 5 Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch na may native Microsoft 365 + Moody's MCP integration, at ang nakatayong $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape ay pumipilit sa AMD (o sa NVIDIA / Broadcom sibling) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate. Ang disclosure precedent ay pinakamalamang na susunod sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape — single-line-item na may opsyonal na supplementary breakout — sa halip na sa mas invasive na cloud-segment-style disclosure regime. Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetric narrative pressure: tahasan nang pinangalanan ni Lisa Su ang Data Center bilang primary growth engine sa print mismo, ngunit ang segment ay bundling pa rin ang EPYC server CPUs sa Instinct MI300/MI325 AI accelerators; hindi ma-triangulate ng buyside models ang accelerator-only ASP at unit economics mula sa bundled line, at ang May 5 Anthropic-finance-agent + FIS-AML stack ang nagpapagawa sa AI-accelerator-only sub-line bilang operative buyside disclosure ask. Ang AMD CFO commentary sa susunod na earnings call ang lead indicator; susunod ang NVIDIA + Broadcom sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure.

nodes.title: Robot-control training consolidates in cloud as per-robot SaaS by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **SaaSとしてのフィジカルAI、そして「Robot-as-a-Service」インフラ競争。** Neura × AWS、DEEPX × Hyundai、そしてNVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmosの一連のパートナーシップは、いずれも同じ方向を指している:**ロボット制御モデルの学習パイプラインがクラウドに集約されつつある。** 2026年Q3までに、ロボット1台あたりのクラウド計算課金(学習 + シミュレーション同期 + ポリシー更新)はエンタープライズ契約の標準的なライン項目になる。ロボット本体は「移動可能な計算エンドポイント」としてコモディティ化し、メーカーは**継続課金型のフリート管理ソフトウェア**へとシフトする。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **AI Fisica como SaaS, y la carrera por la infraestructura "Robot-as-a-Service".** Neura x AWS, DEEPX x Hyundai, y la racha de alianzas NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos apuntan en la misma direccion: **la canalizacion de entrenamiento para modelos de control de robots se esta consolidando en la nube.** Para Q3 2026, los cargos de computo en la nube por robot (entrenamiento + sincronizacion sim + actualizaciones de politica) se convierten en una linea estandar en los contratos empresariales. El robot mismo se convierte en commodity como un "endpoint de computo movil", y los fabricantes pivotan hacia **software de gestion de flotas con ingresos recurrentes.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Physical AI bilang SaaS, at ang "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Ang Neura x AWS, DEEPX x Hyundai, at ang serye ng NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships ay lahat nakatuon sa parehong direksyon: **ang training pipeline para sa robot-control models ay nag-cocon-consolidate sa cloud.** Sa pamamagitan ng Q3 2026, ang per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) ay nagiging standard line item sa enterprise contracts. Ang robot mismo ay nagco-commoditize bilang "moving compute endpoint," at ang manufacturers ay lumilipat sa **fleet-management software na may recurring revenue.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.given: Robot-control training, sim sync, and policy updates are compute-heavy and centralize naturally on hyperscaler infrastructure.
reasoning.so_that: Per-robot cloud-compute charges become a standard enterprise contract line item and manufacturers pivot to recurring fleet-mgmt revenue.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; per-robot cloud-compute line items in enterprise contracts.
reasoning.plain_language: Robots are becoming like phones: the brains live in the cloud, and companies pay monthly fees per robot instead of buying a one-time machine.

plain_language.en: Robots are becoming like phones: the brains live in the cloud, and companies pay monthly fees per robot instead of buying a one-time machine.
plain_language.ja: ロボットはスマートフォンのようになりつつある:頭脳はクラウド側にあり、企業は一回限りの機械を購入する代わりにロボット1台ごとに月額料金を支払う。
plain_language.es: Los robots se estan volviendo como los telefonos: el cerebro vive en la nube, y las empresas pagan tarifas mensuales por robot en lugar de comprar una maquina de una sola vez.
plain_language.fil: Ang mga robot ay nagiging tulad ng phones: ang utak ay nasa cloud, at ang mga kumpanya ay nagbabayad ng monthly fees per robot sa halip na bumili ng one-time machine.
