summary_short_locales.en: Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all consolidate robot-control model training in the cloud. By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges are expected to become a standard enterprise contract line item, with the robot commoditizing as a moving compute endpoint and manufacturers shifting to recurring fleet-management revenue.
summary_short_locales.ja: Neura × AWS、DEEPX × Hyundai、そしてNVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmosのパートナーシップは、いずれもロボット制御モデルの学習をクラウドに集約させる。2026年Q3までに、ロボット1台あたりのクラウド計算課金は標準的なエンタープライズ契約項目となる見込みで、ロボットは移動可能な計算エンドポイントとしてコモディティ化し、メーカーは継続課金型のフリート管理事業へとシフトする。
summary_short_locales.es: Las alianzas Neura x AWS, DEEPX x Hyundai, y NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos consolidan el entrenamiento de modelos de control de robots en la nube. Para Q3 2026, se espera que los cargos de computo en la nube por robot se conviertan en una linea estandar de contrato empresarial, con el robot convirtiendose en commodity como un endpoint de computo movil y los fabricantes pivotando hacia ingresos recurrentes de gestion de flotas.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Neura x AWS, DEEPX x Hyundai, at NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships ay lahat nag-cocon-consolidate ng robot-control model training sa cloud. Sa pamamagitan ng Q3 2026, ang per-robot cloud-compute charges ay inaasahang magiging standard enterprise contract line item, kung saan ang robot ay nagco-commoditize bilang moving compute endpoint at ang manufacturers ay lumilipat sa recurring fleet-management revenue.

bridges.text: Figure 03 shipments doubling monthly and Tesla's late-July Optimus V3 reveal with Fremont and Texas expansion plans extend the robot-fleet scale that drives cloud-side training, sim-sync and policy-update consolidation. The precondition holds at the device side even though no metered per-robot cloud-compute SKU surfaces in the window.

text_locales.en: Figure 03 shipments doubling monthly and Tesla's late-July Optimus V3 reveal with Fremont and Texas expansion plans extend the robot-fleet scale that drives cloud-side training, sim-sync and policy-update consolidation. The precondition holds at the device side even though no metered per-robot cloud-compute SKU surfaces in the window.
text_locales.ja: Figure 03の月次倍増出荷とTeslaの7月下旬Optimus V3公開、FremontとTexasの拡張プランは、クラウド側のトレーニング、シム同期、ポリシー更新の統合を駆動するロボット艦隊規模を拡大する。前提条件は、ウィンドウ内に従量課金型ロボット単位クラウドコンピュートSKUが浮上していなくても、デバイス側で維持されている。
text_locales.es: Los envios de Figure 03 duplicandose mensualmente y la revelacion de Optimus V3 de Tesla a finales de julio con planes de expansion de Fremont y Texas extienden la escala de flota de robots que impulsa la consolidacion de entrenamiento, sim-sync y actualizacion de policy del lado de la nube. La precondicion se mantiene en el lado del dispositivo aunque ningun SKU de cloud-compute medido por robot emerja en la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Figure 03 shipments na dumodoble buwan-buwan at ang late-July Optimus V3 reveal ng Tesla na may Fremont at Texas expansion plans ay nagpapalawak ng robot-fleet scale na nagtutulak ng cloud-side training, sim-sync at policy-update consolidation. Ang precondition ay nananatili sa device side kahit walang metered per-robot cloud-compute SKU na lumitaw sa window.

bridges.text: Figure 03's doubling cadence and Tesla Optimus V3 staging push the commoditization-pressure side of the thesis forward — once unit volume lands, fleet-management software is the recurring-revenue layer the prediction expects to dominate.

text_locales.en: Figure 03's doubling cadence and Tesla Optimus V3 staging push the commoditization-pressure side of the thesis forward — once unit volume lands, fleet-management software is the recurring-revenue layer the prediction expects to dominate.
text_locales.ja: Figure 03 の倍増ケイデンスと Tesla Optimus V3 のステージングは、テーゼの商品化圧力側を前進させる — 単位ボリュームが着地すれば、フリート管理ソフトウェアこそが予測の支配を見込む反復売上レイヤーとなる。
text_locales.es: La cadencia de duplicación de Figure 03 y la escenificación de Tesla Optimus V3 empujan hacia adelante el lado de presión de commoditización de la tesis — una vez que aterriza el volumen unitario, el software de gestión de flotas es la capa de ingresos recurrentes que la predicción espera dominar.
text_locales.fil: Ang doubling cadence ng Figure 03 at ang Tesla Optimus V3 staging ay nagtutulak sa commoditization-pressure side ng thesis pasulong — kapag tumama ang unit volume, ang fleet-management software ang magiging recurring-revenue layer na inaasahang dodominate ng prediction.

bridges.text: Atlas + Optimus production-scale signals reinforce the commoditization-pressure side of the thesis — once volume lands, fleet-management software becomes the recurring-revenue layer the prediction expects to dominate.

text_locales.en: Atlas + Optimus production-scale signals reinforce the commoditization-pressure side of the thesis — once volume lands, fleet-management software becomes the recurring-revenue layer the prediction expects to dominate.
text_locales.ja: Atlas + Optimus の生産規模シグナルは、仮説のコモディティ化圧力側を補強している — 量産が着地すれば、フリート管理ソフトウェアが、予測が支配を見込む継続課金レイヤーになる。
text_locales.es: Las señales de escala de producción de Atlas + Optimus refuerzan el lado de la presión de commoditización de la tesis — una vez que el volumen aterriza, el software de gestión de flotas se convierte en la capa de ingresos recurrentes que la predicción espera que domine.
text_locales.fil: Ang Atlas + Optimus production-scale signals ay nagpapatibay sa commoditization-pressure side ng thesis — kapag dumating ang volume, ang fleet-management software ay nagiging recurring-revenue layer na inaasahan ng prediction na manaig.

bridges.text: MediaPost's Tesla Optimus Plant Cube giveaway tied to FSD demo drives, BMW Group's confirmed Plant Leipzig AEON trial, Agile Robots' Agile ONE Physical AI positioning at Hannover Messe, and Manila Times' $4T mid-2030s projection extend the cloud-trained humanoid fleet shape, while no per-robot cloud-compute SKU or RaaS line item surfaces inside the window.

text_locales.en: MediaPost's Tesla Optimus Plant Cube giveaway tied to FSD demo drives, BMW Group's confirmed Plant Leipzig AEON trial, Agile Robots' Agile ONE Physical AI positioning at Hannover Messe, and Manila Times' $4T mid-2030s projection extend the cloud-trained humanoid fleet shape, while no per-robot cloud-compute SKU or RaaS line item surfaces inside the window.
text_locales.ja: MediaPostのTesla Optimus Plant Cube giveaway(FSDデモドライブと連動)、BMW Groupの確認されたPlant Leipzig AEON試行、Agile RobotsのHannover MesseでのAgile ONE Physical AI位置付け、Manila Timesの2030年代半ばまでの$4T予測がクラウド学習ヒューマノイド・フリート形を拡張する一方、ロボットあたりのクラウド・コンピュートSKUまたはRaaSラインアイテムはウィンドウ内に表面化しない。
text_locales.es: El sorteo del Plant Cube Optimus de Tesla atado a demos de FSD de MediaPost, el ensayo confirmado AEON en Plant Leipzig de BMW Group, el posicionamiento Physical AI de Agile ONE de Agile Robots en Hannover Messe, y la proyección de $4T para mediados de los 2030 de Manila Times extienden la forma de flota humanoide cloud-trained, mientras que ningún SKU de cómputo cloud por robot ni elemento de línea RaaS aflora dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang MediaPost's Tesla Optimus Plant Cube giveaway na nakatali sa FSD demo drives, ang BMW Group's confirmed Plant Leipzig AEON trial, ang Agile Robots' Agile ONE Physical AI positioning sa Hannover Messe, at ang Manila Times' $4T mid-2030s projection ay nag-eextend ng cloud-trained humanoid fleet shape, habang walang per-robot cloud-compute SKU o RaaS line item na lumalabas sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: BMW Plant Leipzig's AEON trial under a Physical AI Center of Competence, New Atlas' AEON 22-sensor / 4-layer stack writeup, IIoT World's Spartanburg ROI on 30,000 vehicles, MediaPost's Tesla Optimus Plant Cube giveaway, and Hannover Messe 2026 closing on Physical AI continue the cloud-trained-fleet shape but do not surface a per-robot cloud-compute SKU.

text_locales.en: BMW Plant Leipzig's AEON trial under a Physical AI Center of Competence, New Atlas' AEON 22-sensor / 4-layer stack writeup, IIoT World's Spartanburg ROI on 30,000 vehicles, MediaPost's Tesla Optimus Plant Cube giveaway, and Hannover Messe 2026 closing on Physical AI continue the cloud-trained-fleet shape but do not surface a per-robot cloud-compute SKU.
text_locales.ja: BMW Plant LeipzigのPhysical AI Center of Competence下のAEONトライアル、New AtlasのAEON 22センサー / 4レイヤー・スタック分析、IIoT WorldのSpartanburg 30,000台のROI、MediaPostのTesla Optimus Plant Cubeのプレゼント、Hannover Messe 2026がPhysical AIで閉幕することが、クラウド学習されたフリートの形を継続するが、ロボットあたりのクラウド計算SKUは表面化させない。
text_locales.es: La prueba AEON de BMW Plant Leipzig bajo un Physical AI Center of Competence, el writeup de New Atlas del stack AEON de 22 sensores / 4 capas, el ROI de Spartanburg de IIoT World sobre 30,000 vehículos, el regalo del Plant Cube de Tesla Optimus de MediaPost, y el cierre de Hannover Messe 2026 sobre Physical AI continúan la forma cloud-trained-fleet pero no exponen un SKU de cómputo en la nube por robot.
text_locales.fil: Ang AEON trial ng BMW Plant Leipzig sa ilalim ng Physical AI Center of Competence, ang AEON 22-sensor / 4-layer stack writeup ng New Atlas, ang Spartanburg ROI ng IIoT World sa 30,000 vehicles, ang Tesla Optimus Plant Cube giveaway ng MediaPost, at ang Hannover Messe 2026 na nagsasara sa Physical AI ay nagpapatuloy sa cloud-trained-fleet shape ngunit hindi naglalantad ng per-robot cloud-compute SKU.

bridges.text: Siemens x Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's 60 totes/h x 8h x 90% production-line run integrating NVIDIA Physical AI + KinetIQ + Siemens Xcelerator's digital twin and fleet management, alongside Tesla Optimus V3's confirmed Fremont 1M-units/year + Texas 10M endgame backed by >$25B 2026 capex, materialize the precondition that cloud-trained policy delivery underpins production robot fleets.

text_locales.en: Siemens x Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's 60 totes/h x 8h x 90% production-line run integrating NVIDIA Physical AI + KinetIQ + Siemens Xcelerator's digital twin and fleet management, alongside Tesla Optimus V3's confirmed Fremont 1M-units/year + Texas 10M endgame backed by >$25B 2026 capex, materialize the precondition that cloud-trained policy delivery underpins production robot fleets.
text_locales.ja: Siemens x Humanoid HMND 01 AlphaがNVIDIA Physical AI + KinetIQ + Siemens Xceleratorのデジタル・ツインとフリート・マネジメントを統合した60トート/時 x 8時間 x 90%の生産ラインでの稼働、加えてTesla Optimus V3が確認したFremont年産100万台 + Texas年産1000万台のエンドゲームを2026年資本支出>$25Bで支える計画が、クラウド学習ポリシー配信が本番ロボット・フリートを支えるという前提条件を物質化する。
text_locales.es: La corrida en la línea de producción de 60 totes/h x 8h x 90% de Siemens x Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha integrando NVIDIA Physical AI + KinetIQ + el digital twin y fleet management de Siemens Xcelerator, junto con la línea confirmada de Fremont 1M-unidades/año + endgame de Texas 10M de Tesla Optimus V3 respaldada por capex 2026 >$25B, materializan la precondición de que la entrega de políticas entrenadas en la nube sustenta las flotas de robots de producción.
text_locales.fil: Ang 60 totes/h x 8h x 90% production-line run ng Siemens x Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha na nag-iintegrate ng NVIDIA Physical AI + KinetIQ + digital twin at fleet management ng Siemens Xcelerator, kasama ang nakumpirmang Fremont 1M-units/year + Texas 10M endgame ng Tesla Optimus V3 na sinusuportahan ng >$25B 2026 capex, ay nagma-materialize sa precondition na ang cloud-trained policy delivery ang sumusuporta sa production robot fleets.

bridges.text: Hannover Messe 2026 going live with Agile Robots' Blue-Eye and the Accenture × Vodafone × SAP humanoid warehousing pilot, Tesla Optimus V3's Fremont July-August production toward a 10M-unit Texas endgame, and Toyota Woven City's Kakezan multi-AI rollout all materialize the precondition that physical-AI fleets need cloud-trained policy delivery, reinforcing the RaaS shape.

text_locales.en: Hannover Messe 2026 going live with Agile Robots' Blue-Eye and the Accenture × Vodafone × SAP humanoid warehousing pilot, Tesla Optimus V3's Fremont July-August production toward a 10M-unit Texas endgame, and Toyota Woven City's Kakezan multi-AI rollout all materialize the precondition that physical-AI fleets need cloud-trained policy delivery, reinforcing the RaaS shape.
text_locales.ja: Agile RobotsのBlue-EyeとAccenture × Vodafone × SAPのヒューマノイド倉庫パイロットとともに開催されるHannover Messe 2026、Tesla Optimus V3のFremont 7-8月生産から1000万台のテキサス最終目標、Toyota Woven Cityの掛け算マルチAI展開はすべて、フィジカルAIフリートがクラウド学習のポリシー配信を必要とするという前提条件を実現し、RaaSの形を強化している。
text_locales.es: Hannover Messe 2026 entrando en vivo con Blue-Eye de Agile Robots y el piloto de almacenamiento humanoide Accenture × Vodafone × SAP, la producción en Fremont julio-agosto de Tesla Optimus V3 hacia un endgame de 10M unidades en Texas, y el rollout multi-AI Kakezan de Toyota Woven City todos materializan la precondición de que las flotas de IA física necesitan entrega de políticas entrenadas en la nube, reforzando la forma RaaS.
text_locales.fil: Ang Hannover Messe 2026 na live sa Blue-Eye ng Agile Robots at ang Accenture × Vodafone × SAP humanoid warehousing pilot, ang Fremont July-August production ng Tesla Optimus V3 patungo sa 10M-unit Texas endgame, at ang Kakezan multi-AI rollout ng Toyota Woven City ay lahat nag-aaktwal sa precondition na ang physical-AI fleets ay nangangailangan ng cloud-trained policy delivery, na nagpapalakas sa RaaS shape.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **SaaSとしてのフィジカルAI、そして「Robot-as-a-Service」インフラ競争。** Neura × AWS、DEEPX × Hyundai、そしてNVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmosの一連のパートナーシップは、いずれも同じ方向を指している:**ロボット制御モデルの学習パイプラインがクラウドに集約されつつある。** 2026年Q3までに、ロボット1台あたりのクラウド計算課金(学習 + シミュレーション同期 + ポリシー更新)はエンタープライズ契約の標準的なライン項目になる。ロボット本体は「移動可能な計算エンドポイント」としてコモディティ化し、メーカーは**継続課金型のフリート管理ソフトウェア**へとシフトする。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **AI Fisica como SaaS, y la carrera por la infraestructura "Robot-as-a-Service".** Neura x AWS, DEEPX x Hyundai, y la racha de alianzas NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos apuntan en la misma direccion: **la canalizacion de entrenamiento para modelos de control de robots se esta consolidando en la nube.** Para Q3 2026, los cargos de computo en la nube por robot (entrenamiento + sincronizacion sim + actualizaciones de politica) se convierten en una linea estandar en los contratos empresariales. El robot mismo se convierte en commodity como un "endpoint de computo movil", y los fabricantes pivotan hacia **software de gestion de flotas con ingresos recurrentes.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Physical AI bilang SaaS, at ang "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Ang Neura x AWS, DEEPX x Hyundai, at ang serye ng NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships ay lahat nakatuon sa parehong direksyon: **ang training pipeline para sa robot-control models ay nag-cocon-consolidate sa cloud.** Sa pamamagitan ng Q3 2026, ang per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) ay nagiging standard line item sa enterprise contracts. Ang robot mismo ay nagco-commoditize bilang "moving compute endpoint," at ang manufacturers ay lumilipat sa **fleet-management software na may recurring revenue.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Physical AI 8-hour production runs become enterprise RFP cuts by Q4 2026
nodes.description: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.en: Physical AI 8-hour production runs become enterprise RFP cuts by Q4 2026
title.ja: Physical AIの8時間連続生産稼働がQ4 2026までに企業RFPの足切り要件となる
title.es: Las corridas de producción de 8 horas de Physical AI se vuelven recortes en RFP empresariales para el Q4 2026
title.fil: Ang 8-hour production runs ng Physical AI ay magiging enterprise RFP cuts pagsapit ng Q4 2026

description.en: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「Physical AIの8時間連続生産稼働」が2026年下半期に企業調達要件となる。** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 AlphaがErlangenで記録した**8時間 / 90%成功率 / 60トート/時間** ― デモではなく生産ラインでの実績 ― は、「ヒューマノイド = PoC」からの明確な卒業点である。Q4 2026までに、大手製造業のRFP(VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota)は「24時間連続稼働」「1週間MTBF」「90%以上の自律完了率」「MES / PLC統合」を事実上の足切り条件として組み込む。Physical AIの競争軸は「見栄えの良いデモ動画」から「既存OT環境への組み込みやすさ」へと完全に移行する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Las "corridas de producción de 8 horas de Physical AI" se convierten en un requisito de compras empresariales en H2 2026.** Las **8 horas / 90% de éxito / 60 totes/hora** de Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha en Erlangen — en la línea de producción, no una demo — son un punto de graduación claro de "humanoide = PoC". Para el Q4 2026, las RFPs de grandes fabricantes (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) integrarán "operación continua de 24h", "MTBF de 1 semana", "tasa de finalización autónoma del 90%+", e "integración MES / PLC" como cortes de facto. El eje competitivo de Physical AI cambia completamente de "videos de demo bonitos" a "facilidad de inserción en entornos OT existentes". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "Physical AI 8-hour production runs" ay magiging enterprise procurement requirement sa H2 2026.** Ang **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** ng Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha sa Erlangen — sa production line, hindi demo — ay malinaw na graduation point mula sa "humanoid = PoC." Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isasama ng big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) ang "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," at "MES / PLC integration" bilang de facto cuts. Ang competitive axis para sa Physical AI ay ganap na lumilipat mula sa "good-looking demo videos" papunta sa "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha logs 8 hours / 60 totes per hour / 90% success on the Erlangen production line, not a demo.

reasoning.so_that: VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota RFPs adopt 24h continuous operation, 1-week MTBF, 90% autonomy, and MES / PLC integration as de facto cuts.
reasoning.landing: By Q4 2026; competitive axis shifts to OT-environment insertion ease.
reasoning.plain_language: A factory humanoid just worked 8 hours straight on a real production line. Soon big manufacturers will only buy robots that pass that bar.

plain_language.en: A factory humanoid just worked 8 hours straight on a real production line. Soon big manufacturers will only buy robots that pass that bar.

plain_language.es: Un humanoide de fábrica acaba de trabajar 8 horas seguidas en una línea de producción real. Pronto los grandes fabricantes solo comprarán robots que pasen ese listón.
plain_language.fil: Isang factory humanoid ay kakatapos lang magtrabaho ng 8 oras nang tuloy-tuloy sa isang totoong production line. Hindi magtatagal, ang malalaking manufacturers ay bibili lamang ng mga robot na pumapasa sa pamantayang iyon.

detail.summary_short: Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's 8-hour Erlangen run at 60 totes/hour and 90% success on a live production line graduates humanoids from PoC. By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs are expected to fold 24h continuous operation, 1-week MTBF, 90% autonomy, and MES / PLC integration into procurement cuts.

summary_short_locales.en: Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's 8-hour Erlangen run at 60 totes/hour and 90% success on a live production line graduates humanoids from PoC. By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs are expected to fold 24h continuous operation, 1-week MTBF, 90% autonomy, and MES / PLC integration into procurement cuts.
summary_short_locales.ja: Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 AlphaがErlangenの実生産ラインで1時間あたり60トート、90%成功率の8時間稼働を達成し、ヒューマノイドはPoCから卒業した。Q4 2026までに、大手製造業のRFPは24時間連続稼働、1週間MTBF、90%自律性、MES / PLC統合を調達足切りに組み込むと予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: La corrida de 8 horas en Erlangen de Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha a 60 totes/hora y 90% de éxito en una línea de producción en vivo gradúa a los humanoides del PoC. Para el Q4 2026, se espera que las RFPs de grandes fabricantes integren operación continua de 24h, MTBF de 1 semana, autonomía del 90%, e integración MES / PLC en los cortes de compras.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang 8-oras na Erlangen run ng Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha sa 60 totes/hour at 90% success sa live production line ay nagpapagraduate sa mga humanoid mula sa PoC. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang big-manufacturer RFPs ay inaasahang magsasama ng 24h continuous operation, 1-week MTBF, 90% autonomy, at MES / PLC integration sa procurement cuts.

bridges.text: Figure 02's 1,250+ hours and 90,000+ parts plus Atlas's committed Hyundai + Google DeepMind production units sustain the OEM-adopted-records framing the prediction rests on. SoftBank Roze AI's data-center-construction launch extends the physical-AI commercial deployment vector beyond logistics into the AI-capex buildout itself. Moderate signal.

text_locales.en: Figure 02's 1,250+ hours and 90,000+ parts plus Atlas's committed Hyundai + Google DeepMind production units sustain the OEM-adopted-records framing the prediction rests on. SoftBank Roze AI's data-center-construction launch extends the physical-AI commercial deployment vector beyond logistics into the AI-capex buildout itself. Moderate signal.
text_locales.ja: Figure 02の1,250時間超および90,000部品超に加え、AtlasのHyundai+Google DeepMindへのコミット済み量産機は、予測が依拠するOEM採用記録のフレーミングを支える。SoftBank Roze AIのデータセンター建設ローンチは、物理的AI商業展開ベクトルを物流から飛び越えてAI設備投資構築自体に拡張する。中程度のシグナル。
text_locales.es: Las 1.250+ horas y 90.000+ partes de Figure 02 más las unidades de producción comprometidas de Atlas con Hyundai + Google DeepMind sostienen el framing de OEM-adopted-records sobre el cual descansa la predicción. El lanzamiento de construcción de data center de SoftBank Roze AI extiende el vector de despliegue comercial de physical-AI más allá de logística hacia el propio buildout de capex IA. Señal moderada.
text_locales.fil: Ang 1,250+ hours at 90,000+ parts ng Figure 02 plus ang nakatuong Hyundai + Google DeepMind production units ng Atlas ay sumusuporta sa OEM-adopted-records framing na pinaninindigan ng prediction. Ang data-center-construction launch ng SoftBank Roze AI ay nag-eextend ng physical-AI commercial deployment vector lampas sa logistics papasok sa AI-capex buildout mismo. Moderate signal.

bridges.text: The carry-forward production-pilot data from Figure 02 (1,250+ hours, 90,000+ parts) and Atlas's committed Hyundai + Google DeepMind production units sustains the OEM-adopted-records framing the prediction rests on. Nothing fresh today, so the signal is consistent rather than reinforcing.

text_locales.en: The carry-forward production-pilot data from Figure 02 (1,250+ hours, 90,000+ parts) and Atlas's committed Hyundai + Google DeepMind production units sustains the OEM-adopted-records framing the prediction rests on. Nothing fresh today, so the signal is consistent rather than reinforcing.
text_locales.ja: Figure 02の引き継がれた生産パイロットデータ(1,250時間以上、90,000部品以上)とAtlasのコミット済みHyundai + Google DeepMind生産ユニットは、予測が依拠するOEM採用記録の枠組みを維持する。本日新たなものはないため、シグナルは強化ではなく一貫している。
text_locales.es: Los datos de pilot de producción que se mantienen de Figure 02 (1.250+ horas, 90.000+ piezas) y las unidades de producción comprometidas de Atlas con Hyundai + Google DeepMind sostienen el encuadre de récords-adoptados-por-OEM sobre el que descansa la predicción. Nada fresco hoy, así que la señal es consistente más que reforzante.
text_locales.fil: Ang carry-forward production-pilot data mula sa Figure 02 (1,250+ hours, 90,000+ parts) at ang ipinangakong Hyundai + Google DeepMind production units ng Atlas ay nagpapanatili sa OEM-adopted-records framing kung saan nakasalalay ang prediction. Walang sariwang ngayon, kaya pare-pareho ang signal sa halip na nagpapatibay.

bridges.text: Figure 03's monthly-doubling shipments and Atlas / Hyundai RMAC / DeepMind production-deployment plans extend the precondition that humanoids are graduating from PoC to fleet-line with measurable uptime. The qualitative inflection is intact even though no OEM RFP today explicitly names the 8-hour / 1-week MTBF / 90% autonomy thresholds.

text_locales.en: Figure 03's monthly-doubling shipments and Atlas / Hyundai RMAC / DeepMind production-deployment plans extend the precondition that humanoids are graduating from PoC to fleet-line with measurable uptime. The qualitative inflection is intact even though no OEM RFP today explicitly names the 8-hour / 1-week MTBF / 90% autonomy thresholds.
text_locales.ja: Figure 03の月次倍増出荷とAtlas / Hyundai RMAC / DeepMindの生産デプロイメントプランは、ヒューマノイドが測定可能な稼働時間を伴ってPoCからフリート・ラインへ進化しつつあるという前提条件を拡大する。本日のOEM RFPが8時間 / 1週間MTBF / 90%自律性の閾値を明示的に名指ししていなくても、定性的な変曲点は維持されている。
text_locales.es: Los envios de duplicacion mensual de Figure 03 y los planes de despliegue de produccion de Atlas / Hyundai RMAC / DeepMind extienden la precondicion de que los humanoides se gradúan de PoC a fleet-line con uptime medible. La inflexion cualitativa esta intacta aunque ningun RFP de OEM hoy nombra explicitamente los umbrales de 8-horas / MTBF de 1-semana / 90% autonomia.
text_locales.fil: Ang monthly-doubling shipments ng Figure 03 at ang Atlas / Hyundai RMAC / DeepMind production-deployment plans ay nagpapalawak ng precondition na ang humanoids ay nagta-graduate mula sa PoC patungo sa fleet-line na may nasusukat na uptime. Ang qualitative inflection ay buo kahit walang OEM RFP ngayon na tahasang nagpapangalan sa 8-hour / 1-week MTBF / 90% autonomy thresholds.

bridges.text: Figure 03's S-curve cadence and Tesla's Optimus V3 staging continue the industry shift from demo to production framing the procurement-thesis structural force needs in place ahead of H2 2026 RFP cycles.

text_locales.en: Figure 03's S-curve cadence and Tesla's Optimus V3 staging continue the industry shift from demo to production framing the procurement-thesis structural force needs in place ahead of H2 2026 RFP cycles.
text_locales.ja: Figure 03 の S 字曲線ケイデンスと Tesla の Optimus V3 ステージングは、デモから量産へという業界シフトを継続させ、H2 2026 RFP サイクルに先立って調達テーゼに必要な構造的力をフレーミングする。
text_locales.es: La cadencia en S de Figure 03 y la escenificación de Tesla Optimus V3 continúan el cambio de la industria de demo a producción enmarcando la fuerza estructural que la tesis de procurement necesita en su lugar antes de los ciclos RFP de H2 2026.
text_locales.fil: Ang S-curve cadence ng Figure 03 at ang Tesla Optimus V3 staging ay patuloy na tinutulungan ang industry shift mula demo patungo sa production na nagbibigay-frame sa structural force ng procurement-thesis na kailangan bago ang H2 2026 RFP cycles.

bridges.text: Atlas + Optimus production-readiness signals support the structural force the prediction names — the industry has shifted from demo to production framing in the same window the procurement thesis requires.

text_locales.en: Atlas + Optimus production-readiness signals support the structural force the prediction names — the industry has shifted from demo to production framing in the same window the procurement thesis requires.
text_locales.ja: Atlas + Optimus の生産準備性シグナルは、予測が名指す構造的な力を支持している — 業界は調達仮説が要求するのと同じウィンドウで、デモから生産フレーミングへとシフトしている。
text_locales.es: Las señales de preparación de producción de Atlas + Optimus apoyan la fuerza estructural que nombra la predicción — la industria ha pasado del marco de demo al de producción en la misma ventana que requiere la tesis de procurement.
text_locales.fil: Ang Atlas + Optimus production-readiness signals ay sumusuporta sa structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction — ang industriya ay lumipat mula sa demo papunta sa production framing sa parehong window na hinihingi ng procurement thesis.

bridges.text: BMW Group's confirmed Plant Leipzig AEON trial building on Spartanburg Figure 02's 30,000-vehicle and 90,000-parts record alongside Agile Robots' Agile ONE Physical AI positioning at Hannover Messe 2026 keep hardening the production-line bar, while no fresh enterprise RFP language adopting the four cuts surfaces inside the window.

text_locales.en: BMW Group's confirmed Plant Leipzig AEON trial building on Spartanburg Figure 02's 30,000-vehicle and 90,000-parts record alongside Agile Robots' Agile ONE Physical AI positioning at Hannover Messe 2026 keep hardening the production-line bar, while no fresh enterprise RFP language adopting the four cuts surfaces inside the window.
text_locales.ja: BMW Groupの確認されたPlant Leipzig AEON試行(Spartanburg Figure 02の30,000台と90,000部品の記録の上に構築)とAgile RobotsのAgile ONE Physical AI位置付け(Hannover Messe 2026)が、生産ライン・バーを硬化し続ける一方、4つの切り口を採用する新たな企業RFP言語はウィンドウ内に表面化しない。
text_locales.es: El ensayo confirmado AEON en Plant Leipzig de BMW Group construyendo sobre el récord de Spartanburg Figure 02 de 30,000 vehículos y 90,000 partes junto al posicionamiento Physical AI de Agile ONE de Agile Robots en Hannover Messe 2026 siguen endureciendo el listón de línea de producción, mientras que ningún nuevo lenguaje de RFP empresarial adoptando los cuatro cortes aflora dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang BMW Group's confirmed Plant Leipzig AEON trial na bumubuo sa Spartanburg Figure 02's 30,000-vehicle at 90,000-parts record katuwang ng Agile Robots' Agile ONE Physical AI positioning sa Hannover Messe 2026 ay patuloy na nagpapatibay sa production-line bar, habang walang bagong enterprise RFP language na nag-a-adopt sa apat na cuts na lumalabas sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: BMW Plant Leipzig's AEON trial with Hexagon Robotics' 22-sensor / self-swap-battery / 4-layer Physical AI shape, IIoT World's Spartanburg 30,000-vehicle ROI computation, and New Atlas' AEON / Spartanburg / Leipzig integration writeup harden the production-line bar, while no fresh enterprise RFP language adopting the four cuts surfaces inside the window.

text_locales.en: BMW Plant Leipzig's AEON trial with Hexagon Robotics' 22-sensor / self-swap-battery / 4-layer Physical AI shape, IIoT World's Spartanburg 30,000-vehicle ROI computation, and New Atlas' AEON / Spartanburg / Leipzig integration writeup harden the production-line bar, while no fresh enterprise RFP language adopting the four cuts surfaces inside the window.
text_locales.ja: BMW Plant LeipzigのHexagon Roboticsの22センサー / セルフ・スワップ・バッテリー / 4レイヤーPhysical AIの形を伴うAEONトライアル、IIoT WorldのSpartanburgの30,000台ROI計算、New AtlasのAEON / Spartanburg / Leipzig統合分析が生産ラインのバーを堅くする一方、4つのカットを採用した新たな企業RFP言語はウィンドウ内で表面化していない。
text_locales.es: La prueba AEON de BMW Plant Leipzig con la forma Physical AI de 22 sensores / auto-cambio de batería / 4 capas de Hexagon Robotics, el cómputo del ROI de Spartanburg sobre 30,000 vehículos de IIoT World, y el writeup de integración AEON / Spartanburg / Leipzig de New Atlas endurecen la barra de la línea de producción, mientras ningún lenguaje fresco de RFP empresarial adoptando los cuatro cortes emerge dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang AEON trial ng BMW Plant Leipzig kasama ang Hexagon Robotics' 22-sensor / self-swap-battery / 4-layer Physical AI shape, ang 30,000-vehicle ROI computation ng Spartanburg ng IIoT World, at ang AEON / Spartanburg / Leipzig integration writeup ng New Atlas ay nagpapatigas sa production-line bar, habang walang sariwang enterprise RFP language na nag-aampon ng apat na cuts sa loob ng window.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「Physical AIの8時間連続生産稼働」が2026年下半期に企業調達要件となる。** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 AlphaがErlangenで記録した**8時間 / 90%成功率 / 60トート/時間** ― デモではなく生産ラインでの実績 ― は、「ヒューマノイド = PoC」からの明確な卒業点である。Q4 2026までに、大手製造業のRFP(VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota)は「24時間連続稼働」「1週間MTBF」「90%以上の自律完了率」「MES / PLC統合」を事実上の足切り条件として組み込む。Physical AIの競争軸は「見栄えの良いデモ動画」から「既存OT環境への組み込みやすさ」へと完全に移行する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Las "corridas de producción de 8 horas de Physical AI" se convierten en un requisito de compras empresariales en H2 2026.** Las **8 horas / 90% de éxito / 60 totes/hora** de Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha en Erlangen — en la línea de producción, no una demo — son un punto de graduación claro de "humanoide = PoC". Para el Q4 2026, las RFPs de grandes fabricantes (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) integrarán "operación continua de 24h", "MTBF de 1 semana", "tasa de finalización autónoma del 90%+", e "integración MES / PLC" como cortes de facto. El eje competitivo de Physical AI cambia completamente de "videos de demo bonitos" a "facilidad de inserción en entornos OT existentes". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "Physical AI 8-hour production runs" ay magiging enterprise procurement requirement sa H2 2026.** Ang **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** ng Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha sa Erlangen — sa production line, hindi demo — ay malinaw na graduation point mula sa "humanoid = PoC." Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isasama ng big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) ang "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," at "MES / PLC integration" bilang de facto cuts. Ang competitive axis para sa Physical AI ay ganap na lumilipat mula sa "good-looking demo videos" papunta sa "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「Physical AIの生産ライン記録がIROS / GTC 2026でリーグ・テーブル化する」が2026年下半期に始まる。** Siemens Erlangenの**HMND 01 Alpha**(60トート/h × 8h × 90%以上)、BMW SpartanburgのFigure 02(10ヶ月 / 30,000台 / 90,000部品)、BMW LeipzigのAEON(2026年4月トライアル → 夏パイロット)、GXOのDigit(100K以上トート)がすべて同じウィンドウに着地し、Hannover Messe 2026がPhysical AIを初の中心テーマに据えたことで、業界の評価基準は「ベンダー主張のデモ」から**「OEM採用の生産記録」**へとシフトしている。2026年下半期の**IROS(10月)**と**GTC Fall 2026**で、「OEM採用数 × 連続稼働時間 × 取扱部品数 × MTBF」のリーグ・テーブルが始まり、Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEONのトップ5が頂点に立つ。PoC段階で停滞している30社以上は、Q4 2026の資金不足 / 買収 / 撤退に追い込まれる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **"Los récords de líneas de producción de Physical AI se convierten en tablas de clasificación en IROS / GTC 2026" comienza H2 2026.** Con el **HMND 01 Alpha** de Siemens Erlangen (60 totes/h × 8h × 90%+), el **Figure 02** de BMW Spartanburg (10 meses / 30,000 vehículos / 90,000 piezas), el **AEON** de BMW Leipzig (prueba abril 2026 → piloto de verano), y el **Digit** de GXO (100K+ totes) todos llegando a la misma ventana — y Hannover Messe 2026 haciendo de Physical AI su primer tema central — el criterio de evaluación de la industria está cambiando de "demos reclamadas por proveedores" a **"récords de producción adoptados por OEM."** En H2 2026 en **IROS (octubre)** y **GTC Fall 2026**, comienzan las tablas de clasificación para "recuento de adopción OEM × horas de operación continua × piezas manejadas × MTBF", con los cinco principales de Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON en la cima. Las 30+ empresas aún atascadas en fase PoC son empujadas a déficits de financiación / adquisiciones / salidas en Q4 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" ay magsisimula sa H2 2026.** Sa **HMND 01 Alpha** ng Siemens Erlangen (60 tote/h x 8h x 90%+), **Figure 02** ng BMW Spartanburg (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), **AEON** ng BMW Leipzig (Apr 2026 trial -> summer pilot), at **Digit** ng GXO (100K+ totes) na lahat tumatama sa parehong window — at ang Hannover Messe 2026 na ginagawang first central theme ang Physical AI — ang evaluation criterion ng industry ay lumilipat mula sa "vendor-claimed demos" papunta sa **"OEM-adopted production records."** Sa H2 2026 sa **IROS (October)** at **GTC Fall 2026**, magsisimula ang league tables para sa "OEM adoption count x continuous-operation hours x parts handled x MTBF," kasama ang Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five sa itaas. Ang 30+ na kumpanyang nakatigil pa sa PoC phase ay itinutulak sa Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: Siemens Erlangen, BMW Spartanburg, BMW Leipzig, and GXO production records all surface together while Hannover Messe makes Physical AI its central theme.
reasoning.given: OEM-adopted production records are now concrete enough that buyers can rank vendors on continuous hours, parts handled, and MTBF.
reasoning.so_that: IROS October and GTC Fall publish OEM-adoption league tables that elevate a top-five cohort and squeeze out the PoC-stuck long tail.
reasoning.landing: Starts H2 2026; 30+ PoC vendors face Q4 2026 funding shortfalls, acquisitions, or exits.
reasoning.plain_language: Real factories now have humanoid robots logging real hours. Soon big AI conferences will rank them like sports leagues, and weaker startups disappear.

because.en: Siemens Erlangen, BMW Spartanburg, BMW Leipzig, and GXO production records all surface together while Hannover Messe makes Physical AI its central theme.
because.ja: Siemens Erlangen、BMW Spartanburg、BMW Leipzig、GXOの生産記録がすべて同時に表面化し、Hannover MesseはPhysical AIを中心テーマに据えた。
because.es: Los récords de producción de Siemens Erlangen, BMW Spartanburg, BMW Leipzig y GXO emergen todos juntos mientras Hannover Messe hace de Physical AI su tema central.
because.fil: Ang production records ng Siemens Erlangen, BMW Spartanburg, BMW Leipzig, at GXO ay sumasambulat nang sabay-sabay habang ginagawang central theme ng Hannover Messe ang Physical AI.

given.en: OEM-adopted production records are now concrete enough that buyers can rank vendors on continuous hours, parts handled, and MTBF.
given.ja: OEM採用の生産記録が今や具体性を持つため、買い手は連続稼働時間、取扱部品数、MTBFでベンダーをランク付けできる。
given.es: Los récords de producción adoptados por OEM ahora son lo suficientemente concretos como para que los compradores puedan clasificar a los proveedores por horas continuas, piezas manejadas y MTBF.
given.fil: Ang OEM-adopted production records ay sapat nang konkreto upang ma-rank ng mga buyers ang vendors batay sa continuous hours, parts handled, at MTBF.

so_that.en: IROS October and GTC Fall publish OEM-adoption league tables that elevate a top-five cohort and squeeze out the PoC-stuck long tail.
so_that.ja: IROS 10月とGTC FallがOEM採用リーグ・テーブルを公表し、トップ5層を引き上げ、PoCで停滞する裾野を圧搾する。
so_that.es: IROS octubre y GTC Fall publican tablas de clasificación de adopción OEM que elevan a un quinteto top y exprimen al largo de la cola atascado en PoC.
so_that.fil: Naglalathala ang IROS October at GTC Fall ng OEM-adoption league tables na nag-aangat ng top-five cohort at pumipiga sa PoC-stuck long tail.

landing.en: Starts H2 2026; 30+ PoC vendors face Q4 2026 funding shortfalls, acquisitions, or exits.
landing.ja: 2026年下半期に開始;30社以上のPoCベンダーがQ4 2026の資金不足、買収、撤退に直面する。
landing.es: Comienza H2 2026; 30+ proveedores en PoC enfrentan déficits de financiación, adquisiciones o salidas en Q4 2026.
landing.fil: Magsisimula sa H2 2026; ang 30+ PoC vendors ay haharap sa Q4 2026 funding shortfalls, acquisitions, o exits.

plain_language.en: Real factories now have humanoid robots logging real hours. Soon big AI conferences will rank them like sports leagues, and weaker startups disappear.
plain_language.ja: 実際の工場でヒューマノイド・ロボットが本物の稼働時間を記録している。間もなく大手AIカンファレンスがそれらをスポーツリーグのようにランク付けし、弱いスタートアップは消えていく。
plain_language.es: Las fábricas reales ahora tienen robots humanoides registrando horas reales. Pronto las grandes conferencias de IA los clasificarán como ligas deportivas, y las startups más débiles desaparecen.
plain_language.fil: Real factories now have humanoid robots logging real hours. Soon big AI conferences will rank them like sports leagues, and weaker startups disappear.

title_locales.en: Physical AI league tables rank top-five OEM-adopted humanoids by H2 2026
title_locales.ja: Physical AIリーグ・テーブル、H2 2026までにOEM採用ヒューマノイドのトップ5をランキング化
title_locales.es: Las tablas de clasificación de Physical AI clasifican los cinco principales humanoides adoptados por OEM para el H2 2026
title_locales.fil: Physical AI league tables, magra-rank ng top-five OEM-adopted humanoids pagsapit ng H2 2026

detail.summary_short: Siemens Erlangen's HMND 01 Alpha 8-hour run, BMW Spartanburg's Figure 02 30,000-vehicle record, BMW Leipzig's AEON trial, and GXO's Digit 100K-tote run land in the same window as Hannover Messe 2026 spotlights Physical AI. H2 2026's IROS and GTC are expected to publish OEM-adoption league tables.

summary_short_locales.en: Siemens Erlangen's HMND 01 Alpha 8-hour run, BMW Spartanburg's Figure 02 30,000-vehicle record, BMW Leipzig's AEON trial, and GXO's Digit 100K-tote run land in the same window as Hannover Messe 2026 spotlights Physical AI. H2 2026's IROS and GTC are expected to publish OEM-adoption league tables.
summary_short_locales.ja: Siemens ErlangenのHMND 01 Alphaの8時間稼働、BMW SpartanburgのFigure 02の30,000台記録、BMW LeipzigのAEONトライアル、GXOのDigit 100Kトート稼働が、Hannover Messe 2026のPhysical AIスポットライトと同じウィンドウに着地する。2026年下半期のIROSとGTCはOEM採用リーグ・テーブルの公表が予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: El HMND 01 Alpha de 8 horas de Siemens Erlangen, el récord de 30,000 vehículos del Figure 02 de BMW Spartanburg, la prueba AEON de BMW Leipzig y la corrida de 100K-totes Digit de GXO aterrizan en la misma ventana en que Hannover Messe 2026 destaca a Physical AI. Se espera que IROS y GTC de H2 2026 publiquen tablas de clasificación de adopción OEM.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang 8-hour run ng HMND 01 Alpha ng Siemens Erlangen, ang 30,000-vehicle record ng Figure 02 ng BMW Spartanburg, ang AEON trial ng BMW Leipzig, at ang 100K-tote run ng Digit ng GXO ay tumama sa parehong window habang inaangat ng Hannover Messe 2026 ang Physical AI. Ang IROS at GTC ng H2 2026 ay inaasahang maglathala ng OEM-adoption league tables.

bridges.text: Apptronik's late-April executive hires from Tesla, Apple, and Microsoft are the lead-up signal that a third humanoid vendor is preparing the same OEM-adoption-count and continuous-operation-hours storyline that the prediction expects to dominate fall conference league tables.

text_locales.en: Apptronik's late-April executive hires from Tesla, Apple, and Microsoft are the lead-up signal that a third humanoid vendor is preparing the same OEM-adoption-count and continuous-operation-hours storyline that the prediction expects to dominate fall conference league tables.
text_locales.ja: ApptronikのTesla、Apple、Microsoftからの4月下旬の幹部採用は、第3のヒューマノイドベンダーが、予測が秋カンファレンスのリーグテーブルを支配すると期待するOEM採用数と連続稼働時間ストーリーラインを準備している先行シグナルである。
text_locales.es: Las contrataciones de ejecutivos de finales de abril de Apptronik desde Tesla, Apple y Microsoft son la señal precursora de que un tercer proveedor humanoide está preparando la misma narrativa de conteo-de-adopción-OEM y horas-de-operación-continua que la predicción espera que domine las tablas de liga de las conferencias de otoño.
text_locales.fil: Ang late-April executive hires ng Apptronik mula sa Tesla, Apple, at Microsoft ay ang lead-up signal na ang ikatlong humanoid vendor ay naghahanda ng kapareho na OEM-adoption-count at continuous-operation-hours storyline na inaasahan ng prediction na mangingibabaw sa fall conference league tables.

bridges.text: The OEM-adoption + carry-forward production data sustains the prediction's premise but produces no fresh signal toward the IROS October / GTC Fall 2026 league-table framing. SoftBank Roze AI's data-center-construction entry adds a new vertical without changing the conference-programming arc. Holding pattern day for the league-table thesis.

text_locales.en: The OEM-adoption + carry-forward production data sustains the prediction's premise but produces no fresh signal toward the IROS October / GTC Fall 2026 league-table framing. SoftBank Roze AI's data-center-construction entry adds a new vertical without changing the conference-programming arc. Holding pattern day for the league-table thesis.
text_locales.ja: OEM採用+持ち越し量産データは予測の前提を支えるが、IROS 10月／GTC秋2026のリーグテーブルフレーミングへの新鮮なシグナルを生み出さない。SoftBank Roze AIのデータセンター建設エントリーは、カンファレンスプログラムの軌跡を変えることなく新しい垂直市場を追加する。リーグテーブルテーゼに対する保留パターンの日。
text_locales.es: La adopción OEM + data de producción carry-forward sostiene la premisa de la predicción pero no produce señal nueva hacia el framing de tabla-de-liga IROS octubre / GTC otoño 2026. La entrada de construcción de data center de SoftBank Roze AI agrega un nuevo vertical sin cambiar el arco de programación de conferencias. Día de patrón de espera para la tesis de tabla-de-liga.
text_locales.fil: Ang OEM-adoption + carry-forward production data ay sumusuporta sa premise ng prediction ngunit hindi nagpu-produce ng sariwang signal patungo sa IROS October / GTC Fall 2026 league-table framing. Ang data-center-construction entry ng SoftBank Roze AI ay nagdaragdag ng bagong vertical nang hindi binabago ang conference-programming arc. Holding pattern day para sa league-table thesis.

bridges.text: The OEM-adoption + carry-forward production data sustains the prediction's premise but produces no fresh signal toward the IROS October / GTC Fall 2026 league-table framing. Holding pattern day for this thesis.

text_locales.en: The OEM-adoption + carry-forward production data sustains the prediction's premise but produces no fresh signal toward the IROS October / GTC Fall 2026 league-table framing. Holding pattern day for this thesis.
text_locales.ja: OEM採用 + 引き継がれた生産データは予測の前提を維持するが、IROS 10月 / GTC Fall 2026のリーグテーブル枠組みに向けた新鮮なシグナルは生み出さない。このテーゼにとっては保留パターンの日。
text_locales.es: La adopción-OEM + datos de producción que se mantienen sostienen la premisa de la predicción pero no producen una señal fresca hacia el encuadre de tabla-de-liga de IROS octubre / GTC otoño 2026. Día de patrón de espera para esta tesis.
text_locales.fil: Ang OEM-adoption + carry-forward production data ay nagpapanatili sa premise ng prediction ngunit walang sariwang signal patungo sa IROS October / GTC Fall 2026 league-table framing. Holding pattern day para sa thesis na ito.

bridges.text: Figure 03's monthly-doubling shipment ramp at $39B valuation keeps the OEM-adoption-records frame alive as the dominant Physical AI signal. The precondition that vendor-claimed demos are giving way to OEM-adopted production records holds with the same factories, OEMs, and shipment counts as the underlying claim.

text_locales.en: Figure 03's monthly-doubling shipment ramp at $39B valuation keeps the OEM-adoption-records frame alive as the dominant Physical AI signal. The precondition that vendor-claimed demos are giving way to OEM-adopted production records holds with the same factories, OEMs, and shipment counts as the underlying claim.
text_locales.ja: Figure 03の月次倍増出荷ランプ(390億ドル評価額)は、OEM採用記録のフレームを、支配的なPhysical AIシグナルとして生かし続けている。ベンダー主張のデモがOEM採用の生産記録に道を譲りつつあるという前提条件は、根底にある主張と同じ工場、OEM、出荷数で維持されている。
text_locales.es: La rampa de envios de duplicacion mensual de Figure 03 a valuacion $39B mantiene vivo el marco de records-de-adopcion-OEM como la senal dominante de Physical AI. La precondicion de que los demos vendor-claimed estan dando paso a records de produccion adoptados-por-OEM se mantiene con las mismas fabricas, OEMs, y conteos de envio que el claim subyacente.
text_locales.fil: Ang monthly-doubling shipment ramp ng Figure 03 sa $39B valuation ay pinapanatili buhay ang OEM-adoption-records frame bilang dominant Physical AI signal. Ang precondition na ang vendor-claimed demos ay nagbibigay-daan sa OEM-adopted production records ay nananatili kasama ang parehong factories, OEMs, at shipment counts gaya ng underlying claim.

bridges.text: Figure 03's S-curve plus Atlas + Optimus deployment cadences are exactly the OEM-adopted production records the prediction expects to feed the IROS / GTC league tables; the underlying empirical pipeline is filling on schedule.

text_locales.en: Figure 03's S-curve plus Atlas + Optimus deployment cadences are exactly the OEM-adopted production records the prediction expects to feed the IROS / GTC league tables; the underlying empirical pipeline is filling on schedule.
text_locales.ja: Figure 03 の S 字曲線に Atlas + Optimus のデプロイ ケイデンスを加えたものは、まさに予測が IROS / GTC リーグテーブルへの供給を見込む OEM 採用の生産記録そのものだ — 根底の経験的パイプラインは予定通り埋まっている。
text_locales.es: La curva-S de Figure 03 más las cadencias de despliegue de Atlas + Optimus son exactamente los registros de producción adoptados por OEMs que la predicción espera alimentar las tablas de liga IROS / GTC; el pipeline empírico subyacente se está llenando según lo previsto.
text_locales.fil: Ang S-curve ng Figure 03 plus ang Atlas + Optimus deployment cadences ang eksaktong OEM-adopted production records na inaasahan ng prediction na magpa-pakain sa IROS / GTC league tables; ang underlying empirical pipeline ay napupuno sa schedule.

bridges.text: Atlas + Optimus deployment cadences are exactly the OEM-adopted production records the prediction expects to feed the IROS / GTC league tables; the underlying empirical pipeline is filling on schedule.

text_locales.en: Atlas + Optimus deployment cadences are exactly the OEM-adopted production records the prediction expects to feed the IROS / GTC league tables; the underlying empirical pipeline is filling on schedule.
text_locales.ja: Atlas + Optimus の配備ケイデンスは、まさに予測が IROS / GTC の league table に給餌されると見込む OEM 採用の生産記録だ; 根底の経験的パイプラインが予定通りに埋まっている。
text_locales.es: Las cadencias de despliegue de Atlas + Optimus son exactamente los récords de producción adoptados por OEM que la predicción espera que alimenten las tablas de liga IROS / GTC; el pipeline empírico subyacente se está llenando según el cronograma.
text_locales.fil: Ang Atlas + Optimus deployment cadences ay eksaktong OEM-adopted production records na inaasahan ng prediction na magpakain sa IROS / GTC league tables; ang underlying empirical pipeline ay napupuno sa schedule.

bridges.text: BMW Group's Plant Leipzig AEON trial under a Physical AI Center of Competence building on Spartanburg Figure 02's 30,000-vehicle and 90,000-parts record alongside Agile Robots' Agile ONE positioning at Hannover Messe 2026 keep production-line records accumulating, while no IROS or GTC league-table methodology surfaces inside the window.

text_locales.en: BMW Group's Plant Leipzig AEON trial under a Physical AI Center of Competence building on Spartanburg Figure 02's 30,000-vehicle and 90,000-parts record alongside Agile Robots' Agile ONE positioning at Hannover Messe 2026 keep production-line records accumulating, while no IROS or GTC league-table methodology surfaces inside the window.
text_locales.ja: BMW GroupのPlant Leipzig AEON試行(Physical AI Center of Competenceの下、Spartanburg Figure 02の30,000台と90,000部品の記録の上に構築)とAgile RobotsのAgile ONE位置付け(Hannover Messe 2026)が、生産ライン記録を蓄積し続ける一方、IROSまたはGTCリーグ・テーブル・メソドロジーはウィンドウ内に表面化しない。
text_locales.es: El ensayo AEON en Plant Leipzig de BMW Group bajo un Physical AI Center of Competence construyendo sobre el récord de Spartanburg Figure 02 de 30,000 vehículos y 90,000 partes junto al posicionamiento de Agile ONE de Agile Robots en Hannover Messe 2026 siguen acumulando récords de línea de producción, mientras que ninguna metodología de tabla de ligas de IROS o GTC aflora dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang BMW Group's Plant Leipzig AEON trial sa ilalim ng Physical AI Center of Competence na bumubuo sa Spartanburg Figure 02's 30,000-vehicle at 90,000-parts record katuwang ng Agile Robots' Agile ONE positioning sa Hannover Messe 2026 ay patuloy na nagdadagdag sa production-line records, habang walang IROS o GTC league-table methodology na lumalabas sa loob ng window.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「Physical AIの生産ライン記録がIROS / GTC 2026でリーグ・テーブル化する」が2026年下半期に始まる。** Siemens Erlangenの**HMND 01 Alpha**(60トート/h × 8h × 90%以上)、BMW SpartanburgのFigure 02(10ヶ月 / 30,000台 / 90,000部品)、BMW LeipzigのAEON(2026年4月トライアル → 夏パイロット)、GXOのDigit(100K以上トート)がすべて同じウィンドウに着地し、Hannover Messe 2026がPhysical AIを初の中心テーマに据えたことで、業界の評価基準は「ベンダー主張のデモ」から**「OEM採用の生産記録」**へとシフトしている。2026年下半期の**IROS(10月)**と**GTC Fall 2026**で、「OEM採用数 × 連続稼働時間 × 取扱部品数 × MTBF」のリーグ・テーブルが始まり、Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEONのトップ5が頂点に立つ。PoC段階で停滞している30社以上は、Q4 2026の資金不足 / 買収 / 撤退に追い込まれる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **"Los récords de líneas de producción de Physical AI se convierten en tablas de clasificación en IROS / GTC 2026" comienza H2 2026.** Con el **HMND 01 Alpha** de Siemens Erlangen (60 totes/h × 8h × 90%+), el **Figure 02** de BMW Spartanburg (10 meses / 30,000 vehículos / 90,000 piezas), el **AEON** de BMW Leipzig (prueba abril 2026 → piloto de verano), y el **Digit** de GXO (100K+ totes) todos llegando a la misma ventana — y Hannover Messe 2026 haciendo de Physical AI su primer tema central — el criterio de evaluación de la industria está cambiando de "demos reclamadas por proveedores" a **"récords de producción adoptados por OEM."** En H2 2026 en **IROS (octubre)** y **GTC Fall 2026**, comienzan las tablas de clasificación para "recuento de adopción OEM × horas de operación continua × piezas manejadas × MTBF", con los cinco principales de Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON en la cima. Las 30+ empresas aún atascadas en fase PoC son empujadas a déficits de financiación / adquisiciones / salidas en Q4 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" ay magsisimula sa H2 2026.** Sa **HMND 01 Alpha** ng Siemens Erlangen (60 tote/h x 8h x 90%+), **Figure 02** ng BMW Spartanburg (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), **AEON** ng BMW Leipzig (Apr 2026 trial -> summer pilot), at **Digit** ng GXO (100K+ totes) na lahat tumatama sa parehong window — at ang Hannover Messe 2026 na ginagawang first central theme ang Physical AI — ang evaluation criterion ng industry ay lumilipat mula sa "vendor-claimed demos" papunta sa **"OEM-adopted production records."** Sa H2 2026 sa **IROS (October)** at **GTC Fall 2026**, magsisimula ang league tables para sa "OEM adoption count x continuous-operation hours x parts handled x MTBF," kasama ang Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five sa itaas. Ang 30+ na kumpanyang nakatigil pa sa PoC phase ay itinutulak sa Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Tesla Optimus capex forces Mag-7 physical-AI 10-Q segment disclosure by H2 2026
nodes.short_label: Tesla Optimus capex forces Mag-7 physical-AI 10-Q segment disclosure by H2 2026
nodes.title: Tesla Optimus capex forces Mag-7 physical-AI 10-Q segment disclosure by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles. In plain language: Tesla is spending big to make a million robots a year — soon Wall Street will demand to see those costs broken out separately. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.fil: Pipilitin ng Tesla Optimus capex ang Mag-7 physical-AI 10-Q segment disclosure pagsapit ng H2 2026

description.en: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles. In plain language: Tesla is spending big to make a million robots a year — soon Wall Street will demand to see those costs broken out separately. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年H2までに、Tesla Q2 2026のFremont Optimus生産ライン構築(レガシーModel S + Model Xラインが第1世代ロボティクス工場の1Mユニット/年向けに段階的に置き換えられる。Optimus 3が2026年夏に$20K-$30Kで発表され、2026年に数百ユニット、2027-2028年までに数千〜数万にランプアップ)、4月28日のApptronik + Jabil Apolloの製造パートナーシップ、Figure 03の1台/時間での生産と夜間完全自律稼働、TeslaのCFOによるEVとロボティクス間のcapex配分のコメンタリーテープが、少なくとも1つのMag-7(当初Tesla;1社以上の兄弟会社 — NVIDIA Isaac、Amazon Robotics、Microsoft)に、SEC命令に先立って物理AI capexを別個のセグメントまたは脚注として10-Qに公表することを強いる。これは2014-2015年にクラウドセグメント開示が最初に自発的に公表され、その後SECが正式化した経緯を反映している。** 強制力は開示前例の拡張だ。クラウドcapexのセグメンテーションは金額が買い手側注目閾値を超えたときに標準となった。Teslaの1Mユニット/年銘板出力での物理AI capex(価格目標で~$25B-$35B年換算)は単一施設でその閾値を越え、Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamicsの商業展開軌道の上に積層される。Q2生産ライン構築 + Optimus 3の夏発表により、2026年9月30日締め期間のTesla 10-Qが自然な最初の開示の場となる。単一のTesla脚注開示からの競争圧力が、1〜2回のファイリングサイクル以内に兄弟Mag-7の開示を引き寄せる。平易な言葉で言えば: Teslaは年間100万台のロボットを作るために大金を費やしている — まもなくウォール街はそれらのコストを別途内訳開示することを要求するだろう。
description.es: **Para H2 2026, la construcción de la línea de producción Optimus en Fremont de Tesla en Q2 2026 (las líneas heredadas Model S + Model X serán retiradas para una planta de robótica de primera generación con capacidad de 1M unidades/año; Optimus 3 se lanza en verano de 2026 a $20K-$30K con cientos de unidades en 2026 ascendiendo a miles y luego decenas de miles para 2027-2028) + la asociación de manufactura Apptronik + Jabil Apollo del 28 de abril + Figure 03 en producción a 1/hora con corridas nocturnas totalmente autónomas + el comentario del CFO de Tesla sobre la asignación de capex entre EV y robótica forzarán a al menos un Mag-7 (Tesla inicialmente; ≥1 hermano — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) a publicar el capex de IA física como un segmento separado o nota al pie en un 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato de la SEC, reflejando cómo la divulgación de segmento de nube se publicó voluntariamente por primera vez en 2014-2015 antes de que la SEC la formalizara.** La función forzante es la expansión del precedente de divulgación: la segmentación de capex de nube se volvió estándar una vez que los montos en dólares cruzaron un umbral de atención del lado comprador; el capex de IA física a la placa nominal de Tesla de 1M unidades/año (~$25B-$35B anualizados al precio objetivo) cruza ese umbral en una sola instalación, apilado sobre la trayectoria de despliegue comercial de Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics. La construcción de la línea de producción Q2 más el lanzamiento de verano de Optimus 3 significa que el 10-Q de Tesla para el período que termina el 30 de septiembre de 2026 es el primer lugar natural de divulgación; la presión competitiva de una sola divulgación de nota al pie de Tesla atraerá una divulgación hermana de Mag-7 dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación. En lenguaje sencillo: Tesla está gastando mucho para fabricar un millón de robots al año — pronto Wall Street demandará ver esos costos desglosados por separado.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (ang legacy Model S + Model X lines na pinapatay para sa 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; ilulunsad ang Optimus 3 sa tag-init ng 2026 sa $20K-$30K na may daan-daang units sa 2026 na lalaki sa libu-libo at sampung-libo pagsapit ng 2027-2028) + ang Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production sa 1/oras na may overnight fully-autonomous runs + ang Tesla CFO commentary tungkol sa capex-allocation sa pagitan ng EV at robotics tape ay magpipilit sa hindi bababa sa isang Mag-7 (Tesla muna; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) na maglathala ng physical-AI capex bilang hiwalay na segment o footnote sa 10-Q bago ang anumang SEC mandate, na sinasalamin kung paano unang inilathala nang boluntaryo ang cloud-segment disclosure noong 2014-2015 bago ito pormal na ginawa ng SEC.** Ang forcing function ay ang pagpapalawak ng disclosure-precedent: naging standard ang cloud capex segmentation kapag ang dollar amounts ay tumawid sa buyside-attention threshold; ang physical-AI capex sa 1M-units/year nameplate ng Tesla (~$25B-$35B annualized sa price target) ay tumatawid sa threshold na iyon sa isang facility, na nakatuon sa Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. Ang Q2 production-line build-out kasama ang Optimus 3 summer launch ay nangangahulugang ang Tesla 10-Q para sa panahong magtatapos sa Sept 30 2026 ay ang likas na unang disclosure venue; ang competitive pressure mula sa isang Tesla footnote disclosure ay magdadala ng sibling Mag-7 disclosure sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles. Sa madaling salita: gumagastos ang Tesla nang malaki upang gumawa ng isang milyong robot bawat taon — malapit nang hingiin ng Wall Street na ihiwalay ang mga gastos na iyon.

summary.en: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles. In plain language: Tesla is spending big to make a million robots a year — soon Wall Street will demand to see those costs broken out separately. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: Tesla starts the Fremont 1M-units/year Optimus line in Q2 2026 with Optimus 3 launching summer 2026 at $20K-$30K.
reasoning.given: Apptronik + Jabil Apollo, Figure 03 at 1/hour with overnight autonomous runs, and Boston Dynamics make humanoid-robotics capex a buyside category.
reasoning.so_that: At least one Mag-7 (Tesla first; NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, or Microsoft to follow) publishes physical-AI capex as a separate 10-Q segment or footnote ahead of any SEC mandate.
reasoning.landing: By H2 2026; Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue.
reasoning.plain_language: Tesla is spending billions to make a million robots a year, so its 10-Q has to break out humanoid-robot costs and the rest of Big Tech will copy it.

because.en: Tesla starts the Fremont 1M-units/year Optimus line in Q2 2026 with Optimus 3 launching summer 2026 at $20K-$30K.
because.ja: Teslaが2026年Q2にFremontの1Mユニット/年Optimusラインを開始し、Optimus 3が2026年夏に$20K-$30Kで発表される。
because.es: Tesla inicia la línea Optimus de Fremont a 1M unidades/año en Q2 2026 con Optimus 3 lanzándose en verano de 2026 a $20K-$30K.
because.fil: Sinisimulan ng Tesla ang Fremont 1M-units/year Optimus line sa Q2 2026 na ilulunsad ang Optimus 3 sa tag-init ng 2026 sa $20K-$30K.

given.en: Apptronik + Jabil Apollo, Figure 03 at 1/hour with overnight autonomous runs, and Boston Dynamics make humanoid-robotics capex a buyside category.
given.ja: Apptronik + Jabil Apollo、Figure 03の1台/時間と夜間自律稼働、Boston Dynamicsがヒューマノイドロボティクスcapexを買い手側カテゴリーにする。
given.es: Apptronik + Jabil Apollo, Figure 03 a 1/hora con corridas autónomas nocturnas, y Boston Dynamics convierten el capex de robótica humanoide en una categoría del lado comprador.
given.fil: Ang Apptronik + Jabil Apollo, Figure 03 sa 1/oras na may overnight autonomous runs, at Boston Dynamics ay ginagawang buyside category ang humanoid-robotics capex.

so_that.en: At least one Mag-7 (Tesla first; NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, or Microsoft to follow) publishes physical-AI capex as a separate 10-Q segment or footnote ahead of any SEC mandate.
so_that.ja: 少なくとも1つのMag-7(まずTesla;NVIDIA Isaac、Amazon Robotics、Microsoftが続く)が、SEC命令に先立って物理AI capexを別個の10-Qセグメントまたは脚注として公表する。
so_that.es: Al menos un Mag-7 (Tesla primero; NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, o Microsoft a seguir) publique el capex de IA física como segmento separado o nota al pie de 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato de la SEC.
so_that.fil: Hindi bababa sa isang Mag-7 (Tesla muna; NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, o Microsoft na susunod) ang maglalathala ng physical-AI capex bilang hiwalay na 10-Q segment o footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate.

landing.en: By H2 2026; Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue.
landing.ja: 2026年H2までに、2026年9月30日締め期間のTesla 10-Qが自然な最初の開示の場。
landing.es: Para H2 2026; el 10-Q de Tesla para el período que termina el 30 de septiembre de 2026 es el primer lugar natural de divulgación.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng H2 2026; ang Tesla 10-Q para sa panahong magtatapos sa Sept 30 2026 ang likas na unang disclosure venue.

plain_language.en: Tesla is spending billions to make a million robots a year, so its 10-Q has to break out humanoid-robot costs and the rest of Big Tech will copy it.
plain_language.ja: Teslaは年間100万台のロボットを作るために何十億ドルも使っているので、その10-Qはヒューマノイドロボットコストを内訳開示する必要があり、Big Techの残りはそれを真似する。
plain_language.es: Tesla está gastando miles de millones para fabricar un millón de robots al año, así que su 10-Q tiene que desglosar los costos de robots humanoides y el resto de Big Tech lo copiará.
plain_language.fil: Gumagastos ang Tesla ng bilyon-bilyon para gumawa ng isang milyong robot kada taon, kaya kailangang ihiwalay ng kanyang 10-Q ang mga gastos sa humanoid robot at gagayahin ito ng iba pang Big Tech.

detail.summary_short: Tesla's Q2 Fremont Optimus build-out at 1M-units/year nameplate, Apptronik + Jabil Apollo, and Figure 03 at 1/hour cross the buyside-attention threshold that drove cloud-segment disclosure in 2014-2015. By H2 2026 at least one Mag-7 is expected to break out physical-AI capex as a 10-Q segment or footnote, with Tesla's Sept 30 filing the natural first venue.

summary_short_locales.en: Tesla's Q2 Fremont Optimus build-out at 1M-units/year nameplate, Apptronik + Jabil Apollo, and Figure 03 at 1/hour cross the buyside-attention threshold that drove cloud-segment disclosure in 2014-2015. By H2 2026 at least one Mag-7 is expected to break out physical-AI capex as a 10-Q segment or footnote, with Tesla's Sept 30 filing the natural first venue.
summary_short_locales.ja: TeslaのQ2 Fremont Optimus構築の1Mユニット/年銘板、Apptronik + Jabil Apollo、Figure 03の1台/時間が、2014-2015年のクラウドセグメント開示を駆動した買い手側注目閾値を越える。2026年H2までに、少なくとも1つのMag-7が物理AI capexを10-Qセグメントまたは脚注として内訳開示することが見込まれ、Teslaの9月30日ファイリングが自然な最初の場となる。
summary_short_locales.es: La construcción Optimus en Fremont de Tesla en Q2a placa nominal de 1M unidades/año, Apptronik + Jabil Apollo, y Figure 03 a 1/hora cruzan el umbral de atención del lado comprador que impulsó la divulgación de segmento de nube en 2014-2015. Para H2 2026 se espera que al menos un Mag-7 desglose el capex de IA física como segmento o nota al pie de 10-Q, con la presentación del 30 de septiembre de Tesla como el primer lugar natural.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Q2 Fremont Optimus build-out ng Tesla sa 1M-units/year nameplate, Apptronik + Jabil Apollo, at Figure 03 sa 1/oras ay tumatawid sa buyside-attention threshold na nag-udyok sa cloud-segment disclosure noong 2014-2015. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, inaasahan na hindi bababa sa isang Mag-7 ang maghihiwalay ng physical-AI capex bilang 10-Q segment o footnote, kung saan ang Sept 30 filing ng Tesla ang likas na unang venue.
