detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles. In plain language: Tesla is spending big to make a million robots a year — soon Wall Street will demand to see those costs broken out separately. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles. In plain language: Tesla is spending big to make a million robots a year — soon Wall Street will demand to see those costs broken out separately. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年H2までに、Tesla Q2 2026のFremont Optimus生産ライン構築(レガシーModel S + Model Xラインが第1世代ロボティクス工場の1Mユニット/年向けに段階的に置き換えられる。Optimus 3が2026年夏に$20K-$30Kで発表され、2026年に数百ユニット、2027-2028年までに数千〜数万にランプアップ)、4月28日のApptronik + Jabil Apolloの製造パートナーシップ、Figure 03の1台/時間での生産と夜間完全自律稼働、TeslaのCFOによるEVとロボティクス間のcapex配分のコメンタリーテープが、少なくとも1つのMag-7(当初Tesla;1社以上の兄弟会社 — NVIDIA Isaac、Amazon Robotics、Microsoft)に、SEC命令に先立って物理AI capexを別個のセグメントまたは脚注として10-Qに公表することを強いる。これは2014-2015年にクラウドセグメント開示が最初に自発的に公表され、その後SECが正式化した経緯を反映している。** 強制力は開示前例の拡張だ。クラウドcapexのセグメンテーションは金額が買い手側注目閾値を超えたときに標準となった。Teslaの1Mユニット/年銘板出力での物理AI capex(価格目標で~$25B-$35B年換算)は単一施設でその閾値を越え、Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamicsの商業展開軌道の上に積層される。Q2生産ライン構築 + Optimus 3の夏発表により、2026年9月30日締め期間のTesla 10-Qが自然な最初の開示の場となる。単一のTesla脚注開示からの競争圧力が、1〜2回のファイリングサイクル以内に兄弟Mag-7の開示を引き寄せる。平易な言葉で言えば: Teslaは年間100万台のロボットを作るために大金を費やしている — まもなくウォール街はそれらのコストを別途内訳開示することを要求するだろう。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para H2 2026, la construcción de la línea de producción Optimus en Fremont de Tesla en Q2 2026 (las líneas heredadas Model S + Model X serán retiradas para una planta de robótica de primera generación con capacidad de 1M unidades/año; Optimus 3 se lanza en verano de 2026 a $20K-$30K con cientos de unidades en 2026 ascendiendo a miles y luego decenas de miles para 2027-2028) + la asociación de manufactura Apptronik + Jabil Apollo del 28 de abril + Figure 03 en producción a 1/hora con corridas nocturnas totalmente autónomas + el comentario del CFO de Tesla sobre la asignación de capex entre EV y robótica forzarán a al menos un Mag-7 (Tesla inicialmente; ≥1 hermano — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) a publicar el capex de IA física como un segmento separado o nota al pie en un 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato de la SEC, reflejando cómo la divulgación de segmento de nube se publicó voluntariamente por primera vez en 2014-2015 antes de que la SEC la formalizara.** La función forzante es la expansión del precedente de divulgación: la segmentación de capex de nube se volvió estándar una vez que los montos en dólares cruzaron un umbral de atención del lado comprador; el capex de IA física a la placa nominal de Tesla de 1M unidades/año (~$25B-$35B anualizados al precio objetivo) cruza ese umbral en una sola instalación, apilado sobre la trayectoria de despliegue comercial de Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics. La construcción de la línea de producción Q2 más el lanzamiento de verano de Optimus 3 significa que el 10-Q de Tesla para el período que termina el 30 de septiembre de 2026 es el primer lugar natural de divulgación; la presión competitiva de una sola divulgación de nota al pie de Tesla atraerá una divulgación hermana de Mag-7 dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación. En lenguaje sencillo: Tesla está gastando mucho para fabricar un millón de robots al año — pronto Wall Street demandará ver esos costos desglosados por separado.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (ang legacy Model S + Model X lines na pinapatay para sa 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; ilulunsad ang Optimus 3 sa tag-init ng 2026 sa $20K-$30K na may daan-daang units sa 2026 na lalaki sa libu-libo at sampung-libo pagsapit ng 2027-2028) + ang Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production sa 1/oras na may overnight fully-autonomous runs + ang Tesla CFO commentary tungkol sa capex-allocation sa pagitan ng EV at robotics tape ay magpipilit sa hindi bababa sa isang Mag-7 (Tesla muna; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) na maglathala ng physical-AI capex bilang hiwalay na segment o footnote sa 10-Q bago ang anumang SEC mandate, na sinasalamin kung paano unang inilathala nang boluntaryo ang cloud-segment disclosure noong 2014-2015 bago ito pormal na ginawa ng SEC.** Ang forcing function ay ang pagpapalawak ng disclosure-precedent: naging standard ang cloud capex segmentation kapag ang dollar amounts ay tumawid sa buyside-attention threshold; ang physical-AI capex sa 1M-units/year nameplate ng Tesla (~$25B-$35B annualized sa price target) ay tumatawid sa threshold na iyon sa isang facility, na nakatuon sa Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. Ang Q2 production-line build-out kasama ang Optimus 3 summer launch ay nangangahulugang ang Tesla 10-Q para sa panahong magtatapos sa Sept 30 2026 ay ang likas na unang disclosure venue; ang competitive pressure mula sa isang Tesla footnote disclosure ay magdadala ng sibling Mag-7 disclosure sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles. Sa madaling salita: gumagastos ang Tesla nang malaki upang gumawa ng isang milyong robot bawat taon — malapit nang hingiin ng Wall Street na ihiwalay ang mga gastos na iyon.

nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. description.en: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B(前年比+33%); ガイダンス $9.8B(±$300M、前年比+32%); 粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%へ(Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失); MI308中国売上はQ4 約$390MからQ1 約$100Mへ(前期比-75%); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に、4月30日のAAPL Q3 +14〜17%ガイド(コンセンサス9.5%対比)が別建てAIサービスラインなしで発表されたこと + $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープ + $100B AAPL自社株買い権限 + 4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例 + 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JV発表(フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーで収益化)が組み合わさり、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー(中国断崖開示プレッシャーを考慮するとAMDが最有力先駆者; またはNVIDIA / Broadcomが同型として)に対し、SECの強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形(任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目)に倣うことが期待される。** 強制関数は二重の非対称性: AMDのMI308中国崩壊は輸出規制売上開示形状を強い、AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップはAI売上開示形状を強いる; 最もクリーンなIRパスは両者を同時に出荷することである。5月5日の決算が自然なアンカー; AMD CFOのコメンタリーが先行指標。NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーにより1〜2回の決算サイクル以内で追随する。In plain language: AMDの中国向けAIチップ売上は1四半期で75%も落ちた — ウォール街はチップ企業に対しAI売上を別ラインとして分けて出すよう要求するだろう。In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para Q3 2026, la impresión Q1 2026 de AMD del 5 de mayo — consenso EPS $1.28 / ingresos $9.88B (+33% YoY); guía $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); margen bruto -2pp QoQ a 55% mientras la reversión de la reserva de inventario MI308 de +$360M de Q4 2025 se evapora; ingresos MI308 de China de ~$390M en Q4 a ~$100M en Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + primer despliegue OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 como las señales focales de avance — combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 de abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impresa sin una línea separada de servicios de IA + cinta de capex de IA Big-Tech 2026 de $700B + autorización de recompra AAPL de $100B + precedente de partida única de la tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT del 29 de abril + el anuncio de la JV paralela Anthropic + OpenAI del 4 de mayo que monetiza la IA de frontera como un envoltorio de capital estructurado obliga a al menos un proveedor de chips (AMD como el más probable primer movedor, dada la presión de divulgación del precipicio de China; o NVIDIA / Broadcom como hermanos) a publicar los ingresos exclusivos de aceleradores de IA como una nota al pie de segmento 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato de la SEC; se espera que el precedente de divulgación refleje la forma de la nota al pie de la tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT (partida única con desglose suplementario opcional) en lugar del régimen de divulgación de segmento de nube más invasivo.** La función forzante es la doble asimetría: el colapso de MI308 China de AMD obliga a una forma de divulgación de ingresos por control de exportaciones, mientras que la brecha de ingresos de aceleradores de IA obliga a una forma de divulgación de ingresos de IA; el camino más limpio para relaciones con inversionistas es entregar ambos a la vez. La impresión del 5 de mayo es el ancla natural; el comentario del CFO de AMD es el indicador líder. NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación a través de presión de divulgación competitiva. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% habang nawawala ang Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal; MI308 China revenue mula ~$390M Q4 sa ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment bilang focal forward signals — pinagsama sa Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) na inilathala nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement na nagmu-monetize ng frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper ay pumipilit ng kahit isang chip vendor (AMD bilang pinakamalamang na first mover, dahil sa China-cliff disclosure pressure; o NVIDIA / Broadcom bilang siblings) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate; inaasahan na ang disclosure precedent ay susunod sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item na may opsyonal na supplementary breakout) sa halip na sa mas invasive na cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual asymmetry: pinipilit ng MI308 China collapse ng AMD ang export-control-revenue disclosure shape, habang pinipilit ng AI-accelerator-revenue gap ang AI-revenue disclosure shape; ang pinakamalinis na investor-relations path ay magpadala ng dalawa nang sabay. Ang May 5 print ang natural anchor; ang AMD CFO commentary ang lead indicator. Ang NVIDIA + Broadcom ay susunod sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. In plain language: In plain language:

plain_language.es: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line.
plain_language.fil: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line.

title_locales.en: AMD breaks out AI-accelerator revenue as 10-Q segment footnote by Q3 2026
title_locales.ja: AMDが2026年Q3までに10-Qセグメント脚注でAIアクセラレータ売上を分離開示する
title_locales.es: AMD desglosa los ingresos de aceleradores de IA como nota al pie de segmento del 10-Q para Q3 2026
title_locales.fil: Ihihiwalay ng AMD ang AI-accelerator revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote pagsapit ng Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: AMD's May 5 Q1 print collides with an MI308 China revenue collapse (-75% QoQ) while MSFT's $37B AI run-rate disclosure and the parallel May 4 AI-JV launches harden the disclosure bar. By Q3 2026 at least one chip vendor (AMD likely first; NVIDIA, Broadcom siblings) is expected to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote.

summary_short_locales.en: AMD's May 5 Q1 print collides with an MI308 China revenue collapse (-75% QoQ) while MSFT's $37B AI run-rate disclosure and the parallel May 4 AI-JV launches harden the disclosure bar. By Q3 2026 at least one chip vendor (AMD likely first; NVIDIA, Broadcom siblings) is expected to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote.
summary_short_locales.ja: AMDの5月5日 Q1決算は、MI308中国売上崩壊(前期比-75%)と衝突する一方で、MSFTの$37B AIランレート開示と5月4日の並行AI-JVローンチが開示水準を硬化させている。2026年Q3までに、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー(AMDが最有力; NVIDIA、Broadcomが同型)が、AIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することが期待される。
summary_short_locales.es: La impresión Q1 del 5 de mayo de AMD colisiona con un colapso de ingresos MI308 China (-75% QoQ) mientras la divulgación de la tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT y los lanzamientos paralelos de JV de IA del 4 de mayo endurecen la barra de divulgación. Para Q3 2026 se espera que al menos un proveedor de chips (AMD probablemente primero; NVIDIA, Broadcom hermanos) publique ingresos exclusivos de aceleradores de IA como una nota al pie de segmento 10-Q.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang AMD May 5 Q1 print ay nagbabanggaan sa MI308 China revenue collapse (-75% QoQ) habang ang $37B AI run-rate disclosure ng MSFT at ang parallel May 4 AI-JV launches ay nagpapatigas sa disclosure bar. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, inaasahan na maglathala ang kahit isang chip vendor (AMD likely first; NVIDIA, Broadcom siblings) ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote.

bridges.text: AMD's May 5 Q1 print delivers exactly the bundled-disclosure problem the AMD AI-accelerator footnote prediction (May 4) names: Data Center $5.78B at +57% YoY mixes EPYC CPUs with Instinct GPUs, leaving buyside models unable to triangulate accelerator-only ASP and unit economics. With Lisa Su naming Data Center the primary growth driver, the precondition for an accelerator-segment carve-out is now operative on a real print.

text_locales.en: AMD's May 5 Q1 print delivers exactly the bundled-disclosure problem the AMD AI-accelerator footnote prediction (May 4) names: Data Center $5.78B at +57% YoY mixes EPYC CPUs with Instinct GPUs, leaving buyside models unable to triangulate accelerator-only ASP and unit economics. With Lisa Su naming Data Center the primary growth driver, the precondition for an accelerator-segment carve-out is now operative on a real print.
text_locales.ja: AMDの5月5日 Q1決算は、AMD AIアクセラレーター脚注予測(5月4日)が指摘するバンドル開示問題そのものを着地させる: Data Center $5.78B が前年比 +57% で、EPYC CPUとInstinct GPUを混在させており、バイサイド・モデルはアクセラレーター単独のASPとユニットエコノミクスを三角測量できない。Lisa SuがData Centerを主要成長ドライバーとして命名したことで、アクセラレーター・セグメントの切り出しの前提条件は、現実の決算で運用化されている。
text_locales.es: La impresión Q1 del 5 de mayo de AMD entrega exactamente el problema de divulgación agrupada que la predicción de la nota al pie de aceleradores de IA de AMD (4 de mayo) nombra: Data Center $5.78B a +57% YoY mezcla CPUs EPYC con GPUs Instinct, dejando a los modelos buyside incapaces de triangular ASP solo de aceleradores y la economía unitaria. Con Lisa Su nombrando a Data Center como el motor principal de crecimiento, la precondición para una segmentación específica de aceleradores está ahora operativa en una impresión real.
text_locales.fil: Ang May 5 Q1 print ng AMD ay naghahatid ng eksaktong bundled-disclosure problem na pinangalanan ng AMD AI-accelerator footnote prediction (May 4): Data Center $5.78B sa +57% YoY ay naghahalo ng EPYC CPUs sa Instinct GPUs, na nag-iiwan sa buyside models na hindi makapag-triangulate ng accelerator-only ASP at unit economics. Sa Lisa Su na nagngangalan sa Data Center bilang primary growth driver, ang precondition para sa accelerator-segment carve-out ay aktibo na sa isang real print.

motivation_locales.en: Address the dual disclosure asymmetry — MI308 China collapse plus the AI-accelerator-revenue gap — before the SEC or Wall Street forces a more invasive cloud-segment-style regime.
motivation_locales.ja: 二重の開示非対称性 — MI308中国崩壊 + AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップ — に、SECやウォール街がより侵襲的なクラウドセグメント型体制を強制する前に対処する。
motivation_locales.es: Abordar la doble asimetría de divulgación — colapso MI308 China más la brecha de ingresos de aceleradores de IA — antes de que la SEC o Wall Street fuercen un régimen estilo segmento de nube más invasivo.
motivation_locales.fil: Tugunan ang dual disclosure asymmetry — MI308 China collapse plus AI-accelerator-revenue gap — bago pilitin ng SEC o Wall Street ang mas invasive na cloud-segment-style regime.

readings.relation_narrative: Parallel to 8 other predictions — independent facets, both can be true at once.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B(前年比+33%); ガイダンス $9.8B(±$300M、前年比+32%); 粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%へ(Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失); MI308中国売上はQ4 約$390MからQ1 約$100Mへ(前期比-75%); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に、4月30日のAAPL Q3 +14〜17%ガイド(コンセンサス9.5%対比)が別建てAIサービスラインなしで発表されたこと + $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープ + $100B AAPL自社株買い権限 + 4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例 + 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JV発表(フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーで収益化)が組み合わさり、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー(中国断崖開示プレッシャーを考慮するとAMDが最有力先駆者; またはNVIDIA / Broadcomが同型として)に対し、SECの強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形(任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目)に倣うことが期待される。** 強制関数は二重の非対称性: AMDのMI308中国崩壊は輸出規制売上開示形状を強い、AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップはAI売上開示形状を強いる; 最もクリーンなIRパスは両者を同時に出荷することである。5月5日の決算が自然なアンカー; AMD CFOのコメンタリーが先行指標。NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーにより1〜2回の決算サイクル以内で追随する。In plain language: AMDの中国向けAIチップ売上は1四半期で75%も落ちた — ウォール街はチップ企業に対しAI売上を別ラインとして分けて出すよう要求するだろう。In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q3 2026, la impresión Q1 2026 de AMD del 5 de mayo — consenso EPS $1.28 / ingresos $9.88B (+33% YoY); guía $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); margen bruto -2pp QoQ a 55% mientras la reversión de la reserva de inventario MI308 de +$360M de Q4 2025 se evapora; ingresos MI308 de China de ~$390M en Q4 a ~$100M en Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + primer despliegue OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 como las señales focales de avance — combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 de abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impresa sin una línea separada de servicios de IA + cinta de capex de IA Big-Tech 2026 de $700B + autorización de recompra AAPL de $100B + precedente de partida única de la tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT del 29 de abril + el anuncio de la JV paralela Anthropic + OpenAI del 4 de mayo que monetiza la IA de frontera como un envoltorio de capital estructurado obliga a al menos un proveedor de chips (AMD como el más probable primer movedor, dada la presión de divulgación del precipicio de China; o NVIDIA / Broadcom como hermanos) a publicar los ingresos exclusivos de aceleradores de IA como una nota al pie de segmento 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato de la SEC; se espera que el precedente de divulgación refleje la forma de la nota al pie de la tasa de ejecución de IA de $37B de MSFT (partida única con desglose suplementario opcional) en lugar del régimen de divulgación de segmento de nube más invasivo.** La función forzante es la doble asimetría: el colapso de MI308 China de AMD obliga a una forma de divulgación de ingresos por control de exportaciones, mientras que la brecha de ingresos de aceleradores de IA obliga a una forma de divulgación de ingresos de IA; el camino más limpio para relaciones con inversionistas es entregar ambos a la vez. La impresión del 5 de mayo es el ancla natural; el comentario del CFO de AMD es el indicador líder. NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación a través de presión de divulgación competitiva. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% habang nawawala ang Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal; MI308 China revenue mula ~$390M Q4 sa ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment bilang focal forward signals — pinagsama sa Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) na inilathala nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement na nagmu-monetize ng frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper ay pumipilit ng kahit isang chip vendor (AMD bilang pinakamalamang na first mover, dahil sa China-cliff disclosure pressure; o NVIDIA / Broadcom bilang siblings) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate; inaasahan na ang disclosure precedent ay susunod sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item na may opsyonal na supplementary breakout) sa halip na sa mas invasive na cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual asymmetry: pinipilit ng MI308 China collapse ng AMD ang export-control-revenue disclosure shape, habang pinipilit ng AI-accelerator-revenue gap ang AI-revenue disclosure shape; ang pinakamalinis na investor-relations path ay magpadala ng dalawa nang sabay. Ang May 5 print ang natural anchor; ang AMD CFO commentary ang lead indicator. Ang NVIDIA + Broadcom ay susunod sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line.
